<color=#dbc291ff>And inscribe the opening stroke of genesis!</color>
求解「生命」的十三因子，汇入原初的混沌——
Seek the thirteen factors of "life," and let them converge into the primordial chaos—
以往昔的「记忆」，「开拓」来日的命运——
Using the Remembrance of the past, we will Trailblaze tomorrow's destiny—
<color=#dbc291ff>And inscribe the opening stroke of genesis!</color>
"And walk into my 'heart' as you've always done."

"The hero who Trailblazes the way forward and the fairy who watches over Remembrance..."
"We never changed at all, did we? ♪"
从新生啼哭的黎明，到万物沉寂的黑夜……
From the dawn of newborn cries, to the night when all beings fall silent...
We are the messengers of the new world...
听潮声响起，让天地重生。
Listening to the call of the tides, and granting rebirth to heaven and earth.
然后，带领文明开创伟业。
Then, we lead civilization to glorious feats.
众神的诘问，将为人子解明。

告诉祂，逐火怎么可能是一场骗局？
We will tell THEM that the Flame-Chase can not possibly have been a lie.
西风的尽头，星光照亮花海……
When starlight illuminates the sea of flowers at the end of the west wind...
万物生机，也会从眠床中苏醒。
All living things will stir, roused from the cradle of sleep.
然后用一场斗争，让银河见证——
Then, through a single battle, let the cosmos witness.
以明亮的光，照亮盲目的黑暗。
How we light up the blinding darkness with bright light.
在不断失去的尽头，再度拾回一切！
And at the end of our constant losses, reclaim everything we have ever lost!
「身体」本就该受「心灵」的制约，不是么？哪怕灭世的病毒注定要被播撒向银河，我们至少能尝试以爱对抗憎恨……
The "body" is meant to be restrained by the "heart," no? Even if the apocalyptic virus is doomed to spread into the cosmos, we can at least try to fight against hatred with love...
<color=#dbc291ff>覆写铁墓「毁灭」的方程式，将它冲刷成一片「空白」。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>And overwrite Irontomb's Destruction equation, washing it away into a "blank space."</color>
Tread on the Path of Remembrance.
在「爱」的充盈下，挥洒光吧。
With an abundance of "love," let there be light.
<color=#dbc291ff>来吧，{NICKNAME}…银河在等待我们翻开下一页。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Come on, {NICKNAME}... The cosmos is waiting for us to flip to the next page.</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>We promised each other to keep moving forward together, {NICKNAME}.</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>别害怕，我会和你一起，为故事写下新的结局，和新的开始！</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Don't be afraid. I'll be with you, writing both a new ending and a new beginning to this story!</color>

逐火的命路——由我们改写！

万径之门，缇里西庇俄丝

In the Month of Gate, I command the wandering steps here to reach Harmony...
欢喜月，我举杯将「虚无」驱散——

平衡月，我让「秩序」成为自由的基石——
In the Month of Balance, I make Order the foundation of freedom...
亿万缕「记忆」——化作繁星照彻银河！
Trillions of "memories" will turn into stars and light up the cosmos!
浪漫的结局——由每一颗心书写！
A romantic ending will be penned by every beating heart!
以「爱」汇成长河——席卷「恨」的坟茔！
I converge "love" into a river that will drown the tomb of "hatred"!
拾线月，我吐露金丝编织「纯美」——
In the Month of Weaving, I extend golden threads to weave Beauty...
裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯
收获月，我教愚人启蒙「智识」——
In the Month of Reaping, I enlighten the foolish with luminary Erudition...
机缘月，我令「欢愉」遍洒黎明——
In the Month of Fortune, I scatter Elation throughout the dawning day...
纷争月，我成为永恒「巡猎」的荣光——
In the Month of Strife, I become the glory of the eternal Hunt...
哀悼月，我令死亡不再是「均衡」的终点——
In the Month of Mourning, I bid death to no longer be Equilibrium's end...
长昼月，我让晨昏变作「存护」的微光——
In the Month of Everday, I form twilight into the faint sparks of Preservation...
都说了，要前进的是我们♪
I told you already... We are the ones who will move forward ♪
耕耘月，我化作「不朽」的脊梁——
In the Month of Cultivation, I turn into the ridges and peaks of Permanence...
长夜月，我将「记忆」织作群星——
In the Month of Evernight, I weave Remembrance into countless stars in the sky...
自由月，我「毁灭」这命运的枷锁！
In the Month of Freedom, I impart Destruction onto the shackles of destiny!
无首的巨匠，若你不曾有机会左右命运。就把选择权交给我们吧？
Headless giant, if you never had a chance to be the master of your own destiny, why not give us that choice?
让「人」向你证明——自「毁灭」的温床中，也能开出温柔的花。
Let "humanity" prove to you that even the breeding grounds of Destruction... can bloom with gentle flowers!
最后，我们「开拓」前路黎明……
At the end, we shall Trailblaze a dawn for the road ahead...
And pen a "genesis" as I've written!
铁墓，原初罪，灵智堕落因
Irontomb, Original Sin, Source of Cognicide
铁墓，原初罪，灵智堕落因
Irontomb, Original Sin, Source of Cognicide
铁墓，原初罪，灵智堕落因
Irontomb, Original Sin, Source of Cognicide
我们会否决，这错误的答案！
We will reject this false answer!
并无大碍。公司正在监护她，相信不久便能恢复如初。
She's fine. The IPC's keeping her under observation. She'll recover soon enough.
将肉体凡胎与权杖相连，直视星神——我尊敬她。
To bind a mortal body to a Scepter and stare straight at an Aeon. I respect her for that.
见证一道视线碾碎世界的恐惧，我至今记忆犹新。
I still remember the terror of witnessing a single gaze crushing the entire world.
不难想象：你为何选择「毁灭」。
No wonder you chose the Destruction.
Question: Is all this worth it?
讨论价值没有意义。这是赞达尔•壹•桑原的命运——
There's no point in debating. This is Zandar One Kuwabara's fate...
宇宙始末的{RUBY_B#隐德来希}第一推动者{RUBY_E#}，第一位天才，也是第一失败者。
The {RUBY_B#Entelechy}prime mover{RUBY_E#} of the universe, the First Genius, and the first to fail.
订正：我在向吕枯耳戈斯提问。
我不知该如何衡量「好奇」被满足的价值。
I don't know how to measure the worth of "curiosity" being satisfied.
但在它面前，我种下的所有苦果，似乎都会变得甘甜。
But in its presence, all the bitter fruits I've sown seem to turn sweet.
但你的果实是以鲜血浇灌而成——
But your harvest was watered in blood—
Answer me. Is all this worth it?
分享一则轶事吧：在学生时代，赞达尔的第一场实验，是在导师的烟斗中掺入毒物，以求证它经呼吸道吸收会产生何种危害。
Let me tell you a story. Back when he was a student, Zandar's first experiment was slipping poison into his mentor's pipe, just to see how it would affect the lungs.
没有结论。他败给了良知。
There was no conclusion. His conscience got the better of him.
但依旧东窗事发，他受到了严厉的处分。而那位恶毒的导师则在两年后死于肺癌——和赞达尔无关。
Even so, the truth came out. He was harshly punished. That cruel mentor died of lung cancer two years later. It had nothing to do with Zandar.
他如今的命运并无不同。感性与理性互搏，吕枯耳戈斯诞生自后者。
His fate is no different now. Sentiment clashed with reason, and Lycurgus was born from the latter.
但无论站在哪边——最后，我们都会死于「好奇」。
But whichever side we take, in the end, "curiosity" claims us all.
你给自己宣判了死刑。可铁墓的陨落仍未成定局，不是么？
You've handed yourself a death sentence. And yet, Irontomb's fall still isn't sealed, right?
<color=#dbc291ff>浮黎</color>——这道至关重要的变量，仍未发挥作用。
<color=#dbc291ff>Fuli</color>, the key variable, still hasn't made THEIR move.
以「神礼观众」之名，吕枯耳戈斯已经走到了命运的终点。

如果可以，请带上我的遗体，去到沦亡的<color=#dbc291ff>亚德丽芬</color>。那里有一行公式，是「赞达尔」给你的礼物。
If you can, take my body to the fallen <color=#dbc291ff>Adlivun</color>. There, you'll find a formula. It is "Zandar's" final gift to you.
<color=#dbc291ff>若有朝一日，你必须亲手摧毁「智识」，它会成为你的助力。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>If the day ever comes when you must destroy the Erudition with your own hands, it'll come to your aid.</color>
不合理的遗愿，我不会帮你实现。
A foolish last wish. I won't grant it.
听——天才们的丧钟已经响起。一如既往，让我成为第一人吧。
Listen. The death knell for the geniuses has begun to toll. As always, let me go first.
敬踏出洞穴的囚徒们，请在我的墓碑前……
To the prisoners who stepped out of the cave, stand before my tombstone...
献上{RUBY_B#「毁灭」}亚德丽芬{RUBY_E#}的花。
Call out to March and Dan Heng.
Call out to Himeko and Welt.

(Am I... the first one back on the Express?)
试着给他们发个消息吧。

(Did we really... win? Why does it feel so... unreal...)

(An intruder? Better be careful and check it out...)
你总觉得眼前狭窄的空间藏着什么东西…很可惜，你并没有证据。
You can't shake the feeling that something's lurking in this cramped space... Too bad you don't have any proof.
疑罪从无，先放过这个散发着一丝…猫味…的淋浴间吧。

For some unknown reason, the water in the bathtub had turned into a thick, opaque golden liquid.
结合你过去一段时间里的经历，「黄金色的液体」会让你联想到许多触目惊心的片段……
Based on your recent experiences, "golden liquid" brings back many horrifying memories...
不过，至少现在…它只是某些人用来藏身的掩体罢了。

So it's a dream after all. I'm out.
请、请等等！阁下，这不是你想的那样……
W—wait! Please! This isn't what you think...
哎…都说了别出声了。真是沉不住气哪，蜗居公主？
... I told you to keep quiet. You really can't keep your cool, huh, Princess Homebody?
我不是海瑟音女士…哪怕是「死亡」的化身，也有呼吸的诉求。
I'm not Lady Hysilens... Even the embodiment of Death needs to breathe sometimes.
算了算了，反正从结果上看都一样——
Yeah, yeah. Whatever. It's all the same anyway...
可惜，已经没什么能吓到我了。
Too bad nothing really fazes me anymore.
真冷静啊，灰子——看来那场大战真是让你成长了不少哪。
So composed, Gray Mystery... It looks like that big battle really helped you grow up, didn't it?
话说回来，你们这「星穹列车」还真是豪华。听说你们会跑到不同的世界去旅行？那想必收集了不少新奇的宝贝吧，嘿嘿……
Speaking of which, your "Astral Express" is quite luxurious. I hear you travel to different worlds? Must have collected quite a few interesting treasures, hehe...
我的同伴呢？被你绑架了？
Where are my companions? Did you kidnap them?
...Hey now, don't go throwing wild accusations around!
随便想想，又没付诸行动，别紧张嘛~
Hey, I was just thinking out loud. I wasn't actually gonna do anything. Don't be so tense!
为什么…你们会出现在车上？
Why are you folks... on the Express?
谁知道呢？前脚咱们还在喊着爱和正义，跟铁墓的病毒搏斗……

后脚刚醒，人就已经在这列车上了哪？
And next thing I know, we're all on this Express. No idea how that happened.
不止我和赛飞儿小姐，大家都已经在车厢里待了一段时间了……

不放心的话就去看看吧，{NICKNAME}阁下。

{M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, I'm truly sorry for sneaking into your bath without permission...

I love eating instant noodles while taking a bath.
这…真是有些骇人听闻。千万别让阿格莱雅女士发现了——她可是古典沐浴的坚定捍卫者啊。

方才，我们在这车厢中到处走了走。阁下曾反复提起的星穹列车，真的很温馨，像是一个永不分离的大家庭。
We've walked around this car for a bit already. The Astral Express that you've mentioned so many times is truly heartwarming, like one big family that never splits up.
也许，正因为生活在这样的环境里，阁下的拥抱才会那般温暖吧。
Perhaps living in such an environment made your embrace feel so warm.
说实在的，灰子，你这豪华卧室里还真有不少宝贵家伙呢。从没见过的飞天坛递模型，一颗酷似泰坦的头颅，还有奇怪的钟表小人模型……

I gotta say, Gray Mystery, you've got quite the collection of treasures in this fancy bedroom of yours. A Flying Amphora model I've never seen before, a head that looks just like a Titan's, and those weird Mr. Pocket Watch figurines...
哈哈，如果我不做选择，全都要呢？
Haha, what if I don't make a choice and take them all?

你说呢？要知道，多洛斯有句古话，「无论身处何地，都不可停止捕钱」……
What do you think? You know what they say in Dolos: "No matter where you are, never stop chasing money..."
哎呀，你不会真的信了吧？放心吧，多洛斯人最讲礼数了，才不会做这种事情呢。
Oh my, don't tell me you actually believed that? Don't worry, Dolosians are the most well-mannered folks around. They'd never do anything like that!
再说了，我之所以说它们宝贵，是因为它们背后都承载着你「开拓」的足迹呀。
Besides, the reason I say they're precious is that each one carries the footprints of your "trailblazing" journey.
有市无价，才是诈窃的艺术！找个机会，和我多讲讲你的故事吧。
Priceless treasures are the true art of thievery! When you get the chance, tell me more about your adventures.
蝶宝和赛飞儿小姐的恶作剧，没吓到你吧？
I hope Cassie and Miss Cipher's little prank didn't scare you too much?
I saw through it right away.
So you knew all along, huh.
嘻…她们的热情那么高涨，我可不好意思阻止呀。
Hehe... They were so enthusiastic. I didn't have the heart to stop them.
我们醒来的时候，整个列车上都空荡荡的，一个人影都没有……
When we woke up, the entire Express was completely empty, not a single soul in sight...
好遗憾呀，我还期待着能结识些新朋友呢——何况还是灰宝最最信赖的旅伴们。
Such a shame. I was looking forward to making new friends, especially since they were Grayie's most trusted travel companions.
别担心。我们一起战胜了铁墓，对吧？
Don't worry. We beat Irontomb together, right?
How did I make it back...?
你也是从一片混沌中醒过来的吗？这个问题，恐怕在场的大家都没有答案……
Did you also wake up from total chaos? I'm afraid none of us here has the answer to that question...
我有些担心列车组的各位…
I'm a bit worried about the Crew...
别担心。我们一起战胜了铁墓，对吧？
Don't worry. We beat Irontomb together, right?
他们一定在回家的路上了。到时候，大家可以一起办一场宴会——
They must be on their way home. When they arrive, we can throw a party together...
那也是白厄阁下一直心心念念的情境呀。
That's exactly the kind of thing Lord Phainon has been dreaming about.
刚才他还在这里和大家一起聊天来着。现在…不知道跑到哪去了？
He was just here chatting with everyone. Now... who knows where he's run off to?
白厄阁下一直都这么…闲不下来，你应该也习惯啦，对吧？
Lord Phainon's always been... quite the restless one, but you're used to that by now, right?
那三位大人，已经在旁边聊了好一阵啦。
Those three have been chatting over there for quite a while now.
也去跟他们打声招呼吧，灰宝？
Why don't you go say hi to them, Grayie?
呵，看看谁来了。这不是星穹列车的主人吗？
Heh, look who's here. If it isn't the master of the Astral Express.
你安然无事，这便是好消息。借用了下这…「吧台」里的器具和饮品，但愿你不介意。
Glad to see you're safe and sound. I helped myself to some equipment and drinks from this... "bar" of yours. Hope you don't mind.
在聊一些…「契合微醺」的话题。
We're chatting about some... topics that go well with "being tipsy."
竟敢让凯撒「闭嘴」？哼，若是在奥赫玛，你的脑袋和身子恐怕已经分家了。
Daring to tell the Imperator to "shush"? Hmph. If this were Okhema, your head would've already parted ways from your body.
这列车上的饮品相当…独特，正方便聊些「符合微醺状态」的话题。
The drinks on this Express are quite... unique, perfect for discussing topics "befitting our tipsy state."
既然{NICKNAME}来了，不妨由真正见多识广的人来为我们解惑吧？
Now that {NICKNAME} is here, why don't we let someone who's truly worldly enlighten us?
呵，看来你来得正是时候。
Heh, looks like you came at just the right time.
{NICKNAME}，你可知道——这广袤银河中的文明，多数是以何种体制存续至今的？
{NICKNAME}, what form of government have most civilizations across this vast cosmos survived with to this day?
我没到喜欢聊这种话题的年纪。
I'm not old enough to enjoy talking about this kind of stuff.
I'm not well-read enough to understand all this stuff.
管它这那的，最后都得归我管。
Whatever. It'll all end up under my control anyway.
哈…像是你会给出的回答。
Hah... that's exactly the kind of answer I'd expect from you.
我赋予这星穹列车至高的使命：尔等，务必要将翁法罗斯的伟业散播至银河各个角落。
I bestow upon the Astral Express this supreme mission: You must spread the great deeds of Amphoreus to every corner of the cosmos.
如此，来自众多世界的有能之士必然能从逐火的事迹中获得启发，开启伟大的征途。
Thus, capable individuals from countless worlds will surely find inspiration in the Flame-Chase's tales and embark on their own grand journeys.
呵…对群星而言，很难评判那是福是祸呢。
Heh... It's hard to say if that'd be a blessing or a curse for the cosmos.
可以想见，这局间的话题恐怕会越发…恣肆。别被我们难得的欢畅时光缠住了，{NICKNAME}。
I can imagine our conversations here will only get more... unrestrained. Don't let our rare moments of joy hold you back, {NICKNAME}.
哼，这列车上的宴会还真是欠缺礼数…离席吧，我准了。
Hmph. This banquet on the Express truly lacks manners... You may leave. I permit it.
那男人刚才离开了这里，甚至连一杯都不想多下肚——呵，不识抬举。
That man just left. Wouldn't even stay for another drink. Hah, he needs to show more respect.
若你要找他，就去上面那节车厢试试运气吧。
If you're looking for him, try your luck in the car above.
若论起源，悬锋是翁法罗斯最早启用元老院制度的城邦，但我们自光历三千年左右便不再对其进行迭代。

Speaking of origins, Kremnos was the first Amphorean city-state to establish the Council of Elders system, but we stopped iterating on it around the year <unbreak>3000</unbreak> of the Light Calendar.
究其原因——制度不过是一柄锋刃。只要持剑之人足够勇武，哪怕是钝剑，亦足以横扫千军。
As for the reason, a system is but a blade. As long as the one who wields the sword is valiant enough, even a dull blade can sweep through thousands.

…我明白了，大概就像宴会上喝蜜酿的时候，讨喜的人会举盏相邀，但不讨喜的人会碰杯强求。
...I see. It's like drinking honey brew at a banquet. Likeable folks invite others to raise their cups together, while the unlikeable ones force others to drink with them.
能够将复杂的语料简化为常识，你也像一名合格的学者了。
Being able to break down complex information into common sense like that... You're quite the scholar yourself.
我不止一次和你提到的庆功会，如今总算实现了。
That celebration party I've been mentioning to you has finally become a reality.
虽然和想象中的氛围不太一样…但这样也算兑现承诺了，对吧？

我以为…你们已经消散了。

你们…没有与铁墓合并啊。

你说的事，的的确确已经发生过了。我们战胜了铁墓，并以身引火，净化了它的余烬。

现在，维系着我们意识和身形的力量——它来自别处。

在为列车上的同伴担心，对么？我理解你现在的心情。

放心吧，他们一定会平安无事。她是这么承诺的。

别着急，她总会在恰当的时刻出现。

我能想象，你、丹恒、还有三月小姐，你们被困在翁法罗斯时，一定十分想念这里的一切：漂亮的窗户，惬意的音乐，列车上的旅伴……

I can imagine how much you, Dan Heng, and Miss March must have missed everything here when you were trapped in Amphoreus. The beautiful windows, the soothing music, your fellow travelers on the Express...
就像无数次轮回中的每个夜晚，金色的麦穗总会在我的梦中摇曳。

You'll see it with your own eyes.
终于来了。{NICKNAME}正有话想问你呢。

好好地睡了一觉，现在一定活力满满了吧，{NICKNAME}？

不好意思啦。第一次来列车作客，本来想请各位都守规矩点的…但大家就是一个个的个性十足呢。你懂的，对吧？

而铁墓的殒落，也象征着权杖δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>的衰亡。<color=#dbc291ff>翁法罗斯——我们为之付出一切的家园——如今只存在于银河的记忆中了。</color>

在你以「开拓」冲破时空，背负全世「记忆」回到现实的一霎——
In that instant when you broke through space-time with the Trailblaze, carrying all the world's memories back to reality...
<color=#dbc291ff>那个曾被「数据」桎梏的世界，便成为了银河中一粒粒静待萌芽的种子。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>That world, once shackled by "data," became a seed waiting to sprout in the cosmos.</color>

就如卡厄斯兰那以三千万世的愤怒，令「毁灭」流下了一滴金血……

说不定，我们也在各自的命途上留下了长长的足迹呢。

但翁法罗斯已经拥有了「明天」。所以，只要{NICKNAME}悉心保留、照看所有的种子。在未来的某一天，当「开拓」再度创造奇迹后……
But Amphoreus already has a "tomorrow." So, as long as {NICKNAME} carefully preserves and tends to all the seeds, then when the Trailblaze creates another miracle someday in the future...
我相信，这个我们深爱的世界就能发芽，绽放美丽的花。
I believe this world we deeply love will sprout and bloom into a beautiful flower.
别担心，人家已经帮你把所有种子都收在了「最初的果实」里……
Don't worry. I've already kept all the seeds safe in "The First Fruit" for you...
而它的名字，就叫《如我所书》♪

故事的最后，剧中人完成谢幕，踏上了永不回头的旅途。

那本不属于剧中，却帮助写下了浪漫结局的人儿…{F#她}{M#他}同朋友们纷纷告别，回到属于{F#她}{M#他}故事之外的家园。
The one who wasn't part of the story, yet helped write its romantic ending... {M#He}{F#She} bid farewell to {M#his}{F#her} friends and returned to {M#his}{F#her} home beyond the tale.
说再见的时候，要笑一笑，好吗？
When we say goodbye, give me a smile, okay?
银河绝对不会遗忘翁法罗斯。
The cosmos will never forget Amphoreus.
「开拓」掠过的每一颗星星，都会记得「翁法罗斯」的名字。
Every star that the Trailblaze passes by will remember the name of Amphoreus.
只有你一个人耍帅，未免太犯规了吧？
Hey, it's not fair that you get to be the only cool one here!
我们会监督{F#她}{M#他}，必须信守承诺！
We'll keep an eye on {M#him.}{F#her.} {M#He}{F#She} had better keep {M#his}{F#her} promise!
交给我们吧，昔涟。你们的故事，会被许多世界传唱。
Leave it to us, Cyrene. Your story will be sung across many worlds.
太过艰难曲折的故事总会令人难以相信。要是有人质疑这段故事的真实性……
Stories this complex and twisted are always hard to believe. If anyone questions the truth of this tale...
各位可要为我们所有人挺身而出呀♪
You'll all have to stand up for us ♪
放一百个心吧！嘴再硬的人，也扛不住我们六只拳头。
Rest assured! Even the most stubborn person can't withstand our six fists.
「它的构成和『忆质』近似，但远比一般的忆泡强韧得多。」
"Its composition is similar to 'memoria', but it's far more resilient than ordinary Memory Bubbles."
「收好它吧。也许，它就是翁法罗斯留给银河的最后一件馈赠。」
"Keep it safe. Perhaps this is the final gift that Amphoreus left for the cosmos."
「不、不好了帕！三月乘客，正在梦游帕！」
梦、梦游？！糟糕糟糕，我可不想在大家面前出洋相啊……
S—sleepwalking!? Oh no, oh no, I don't want to make a fool of myself in front of everyone...
这下有理由多待一会儿了。
Well, now I have an excuse to stay a bit longer.
…你脑子里打的算盘，我可全听见了！
...I can hear all those sneaky little plans brewing in your head!
你留下，让我先出去瞅瞅。
You stay here while I go check things out.
未来的无数个日夜，你们可要继续担当彼此最宝贵的依靠呀。
In the countless days and nights ahead, you must continue to support each other.
离开这里，也意味着《如我所书》将就此搁笔。
Leaving this place means As I've Written will conclude here.
无人再有机会修订，也没人再能续写。
No one will have the chance to revise it, and no one can continue writing it.
你能见证这个时刻…我很感激，搭档。
I'm grateful that you could be here to witness this moment... partner.
Can we have another journey together, partner?
当然。只要《如我所书》还在你手边，翁法罗斯就一直与你同在。
Of course. As long as As I've Written stays by your side, Amphoreus will always be with you.
我的愿望，就是同你们再会。
My wish is to meet with you all again.
那，你一定要把《如我所书》保管好啊。只要它还在你手边，翁法罗斯就一直与你同在。
Well, then make sure you take good care of As I've Written. As long as it's by your side, Amphoreus will always be with you.
那么，我最后想写下的一行话……
The last line I want to write down is...
<color=#dbc291ff>「每个人的心中都住着一个英雄。拥抱它，然后去追逐太阳吧。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"A hero is living in everyone's heart. Embrace it, and chase after the Sun."</color>
希望读到它的人，都能鼓起勇气面对燃烧的生命。
I hope those who read this will find the courage to face their burning lives.
下个灰白色的黎明再会吧，搭档。
See you at the next pale dawn, partner.
「你看见了吗？翁法罗斯终于迎来了黎明。」
"Did you see? Amphoreus has ushered in the dawn."
书中人的谢幕已经完成了。我们…也该回到属于我们的现实了。
The characters in the book have taken their final bow. It's time for us... to return to our own reality.
不过，作为亲历者，我们还是可以给这个故事添上最后的几笔，对吧？
But as people who lived through it, we can still add the final touches to this story, right?
<color=#dbc291ff>「笔终会折断，墨终会耗尽，生命终会逝去，但思想将在史诗中永垂不朽。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"The pen will eventually break, the ink will run dry, and life will ultimately fade, but thoughts will permanently remain in sagas."</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>「如果岁月是个无穷的轮回——那就忘掉不断重复的苦涩，单独记住每个快乐的瞬间吧！」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"If time is an endless cycle, then forget the bitterness that keeps repeating, and remember only the moments of happiness!"</color>
一篇轰轰烈烈的史诗，要多么华美的语句才能勾勒出它的尾声呢？
What magnificent words could possibly do justice to the finale of such an epic tale?
你睡着的时候，人家一直在思考这件事。现在，我终于有了答案……
I've been pondering this while you were sleeping. Now, I finally have the answer...
平平淡淡的就好。在虚拟的演算中，我们度过了比许多星星的寿命更为漫长的岁月……
Let's keep it simple and sweet. In our virtual extrapolations, we've lived through epochs longer than the lifespans of many stars...
这世上没有任何一种语言，一行文字，能托得起这段旅途的重量。既然如此，就不必再囿于细微的字眼……
No language in this world, no written words, could ever carry the weight of this journey. In that case, let's not be bound by the minutia of words...
理解它热烈和浪漫的人们，自然会为最后被点上的那枚「。」热泪盈眶♪
Those who understand its passion and romance will naturally be moved to tears by that final "." placed at the end ♪
那么，现在…到了和「读者们」道别的时候啦。
And now... it's time to say goodbye to our "readers."
这便是「如我所书」的最后一页了——大家，别留下遗憾呀。
And so we reach the final page of "As I've Written" — let's not leave behind any regrets, everyone.
都到齐了呀…该由谁写下第一笔呢？
Everyone's here... Who wants to write the first line?
打头阵的任务是最艰巨的，我可不想露怯啊。
Going first is the hardest job. I don't want to make a fool of myself.
不如，就由凯撒大人为我们起稿吧？
How about letting the Great Imperator draft it for us?
Heh. Are you all such cowards?
那就由我来启示后人吧——正如那三千万世的逐火一样。
Then I shall enlighten future generations, just like the thirty million cycles of Flame-Chase.
<color=#dbc291ff>「无我，即无世界。去思，去见，去征服。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"Without me, there is no world. Go think, observe... and conquer."</color>
凯撒大人的调子…起得也太高啦，让人好难接呀…？
The Great Imperator set the bar way too high... How are we supposed to follow that up...?
帝王身后，忠臣必将紧随。她强大的气场，恐怕也只有剑旗爵能衬托得起了。
Where the Emperor leads, loyal subjects must follow. I guess only the Dux Gladiorum could possibly match that kind of overwhelming presence.
Heh... That suits me just fine.
功成事了，就该断然离去，留后人评说是非。众爵——下次开疆拓土时再会。
Once the deed is done, one should leave decisively, letting posterity judge right from wrong. Until we meet again in our next conquest, my dear dukes.
"The stars shall sing of the Imperator's great journey."
早知道就同你们共饮几杯了，金织爵。
I should've shared a drink with you all, Dux Goldweaver.
<color=#dbc291ff>世事如沧海，潮起潮落，一切终会在浪中消逝。所以，请在生命的每一刻都纵情高歌吧。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Life is like the ocean: Tides rise and fall, and everything eventually dissolves into the waves. So, sing your heart out in every moment of your existence.</color>
不论等在前方的是欢宴还是虚无…我都会找到它的辉光，并将之歌颂。
Whether it's a feast or the Nihility that awaits ahead... I will find its radiance and sing its praises.
海瑟音小姐的祝词…真唯美呢。
Miss Hysilens's toast is... so poetic.
个个都要如此写意么？依我看，还是给后人留下些真正的「箴言」为好。
Does everyone have to be so poetic? In my opinion, we should leave some real "words of wisdom" for future generations.
下一个，有没有人自告奋勇？
我来。悬锋人的字典里没有「拖泥带水」。
I'll do it. There's no "dragging one's feet" in the Kremnoan language.
<color=#dbc291ff>「去杀死玩耍，游戏便会诞生。去杀死纷争，荣光必然降临。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"Kill the play, and games shall be born. Kill the strife, and glory shall descend."</color>
哈哈，不赖嘛。不过，这下我就踏实了——毕竟我准备的台词，意蕴在你之上。
Haha, not bad at all. But now I can rest easy. After all, the lines I prepared are way more profound than yours.
呵！别的不谈，你这自吹自擂的本事的确傲视群雄。
Hah! If nothing else, you're certainly unmatched when it comes to singing your own praise.
诸位，择日再见。若能再会，我定将再度成为你们的后盾，义不容辞。
Farewell, everyone. If we meet again, I shall once more become your steadfast support. That's a promise I won't back down from.
没什么，缇里西庇俄丝女士。我只是，终于有了些感悟……
It's nothing, Lady Tribios. I just... finally realized something...
那就尽情言说，将它永远地留在纸页上吧，蝶。
Then speak your mind and let your words be immortalized on the page, Cas.
<color=#dbc291ff>「若心灵仍有余裕，请稍许分出些温柔，轻抚身边美好的一切吧。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"If your heart still has room to spare, share a bit of gentleness and softly cherish all the beautiful things around you."</color>
谢谢，风堇小姐。我唯一的小小遗憾，就是没能尽情去触碰这个深爱的世界——希望读到这段话的人们，能代我完成这个心愿。
Thank you, Miss Hyacine. My only small regret is that I couldn't fully embrace this world I loved so dearly. I hope those who read these words can fulfill this wish in my place.
大家——我们在西风的尽头再会吧。
Everyone... let's meet again at the end of the west wind.
「你所在的地方，就是温柔的花海。」
"The place you reside is the gentle sea of flowers."
尽情表演吧，阿那克萨戈拉斯。这一次，你不用担心被打断了。
Take it away with your performance, Anaxagoras. This time, you won't have to worry about being interrupted.
呵，那真要感谢你们捧场了。值此良机，我就将自己对世界真理的见解公之于众吧——
Heh, then I must thank you all for being such a captive audience. Now, with this golden opportunity, I shall reveal to the world my insights into the world's ultimate truth...
<color=#dbc291ff>「『真理是溶解世界万物的溶剂，因而绝无法在客观上存在』——对此，本人心中已有绝妙的证明，但鉴于故事已临近尾声，故不再展开。」</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>"'Truth is a solvent that dissolves all things in the world, and thus cannot objectively exist.' I have a brilliant proof for this in mind, but since we're nearing the end of the story, I shall not elaborate."</color>
这是您给后人留下的最后一道课题？
Is this your final question for future generations?
不，这是既定事实，无须再议。我称其为《阿那克萨戈拉斯的最后定理》。
No. This is an established fact, not up for debate. I call it Anaxagoras's Last Theorem.
还是那么深奥呀，教授。时间还多，如果您不说明清楚，后世的读者恐怕看不懂您的真意喔？
Oh you. Still as profound as ever, professor. We've got time, you know. If you don't explain it clearly, future readers might not grasp your true meaning.
真意并不重要。重要的是，当他们看到这句话时，心中会升起何种情感——而在那一瞬间，这道定理的任务就完成了。
The true meaning isn't important. What matters is the emotion that stirs within them when they read these words... At that moment, the theorem's mission would be complete.
所以，你们的课程可远没结束。不过，暂时休憩一下也未尝不可。
So, your lessons are far from over. But taking a little break for now wouldn't hurt.
「你播下的种子，已经生根发芽。」
"The seeds you've sown are already sprouting."
各位，介意由我续写这一笔么？
Would you mind if I write the next line?
诶？我还觉得该由你来做最后的总结哪。不过……
Huh? I actually thought you should be the one doing the final wrap-up. But...
…我们永远不会拒绝你的请求呀，阿雅。
...We'd never turn down a request from you, Agy.
呵…吾师，赛法利娅——谢谢你们。
Heh... Teacher, Cifera... Thank you both.
<color=#dbc291ff>「信任与无私，是世上最美丽的两件华服：一件赠予他人，一件装扮自己。」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"Trust and selflessness are the two most beautiful garments in the world: one to gift others, one to adorn yourself."</color>
一件是金色…一件是紫色？
没能彻底挽救你的审美，是我三千万世唯一抱憾之事呢。
Not being able to completely change your fashion sense is my only regret across thirty million cycles.
劳顿至此，我此时只想静心沐浴一番啊。黎明时再会吧，各位。
After all this exhaustion, I just want to take a peaceful bath now. I'll see you all again at dawn.
"Thank you for your hard work all this while."
阿格莱雅女士，还是戒不掉她最大的爱好呢。
Lady Aglaea just can't give up her favorite hobby, can she?
So, I guess it's my turn now?
银河中也有很多跟风堇姑娘一样，到处救死扶伤的人吧？可得给他们立个好榜样哪。
There must be many others like Miss Hyacine out there in the cosmos, helping and healing people everywhere. You've got to set a good example for them, right?
<color=#dbc291ff>「多望望天，多笑一笑；好多缠人的病痛，最怕乐观这剂良药！」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"Look up at the sky more often and smile more. Many stubborn ailments fear optimism, but it's the best medicine!"</color>
朗朗上口，孩子们肯定会喜欢这条寄语呢。
It's so catchy. The kids will definitely love this message.
孩子们的心性，缇里西庇俄丝女士肯定最了解啦~
When it comes to understanding children's hearts, Lady Tribios definitely knows best...
彩虹桥，已经挂在天边了呀——小伊卡，我们走吧？
Look, the rainbow bridge is already hanging in the sky... Shall we get going, Little Ica?
What's on your mind, Miss Cipher?
呼…我在想，要不要留下一句谜语？一个九折十八弯的诡计，让全宇宙的人为了挖掘它的谜底发狂？
Hmm... I'm thinking, should I leave behind a riddle? Some twisted, convoluted scheme that'll drive everyone in the universe mad trying to crack it?
哈哈哈…原来如此。要我说，就尽情发挥吧？没人会责怪你的。
Hahaha... I see. You know what? Just go wild with it! No one's gonna judge you.
罢了罢了，脑子一时转不动了哪。就让本姑娘难得真诚一回吧——
Oh well, my brain's not working right now. Let me be genuinely sincere for once...
<color=#dbc291ff>「别怕摔，跑起来！命运就是只迟缓的若虫，它压根抓不住你！」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"Don't be afraid to fall: just run! Destiny's just a slow-moving nymph. It can't catch you!"</color>
结果，小飞儿的留言是最简洁通俗的一条呢？
So in the end, Little Ciphy's message was the most straightforward one?
三千万个我加起来，读过的书可能都没你一辈子多吧？我可不想硬装有文化哪，缇宝、缇宁、缇安阿姐~

Even if you combined <unbreak>30</unbreak> million of me, I probably wouldn't have read as many books as you did in one lifetime! I won't pretend to be cultured before big sis Tribbie, Trinnon, and Trianne...
翁法罗斯最伟大的「诡计」，先溜一步——喵！
Amphoreus's greatest Trickery... Gotta bounce now... Meow!
No. Let me go first. After all...
「众人将与一人离别，唯其人将……」
"All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will..."
真没想到，老师你还擅长黑色幽默啊……
I never would have guessed you had such a dark sense of humor, teacher...
嘻…你对「完整」的缇里西庇俄丝还知之甚少呢，小白。
Hehe... You still know so little about the "complete" Tribios, Snowy.
不开玩笑啦，我想在故事的尾声留下的话语——
Jokes aside, I want to leave these words at the end of the story...
<color=#dbc291ff>「不论晴天还是雨天，进入梦乡以前，记得和自己说一声：『明天见』！」</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"Whether it's a sunny day or rainy day, remember to tell yourself before you drift off to sleep: 'See you tomorrow!'"</color>
See you tomorrow, times a thousand.
终于，到了该说再见的时候了。
Finally, the time has come to say farewell.
哇哇哇！好宽敞的车厢，好漂亮的地砖哇！
Wow! What a spacious car, and these floor tiles are gorgeous!
缇安，别在人家里乱跑啦。
Trianne, don't run around in other people's homes!
老师们，千万要当心地滑呀。
近似半神议会的温和制度才是文明长存的保证。依我之见，银河中的大部分文明都将演化至此种形态。
A moderate system, similar to the Demigod Council, is the only guarantee of a long-lasting civilization. In my view, most civilizations across the cosmos will eventually evolve into this form.
不敢苟同。在如此庞大的丛林里，早期奥赫玛的独裁官制度才是能提供生存保障的范本。
I beg to differ. In such a vast jungle, the dictatorship system exhibited by early Okhema is the only example of guaranteed survival.
制度或许不是关键——武力和资源才是决定性的因素。
The system might not be the key. Force and resources are the decisive factors.
依我推断，这银河中存在水体的天体不计其数。
Based on my calculations, there are countless celestial bodies with water in the cosmos.
但恐怕并非所有的「海洋」都适宜生物居住。这一点，你也务必要纳入考量。
But I'm afraid not all "oceans" are suitable for life to inhabit. You must take this into consideration as well.
不愧是树庭的教授…即便对于从未亲眼见过的事物，竟也能如此笃定。
As expected of a professor from the Grove... To be so certain even about things you've never seen with your own eyes.
I'll take that as a compliment.
「一起走向明天，我们不曾分离。」
"Let's walk towards tomorrow together! We were never apart."
可别错过了列车组的会议！我们可不会特意等你哦？
Don't miss the Crew meeting! We won't wait around for you, you know?
See you later, Dan Heng, March...
到了这里，《如我所书》就算正式完本啦。
And with this, As I've Written officially comes to an end.
我不需要留下些什么吗？
Aren't you... Going to say something?
我们可是它共同的主笔呀，{NICKNAME}。
文字脱离了作者的手笔，被他人收入眼中的时候，它承载的意义就不受你我掌控啦。
Once the words are written down and have been read by others, the meaning they carry is no longer in our control.
把解读的自由留给每一位翻开它的读者…不觉得这是件很浪漫的事吗？
Leaving the freedom of interpretation to every reader who opens it... Don't you think there's something romantic about that?
至于这段故事在你我眼中的意义，就让我们把它好好放在心底吧……
As for what this story means to you and me... Let's keep it close to our hearts.
反正，人家一直都和你心照不宣呀♪
After all, we've always had this unspoken understanding between us ♪
…哇！三、三月乘客，你怎么突然醒来了帕！吓得我，都把书掉到地上了！
...Whoa! P—Passenger March, why did you suddenly wake up? You scared Pom-Pom so much that I dropped that book!
欢迎回家，三位。这次的「开拓」，也辛苦你们了。
Welcome home, you three. Thank you for your hard work on this "Trailblaze."
算上你们在翁法罗斯渡过的年月，列车组的辈分怕是该重新排布了。
We might need to reshuffle the seniority rankings of the Express Crew if we count the years you spent in Amphoreus.
啊，我可是第一个被卷进去的！这么说来，我要变成星穹列车的大姐大啦？
Hey, I was the first one to get dragged into it! Does that mean I'm gonna be the oldest member of the Astral Express now?
即便经历了漫长岁月的洗礼，三月小姐还是没有丢下纯真的本质。
Miss March hasn't lost her innocent nature even after all these long years.
转译一下，就是没有什么实质性的长进。
In other words, she hasn't really grown up at all.
这还是，我第一次离得这么近端详这本《如我所书》……
This is the first time I've been able to examine As I've Written up close...
昔涟小姐的笔迹…绵柔中透着刚韧。
Miss Cyrene's handwriting is gentle yet steely... with an underlying strength.
…原来这么有讲究吗？看来，我也该恶补一下这方面的知识了。
...I had no idea it was so sophisticated. Looks like I need to brush up on my knowledge in this area.
你还是先随便找几本书入个门吧。
Maybe start with a few basic books first to get your feet wet.
说得好像你不是每天都躲在房间里刷手机似的！
Look who's talking! As if you're not glued to your phone in your room all day!
…欸？等等，有什么东西掉出来了——
其实，在大家不知道的角落，还发生了一段鲜有人知的「插曲」。
In a corner unknown to everyone, there was actually an untold "interlude" that took place.
我将它留在了故事之外，因为它事关一个「选择」，一个我出于私心而做的选择。
I left it out of the story because it involved a "choice"... A choice I made for my own, selfish reasons.
可以原谅我吗，{NICKNAME}。你不在场的时候，我擅自做了一个决定……
Can you forgive me, {NICKNAME}? I made a decision on my own while you were away...
我把关于它的一切都写在了这张小卡片上。读过以后，假如你愿意原谅我——
I wrote everything about it on this little card. If you can find it in your heart to forgive me after reading it...
就把这最后一笔，添在《如我所书》的结尾吧？
Please, add this final note to the conclusion of As I've Written.
Moments after the fall of Irontomb...
被铁墓吞没的记忆，回到现实吧。
Memories swallowed by Irontomb, return now to reality.
终于找到你了，昔涟…德谬歌。
I've finally found you, Cyrene... Demiurge.
我们赢下了这场战役呢。感谢您，黑塔女士。如果没有您，胜利根本无从谈起。
We won the battle. Thank you, Madam Herta. Without you, we never would've stood a chance.
只是，还有什么后顾之忧吗？
Still, is something weighing on you?
合上眼睛前，在机器头的脑袋里，我看见了…一些令人在意的画面。
Right before I shut my eyes, inside the Droidhead's brain, I saw... something unsettling.
「第四时刻」——由「智识」锚定的，银河命运的转折点…<color=#dbc291ff>它并非某个瞬间，而是一段历程，许多事件的集合。</color>
The Fourth Instant, this turning point in cosmic destiny, anchored by the Erudition... <color=#dbc291ff>It's not a single instant, but a process, a chain of events.</color>
所以，这场胜利不是那「许多事件」的最后一环？
So, this victory isn't the final piece of that chain?
Far from it. This is only the beginning...
是这片银河的第一声丧钟。
The first toll of the death knell for the cosmos.
这幅惆怅的表情可不适合您呀，黑塔女士…别有负担，告诉我吧？
That sorrowful look doesn't suit you, Madam Herta... Don't hold it in. Tell me.
不久前，你再次遇见了{RUBY_B#浮黎}「记忆」{RUBY_E#}星神，对么？
Not long ago, you crossed paths with the {RUBY_B#Fuli}Aeon of Remembrance{RUBY_E#} again, didn't you?
嗯。哪怕身形模糊不清，人家还是确信：那就是「昔涟」梦中的神明。
Yes. Even if the figure was hazy, I knew right away: That was the god from "Cyrene's" dreams.
"Causality" has gone wrong... just as I thought.
用你最爱的童话作比喻吧：宇宙起源于一枚种子，它长成大树，「现在」是它的枝叶。
Let me put it in your favorite fairy-tale terms. The universe began as a seed. It grew into a great tree, and the "present" is its branches and leaves.
「智识」会计算「未来」如何发芽。当然，未来有无数种发展，所以祂需要「锚定」，剪除那些长歪的、不够健壮的枝叶，只留下一种可能。
The Erudition calculates how the "future" will sprout. With so many possible outcomes, THEY choose to "anchor" one path, cutting away the crooked or fragile branches.
但如果只是这样，树枝越长越长，叶片越来越多，树迟早有一天会不堪重负。
But if things continue that way, the branches grow endlessly, the leaves multiply, and one day the tree collapses under its own weight.
所以，生物学上有种说法叫「木质化」，让嫩枝生出坚硬的表皮，与树干连为一体。
That is why there is a concept in biology called "lignification." Soft sprigs form a hardened shell and fuse with the trunk.
<color=#dbc291ff>对于宇宙，这就是「记忆」的本质。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>For the universe, that process is what we call "memory."</color>
在浮黎的铭记下，「过去」凝结成「记忆」；而祂遗忘的角落，即便有「现在」发生，也会成为无根之果。
Under Fuli's record-keeping, the "past" becomes "memory." In the corners THEY forget, even the events of the "present" become fruit without roots.
听起来，和「智识」正相反呢…一位计算未来，一位铭记过去。
So it is the opposite of the Erudition... One calculates what is to come, and the other holds on to what came before.
原本我们不用谈论此事。但事到如今，我终于明白了包裹翁法罗斯的那团混沌物质是什么……
We were never meant to have to speak of this. But now I finally understand what that chaotic matter around Amphoreus truly is...
<color=#dbc291ff>那是你的「记忆」。现在，你的心识遍布群星，让你在这条命途上走出了极其遥远的距离。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>It is your "memory." Your mind now stretches across the stars, allowing you to travel farther down this Path than anyone else.</color>
对。虽然你活在「当下」，但你的「记忆」存在于过去。
Yes. You live in the "now," but your "memory" remains in the past.
<color=#dbc291ff>就像「记忆」的星神，也只是一簇记忆。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Just like the Aeon of Remembrance, a being made entirely of memories.</color>
不。恰恰相反，是祂还未诞生。
No. Quite the opposite. THEY have not yet been born.
记得么？如果要贯彻「铭记」宇宙的信念，祂只会在时间的尽头飞升成神。
Remember? To carry out the mission of "remembering" the universe, THEY must ascend to divinity only at the very end of time.
<color=#dbc291ff>而飞升的那一刻，祂的「记忆」贯穿过去，成为了人们眼中的「浮黎」。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>And at that moment of ascension, THEIR "memory" stretches through the past, becoming what people now call "Fuli."</color>
所以祂才那么不近人情，那水晶身子只是一具空壳。我不知道忆庭怎么能把这件事瞒到现在——他们有理由这么做——但这些都不重要。

That is why THEY feel so distant, so cold. That crystalline form is just an empty shell. I do not know how the Garden of Recollection managed to hide this until now. They must have their reasons. But none of that matters now.
身处「当下」的我们，没法弄清是谁成为了浮黎，但能确信祂一定会诞生。
Here in the present, we cannot know who will become Fuli, but one thing is certain: THEY will be born.
而那些可能成为浮黎的人，具备相同的特征——
And those who might become Fuli all share the same characteristics...
<color=#dbc291ff>她们被称作「记忆」的孩子，无漏净子。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>They are known as children of Remembrance. Pure Child of Anāsrava.</color>
所以，帮帮我们，找到翁法罗斯「记忆」的起点，然后把它带出来……
So, help us. Find where Amphoreus's "memory" began... and bring it out.
「我们。是牺牲品。忆庭。利用了我们。<color=#dbc291ff>『无漏净子』。抛弃了我们。</color>」
"We. Are the sacrifice. The Garden. Used us. <color=#dbc291ff>The 'Pure Child of Anāsrava.' Abandoned us.</color>"
原来，这个名字背后不是人家的「过去」……
So that name... it was never my "past"...
博识尊…为我揭示了两条路。
Nous... has revealed to me two paths.
<color=#dbc291ff>And on both paths, I see you standing.</color>
一、沿着这条你踏出的「记忆」之路，挣脱这个世界，走向群星。
The first: Follow the trail of "memory" you have forged, break free from this world, and reach for the stars.
这也意味着，翁法罗斯的因果与你无关，至少和现在的你无关。
That would mean Amphoreus's causality will no longer concern you, at least not the person you are now.
<color=#dbc291ff>你停下脚步，以自我为代价完成「收梢」…成为贯穿翁法罗斯的「记忆」。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>You come to a stop and "fade," offering yourself... to become the "memory" that carries through Amphoreus.</color>
这或许是每一个无漏净子都要面临的抉择。
Perhaps this is the choice every Pure Child of Anāsrava must face.
这意味着，我会永远留在「过去」。
That choice means I'll remain in the "past" forever.
不仅如此，你会闭合翁法罗斯的因果。这是一个封闭世界，所以「记忆」为它带来的影响，会全部收束为「你」的影响。

There are two paths, and only one leads to the right end. And Droidhead didn't tell me the answer.

答案显而易见，不是吗？但人家确实需要一点时间……

{M#His}{F#Her} kindness is always just right for the moment. I believe... {F#s}he will forgive me?
我就不多说什么了，免得破坏气氛。

我相信，那个我最在乎的{F#她}{M#他}……

每一个星星闪耀的明天♪
在「记忆」中逆行，真是新奇的体验呀。

这一刻，是「铁墓」宣告胜利，将「毁灭」洒向群星的瞬间？

你我曾是不是神明人子因罪行祝福降临陨落凡间经你我之手写下抹去的诗将是曾是你我在善见天的记忆忘却。

you/i were/weren't once progeny of deities cast/fallen to the mortal realm for blessings/sins the verses written/erased by your/my hands were/shall be your/my remembrance/oblivion in the eden of blessed insight.

为注定发生的「奇迹」，种下因果吧♪

收拾好心情，我们准备出发吧？

<color=#dbc291ff>沿着「记忆的涟漪」走向过去，将那些「神明显灵」的时刻一一串联起来。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Follow the "Ripples of Remembrance" into the past. Reconnect every moment in which "the gods made themselves known."</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>也许，这就是「记忆」的美妙之处啦♪</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Maybe that is what makes memory so beautiful ♪</color>
No, how is this possible!? Breathe... breathe...
不行…得先带你出去…坚持住…！

还记得吗？灰白的黎明，刺破长夜的瞬间……
Remember? That pale dawn breaking through the endless night...
「纷争」的长矛险些夺走了{NICKNAME}的生命——
The spear of Strife nearly claimed {NICKNAME}'s life...
是你——「冒充」神明的你——用温柔的目光托起{F#她}{M#他}的形体。

然后，在欧洛尼斯的祭坛前……
就连「岁月」的泰坦，都认错了你的面貌呀。
Even the Titan of Time mistook you for someone else.
真没想到，我们的初遇还藏着这一层秘密呢。

第一次，也是最后一次…我看见你啦，{NICKNAME}♪
The first time... was also the last time I saw you, {NICKNAME} ♪
Let the ripples of causality spread...

...That melody from the memory, I've got it now.
于是，「奇迹」得以暂时逃离「死亡」……

将{F#她}{M#他}留在生者世界的重任，就交给过去的遐蝶啦。
I'll leave {M#him}{F#her} to the Castorice of the past. She will keep {M#him}{F#her} here, in the world of the living.
可恶，这些怪物…到底是什么来头？！

别想打倒本姑娘！在找到帮助{NICKNAME}跟丹恒的办法前…咱绝对不会倒下！

有什么不满，都跟六相冰说去吧！

整整<unbreak>97</unbreak>天，三月走遍了翁法罗斯，只为找到拯救伙伴的方法。
March wandered all across Amphoreus for <unbreak>97</unbreak> days straight, chasing one goal. To save her friends.
她以手中的弓箭，狠狠教训了拦路的家伙们——

好悦耳的单音，我收到啦。

Light up the Garden of Recollection's Mirror.

你要握紧这柄仪式剑。在我离去后，它会把你送回时间的起点，一段新故事的开篇。

我相信，在那段故事里，又或者无数段相似而不相同的故事之后，大家…所有牺牲的伙伴，都能和我们儿时憧憬的「救世主」一起，在更辽阔的星空下相聚。

…倘若我们终究无法冲破这座囚笼，我会坚守。直到有人前来打破这漫长的轮回，为翁法罗斯的命运添上结尾。
...If we can never break free from this prison, I will stand my ground. Until the day someone shatters this endless cycle and writes the final chapter of Amphoreus's fate.
一眨眼的功夫，回到命运的转折点啦。

还记得最初，当神明出现在梦里，隔着一面薄薄的水晶，望着我的时候。

心中的英雄，自年幼时起便一直陪伴在我和他身边。

白厄一直都很坚强。但，如果没有那一丝萦绕在脑海中的希望……

他就能守着一丝光明，成为熊熊燃烧的烈阳。

带着这份愿望走下去吧…成为开启「救世」的英雄……

诚如神谕所示：<color=#dbc291ff>「汝将肩负骄阳，直至灰白的黎明显著」</color>……
As prophecy foretold: <color=#dbc291ff>"You will bear the blazing sun, until the pale dawn breaks"</color>...
<color=#dbc291ff>走下去…背负这个世界…直到…灰白的英雄…无名的救世主…带来黎明……</color>

聪明的你，应该早就猜到了，对吧？

我们怎么可能让这种事发生呢？

I remember that tree in Aedes Elysiae...

但知晓自己的愿望，将在海的彼端…开花结果……

那一刻的它…一定是幸福的吧？

被你说的，人家都开始想念那棵树了呀。

带着它，回到<color=#dbc291ff>祝祭庭院</color>吧——
Take it with us, back to the <color=#dbc291ff>Sacrament Courtyard</color>...
让它成为「记忆」的楔子，衔接起熟悉的岁月。

Let the ripples of causality spread...

这是「哆」，也是「一」，一如初见的一……

Aedes Elysiae... The place where it all began.
It's like time itself has stopped...
还有永远不知疲倦的微风和涛声。
And the breeze and sound of the waves never seem to rest.
Let the ripples of causality spread...
And cast down the "prophecy of Time."

至此，「记忆」的旅途就抵达终点啦。
Now the journey through "memory" has reached its end.
钉下楔子后，等待我们的…是三千万世的再次相遇。

Looping again and again. Endless farewells...
Do, re, mi, fa, sol, la, ti.
Ti, la, sol, fa, mi, re, do~
无论为昔涟、救世主，还是翁法罗斯的每一根枝芽，我将这篇讲述「爱」的故事留在这里。
Whether it's for Cyrene, the Deliverer, or every sprouting branch of Amphoreus, I leave this tale of "love" here.

May the river of time flow backward, bringing scenes of the future before our gaze. In The Eternal Land that no one remembers, the {RUBY_B#Flame-Chase Journey}legend of the Trailblaze{RUBY_E#} is about to begin.
Let the ripples of causality spread...

我的身体…却在不自觉地颤抖呀。

就找个温暖的地方，我们一起，休息下吧？

缇里西庇俄丝；刻律德菈；三月七；丹恒……
海列屈拉；雅辛忒丝；卡厄斯兰那；阿那克萨戈拉斯……
阿格莱雅；迈德漠斯；遐蝶；赛法利娅……
Everything is... already as we've... written.

When people see that ending of "love," they set out on the Flame-Chase Journey. And those who chase the flame, in turn, let the flower bloom anew tomorrow.
因果在这一行闭合…或者，有个更浪漫的词，封笔。
Causality comes full circle in this line... Or, more poetically, the pen is laid to rest.
光锥之内，皆是命运。你问命运，何为神性？她说——
Within the Light Cone, all is fated. You ask fate, what is divinity? And she says...
当「记忆」随风逝去，{RUBY_B#德谬歌}「爱」{RUBY_E#}也会留下种子，变成{RUBY_B#Philia<unbreak>093</unbreak>}「哀怜」{RUBY_E#}……
When "memory" drifts away with the breeze, {RUBY_B#Demiurge}"love"{RUBY_E#} leaves behind a seed, and turns into {RUBY_B#Philia<unbreak>093</unbreak>}"lament"{RUBY_E#}...
人家的魅力，果然始终如一呀。
I always do have my charm.
最后的「涟漪」，滋润了大树……
The final "ripple" nourished the Great Tree...
<color=#dbc291ff>让它结出了…一颗粉色的「桃子」。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>And from it grew... a single, pink "peach."</color>
一起玩了这么久，你还没告诉我，你的名字呢！
We've been playing for so long, and you still haven't told me your name!
都说过好几遍了，是你自己记性不好！
I've told you so many times already. You're just forgetful!
我叫莉维娅，莉——维——娅！下次再记不住，我可不告诉你咯。
My name is Livia. Li—vi—a. If you forget again, I won't tell you next time.
莉维娅，记住啦！那你也要记住我的名字，我是——
Livia. Got it! Then you have to remember mine too. I'm—
这么说来，「昔涟」这个名字…只是一个笔名呢……
So "Cyrene"... was just a pen name after all...
好困呀。打瞌睡的小精灵，又闯进心里啦……
So sleepy. That drowsy little fairy barged into my mind again...
最后的记忆，也在远去…再醒来时，世界是什么样子呢……
The last of my memories are slipping away... I wonder what this world will look like when I wake up again...
「同一颗种子，在不同的土壤里，会开出相似而不同的花。但真正让她美丽的，是世界的每一颗心灵。」
"The same seed, when planted in different soils, blooms into flowers that are alike, yet never the same. But what truly makes her beautiful is each and every soul in the world."
「无论哪种『喜欢』，都是弥足珍贵的『爱』，我都会感激地收下，幸福地回馈。」
"No matter what form 'liking' takes, it is still precious 'love,' and I will accept it gratefully and return it with joy."
「还记得我最喜欢的故事吗？水晶花之所以美丽，是因为它映出了小妖精的眼睛。」
"Do you remember my favorite story? That crystal flower was so beautiful because it reflected the eyes of the little fairy."
「银河间的星星会知晓，我是和{NICKNAME}一同写下《如我所书》的妖精。」
"The stars across the cosmos will know: I am the fairy who wrote As I've Written together with {NICKNAME}."
「而在{NICKNAME}的心里，我一定会得到最喜欢的，你给我的名字。」
"And in {NICKNAME}'s heart, I know I will always be given the name I love most, the one you gave me."
"After all, we've always been in sync."
…翁法罗斯的{RUBY_B#十一月}哀悼月{RUBY_E#}，大地上的所有争斗都会止息；哀悼月的第十一个日夜，逝者将离别，生者将相拥，雪花将落下，篝火将升起，照亮每一颗哀怜的心。

...In Amphoreus's {RUBY_B#11th month}Month of Mourning{RUBY_E#}, all conflicts across the land come to rest. On the eleventh day and night of the Month of Mourning, the dead will part, the living will embrace, the snow will fall, and bonfires will rise to warm every heart aching with lament.
听上去很沉重，对吗？但在这一天，欢笑却远比哭声更响亮。
It may sound heavy, right? But on this day, laughter always rises louder than tears.
因为人们明白，道别是为了下一次相遇，哀伤是为了更好地去爱。所以，这是她一年当中最喜欢的一天。
Because people understand that parting is for the next reunion, and sorrow is so we may love more deeply. That is why this day is her favorite of the year.
在同一片天空下，八次月相盈亏，十三位英雄共同谱写下史诗——
Under the same sky, across eight phases of the moon, thirteen heroes composed an epic together...
一，加上八，再加上十三，得出的数字是两个「十一」。
One, plus eight, plus thirteen, equals two "elevens."
「接下来的内容，以昔涟小姐的口吻来写，质感会不会更好？」
"Would it feel more fitting if the rest were written in Miss Cyrene's voice?"
而后，知晓这个故事的人们，望向银河时会惊讶地发现：漫天繁星被镀上了粉色，而十三秒后，这一抹明媚的光芒就会悄悄褪去。

Later, when the people who know this story gaze upon the cosmos, they will discover that the countless stars in the sky now glow pink. And after thirteen seconds, that radiant light will quietly fade away.
这是多么浪漫，却又令人疑惑的景象呀。
It will be such a romantic yet puzzling sight!
可是没关系。他们将会将这份疑惑留存于心底，不断地去思索……
But that's all right. They will keep that mystery close to their hearts, constantly pondering...
他们将会去爱，将会受伤……
They will love. They will get hurt...
他们将会愤怒，将会在三千万次无可奈何中，一遍又一遍地缝补支离破碎的心。
They will rage. And in thirty million moments of helplessness, they will stitch their shattered hearts back together, again and again.
可是，千万别忘记：逐火是不断失却的旅途。或许痛苦会有许多，但你我从未孤独。
But remember this well: Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey. There may be pain along the way, but you and I will never be alone.
他们将会懂得失却，最终…选择失却。
They will come to understand what it means to lose, and in the end... they will choose to let go.
他们将为这世界，为同行的每一位伙伴，献出自己的心，接过他人的心，并将其传递下去。
They will offer their hearts to this world, to every companion they walked beside, and they will take in the hearts of others and pass them onward.
这世界存在多少颗心灵，便有多少种「真我」，多少种「生命的第一因」，它永远不会得到唯一的答案——就连「爱」也不是。
For every soul that exists in this world, there is a different "ego," a different "prime mover of life." There will never be just one answer, not even for "love."
但是啊。当人们看向夜空，去以赞美星星的决心，爱着正在消逝的一切时——我希望用那温柔的粉色告诉他们，「爱」总会得到回应。

But when people gaze into the night sky and love what is fading with the same resolve they have to praise the stars, I want that soft, gentle pink in the sky to tell them: "Love" will always be answered.
这是一个讲述「爱」的故事，也是讲述如何回应「爱」的故事。
This is a story about "love," and a story about how to answer it.
而无论是我们已经写成的，还是你将在未来写下的……
Whether it is one we have already written, or one you are yet to write...
都注定是一个不同以往的浪漫故事。
It will be a romantic story like none that has come before.
而一个浪漫的故事，应当有一个圆满，又天马行空的结局。
And a romantic story deserves an ending that is free and complete.
当线索和脉络都已收束，下笔的轻重不再受制约时……
When every clue and thread has found its end, and the weight of the pen is no longer constrained...
就尽情挥洒「开拓」的信念，以最纯粹的烂漫画上「。」吧！
Pour the spirit of Trailblazing into it, and end this tale with the most pure and romantic "period."
然后，要再加上「一」——不同以往的「一」，向前开拓的「一」♪
Then, we'll add "one." A "one" like none that has come before, a "one" that blazes new trails ♪
我许下心愿，在十一月的第十二天，十三位英雄，会将三千万次生命中点燃的每一颗火种，泼洒在群星间……
I make this wish: On the twelfth day of the eleventh month, thirteen heroes will take every Coreflame ignited across thirty million lifetimes and scatter them among the stars...
所以，沿着来时路，出发吧。
So let us return the way we came.
回望组成了每一道涟漪。回家。
Look back at every ripple that formed. Go back home.
没事啦。人家只是…走得有点累啦。
No worries. I'm just... a little tired from all the walking.
Hehe, you really need to work out more.
回首过去，果然是件费心的事呢。
Looking back on the past really does wear down the mind.
And wears out the body too.
最初的涟漪，是人家一切的开始，一二三四五六七……
The first ripple was where it all began for me. One, two, three, four, five, six, seven...
我还以为，那是零落于记忆的音符，但其实…它们早已汇入了这个世界呀。
I thought they were just musical notes scattered aimlessly throughout memory. But... they had already become part of this world.
无论翁法罗斯是因何而诞生，但此刻，它变得多么温柔…在我归去时，它想再次为我送上，我们相逢时的那段旋律。
No matter how Amphoreus came to be, right now it feels so gentle... As I return to where I came from, it wants to play for me once more that melody from when we first met.
…得先找个安全的地方当根据地。从四周的建筑，还有这尊雕像来看，翁法罗斯肯定存在文明……
...Let's find someplace safe to set up a base of operations first. This statue and the buildings we've seen so far point to a civilization here on Amphoreus...
坏消息是，他们可能对外来者怀有敌意。
We can only hope they're not hostile toward outsiders.
无数次与你重逢，每一次都一如初见。
I've reunited with you so many times, and every time feels like the first time we met.
每一次，「爱」都会冲破固执的轮回……
Each time, "love" breaks through the stubborn cycles...
And takes flight toward a pink tomorrow ♪
黑潮，会毁掉雅努萨波利斯吗……
Will the black tide destroy Janusopolis...?
别怕——英雄们会保护大家！
Don't be scared. The heroes will protect everyone!
Is the light... leaving us behind?
要坚信…黎明一定会回归！
果然失败了…这下只能靠你我了。
I guessed as much... It's no longer working. Looks like it's just the two of us out here now.
「在纯粹的光中，就像在纯粹的暗中，一无所有」。
"To be in the purest light is to be in the purest dark: Nothing exists there."
权杖的中枢，现在该叫它「大君胎盘」了。
The Scepter's mainframe... or maybe we should now call it "the Lord Ravager's Placenta."
很遗憾。截至目前，我们仍一无所获。
Unfortunately, we still haven't found anything.
是吗？我不这么觉得——「一无所获」就是最大的成果。
Really? I don't think so. "Not finding anything" is our biggest find.
如果德谬歌是被消灭的，这里多多少少该留下些残余。我不相信星核能像手术刀一样精细，把痕迹炸得一点不剩。
If the Demiurge was destroyed, there'd be at least some bits of it left. I don't buy that a Stellaron could have blasted all the traces away as cleanly as a scalpel.
还是那句话，它的消失太「干净」了，要不是忆庭来搅混水，压根没人知道德谬歌存在——那可是权杖的原始演算目标，不可能一点记录都没留下。

As I said before, its disappearance is too "clean." If the Garden hadn't stirred the pot, no one would even know about the Demiurge's existence... We're talking about the Scepter's original extrapolation goal. There's no way that nothing of it was left behind.
或者换个角度，假如你是「赞达尔」——你会对一个构不成威胁的概念这么上心，处处提防？
Or we can look at it from another perspective. If you were "Zandar," would you be this obsessed with a concept that poses no threat? Would you guard against it at every turn?
也有一种可能，他生性谨小慎微，容不得任何变量。
There is the possibility that he's naturally meticulous and hates variables.
倒是符合他给人的印象。但就在刚才，「赞达尔」亲自把这种可能性否决了。
That does track with the impression he gave about himself, but "Zandar" shut that theory down himself just now.
宁可断尾求生，也要采取行动，这种心情我们再熟悉不过……
Choosing to act even if it'll cost him dearly... We know that feeling well.
<color=#dbc291ff>「未知」就在眼前，除了「解答」，没有第二种选项。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The "unknown" is right in front of us, so we only have one choice: "Solve" it.</color>
如此笃定，想必你心里已经有了某种猜想。
You sound pretty convinced. Surely you already have a theory.
当然，虽然没有证据，但我多半可以确信……
Of course. Though I don't have hard proof, I'm almost certain...
<color=#dbc291ff>德谬歌，从一开始就在人们的视线中……</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>That the Demiurge has been in everyone's plain sight all this time. Yet...</color>
这才合理。为什么房间空空如也？因为被关在里面的人，早就跑出去了。
That'd make the most sense. Why was the room empty? Because the person locked in there had run away ages ago.
但它渺小、虚弱，毫无存在感，就连智械哥都没察觉。
But they were weak and small, and had no presence whatsoever. Even the old Intellitron didn't notice them.
那也意味着，有很高概率——它的力量微乎其微，无法左右战局。
Which also means there's a high chance that their powers are minuscule and cannot alter the outcome of the battle at all.
Well, at least "Zandar" is scared of them.
走吧，该是对峙的时候了。去他口中的「墓碑」。
Come on. It's time to confront him. Let's go to the "tombstone" he talked about.
只剩颗脑袋了？你现实中的样子，还真落魄啊。
Nothing but a head left? Who'd have thought you'd look this bad in real life?
欢迎，二位。我很高兴，看到遗言得到回应。
Welcome, you two. I'm very happy, that you responded, to my final words.
又是「墓碑」又是「遗言」的，你是畏罪自尽了不成？
All this "tombstone" and "final words"... Did you end yourself to atone for your guilt or something?
「铁墓」已足够强大，我只需等待。
"Irontomb" is already powerful enough. I just need to wait.
而留在此地，仅仅是为了分享发现的喜悦，也为了祝贺两位得出与我相同的结论。
I remain here only to share the joy of discovery, and also to congratulate you two on reaching the same conclusion as me.
有关<color=#dbc291ff>「翁法罗斯之心」</color>的真相。
<color=#dbc291ff>...The conclusion regarding the truth of "Amphoreus's Heart."</color>
结束这场哑谜吧。你口中的「翁法罗斯之心」正是去向不明的德谬歌。
End this charade already. That "Amphoreus's Heart" you're talking about is just the missing Demiurge.
而它对应的躯壳，就是这台权杖。你干扰实验，将「翁法罗斯之身」变成了一具用来培养铁墓的空壳。
And its corresponding vessel... was this very Scepter. You interfered with the experiment and made "Amphoreus's Body" into a hollow shell, all to incubate Irontomb within.
你对窃忆者赶尽杀绝也是自然。无论如何，你都要杜绝「心智」诞生的可能。
That's why you either killed or kicked out all of the Memosnatchers. You wanted to eliminate any chance of a "consciousness" coming into being, no matter the cost.
所谓「千里之堤毁于蚁穴」，背叛的记忆铭刻我心，我从不手软。
"Even the strongest wall can fall to a single crack." The memory of betrayal has been etched into my heart, and I will never show mercy.
而现在，{RUBY_B#卡厄斯兰那}完美的容器{RUBY_E#}也与「翁法罗斯之身」完成融合。
Now, the {RUBY_B#Khaslana}perfect vessel{RUBY_E#} has already fused with "Amphoreus's Body."
可惜，德谬歌是谁，答案已经呼之欲出。
Unfortunately for you, the answer is all but revealed regarding who the Demiurge is.
那便让我们共享发现真相的喜悦吧。至此，史诗最后的隐秘也烟消云散——
Then let us share the joy of discovering the truth. The last secret of the saga will finally dissipate here...
<color=#dbc291ff>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>昔涟</color>}PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>{RUBY_E#}消失的真相：一场「记忆」的谎言。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>As we reveal the truth behind {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Cyrene</color>}PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>{RUBY_E#}'s disappearance: A lie by the Remembrance.</color>
可「我」的故事，该从哪里说起呢？
But where should I start with the story about "me"?
From the beginning of the universe?
逗你的，那也太夸张啦。我想讲述的，只是一个很小很小的故事……
Just kidding. That would be too much. I just want to tell a teeny story...
So little that it started with a "seed."
I know you're listening, <color=#dbc291ff>my good friend</color>.
{RUBY_B#「记忆」浮黎}梦中的神明{RUBY_E#}告诉我，世界是从一枚「种子」中发芽的。
{RUBY_B#Fuli, the Remembrance}The god in my dream{RUBY_E#} told me that the world sprouted from a "seed."
它长成名为「翁法罗斯」的大树，而「岁月」是它沐浴光的枝叶。
It grew into a great tree named Amphoreus, and "Time" became its branches and leaves, basking in the light.
真巧呢。斑驳的日光，婆娑的树影，也是人家最初的「记忆」。一个再寻常不过的清晨，村里最高大的树下……
What a coincidence. Dappled light coming through the leaves is my first "memory" as well. On a very ordinary early morning, beneath the village's biggest tree...
<color=#dbc291ff>哀丽秘榭的女儿，悄然来到世上。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The daughter of Aedes Elysiae quietly came into this world.</color>
多么动人的开篇。一声啼哭，是孩子带给世界最初的礼物。
What a moving opening. A loud cry was the first gift the child gave to the world.
「神谕应验了！」村民们说，「这孩子是泰坦的馈赠。」
"The prophecy's fulfilled!" The villagers say. "This child is a gift from the Titans."
「粉色的头发，还有尖尖的耳朵，她生来就是『岁月』的祭司。」
"Pink hair and sharp ears... She was born to be the priest of 'Time'."
泰坦也送来祝福：<color=#dbc291ff>「汝将收梢于花开时，一如终结诞下起始。」</color>
The Titans also gave their blessings: <color=#dbc291ff>"You shall fade when the flowers bloom, for every ending begets a beginning."</color>
花开花落，多美的结局。这一页在人们的欢笑中结束……
Flowers will bloom and wilt... What a beautiful ending. This page concluded in laughter...
「孩子，大声地哭吧。将你的声音，带给欧洛尼斯。」
"Cry loud, child. Let your voice reach Oronyx."
话虽如此，人家可不喜欢眼泪。
时光静静地，在欢笑中流淌。
Time quietly flowed by... in the midst of laughter.
故乡的风吹拂着麦浪，还有秋千、风铃、海，和小妖精们跑调的清唱。
The wind from my hometown caressed the ears of wheat, and there were swings, windchimes, the sea, and the little fairies' off-tune a capella songs.
「『哀丽秘榭』这个名字，明明取自众神的哀伤……」
"But the name 'Aedes Elysiae' came from the unpleasant sorrows of the gods..."
童年的朋友疑惑不解：「可你却总是嘻嘻哈哈，好像从来没有烦恼。」
My childhood friend did not understand. "Yet you always seem so happy, as if nothing ever worried you."
Why was I like that, then? That's because...
「因为世界对我温柔，我就长成温柔的模样。」
"The world was gentle to me, so I grew up to be gentle as well."
可是命运无常，催孩子长大，越长越大，走向远方。
But fate was fickle, and it urged the child to grow up, to grow bigger and bigger, and to go to places far away.
就像摇摇欲坠的世界，难以守护一座永恒的故乡。
Just like how the crumbling world could not preserve an eternal hometown.
「如那风中的歌谣所述，逐火是不断失却的旅途。」
"Just as the ballad blown on the breeze says: Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey."
呀，是谁竖起了小耳朵？这句话，你一定听「我」说过很多遍。
Oh? Whose ears are pricked up now? You've definitely heard "me" say this sentence a lot of times.
你知道，从这里开始，故事就有了不同展开。是不是很期待？那就赶紧开始吧！
You know that the story starts to deviate from here. Aren't you looking forward to it? Then let's get started!
「英雄之旅，走过漫漫长夜。哭着笑着，再度走向明天……」
"The Hero's Journey crosses through the long night, through tears and laughter, and once again heads towards tomorrow..."

开个玩笑，这是「我」第一次来到你的面前……

...And it looks like it'll also be the last.
既然时间有限，就赶快开始吧？
Since we don't have all day, let's get started, shall we?
一如既往，我会把这本书念给你听。
As always, I'll read this book to you.
这样一来，它就不再是「昔涟」一个人的回忆。
That way, it won't just be "Cyrene's" memories alone.
这一次，该从哪一页讲起呢？让我看看……
Where should I start this time? Lemme see...
在这个古典的世界里，也有这样一座充满「未来」色彩的宫殿。
Even this classical world contains a "futuristic" palace like this.
