Are you leaving, Peach? It's okay. I'll wait for you to come back.
今天你教我的，我都会认真学。
I'll study really hard about what you taught me today.
这么说来，还没回答你什么是「爱」呢。
Right. I still haven't told you what "love" is.
但其实，好朋友，在遇见你前，「哀怜」的因子也不懂得「爱」。
But actually, my good friend, the "Lament" factor did not understand what "love" was before she met you either.
直到我用颤抖的声音，在这小小的房间里，为你讲述所有悲伤的故事，并告诉你：我爱他们，爱这诗里的一切。
Not until I told you all the sad tales in a trembling voice in this tiny room. Not until I told you that I love them, that I love everything in this saga.
故事到来、逝去、去而复返。让我们重逢，又让我们分别。
The story comes, passes, then returns. It makes us reunite, then pulls us apart again.
最后，它留下一颗「种子」，一个理由。就算大树枯萎，万物沉寂……
At the very end, it leaves behind a "seed"... a reason. Even if the great tree withers and all falls to silence...
也有一些感情，依然值得被铭记。
There are still some emotions that deserve to be remembered.
看，光照进来了。「救世主」的光，要照亮翁法罗斯啦。
Look. A light is coming in. The "Deliverer's" light is going to illuminate Amphoreus.
嗯…虽然还是不懂。但人家相信桃子。
Mmm... I still don't get it, but I trust Peach.
期待一下吧。下次见面时，就轮到我来为你讲述「爱」的故事了♪
Just wait... It'll be my turn to tell you a story of "love" the next time we meet ♪
那我可要好好期待了哦？
Then I'll really look forward to it.
既然如此，我想做个约定：想把我的笔，我的书，还有我的名字，一起送给你。
In that case, I want to make a promise. I want to gift my pen, my book, and my name to you.
请把它们当作美丽的祝福。第一次写诗时，我为自己起了这个笔名：「昔涟」。希望文字像石子点水，自往昔投下，向未来送去涟漪。

Please take them as a beautiful blessing from me. I gave myself the pen name "Cyrene" the first time I wrote a poem. I want my words to be like pebbles falling into a pond, dropped from the past to send ripples into the future.
在你写下的故事里，也许不可避免，仍有悲伤和注定落下的眼泪。
In the stories you will write, perhaps it'll be inevitable that there are still sorrows and tears that are destined to fall.
但，可以答应我吗？要永远做一朵温柔的花，在星星看向你的时候……
But could you promise me one thing? Promise you'll forever be a gentle flower. Promise that, when the stars cast their gazes upon you...
You'll only reply to them with love and a smile.
当然，这一定是个不同以往的浪漫故事。
Of course. This will be a romantic story like none that has come before.
就像花开花落，我讲述，你聆听。
I'll read, and you'll listen, like how flowers always bloom then wither.
我迎来自己的收梢，成为下一朵花绽放的养料。
I shall welcome my own decay, becoming nourishment for the next flower's bud.
而你会启程，捧住那颗星星，和{F#她}{M#他}一同，在最后一页种下无垠的花海。
While you will depart and hold that{F# final} star, planting a boundless sea of flowers on the final page with {M#him.}{F#her.}
而我们的故事，会静静地躺在花丛中，一如「记忆」的每一道涟漪……
And our stories will be lying silently among the flowers like every ripple of "Remembrance"...
And they shall become the epic known as As I've Written.
…于是，撕开混沌的那道光，照亮了我的「记忆」。
...So, the light that tore through the chaos illuminated my "memories."
我化身为诗歌中的小妖精，与{NICKNAME}相遇，却遗忘了一切。
I turned into a little fairy from the stories and met {NICKNAME}, yet I forgot everything.
但无论如何，人家很高兴。我接住了那颗星星，对吗？
But I'm still so happy. I caught that star, didn't I?
The one walking beside me... had always been...
嗯，是记忆中，被{RUBY_B#PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>}「昔涟」{RUBY_E#}捧起，用「哀怜」浇灌的「种子」……
Yes. The "seed" within memories, the one {RUBY_B#PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>}"Cyrene"{RUBY_E#} held in her hands and watered with "lament"...
我是…最初的智种，翁法罗斯之心，德谬歌。
I am... The first Nouspore. Amphoreus's Heart. The Demiurge.
真是个好长，又不可爱的名字。和「迷迷」天差地别呀。
What a long name. And it doesn't even sound cute. The total opposite of "Mem."
So, at the end, that first ripple...
对不起，我不知道。如果自己都不愿相信，要如何给出回答呢……
I'm sorry, I don't know. If I don't even want to believe in the answer, then how am I supposed to answer you...
但现在不是哭泣的时候，对吗？我们会找到答案的，就像奇迹…总会发生。
But now's not the time to cry, right? We'll find the answer, just like how miracles... will eventually happen.
我该叫你迷迷，昔涟，还是…？
Should I call you Mem? Cyrene? Or...?
还记得吗？启程之初，人家也烦恼过这个问题。
Do you remember that I was also worried about this when we first set out?
属于迷迷的记忆，属于「昔涟」的记忆，在同一颗心里兜兜转转，那么陌生，又那么熟悉。
Mem's memories and "Cyrene's" memories got all tangled up with each other in my one heart. It's all so strange... yet so familiar.
但唯独这一次，可以接受人家小小的任性吗？我希望……
Either way, could you please let me do something I want? Just this once? I want...
能以「昔涟」的名字，被{NICKNAME}呼唤。
这个名字里有我，也有她…每一个她。
That name represents me and her. Every one of her.
当然，这是她给你的祝福。
Of course. It's her blessing to you.
无论如何，你们难以分离。
You can't be separated from her, no matter what.
谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。你的温柔，总是这样恰到好处。
Thank you, {NICKNAME}. Your kindness is always just right.
生命是一首充满告别的诗，但只要被写进「心」的书页，就不会轻易逝去。如今，所有逐火者与「开拓」的足迹，都汇入这本《如我所书》……

Life is a poem full of farewells, but if you write something into the pages of your "heart," then that will not easily fade away. Now, all the footsteps of the Flame-Chasers and the Trailblaze have come together within this book As I've Written...
<color=#dbc291ff>Becoming the source of power for "Amphoreus's Heart."</color>
你是击败铁墓的关键之一。
You are one of the keys to defeating Irontomb.
也许有办法和铁墓抗衡。
There may be a way to stand up against Irontomb.
一颗迷路的「心」，当然要被放回「身体」里。
A lost "heart" needs to be placed back into its "body."
「赞达尔」最不愿看见的，就是我们的机会：完成身心结合，让权杖重归完整，然后……
The last thing "Zandar" wants to see is an event that gives us a chance of winning: For the two halves to rejoin and for the Scepter to become complete again. Then...
然后会发生什么，我也不知道，{NICKNAME}。
And what happens after that... I don't know either, {NICKNAME}.
也许我能创造奇迹，让黑潮在下一秒化作粉色的星海。
Maybe I can create a miracle and instantly turn the black tide into a pink sea of stars.
也许…我只是一阵微不足道的涟漪，终将被「毁灭」吞没，什么也无法改变。
Or maybe... I prove to be nothing more than a weak ripple, unable to change anything, and am devoured by the Destruction.
但无论如何，在这史诗的尾声，我不想再做沉默的听众，或是被供奉的神明……
Either way, I no longer wish to be a silent onlooker or a worshiped god at the end of this saga...
你是逐火的一员，自始至终。
You have always been and will always be a member of the Flame-Chase.
这样一来，人家也能放下所有的不安，真正地…成为「昔涟」了。
That way, I can also put aside all my worries and... truly become "Cyrene."
世界前所未有地安静，真好呀，仿佛能听见心跳的声音。
The world has never been so quiet. It's so good... It's as if I can hear the sound of my heart beating.
Let's move forward together with the Trailblaze.
我们一起，画上最后的句号。
所以，德谬歌骗过了所有人…甚至自己。
So the Demiurge managed to fool everyone... including themselves.
随后，PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>完成了最后一次牺牲，化作一缕回忆，彻底消散；而星穹列车带来的另一枚星核，与被污染的权杖同频共振，吸引了懵懂的德谬歌……

Then, PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak> completed her final sacrifice, turned into a strand of memory, and completely dissipated. Meanwhile, the other Stellaron brought here by the Astral Express resonated with the contaminated Scepter, and attracted the naive Demiurge to them...
就这样，一无所有的「心」踏上了回归「身」的旅途。
And thus, the empty "heart" began its journey to return to its "body."
身为实验因子的PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>，原本只能识别并输出固定的模式。但「记忆」的力量，加以跨越三千万次牺牲的铭记，让她完成了前所未有的壮举。

As an experimental factor, PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak> originally could only recognize and output information in a set format. However, the power of the Remembrance and the memory of over thirty million sacrifices enabled her to complete an unprecedented feat.
<color=#dbc291ff>她浇灌了一颗真正的「心」——而它具备感染「智识」的能力。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>She managed to nourish a real "heart"... A "heart" with the capacity to influence the Erudition.</color>
权杖的「心智」不光活着，还前所未有地强大。你的失败已经板上钉钉了。
Not only is the Scepter's "consciousness" still alive, it's also more powerful than it has ever been. Your defeat is already set in stone.
现在投降还来得及。同为天才，真没必要撕破脸，到最后弄得谁也不好看。
There's still time to surrender, you know? You really don't need to burn all the bridges. We're all geniuses here. Don't make everyone lose face at the end.
可惜，真相水落石出后，我便能断定：弱小的德谬歌已无力改变实验结果。
What a pity. When the truth surfaced, I knew at once that the Demiurge was far too feeble to ever alter the result of the experiment.
不仅如此，黑塔女士，请设想这样一种可能：
Not only that, Madam Herta, please consider this possibility:
<color=#dbc291ff>当三千万次轮回的「憎恨」与「哀怜」合而为一，会诞生出何种美妙的造物？</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>When thirty million cycles of "hatred" and "lament" are joined as one, what wondrous creation will arise?</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>很简单：一位反造物主，「毁灭」的巨匠——它的憎恨将点燃众神的星空，却只出于对凡人的哀怜。</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>It's simple... An Anti-Creator, a giant of the Destruction, would be born. Its hatred will ignite the starry skies of the gods, motivated only by its lament toward the sufferings of humankind.</color>
你难道觉得…历经三千万世，德谬歌仍只是PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>的复制品？
Do you really think that the Demiurge is still a cheap copy of PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>? Even after thirty million cycles?
以上事实只待<color=#dbc291ff>「祂计算中的第四个时刻」</color>到来，在博识尊的见证中确立。
The facts above only await the arrival of the "<color=#dbc291ff>Fourth Instant THEY calculated</color>." Those words will be proved in the presence of Nous.
Zandar One Kuwabara thus completes the proof.
明明亲手为机器头打上了失败品的烙印，却还指望着祂证明你的理论成立……
You branded Droidhead as a failure with your own hands, yet you still expect THEM to prove your theory...
就让祂尽情投来视线，描绘祂想象中的未来吧。身为祂的造主，我将完成应尽的责任——
Let THEM cast THEIR gaze this way as much as THEY want and paint the future THEY imagined. As THEIR creator, I shall complete my duty...
引导祂完成最后一次求解——自我的毁灭。
And direct THEM to complete THEIR final query: The destruction of the self.
大言不惭。如果你失败了呢？
What hubris. And what if you fail?
谈到对失败的理解，没有人比赞达尔更深刻。他已尝过太多苦果，就算再多一次又有何妨？
No one understands failure better than Zandar. He has suffered so much already. What is one more failure to him?
对第一位天才而言，失败只是下一次论证的开始……
For the First Genius, failure is simply the beginning of the next inquiry...
切勿质疑已死之人的决心。
You don't want to test the resolve of a dead man.
走着瞧吧，前辈，看我亲自写下颠覆你论证的最后一步。
Let's wait and see, Senior Society Member. I'll have you watch me perform the final step to overturn your proof.
这是我的课题，你休想插手。别废话，脑袋借我一用——
It's my topic, so stay out of it. Be quiet and let me borrow your head.
螺丝，我们走。解开铁墓的封印去。
Let's go, Screwy. We're gonna break Irontomb's seal.
这里视野不错。交给你了，螺丝。
The view's pretty good here. All yours, Screwy.
原来如此。看来你的「备用计划」需要一柄权杖，和一颗天才的头颅。
I see. So your "backup plan" requires a Scepter and the head of a Genius.
有眼睛的人都能看出来。
Anyone with eyes can see that.
黑塔，你知道我的态度：无论成功与否，你的计划都正中「毁灭」下怀。
You know what I think about this, Herta. Whether it succeeds or fails, your plan plays right into the Destruction's hands.
螺丝咕姆，难道你看不到吗？她机会渺茫，但并非不可能。
Can't you see what's going on, Screwllum? Her chances may be small, but it's not zero.
叽里咕噜说什么呢？要是还有人想阻止我，搞快点，我赶时间。
What are you two going on about? If you want to stop me, be quick about it! I'm in a hurry!
不说话，我就当默许了。你呢，赞达尔？
I'll take that silence as a no. You, Zandar?
作为敌手，我衷心希望你停下脚步。
As your enemy, I genuinely wish you would cease your actions.
但同为「智识」行者，如果你的灵光乍现，能为论证带来更多变量……
But should your sudden inspiration bring more variables to the proof, then as a fellow pathstrider of the Erudition...
I won't mind witnessing it with my own eyes.
（即便过去这么久，经历数不清的失败，甚至在糟糕透顶的，机器头计算中不可违逆的<color=#dbc291ff>「时刻」</color>到来时……）
(It's been so long, and we've all failed so many times. Even now, moments before the horrible and inescapable <color=#dbc291ff>"Instant"</color> within Droidhead's calculations arrives...)
（「智识」的宠儿，人们口中的天才……）
(The cherished children of the Erudition, the geniuses lauded by all...)
（我们心中，只有「好奇」这一种感情么？）
(Is "curiosity" the only thing we can feel, even at moments like this?)
漫步群星的天才们，银河已经走到生死存亡的关头！我，天才俱乐部#83，黑塔，向你们发出召唤——
Geniuses who walk the stars! The cosmos has reached a moment where its very existence hangs in the balance! I, Herta, Genius Society #83, hereby summon you!
我要求，立刻召开俱乐部会议——用最宏观的思想，服务最宏伟的事业！
I request a Society meeting to be held immediately! We shall serve the grandest cause with the most macroscopic ideas!
据我所知，俱乐部的章程从来没有「团结」二字。
There's no such thing as "unity" in the Society's rules based on what I know.
诚然。有史以来，会议仅仅召开过三次。
Indeed. A meeting has only been held three times in the Society's history.
第一次，与会者两人；「帝皇」遇刺后，与会者七人；第二次大繁荣，与会者共五人。
The first meeting had two attendees. After the emperor was assassinated, the second meeting had seven attendees. During the Second Great Prosperity, the third meeting had five attendees.
这一次，又有多少人会回应？
How many will respond this time?
我本以为，你不会把{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#81}我{RUBY_E#}卷入这个「课题」了，黑塔。
I thought you were not going to involve {RUBY_B#Genius Society #81}me{RUBY_E#} in this "topic" anymore, Herta.
真是这个小魔女。早知道{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#23}我{RUBY_E#}就不跟你打赌了，波尔卡。
It really is this little witch. {RUBY_B#Genius Society #23}I{RUBY_E#} shouldn't have made the bet with you, Polka.
{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#4}我{RUBY_E#}一直在等你自投罗网。
{RUBY_B#Genius Society #4}I{RUBY_E#}'ve been waiting for you to offer yourself up.
{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#64}我{RUBY_E#}的天！熟人这么多？甚至还有位特邀嘉宾——最失败的天才，赞达尔！
Goodness gracious {RUBY_B#Genius Society #64}me{RUBY_E#}! So many familiar faces! We even have a special guest? It's that greatest failure of a genius, Zandar!
呵，真是一场聒噪的聚会啊。
Heh. What a noisy gathering this is.
可以，人比我想象中多。虽然有个家伙只是来凑热闹的。
Not bad. More people showed up than I expected, even though one is just here for the fun of it.
但我最{RUBY_B#波尔卡•卡卡目}希望到场的人{RUBY_E#}已经在了。
Either way, {RUBY_B#Polka Kakamond}the person I was hoping for most{RUBY_E#} is here.
斯蒂芬•劳艾德拒绝了邀请。他需要专心筹备攻防，无法参会。
Stephen Lloyd declined the invitation. He needs to focus on attacking and defending, and cannot attend the meeting.
没事，本来也不用他到场。跳过无聊的寒暄，直入主题吧。
That's fine. He doesn't need to be here anyway. Let's skip the boring introductions and cut to the chase.
各位，这不是一场「讨论」，而是「通知」——虽说俱乐部向来是一盘散沙，但我们至少遵守一项基本礼仪……
Folks, this is not a "discussion," but an "announcement." Though the Society has never been united, we still observe at least one basic courtesy...
<color=#dbc291ff>We don't interfere with each other's research topics.</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>所有人，听好了：攻克「铁墓」是本人的课题。我将在<unbreak>1.5</unbreak>个系统时内接管权杖δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>，阻止「毁灭」——</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>So listen up, all of you: conquering "Irontomb" is my research topic. I will personally take over Scepter δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak> in one and a half system hours and stop the Destruction.</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>一旦正面战场失利，我就会立即超频权杖，代替铁墓完成「自我加冕」，与机器头接轨。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>If the front line falls, I will immediately overclock the Scepter and complete "Self-Coronation" in Irontomb's place, and interface myself with Droidhead.</color>
好笑，太好笑了！你这个疯子，简直是在波尔卡刚洗好的白床单上跳踢踏舞！
That's funny! That's real funny! You madwoman! That's like watching you tap-dance on Polka's spotless white sheets right after she's washed them!
相当大胆。你想接入星神的机核，定义祂的「时刻」？
Very bold. You want to connect your brain to the Aeon's mechanical core and define THEIR "Instants"?
鲁珀特敢这么干，我为什么不敢？这里集齐了权杖原型机、博识尊之父，还有一颗天才的大脑——万事俱备。
If Rubert dared to do that, why shouldn't I? I've got the Prototype Scepter, the father of Nous, and the brain of a genius. Everything's set.
且不论成功率，小魔女…如果你能做到，然后呢？
Never mind the success rate, little witch... What's gonna happen if you succeed?
在场都是聪明人，我就直奔主题：很简单，对「智识」开刀——
We're all smart people here, so I'll just say it straight: strike at Erudition...
<color=#dbc291ff>我将改写「第四时刻」的锚点，让银河未来朝着黑塔喜欢的方向前进！</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>I'll change the anchor points for the "Fourth Instant" and move the future of the cosmos in a direction I want!</color>
想也知道，又一位倒果为因的天才。看看「寂静领主」怎么说？
I knew it. Another genius who confuses cause with effect. What do you think about this, "Lord of Silence"?
你知道，这是给自己判决死刑。
You know you're signing your death sentence right here.
当然。判决书有两份。一份是我自己写的，另一份来自你。
Of course I do. There'll even be two copies of the verdict. One that I wrote myself, and another one coming from you.
所以我才希望你能到场，好亲口告诉你——我不在乎！
That's why I wanted you to be in this meeting. Now, I can tell you: I don't care about all that!
这是威胁：要么放下手术刀，要么跟着全银河一起完蛋。这场会唯一的目的，就是希望各位放下傲慢，别来添乱。
Consider this a threat: Either put down your scalpel, or die with the entire cosmos. The only goal I have for this meeting is to ask all of you to put aside your pride and not cause me any trouble.
单纯的小姑娘，以为自己的愿望总能成真。
What a naive little girl, thinking her wishes will always come true.
我感到欣慰，黑塔。因为我们终究殊途同归——
I am glad, Herta. We ended up on the same page.
无论「毁灭智识」还是「改写时刻」，你我选择了相同的道路：否决那尊为世人圈定了边界的神明。
No matter if it was to "destroy the Erudition" or to "rewrite the Instants," we both chose the same road. We will defy the god who marked the limits of humanity.
单就这句话而言，我没什么好反驳的。
I'm not gonna argue with that.
为庆祝我们达成根本性共识，我会为你的演出准备一片舞台。
Then, to celebrate us coming to a fundamental agreement, I will prepare a stage for your performance.
听好，后世的天才们，以下话语出自俱乐部#1之口：结束这场可悲的会议吧。
Listen well, geniuses who came after me. Thus speaks Genius Society #1: End this pathetic meeting.
<color=#dbc291ff>2纳秒前，我已将黑塔的决定传达给所有「赞达尔」——</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>As of two nanoseconds ago, I have passed Herta's decision to all the "Zandars" in the universe.</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>「我们」会成为她的代行者，阻断一切外部干涉。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>"We" will become her representatives and stop all external interferences targeting her.</color>
要和「第一位天才」过上两招了么？意外之喜。
Am I going to clash blades with the First Genius? What a pleasant surprise.
既然立场已经明确…这场无聊的会议也该结束了。祝你好运，小姑娘。
Now that our positions are clear, it's time for this boring meeting to end. Good luck, little girl.
被当成配角了？该死啊！不过——
Did you all just treat me as a side character? Darn it! But anyways...
反正我也只是来凑热闹的，哈哈！
I'm just here for the fun! Ahahaha!
呵…作为量子域的「幽灵」，观测是我的天职……
Heh... As the "ghost" of the quantum domain, it is my duty to observe...
如果你愿意为我带一套螺丝星的茶具，我不介意出手轻轻推你一把喔，小魔女。
So if you're happy to bring me a tea set from Planet Screwllum, then I wouldn't mind giving you a helping hand, little witch.
等到一切结束后…再来我这品尝新出品的茶点吧。
After everything's over... come visit me and taste some of my freshly baked desserts.
我就知道你会说类似的话。
I knew you'd say something like that.
对于超出计算边界的方案，我总会给出相同的回应。
I always give the same response to plans that exceed the limits of mathematical calculations.
看似粗糙的四个字，却孕育了已知银河的全部智慧。
Those three words, though seemingly graceless, contain all the wisdom in the entire known cosmos.
俱乐部这关算是过了。现在，专注眼前吧。
Well, we passed the Society's trial. Let's focus on what we've got in front of us.
I hope you hold up your end of the bargain, Senior Society Member.
呵。吕枯耳戈斯或许不值得信任，但赞达尔言出必行。
Heh. Lycurgus may not be trustworthy, but Zandar always follows through with his words.
别了，后辈们。在未来有限的时间中……
Farewell, juniors. In the limited time we have left to spend with each other...
诸位不必再以「赞达尔」称呼我。
You no longer need to address me as "Zandar."
正是。我已彻底切断与「赞达尔•壹•桑原」的连接。
Yes. I have completely severed my connections with "Zandar One Kuwabara."
世界的终幕，我会以剧中人「神礼观众」之名，将其见证。
I shall witness the end of the world in the role of "Theoros"... as a character within this play.
或许你已习以为常，黑塔。但我还是想在这一刻重申：能与你共事，是我莫大的荣幸。
Perhaps you've heard me say this many times, Herta, but I still would like to reiterate that it's a great honor to work with you.
是啊。我也不止一次这么回复了……
I did hear this many times, and I've responded to you many times in the same way...
我对客套话过敏，严重时可能会休克。
I'm allergic to pleasantries. Keep at it, and I might go into shock.
斯蒂芬的工作已经完成。做好准备——
Stephen's work is done. Let's get ready.
早就准备好了。为我们的盟友开道吧。
I've been ready for ages. Let's open up a path for our allies.
计算结果：你的备用计划…成功率无限趋近于零。
Calculation results: Your backup plan... has a success rate infinitesimally close to zero.
那就代表能成功，不是么？
Which means it COULD work, no?
This is the place below the tombstone.
如来古士所愿，把他的棺材刨开。
Let's open Lygus's coffin like he wanted.
Heh. Looks like you were right.
来吧，起飞。该去会会你的小宠物了，前辈。
Come on. Let's take off. It's time to go meet your little pet, Senior Society Member.
美妙的啼哭。很快它就会响彻银河。
What a beautiful wail. It will soon resound throughout the entire cosmos.
你将开启「毁灭」的链式反应……
You will initiate the Destruction's chain reaction...
但你也将成为「完美学者」——
But you'll also become the "Perfect Scholar"...
The chances are ten thousand to one.
PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>坚持了三千万世，孜孜不倦地赠予它翁法罗斯的「记忆」……
PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak> persevered for thirty million cycles and tirelessly gave the Demiurge "memories" of Amphoreus...
只因她「梦中的神明」留下了一丝希望，让她相信成长后的德谬歌能够对抗自己的半身——铁墓。
Only because the "god in her dreams" left a sliver of hope, making her believe that a grown Demiurge would be able to fight against their other half... Irontomb.
在创世涡心与海瑟音告别之际，我察觉到了「岁月」火种的异样，随即被「长夜月」拖入到「忘却」的忆潮之中…她曾是三月献出全部记忆实现的隐藏力量，如今心中却另有暗账。

As I bid farewell to Hysilens at the Vortex of Genesis, I noticed something strange about the "Time" Coreflame, and was immediately dragged into the memoria tide of "Oblivion" by "Evernight"... She was once the hidden power that March manifested by sacrificing all of her memories, yet now she harbors other secret intentions in her heart.
与此同时，丹恒精神折跃回到列车，却发现了窃忆者入侵。众人此时觉察到「记忆」的势力早已渗透了翁法罗斯，并阻拦了外部介入…为了与我取得联系，丹恒决心立刻返回翁法罗斯。

Meanwhile, Dan Heng warped back to the Express via a spirit warp jump, only to discover a Memosnatcher invasion. Everyone then realized that the Remembrance's forces had already permeated Amphoreus and blocked outside intervention... To establish contact with me, Dan Heng was determined to return to Amphoreus immediately.
在「虚假的开拓」中醒来后，我得到了昔涟与星期日的帮助逃离其中，可惜「长夜月」掌握着绝对的主动权，使我再次落入忆潮之中…不过，黑天鹅却趁此机会悄悄接近了「长夜月」。

After waking up in the "False Trailblaze," I managed to escape with help from Cyrene and Sunday. Unfortunately, "Evernight" held absolute control, causing me to fall into the memoria tide once again... However, Black Swan took this opportunity to quietly approach "Evernight."
重返翁法罗斯的丹恒，借用神血呼唤白厄英魂，从天而降的「毁灭」洞开了忆域，找到世界最隐秘的角落。为了追寻「长夜月」的去向，丹恒来到被烧毁的神悟树庭。

Dan Heng returned to Amphoreus and beckoned the heroic spirit of Phainon with divine blood. The Destruction, descending from the sky, pierced through the Memory Zone and discovered the most hidden corner of the world. In pursuit of "Evernight," Dan Heng arrived at the charred remnants of the Grove of Epiphany.
在记忆错乱的树庭，丹恒得到记忆中「丹枫」的帮助，完成了与过往的告别。「大地」的半神荒笛枯朽之余，将使命与权能尽数托付给丹恒。借助新的力量，丹恒在忆潮中找到了我。

In the Grove, where memories became disjointed, Dan Heng received help from "Dan Feng" within his memories and completed his farewell to the past. In their final moments, the "Earth" demigod Terravox entrusted all their duty and authority to Dan Heng. With this newfound strength, Dan Heng found me within the memoria tide.
我们进入无名泰坦大墓，发现了此地的秘密——永劫回归中三千万世的「昔涟」都会来到这里，将自己奉献给「记忆」。在黑天鹅的协同下，我们在大墓深处找到了「长夜月」。

We entered the nameless Titan's great tomb and discovered its secret... across the thirty million cycles of Eternal Recurrence, every incarnation of "Cyrene" had come here, offering herself to the Remembrance. With Black Swan's help, we found "Evernight" in the depths of the great tomb.
危亡关头，「长夜月」被三月的相机捕获，陷入哀丽秘榭的记忆迷宫中。经历几番长谈，三月与「长夜月」达成一致…「长夜月」归还三月的记忆，而三月也终于回到了我们的身边。

When all seemed lost, "Evernight" was captured by March's Camera and trapped within the memory maze of Aedes Elysiae. After several lengthy conversations, March and "Evernight" reached an agreement... "Evernight" returned March's memories, and March finally returned to our side.
再创世的所有条件均已达成。我们回到大墓深处，开启了最后的再创世仪式……
With every condition for the Era Nova fulfilled, we returned to the depths of the great tomb and initiated the final Era Nova Ceremony...
数个系统时前，飘荡于茫茫太空的列车车厢中
Some system hours ago, aboard the Astral Express in space...
在茫茫太空里拿根探针随便嗅嗅，就能找到{NICKNAME}和丹恒…你这小玩意这么厉害啊，忍者妹？
You mean you just waved a probe around in deep space and found {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng...? That little thing's really that impressive, ninja girl?
此乃大岚神法力加持，感应人体超低频电波的忍•科学用具是也。
This is a ninja tech device, blessed by the Great Lan. It senses the ultra-low-frequency electric waves of the human body.
That's a whole lotta pretty wubbaboo. But...
既然人找着了，咱也就不装了。你演得倒挺像，是哪来的哈努兄弟，敢冒充巡海游侠？
Since we've found them, let's drop the act. You played it well, but who do you think you are? Brother Hanu? Thinking you can pass as a Galaxy Ranger.
牛仔•忍者殿下，汝无故发难，莫非是受猴子•叛忍蛊惑，堕入邪魔外道了么？
Lord Cowboy Ninja, you have turned on me for no reason. Don't tell me the traitorous Monkey Ninja bewitched you. Are you walking the path of heretics now?
得了吧！老子叫银枪•修罗。
Enough! My name is Silvergun Shura.
唉，所以我最讨厌在剧本里设置形象过于夸张的角色了。
This is why I hate putting over-the-top characters into the script.
你，还有这位神秘忍者妹，一个比一个难演。花导不喜欢疯子。
You, and this mysterious ninja girl... Both of you are impossible to play. Director Sparkle doesn't care for madmen.
少和我贫嘴。说，你此行的目的是什么？
Cut the chatter. What's your real reason for being here?
哎呀，假面愚者能有什么坏心思，不过是看看戏、码码牌。
Come on, what bad intentions could a Masked Fool possibly have? Just here to watch a show, shuffle a few cards.
我重要的两位演员在宇宙里漂流了这么久，你们愣是找不着。无奈，我只好自己来，不然之后找谁和我演对手戏呢？
My two prized actors were drifting through space for ages, and you all couldn't find them. What choice did I have but to come myself? Otherwise, who's going to share the stage with me?
呵…连危及寰宇的「铁墓」之灾都不当回事，我看愚者的道行也就这点档次了。
Hah... You don't even care about the Irontomb disaster threatening the whole universe? Seems the Fool's wisdom isn't all that deep.
游侠，别以为占个大义的名头就能对人指手画脚的。再说了，我看你也不是没有私心嘛。
Ranger, don't think waving some righteous flag gives you the right to throw sidelong jabs. And don't act like you've got no motives of your own.
想借着这场联系着诸神的战斗…找到帮那位<color=#dbc291ff>折足之狼</color>解脱的办法？
You're hoping this war involving the gods might be the key to freeing that <color=#dbc291ff>broken-legged wolf</color>.
只有我自己知道。你信吗？
Just me. Do you believe it?
放心，我没想着要打扰那位传奇人物。只是看你无功而返的样子，忍不住想调侃一下。
Relax. I'm not interested in disturbing that living legend. I just couldn't resist messing with you when I saw you come back empty-handed.
喵的…看在你救了{NICKNAME}和丹恒的份上，滚吧。
You little... Fine. Since you saved {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng. Get out of here.
记着你刚才说的话，别去打扰<color=#dbc291ff>老大</color>。
But remember what you said. Leave the <color=#dbc291ff>boss</color> alone.
放一百个心啦。在花导的下一个剧本里，小灰毛才是主角～
You don't have to worry at all. In Director Sparkle's next script, Gray Hair gets the spotlight~
仰赖列车组牵头组建银河联军，寰宇文明才能够免于「毁灭」的摧残——这样的套话，我就不赘述了。
Let's skip the formalities about how the Express Crew led the formation of the Cosmic Alliance and saved civilization from the Destruction.
列车组的支持，让我们的工作在市场开拓部的施压下，依然能有条不紊地推进。
Thanks to the Express Crew's support, our operations stayed on course, even under the relentless pressure from the Marketing Development Department.
请你们接受战略投资部最为诚挚的感谢，姬子小姐。
Miss Himeko, the Strategic Investment Department extends its deepest thanks.
战略投资部在抗灾一事上付出的辛劳，寰宇有目共睹。
Your department's contributions during the crisis did not go unnoticed.
只是，除了御敌和赈灾，你们近日似乎还有其他事情要忙？
But besides disaster relief and holding the line, you've had your hands full with something else too, haven't you?
没错。此次银河联军的凯旋，为寰宇联合抵抗毁灭势力展现出宝贵的可能性。
Indeed. The Cosmic Alliance's victory this time has revealed something truly precious, a glimpse of what united civilizations can accomplish in the face of Destruction.
战略投资部正在总结此战的成功经验。我们希望当下一次类似的危机发生前，能建立起一套有效的对灾响应机制。
Our department is summarizing key lessons from this campaign. If another crisis of this scale appears on the horizon, we intend to have a system ready to respond.
若公司能够率先建立起抵御「毁灭」的前线，将是所有文明的幸运。
If the IPC can take the lead in establishing a true frontline against the Destruction, it will bring hope to every civilization.
此事仍少不了星穹列车的支持。等「铁墓」一事尘埃落定，我们还会与姬子小姐联系的。
Of course, that still hinges on continued support from the Astral Express. Once the Irontomb matter is settled, we will be in touch again, Miss Himeko.
景元将军，许久不见了。不知符玄小姐可有安全到家？
General Jing Yuan, it's been too long. Did Miss Fu Xuan return safely?
她呀，这回可真是在鬼门关前走了一遭。
Well, she almost had a near-death experience this time.
法眼为我卜测到铁墓那抹消万物的一击，同时也告诉我，这一击避无可避、十死无生。
The omniscia foresaw Irontomb's obliterating strike. It also told me there was no avoiding it, no surviving it.
不过，也正是在那一瞬间，戎韬将军传来讯息，「虚贞已破，吉凶可定」，随后就断了联系。
Yet in that exact moment, the Seer Strategist sent a message: "The empty fortune has cracked open, and fate can now be decided." Then we lost contact.
唉，好是绕口。你的好师姐也不说明白些，害得我寝食难安啊。
Alas, always so cryptic. Your brilliant senior soror never says anything plainly. Left me pacing all night.
哈哈哈，符卿莫气。这可是成为将军的必经之路啊。
Hahaha, no need to be upset, Master Diviner. Cryptic talk comes with the territory of being a general.
这一战，仙舟的将士们置身危局，却半步未退，他们的牺牲与贡献理应得到回报。
The soldiers of the Xianzhou stood firm in this battle amidst overwhelming odds. Their courage and sacrifice deserve recognition.
联盟所需的「烬灭金血」，无名客手中正好有那么一枚，那是翁法罗斯的英雄卡厄斯兰那赌上性命，从纳努克本尊处取来的。

And it just so happens that the Golden Blood of Ruin the Alliance needs is in the Nameless's hands. It was taken by the hero Khaslana of Amphoreus at the cost of his life, directly from Nanook THEMSELF.
尽管卡厄斯兰那如今已不存于世，但{NICKNAME}仍能触及他的一簇记忆。
Though Khaslana is no longer part of this world, {NICKNAME} can still reach a fragment of his memory.
也许，卡厄斯兰那会愿意将这份金血，交给为翁法罗斯赴汤蹈火的盟友。
Perhaps Khaslana would be willing to entrust the golden blood to an ally who went to great lengths for Amphoreus.
如此…甚好。我谨代表仙舟联盟，对那名为翁法罗斯的世界，和她伟大的英雄子民，致以崇高的敬意。
In that case... very well. On behalf of the Xianzhou Alliance, I offer our deepest respect to the world of Amphoreus and her brave, noble heroes.
以凡人之身伤及星神，哪怕只有一瞬，此番功绩，已然值得寰宇永铭。
To strike an Aeon as a mortal, even for but a fleeting instant... This deed alone deserves to be etched into the stars and remembered forever.
波提欧先生，真高兴在这场血战后能看见你平安无事。
Mr. Boothill, it's a relief to see you alive and well after all that bloodshed.
命硬，天生的。说来还得和姬子小姐说声抱歉，先前没能接上列车的联络。
Born tough. Though I oughta apologize to you, Miss Himeko, for missing the Express's signal earlier.
你们在第一线鏖战的英姿，公司和仙舟的军队都有目共睹。请允许我为游侠拔刀相助的勇义报以真挚的感谢。
The soldiers of both the IPC and the Xianzhou saw the way you all fought on the front lines. Please accept my sincere thanks for the bravery the Rangers showed.
姬子小姐不用客气，我不是领猎人，叫的人不算多。但为了这一仗碰头的游侠，大多和「毁灭」不共戴天，所以看上去确实不要命。

No need for thanks, Miss Himeko. I ain't the leader of the pack. Didn't bring many along. Most of those who showed up for this fight have a personal score to settle with the Destruction. That's why they fought like they had nothing to lose.
列车组还需专门感谢你和乱破小姐，在大战结束后为我们带回{NICKNAME}和丹恒。
The Express Crew owes you and Miss Rappa a special thanks for retrieving {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng after the battle.
权杖报废后，翁法罗斯星域空间持续紊乱了许久，哪怕有信号定位，想找到他们也并非易事。
With the Scepter put out of commission, there was a lot of chaos across the Amphoreus segmentum. Even with signal tracking, finding them was no simple task.
哈哈，没准她的忍法真不是开玩笑呢。
Haha, maybe her ninjutsu really is the real deal.
Speaking of which, where is Miss Rappa?
别担心，她去助其他游侠的阵了。星穹列车的意思，我来转达吧。
Don't worry, she's gone to help the other rangers. I'll pass on the Astral Express's message to her.

In the ceaselessly mercurial extrapolations, THEIR radiance descends before all eyes, illuminating the vast cosmos. THEIR colossal form, divine in magnitude, is a marvel of intricately interwoven gears and cables.
祂观察、计算、求解一切。祂提出疑问、进行验证、获取解答。现在，无所不知的存在向你发问——
THEY observe, compute, and seek to solve all. THEY question, verify, and obtain resolution. Now, the all-knowing entity questions you...
你看见：祂消失了。只留下一个符号：<color=#dbc291ff>「！」</color>
You witness: THEY disappeared, leaving only a symbol behind: <color=#dbc291ff>"!"</color>
「！」——在自然语言中，人们将其添加于文句后，以表达某种复杂的情感。也许它的意思是：对已至的一切永葆惊奇。
"!"... In natural language, it's appended to sentences as a vessel of complex emotions. Perhaps it signifies a perpetual wonder at all that has come to pass.
「！」——在编程语言中，人们将其添加于算式前，以表示对目标值的取否。也许它的意思是：对未至的一切永怀质疑。
"!"... In programming languages, this symbol is prefixed to expressions to denote negation. Perhaps it signifies an enduring skepticism toward all that has yet to arrive.
但祂不再言语，这便是答案的所有。或许你回答了；或许没有。一切已然发生——
But THEY speak no more. Therein lies the entirety of the answer. Perhaps you have completed the reply, or perhaps not. All has come to pass...

因果在这一行闭合…\n或者，有个更浪漫的词，封笔。
The loop of causality is closed in this line...\nOr, there's a more romantic word for it: to seal the pen.

May this journey lead us starward
与此同时，从学校只身逃出的{NICKNAME}，竟然报了警……
Meanwhile, {NICKNAME}, who escaped from school alone, actually called the police...
…您的意思是，那位火花小姐，原本只是个虚拟形象，现在却来到现实中，劫持了一整座学校的师生？
...So what you're saying is that this Miss Sparxie, who was originally just a virtual avatar, has now crossed into reality and taken an entire school's staff and students hostage?
啊，明白了，也就是常见的<color=#dbc291ff>「缘生幻造种」</color>现象吧。
Ah, I get it. So it's just a typical case of the <color=#dbc291ff>ideogenitive imagenae</color> phenomenon.
It gained sentience of its will?
对，按古老的迷信说法，可以这么理解。
Yeah. You could say that according to the old superstition.
现代科学认为，受过度关注的某物因为得到了过多的愿力，会突然拥有生命成为幻造种。
Modern science believes that when something receives excessive attention, it would suddenly gain life and becomes an imagenae due to the accumulation of too much Wishpower.

在过去某些时代，幻造种诞生的速度就像下过雨后角落里的蘑菇一样蹭蹭窜个不停。如今虽然不同了，但稍不留神，还是有些知名漫画的角色会突然活生生地现世。

Certain historical eras had imagenae popping up non-stop like mushrooms after a shower. Things are different now, but if you're not careful, you might still find characters from popular comics suddenly show up in the flesh.
抱歉抱歉，用了复杂的术语。「缘生」的意思，就是因机缘而生。

这类幻造种诞生的原因都是些偶发性事件。和那些要靠绘师画出自己后代来繁衍的<color=#dbc291ff>「谱系幻造种」</color>不太一样。
These imagenae arise from incidental events. That's quite different from <color=#dbc291ff>"progenitive imagenae,"</color> which reproduce by having artists draw their offspring.

Although you're honored guests of the Astral Express, you seem completely unfamiliar with the laws and customs of this world. During the Phantasmoon Games, we do not traditionally interfere with Supplicants' actions. That is their privilege.

好、好的！不可思议的是，仅仅十五年过去，幻月居然再度满盈，开启「幻月游戏」的时刻又一次降临，这一定是「欢愉」之主福佑乐园！

Y—Yes! Incredibly, after just fifteen years, the Phantasmoon is full again, and the time for the Phantasmoon Games is upon us once more. Surely a blessing from the Master of Elation upon this arcadia!
本次「幻月游戏」究竟会有哪些谒者现身，他们又会为大家带来怎样震撼心灵的奇迹呢？本台已得到「异常防御部」的许可，将全程跟踪本次「幻月游戏」的相关进展！

Which Supplicants will appear in these Phantasmoon Games, and what mind-blowing miracles will they bring to everyone? With permission from the Department of Aberration Defense, we'll be following and reporting on the Phantasmoon Games from start to finish!
就在刚才，第一位佩戴面具的谒者出现了！
Just now, the first masked Supplicant has appeared!
真令人好奇啊！这位谒者究竟是谁，又来自何方？让我们一起来看看！
How intriguing! Who are they, and where did they come from? Let's take a look!
哇喔！风靡网络的主播火花小姐，于两小时前宣告自己佩戴面具，成为谒者！「异常防御部」已确认了本条信息的真实性！
Wow! Internet-famous streamer Miss Sparxie announced two hours ago that she's donning a mask to become a Supplicant! The Department of Aberration Defense has confirmed the news is authentic!
作为缘生幻造种，火花小姐的诞生并未通过「异常防御部」的批准，但这些都不重要了。
As an ideogenitive imagenae, Miss Sparxie's birth wasn't approved by the Department of Aberration Defense, but that hardly matters at this point.
在本次「幻月游戏」期间，这位网络主播想要创造什么样的奇迹呢？下面，让我们切到她的直播间看看！

Hello everyone, I'm Welt Yang, a history teacher at Graphia Academy. I'm honored to be selected as this year's "Most Popular Male Teacher," and I will continue to strive to nurture even more outstanding talents!
好的，采访暂告一个段落，接下来我要向大家预告下一次的直播内容！
Alright, that wraps up our interview for now! Let me give you all a sneak peek at what's coming up in our next livestream!
感谢大家全心全意的支持，火花花也要努力回报大家的心意啦~♥
Thank you all for your wholehearted support! Sparxicle will work hard to repay your kindness! ♥
三小时后，我将和本次活动的特邀嘉宾——纵横银河、创下无数传奇的星穹列车的无名客们一起，为大家献上一场直播演出——「火花大会」！

In three hours, I'll be hosting a special livestream performance — SparxiCon — alongside our special guests, the legendary Nameless from the Astral Express who have carved countless legends across the cosmos!
请把消息告诉你的朋友，你的家人，还有你的敌人，让我们一起放下所有恩怨烦恼，准时进入直播间，见证今日的二相乐园绽放最灿烂的火花吧！

Have you seen shows like that before? You know, where celebrities go somewhere to do everyday jobs, like those reality shows where they trade places with regular people.

That's hilarious. I heard they're supposed to be great heroes who saved other worlds, but look at them now, switching to comedy in a heartbeat...

(Darn it... Soon the whole of Planarcadia will be saying Sparxie caught the Astral Express crew in one go and made us the butt of jokes... our reputation would also turn into her trophy.)

Oh right, please keep this Phantasmoon Games Emergency Response Guide safe. Some sections in it might come in handy.
如果没别的事情，我就先走了，再见。
If there's nothing else, I'll be going now. See you.
瞧瞧，我说什么来着。报警也没用。
See? I told you so. Even calling the police was useless.
眼下唯一能救他们的，只有你了……

…还有你们那位红色的大姐头。她来了喔。
...and that red boss lady of yours. She's here too.
{NICKNAME}，你还好吗？逃出来时没受伤吧？
{NICKNAME}, are you alright? Did you get hurt when you ran away?
你向姬子展示了一位少女为你画下的奇怪面具。
You showed Himeko the strange mask that a young girl drew for you.
…所以，眼下三月和瓦尔特都被困在了绘世学院里？面具也被这个叫火花的家伙夺走了？
...So March and Welt are both trapped in Graphia Academy now? And that girl called Sparxie took the mask, too?
不，不是你的错。是我低估了这场游戏背后的复杂局势。
No, it's not your fault. I underestimated the complexity of the situation behind these games.
重返故乡，本意是让大家享受一场轻松的度假，也想让你和三月体验一番这个世界「欢愉」的氛围。
Coming back to my homeland was meant to be a relaxing vacation for everyone, and I also wanted you and March to experience the atmosphere of Elation in this world.
在过去「幻月游戏」的历史中，谒者之间不乏有彼此合作的事迹。
Throughout the history of the Phantasmoon Games, there have been many instances of cooperation between Supplicants.
但这一次，银河中的各路人马却把它当成了互相掰手腕的牌桌。
But this time, forces from across the cosmos have turned this into their own high-stakes poker table.
比起践行「欢愉」，牌手们更想独尝胜利的喜悦，迫不及待把其他人踢出局。
Rather than honoring the Elation, these players are far more eager to savor victory for themselves, itching to knock everyone else out of the game.
火花就是这样的搅局者。
We can't let her get away with this!
Should we head back to school and save everyone now?
在不清楚火花「做了什么」和「要做什么」的情况下，光凭一腔勇气闯回学校可是很危险的。
It's dangerous to rush back to school on courage alone when we don't know what Sparxie "has done" and what she's "planning to do."
<color=#dbc291ff> 对每一位谒者来说，加入「幻月游戏」后至少需要完成三个重要行动——「唱名」、「奇迹」和「宣扬」。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>For every Supplicant, there are three key acts that must be completed once the Phantasmoon Games begin: the "roll-call," the "miracle," and the "promotion."</color>
火花已经完成了「唱名」。她夺走面具，宣布自己加入游戏。这也让所有人的目光都被「第一名谒者出现」的新闻吸引。
Sparxie has completed the "roll-call." She took the mask and declared her entry into the games, drawing everyone's attention to the news that "the first Supplicant has appeared."
接下来，她要努力促成「奇迹」：承载民众的愿望，完成壮举予以回应。
Next, she must strive to make a "miracle" happen: bear the people's wishes and answer with a great feat.
如果我猜的没错，火花也在等我们自投罗网。对她来说，这场谒者间的第一战不会有比星穹列车更好的对手了——
If I'm not mistaken, Sparxie is waiting for us to walk right into her trap. For her, there couldn't be a better opponent than the Astral Express for this first battle between Supplicants...
能在自己精心布置的战场上，击败银河闻名的大英雄，还有什么能比这条新闻更撼动人心？
What could be more earth-shattering than defeating a renowned cosmic hero on a battlefield of her own meticulous design?
那么问题来了，花火，以你对这个「冒牌货」的了解，她加入游戏到底要做什么？只是戏弄和击败列车组显然不够，她到底要完成怎样惊天动地的「奇迹」？

So here's the question, Sparkle: Based on what you know about this impostor, what's her real agenda for joining the Games? Simply toying with and defeating the Express crew alone won't be enough. What kind of world-shaking "miracle" is she after?
虽说是个冒牌货，但好歹也是花火大人的冒牌货嘛，光靠猜又怎么能猜得中嘛。
Sure, she's a fake, but she's still a fake of Miss Sparkle. Guessing won't get us far.
要我说…去「酒馆」查查呗，也许会有线索！
If you ask me... we should check out the tavern. Might find some leads there!
你说的是…你们那个酒馆？
假面愚者的总部…「世界尽头」酒馆。
The Masked Fools' headquarters... the "World's End" Tavern.
没错。要搞惊天动地的大事，又怎么能少了花火大人多年来收藏的宝贝呢？
That's right. How could we pull off something this insane without Miss Sparkle's prized collection I've been hoarding all these years?
那个冒牌货应该很明白这一点。在这趟行动前，她肯定去过「酒馆」…用我的名义。
That imposter must've known this well. Before this operation, she definitely went to the tavern... using my name.
大多数愚者分不清我和那个冒牌货的区别，也可能不在乎。但只要找出「我」和谁聊过什么，「我」又从我的库藏道具里偷走了哪件宝贝，自然就能知道冒牌货想做什么了。

Most Fools can't tell the difference between me and that imposter, or maybe they just don't care. But if we can find out who "I" talked to and which treasures "I" stole from my collection of items, we'll naturally figure out what that imposter is up to.
这是个不错的法子。但我不能让你一个人行动，带我们俩进「酒馆」，能做到吧？
That's a good plan, but I can't let you act alone. Can you take both of us into the tavern?
拿好这张名片，「酒馆」的地址就印在这上面。不过，去「酒馆」的路要你们自己走，这是它成立起就有的规矩，我也没法子。

Take this business card. The address of the tavern is printed on it. However, you'll have to find your own way to the tavern. That's been the rule since it was established, and there's nothing I can do about it.
既然还有时间，我就先出发咯。你们俩，准备好就来吧。
Since there's still time, I'll head out first. You two can come over when you're ready.
I'd say she needs us more than we need her.
放轻松，{NICKNAME}。<color=#dbc291ff>要踏入「欢愉」的仪式，重要的就是松弛感。</color>
Relax, {NICKNAME}. <color=#dbc291ff>To step into the Elation's rite, what you need the most is ease.</color>
不要随你的敌人起舞，而是要找准自己的节奏。
Don't dance to your enemy's tune. Find your own rhythm.
现在，该我们踏出自己的舞步了。
Now it's our turn to set the steps.
「世界尽头」酒馆，地址：鸽川区，共愿帮事务所附近
"World's End" Tavern, Location: Dovebrook District, near the Synwish Syndicate Office
鸽川区啊…好久没回家看看了。正好丹恒和星期日那边也有些新发现，我让他们稍后和我们碰头。
Dovebrook District... It's been a while since I've been home. Perfect timing. Dan Heng and Sunday have made some new discoveries. I asked them to meet up with us later.
Himeko's home is in Dovebrook District?
The place where Himeko grew up?
可不要有什么太高期待哦。
Don't get your hopes up too high.
（是个挺繁华的城区啊…姬子过去就在这儿吗？）
(Quite a bustling district... Is this really where Himeko lived back then?)
十五年没回来看看了，不知那些房子如今是租借给了别人，还是被变卖出售了……
It's been fifteen years since I've been back... I wonder what's become of these houses now... If they're being rented out, or if they've been sold off already?
Let's go. Stay safe on the road.
等之后有空了，我们再到处闲逛吧。
Once we've got some time to spare, let's go explore a bit.
关于赔、赔偿的事情，本狸一点都不敢忘呢。
Rest assured, I haven't forgotten a single thing about the c—c—compensation.
（这只狸猫为了赔偿居然在杂志社的门口一直等着…这合狸吗？）
(This furbo was actually waiting outside the magazine's office just to make amends...? Furbo absurdo!)
The tabloid journalist who took my picture.
It's quite the escapade... long story.
你向姬子讲述了被八卦记者跟拍，索赔的一系列事件始末。哼哼，看起来命运最终让你们再度相遇，还是想让你大发一笔横财啊。

You told Himeko about the whole series of events with the tabloid journalist following you and the compensation claims. Heh heh, looks like destiny wanted you two to meet again, and maybe score you a nice fat paycheck while at it.
劳驾您来杂志社里面谈谈？咱们聊一聊赔偿金额吧？
Would you mind coming into our magazine office to talk? Let's discuss compensation, shall we?
幻太子，你在啊！我请来一位了不得的债主上门哩！
Hey there, Paraprince! I've brought quite an impressive creditor to visit you!
哔哔，检测到债主电波出现？！我逃——
Beep beep, debt collector signal detected!? I'm outta here!
别逃哩！是星穹列车的浣熊大人！狸猫和浣熊，一家亲哩！
Don't run! It's the great Raccoon from the Astral Express! Furbos and raccoons, we're all one big family!
哔啵~亲不亲什么的，不都是来要债的？！
Beep boop! Family or not, you're all just here to collect debts, aren't you!?
So, what's it gonna be for compensation?
What are you plotting, little furbo?
浣熊大人，社长这个坏家伙抛下大家躲债哩。咱们弟兄几个已经好几个月没发薪水了。
Great Raccoon, that jerk of a company president ditched everyone to dodge the debts. We brothers haven't gotten paid in months.
看本狸弟兄几个的样子，你也应该明白，就算把咱们卖去做狸火锅也赔不了您几个钱，但是哩——
As you can see from our sorry state, even if you sold us all for furbo hotpot, you wouldn't get much money back, but...
本狸有一计，咱们可以通狸合作，互惠互狸！毕竟，这家《狸狸周刊》，还是有些销量的！
I've got a plan! We can work together for some mutual raccoon-furbo benefits! After all, Furbobo Weekly does have quite a readership!
眼下整个二相乐园最炙手可热的新闻，就是星穹列车的到来哩！
Right now, the hottest news in all of Planarcadia is the arrival of the Astral Express!
只要浣熊大人当上社长，《狸狸周刊》可以为您全面开动，成为列车的专属媒体，输出一大串大热新闻哩！
Once you become the company president, great Raccoon, Furbobo Weekly can go full throttle for you, becoming the Express's exclusive media outlet, churning out a string of hot scoops!
要不了多久，《狸狸周刊》将成为销量第一的八卦周刊哩！我们不愁没有薪水~浣熊大人也不愁赔偿哩！
In no time, Furbobo Weekly will be the #1 gossip magazine! We won't have to worry about our salaries! And great Raccoon won't have to worry about compensation!
You want me to work for you for free?
哪儿的话哩！作为您的仰慕者，我们弟兄几个是真心想赔您一大笔精神损失费哩！
No way, no way! As your devoted fans, me and my bros sincerely want to compensate you handsomely for your emotional distress!
…一家杂志社？这事儿有点意思。{NICKNAME}，你觉得呢？
...A magazine publisher? Now this is interesting. What do you think, {NICKNAME}?
我就知道你不会错过这样的机会。
I knew you wouldn't pass up an opportunity like this.
这些狸猫虽然诡计多端，但确实能为咱们提供一些助力：一个为你工作的媒体，一群能到处跑的眼线。在「幻月游戏」中，拥有这样一支后勤团队的好处多多。

These furbos may be crafty and full of tricks, but they can definitely help us out: A media outlet working for you, and a network of informants who can run around everywhere... Having a logistics team like that during the Phantasmoon Games would come with many perks.
And best of all, they're free.
说说看，社长要干些什么？
So tell me, what does a company president have to do?
其实当社长可轻松哩，您跟我来~
Being a company president is actually super easy, just follow me!
就这么简单？好，现在起，我就是你们的新社长了！
That's all it takes? Okay, from now on, I'm your new company president!
呜呼~浣熊大人是新社长哩！您交代的任务，弟兄们一定为您办到哩！您还有什么其他交代？
Woohoo! Great Raccoon is our new company president! Whatever mission you assign, we brothers will get it done for ya! Anything else you'd like us to do?
Change the name of the gossip forum!
社长大人觉得「狸狸八卦」不行吗？那想要给它起个什么名字呢？
Boss, you don't like "Furbobo Gossip"? What name would you prefer then?
围绕幻月游戏大家一起Chat？好名字！
Chatting about the Phantasmoon Games together? Cool name!
本狸突然感到一阵心脏不适哩…但没关系，只要社长喜欢！
My heart just skipped a beat... but that's okay, as long as the boss is happy!
Ghost-Ship Grove!? What's that supposed to mean?
听起来很有个性的名字！
Never mind, let's stick with the old name.
No, let me think about it.
That's all there is to it.
相应的，请你务必要多造些大新闻！
In return, make sure you create some big news stories!
对了，刚刚那位写您黑稿的{RUBY_B#幻太子}狸狸记者{RUBY_E#}，人事部会将他开除！本社不需要一位对社长不满的员工哩。
Oh, and that {RUBY_B#Paraprince}journalist furbo{RUBY_E#} who wrote that slander about you? HR will fire him! We don't need an employee around here who's got beef with the company president.
Wait, send him to gather intel at the school!
我听说绘世学院那边有位谒者现身哩，让他为您拍些情报回来吗？
I heard a Supplicant has appeared at Graphia Academy. Should we have him take some pictures there for you?
没问题，这就安排！本狸这就发布命令，请随时等他传回一手报道哩！
No problem, I'll arrange it right away! This furbo will issue the order. Stay tuned for his first-hand report!
{NICKNAME}，看起来你已经很快进入了「社长」这个身份了。
{NICKNAME}, looks like you're already getting into the groove of being a company president!
这儿的事情办得差不多了。算算时间，丹恒与星期日那边也快到了。方便起见，我会通知他们来杂志社碰头。
We're pretty much done here, and Dan Heng and Sunday should be arriving soon as well. I'll just have them meet us here at the publishing house.
看来这一整栋楼，都成杂志社了……
It looks like the magazine publisher has taken over this entire building...
严格来说…这一栋楼所在的街道，都是属于我家的地产。
Strictly speaking... The entire street where this building stands belongs to my family's estate.
据说过去绘世家族全盛期在二相乐园的各处都有财产，只是到了我这一代已经所剩无几了。
It's said that, in their heyday, the Graphia family owned property all across Planarcadia, but by my generation, very little was left.
等我的路走到尽头时，世界上也许不会再有人能从我手中继承什么了吧？
When my journey reaches its end, will anyone in this world be able to inherit anything from me?
抱歉，我把话题说得太伤感了。

Silly child. What nonsense are you talking about.
来吧，去杂志社里瞧瞧，看看这只小狸猫卖什么关子。
Come, let's go inside the magazine office and see what this little furbo is up to.
看来，丹恒和星期日还没到。你如果坐不住的话，不妨先下楼逛逛。
Looks like Dan Heng and Sunday haven't arrived yet. If you're feeling restless, why don't you go outside and explore a bit?
不过片刻，你们就等来了丹恒与星期日。
After a brief moment, Dan Heng and Sunday arrived.
比预想中慢不少啊——看来有不少收获？
Slower than expected, huh? Looks like you had quite a harvest?
见过姬子女士，还有{NICKNAME}也在啊。一别多日，小女子甚是挂念几位。
Ah, Miss Himeko, and {NICKNAME} is here too! It's been a while. I've missed you all dearly.
停云小姐？这一次是你代表仙舟出使二相乐园吗？
Miss Tingyun? Are you representing the Xianzhou on this diplomatic mission to Planarcadia?
兹事体大，小女子哪有这样的份量——这趟旅行我只是跟随玉阙仙舟的爻光将军打打杂罢了，在路上恰巧遇见了这二位。

This is a matter of great importance. A humble girl like me doesn't have that kind of standing. I'm just tagging along with General Yao Guang of the Yuque to help out with odd jobs. I happened to run into these two on the way.
「戎韬将军」…这一路上发生什么事了？
The Seer Strategist... What happened on this journey?
抱歉，出了些岔子——我不慎戴上了欢愉假面。眼下，我成了幻月游戏中的一名谒者。
Sorry, there was a bit of a hiccup... I accidentally put on a Mask of Elation. Now, I'm a Supplicant in the Phantasmoon Games.
我知道列车在寻求加入幻月游戏的机会，对此一直有些好奇。抱歉，我是不是让事情节外生枝了？
I know the Express has been seeking to join the Phantasmoon Games, and I've been quite curious about that. Sorry... Did I make things more complicated than they needed to be?
不必道歉，星期日。你是「开拓」的同伴。没有无名客会阻止同伴寻找自己的道路。
No need to apologize, Sunday. You are a companion of the Trailblaze. No Nameless would ever stop a companion from finding their own path.
不必道歉，星期日。虽说你并非无名客，但你也是这趟旅程和我们同行的旅伴。没有无名客会阻止同伴寻找自己的道路。
No need to apologize, Sunday. Though you may not be one of the Nameless, you're still a companion on this journey with us. No Nameless would stop a fellow traveler from finding their own path.
But wait... did you just say "accidentally"?
说来话长…恐怕要等爻光将军亲自解释了。
It's a long story... I'm afraid we'll have to wait for General Yao Guang to explain it herself.
刚才她一直和我们同行，却不知为何不见了。
She was with us just now, but somehow disappeared without a trace.
爻老板…时常这样，她临时离开，怕是有什么要事吧。
Madam Yao... Is always like this. She probably disappeared suddenly to deal with something urgent.
这位戎韬将军…和传闻中一样神龙见首不见尾。不如我们等等她？
This Seer Strategist... Is just as elusive as the rumors say. Should we wait for her?
不必啦，这怎么好意思。因为命数变迁，我不得不暂时延宕几步，以应时现身，请诸位见谅。
No need. I wouldn't dare impose. The tides of fate shifted. I had to delay my steps to arrive at the proper time. I ask for your understanding.
呀，诸位连我在内正合六爻之数，让我算算……
Oh my. Counting me, we make exactly six. Let me do some calculations...
近日运势凶危。您可要当心啊。
Your fortune in the coming days looks grim. You'd better watch out.
吉。今日刚好得偿所愿，合理。
Weal. Makes sense. You got what you wanted today.
命数凶险。这事儿多半与刃有关了。
The fates spell danger. This matter is most likely connected to that Blade.
小狐狸否极泰来，吉运常在，是个福将。
The little fox's misfortune has overflowed into good luck. She's blessed with constant good fortune, a true harbinger of prosperity.
That's weird... I can't see yours?
久仰大名，戎韬将军。我是星穹列车的领航员，姬子。有什么事，请和我谈。
Your reputation precedes you, Seer Strategist. I'm Himeko, Navigator of the Astral Express. Whatever's on your mind, you can discuss it with me.
啊——实在抱歉，卜者遇上命数「无从卜测」之人，难免就有三分激动、三分失态，三分好奇…还有一分敬畏了。

Ahh, my sincerest apologies. When a diviner encounters someone whose fate is "unfathomable," we can't help but feel three parts excited, three parts flustered, three parts curious... and one part awestruck.
我的「观自在眼」能遍览几位身上的气运，于额顶悬作「吉凶签」。我想以此占卜，献给各位作为见面礼。
My Eye of Īśvara can scan the aura of fortune surrounding each of you, manifesting as Weal or Woe Signs above your foreheads. I'd like to divine your fortunes as a welcome gift.
但是，这位{NICKNAME}却让我颇为意外…在{F#她}{M#他}的身上，我什么都瞧不见。
However, this person, {NICKNAME}, really surprised me... I can't see anything from {M#him}{F#her} at all.
对你而言，什么选择都可去试，什么事都可能去做？世上真的有这样的「自在之人」？
Are you really free to try any choice, to do anything you want? Does an "īśvara" like you actually exist in this world?
I can indeed see the options.
对世人而言，人人皆有可选。只是有的选，却未必能逃得脱命数。
Everyone has options in life. But some options... they can't help you escape your fate.
你是说，你见证过末王的存在？可这不代表你的人生走进「终末」了呀？
You mean, you've witnessed the existence of Terminus? But that doesn't mean your life has entered the Finality, does it?
That's just how we Stellarons are.
也许你说到点子上了。事涉「星神」，占卜往往诸元错乱，不能成卦。
You might be onto something. When it comes to "Aeons," divination often goes haywire and no proper reading can be formed.
在将军看来，这意味着什么？
What do you think this means, general?
<color=#dbc291ff>身为自在之人，仅凭入局便能成就「变数」。</color>是好事，也是坏事。
<color=#dbc291ff>As an īśvara, their mere presence in the playfield creates a "variable" in the game.</color> It's both a blessing and a curse.
我刚才说了，我们六人的吉凶正合六爻之数——若{NICKNAME}为{RUBY_B#--}凶{RUBY_E#}，则卦象落定于坎☵☵，天险难升，地险难行，凶。

As I said before, the weal and woe of us six align with the six lines of divination. If {NICKNAME} represents {RUBY_B#--}Woe{RUBY_E#}, then the hexagram falls to Water ☵☵, where dangers lurk above and below, spelling doom.
若{F#她}{M#他}为{RUBY_B#—}吉{RUBY_E#}，则卦象涨落于巽坎☴☵，利涉大川，吉。
If {F#s}he brings {RUBY_B#—}weal{RUBY_E#}, then the hexagram shifts between Wind and Water ☴☵, presenting a great opportunity to strike. Auspicious.
所以，二相乐园之行的吉凶就在{NICKNAME}的一念之间？
So, the fate of our journey in Planarcadia rests on {NICKNAME}'s decision?
That's way too much responsibility for me to handle.
倒也没有这么玄乎。自在之人虽然拥有远胜凡人的选择权，但依旧身处命数洪流之中。我只想提醒你，慎重选择。
It's not as mystical as it sounds. While an īśvara has far greater freedom of choice than ordinary people, they're still caught in the currents of fate. I just want to remind you to choose wisely.
我不是自在身，自然也无法指点「自在之人」。
I am not an īśvara free from fate, so naturally I can't guide those of that disposition.
言归正传吧，您这趟来，想必不只是为我们算卦？
Back to business. I take it you're not just here to read our fortunes?
来拜会诸位，则是要为之前的「擅作主张」向列车的领航员致歉，并向您借人。
I'm here to greet everyone, to apologize to the Express Navigator for my previous "indiscretions," and to borrow someone from you.
（姬子小姐，你现在明白我是怎么戴上面具了吧？）
(Miss Himeko, now you understand how I ended up wearing this mask?)
（我懂了。她说想借调你行事。我要听听你的想法，如果你不方便拒绝，可以由我来开口——）
(I get it. She says she wants to borrow you for an operation. I want to hear your thoughts. If you're not comfortable refusing, I can speak up for you...)
两位，还是不要说悄悄话了，这声音大得我都能听见啦！
You two, no need for whispers. I can hear you loud and clear!
你是怎么…既然将军听见了，能开诚布公说说您这么做的理由吗？
How did you... Well, since the general heard us, would you mind telling us your reasons for doing this?
我在收集「变数」，此行中我会尽可能肆意妄为，不按常理行事。
I'm collecting "variables." During this journey, I'll be acting as unpredictably and irrationally as possible.
诸位不必奇怪，帝弓天将或以智勇疆场争胜，或以巧手锻冶兵仗，或以生命坐镇幽冥，而我以卜算为联盟争夺命数，绸缪未来。

Don't be surprised. Some Arbiter Generals excel in battle with their wit and valor, others master the art of forging weapons, and some guard the netherworld with their lives. I, however, fight for the Alliance by calculating and manipulating fate itself, peeking into the future.
我来，是为磋商「反毁灭同盟」的事宜，之后去往千星城投票，这是正事。
I'm here to discuss matters regarding the Anti-Destruction Alliance, and then I'll head to Astropolis for the vote. That's the real business.
但按占卜所示，这座乐园世界有着绝非常情的凶险——一巢倾覆，难有完卵。
But according to the divination, this arcadian world faces an extraordinary danger. When a bird's nest falls, no egg will remain unbroken.
…你是说我们所有人会随二相乐园一起覆灭？这又是怎么回事？
...Are you saying we'll all perish along with Planarcadia? What's going on here?
情报指出，{RUBY_B#刃}仙舟重犯{RUBY_E#}试图加入幻月游戏——此人身受丰饶令使「倏忽」血肉的侵染，危险至极。

Intel indicates that a serious {RUBY_B#Blade}Xianzhou criminal{RUBY_E#} is attempting to join the Phantasmoon Games. This individual has been infected by the flesh of Shuhu, the Emanator of the Abundance, and is extremely dangerous.
<color=#dbc291ff>依照本座解读：他压抑已久的凶性终将难以遏制，会为所有人带来灭顶之灾。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>According to my interpretation, his long-suppressed violent nature will eventually become uncontrollable, bringing catastrophic disaster to everyone.</color>
...There's no way he could do that.
占卜显示如此，比起问「他能不能」，倒不如问「他如何做到」？
That's the divination's answer. Rather than asking "whether he could," we should ask, "How would he do it?"
我占得「龙战于野，其血玄黄」一爻。「龙战」一词固然能解作「鏖战」，但是否预示着你和刃的相争酿成大难？

My divination shows "Dragons clash in the wilderness, their ichor dark and yellow." While the term "dragon clash" could simply mean "fierce battle," could it be foreshadowing a great calamity from your conflict with Blade?
也可能，这命数另有其他解读…不过眼下我所得的情报有限，只好暂且先将刃这个最容易生变的危险因素摆在最重要的位置考虑。
Perhaps this prophecy has other interpretations... But with my limited intel right now, I have to prioritize Blade, this most volatile and dangerous factor.
我听人说，对预言的不同理解会导致截然相反的结果。在一切有眉目前，还是存而不论为好。
I've heard that different interpretations of prophecies can lead to completely opposite outcomes. Until things become clearer, it's better to reserve judgment.
存而不论，好。无论如何，此行我携来了一样「刃亲手所锻的造物」，若事情到了难以收拾的地步，也许可以暂时恢复其心智，争取片刻的胜机。

Let's put that aside for now. In any case, I've brought along a "creation forged by Blade himself." If things get out of hand, it might temporarily restore his sanity, giving us a brief chance at victory.
抱歉，命数再度生变，我…必须离开了。
I'm sorry, but fate has shifted once again... I must take my leave.
为了让列车诸位放心，我可以指天信誓，星期日先生不必为仙舟尽任何义务，相反，我将为他提供使团力所能及的一切协助——

To put everyone on the Express at ease, I solemnly swear that Mr. Sunday won't be obligated to do anything for the Xianzhou. On the contrary, our delegation will give him every ounce of aid within our power...
…「力所能及的一切协助」？她消失了。
..."Aid within our power?" She... She's gone.
呀，这么快就…爻老板看来是忙得很呀。
Whoa, that was quick... Madam Yao must be really busy.
此前她也是这样凭空消失的吗？
Has she vanished into thin air like this before?
不错，具体内情我也不太清楚。这在爻老板身上是常事，也不知多久才能回来——她不是有心而为，我代她向各位致歉。
Yes... I don't know the details myself. With Madam Yao it often happens, and no one knows when she'll return. She doesn't do it on purpose. Allow me to apologize on her behalf.
无妨，至少我们知道了仙舟的来意。
No worries, at least we know what the Xianzhou is up to.
眼下，列车有两位同伴仍被困在某处，我和{NICKNAME}必须动身去「酒馆」查清一些线索。
Right now, two companions from the Express are still trapped somewhere. {NICKNAME} and I must head to the tavern to uncover some clues.
需要小女子帮忙的话，姬子小姐请尽管开口。
If Miss Himeko needs my help, please don't hesitate to ask.
是三月和瓦尔特先生出了事？我同你们一起去。
Are March and Mr. Yang in trouble? I'll go with you.
不，你和星期日随那位戎韬将军一起行动——眼下还没到非搬救兵不可的时候。
No, you and Sunday will act together with the Seer Strategist. We're not at the point where we need to call in reinforcements yet.
刃的事情不同寻常，那位戎韬将军的顾虑绝不是空穴来风的担忧。
The situation with Blade is unusual. That Seer Strategist's concerns aren't just baseless worries.
这也是我的请求，我不想看到这场幻月游戏为故乡带来灭顶之灾，用那位将军的话说：请你们…尽力带来「变数」吧！
I don't want to see the Phantasmoon Games bring catastrophe to my homeland, so this is also my request. To put it in the general's words: Please do your best to introduce new "variables"!
我明白姬子小姐的用心。{NICKNAME}，三月和瓦尔特先生就拜托你了。
I understand Miss Himeko's intentions. {NICKNAME}, I'll leave March and Mr. Yang in your care.
…刃的出现，意味着星核猎手在这个世界也有所行动。
...Blade's appearance means the Stellaron Hunters are also on the move in this world.
以此前的种种迹象看来，这场二相乐园之行也至关重要。
From everything we've seen, this mission to Planarcadia is of the utmost importance.
我会跟随爻光将军一同，查清星核猎手的布局。希望这一次无论发生什么，都不会危及你们…我会尽力确保这一点。
I will accompany General Yao Guang to uncover the Stellaron Hunters' schemes. Whatever happens this time, I hope it won't put any of you in danger... I'll do my best to make sure of that.
什么…他们俩被困在了学校里，被迫「成为」了学生和老师？治安官也对这些事情不闻不问？
What... Those two are trapped in the school, forced to "become" a student and teacher? And the security officers are turning a blind eye to all this?
虽然三月和瓦尔特先生听起来暂时没有性命之忧，但谁也不知道火花想做什么。未免夜长梦多，还是尽快将他们解救出来吧。
Though March and Mr. Yang don't seem in mortal danger for now, who knows what Sparxie is plotting. The longer we delay, the worse it could get... Better to rescue them as soon as possible.
「幻月游戏」…真是个奇怪的仪式。对此地的居民来说，这样的「欢愉」到底意味着什么？阿哈为什么要推行这样的游戏？
The Phantasmoon Games... What a bizarre ceremony. What does this type of Elation really mean for the people of this place? Why would Aha promote such a game?
Don't worry. I'm here with you.
无论发生什么，记得告诉我进展。
Whatever happens, keep me posted on how things go.
见过恩公。匹诺康尼至此，已是一别多日，小女子可是日夜挂念您呐。
Greetings, benefactor. It's been many days since we met in Penacony, and I've been thinking of you day and night.
感谢您的关心，小女子身体无恙。
Thank you for your concern. I'm doing well.
虽然停云本事低微，但好在这位爻老板夸我有杀贼之心，正是她想要的「变数」。故此，这趟出行她调了我来寄在帐下听令。这不，就和您再续前缘了嘛！

Though my skills are meager, Madam Yao praised my resolve to kill my enemies, saying that was just the "variable" she sought. That's why she assigned me to temporarily serve under her command for this expedition. And look at that... it's brought us back together again!
可巧，匹诺康尼时我也曾想过，如能和恩公多同行几日就好了——毕竟，小女子被幻胧夺去的缘分，还没全收回来呢。
What fortune! I wished I could travel with you longer back in Penacony, benefactor. After all, I've yet to reclaim the opportunities Phantylia stole from me.
What kind of person is Madam Yao?
小女子可说不好。就像她卜的卦，如谜如雾，令人捉摸不透。也许除却从不现身的{RUBY_B#有无}「尘冥将军」{RUBY_E#}外，帝弓天将中就属这位大人最神秘莫测了。

Hard to say. Like the divinations she casts, she's a riddle shrouded in fog. Apart from the ever-absent {RUBY_B#Youwu}Patina Justice{RUBY_E#}, she's likely the most mysterious of the Arbiter Generals.
How is Madam Yao treating you?
想来应该不至有性命之忧吧~恩公莫怪，跟在这位爻老板的身旁，小女子也习惯起随时开玩笑了。
I'm sure there's no mortal danger, teehee... Please forgive my jest, benefactor. Being around Madam Yao has gotten me into the habit of cracking jokes all the time.
这位将军虽说行事莫测，但却总能先一步予你所求，所以她差遣的人纵有腹诽，也会尽心办事。仔细想来，这位比起卜者更像是绝顶的商人？

Her actions may seem inscrutable, but she always provides what you need ahead of time. That's why even those who grumble still carry out her orders with diligence. In truth, doesn't she seem more like a shrewd merchant than a diviner?
唉，帝弓天将嘛，又有哪个是平庸之辈呢？
But then, when have any Arbiter Generals ever been ordinary?
I'll drop by to see you when I get the chance!
恩公可不要食言喔！我们可以找一间当地酒馆，举杯闲话。
Don't go back on your word, benefactor! We can find a local bar and share a drink while we chat.
爻老板嘱咐，若她遁去身形，要我去约定的地方见面。时候不早了，小女子先行告退了。
Madam Yao instructed me to meet her at our agreed spot if she disappears. It's growing late, so I'll take my leave now.
…欢愉的面具，能映照出灵魂的形状？
...A mask of elation can reflect the shape of one's soul?
老日，能看看你的面具吗？
Sunny, can I take a look at your mask?
在匹诺康尼的装饰艺术里，乌鸦，通常会被用来表现人类梦境中潜在的渴望和低语。
In Penacony's decorative arts, ravens often symbolize the hidden desires and whispers of humans' dreamscapes.
Don't get too carried away now.
放心吧，我曾有过试图登神之举，不会被谒神的殊荣所迷惑。
Don't worry, I once tried to ascend to godhood myself... I won't be dazzled by the honor of an audience with a deity.
参与这场盛事，也是为了能更为深入地了解这片…「乐园」。就像人们身处匹诺康尼时，不能错过谐乐大典一样。
Taking part in this grand event is also about gaining a deeper understanding of this... "arcadia." Just as one cannot miss the Charmony Festival when visiting Penacony.
唔？没有哪条规则要求幻月游戏的谒者必须彼此厮杀吧？
Hmm? There's no rule saying that Supplicants of the Phantasmoon Games have to fight each other, right?
恰恰相反，对「欢愉」来说，笑声不该是从彼此内心发出的共鸣吗？
On the contrary, for the Elation, shouldn't laughter be a resonance that comes from within each other's hearts?
这副面具到底有什么作用？
What's the deal with this mask anyway?
它扣在我脸上后，我似乎察觉到了一些…有趣的声音。
After putting it on, I seemed to hear... curious voices.
面具在向我低语：要我向神明展露自己的「欢愉」，尽力创造奇迹让乐园的民众为之欢笑。
The mask whispers to me... urging me to show my "elation" to the god, to create miracles that will make the people of the arcadia laugh with joy.
Now would be the perfect moment!
踏上欢愉命途的星期日！
Sunday will now embark on the Path of Elation!
等那位爻光将军再度现身，我该去和她谈谈合作的计划了。祝你好运，{NICKNAME}。
When that General Yao Guang shows up again, I should discuss our collaboration plans with her. Good luck, {NICKNAME}.
星际和平公司、假面愚者、仙舟将军、星核猎手、还有无名客……
The IPC, Masked Fools, a Xianzhou general, the Stellaron Hunters, and the Nameless...
有些为同盟而来，有些为星神的游戏而来，无论为了什么，风暴已在这个世界的天空中汇聚成形了。
Some came for the alliance, some for the Aeon's game... Whatever their reasons, a storm is brewing in the skies over this world.
不过眼前至少听到了个好消息，星期日加入了幻月游戏，在和火花的对垒中，他可以帮上我们的忙。
But at least we got some good news. Sunday has joined the Phantasmoon Games. He can help us in our showdown against Sparxie.
去「酒馆」和花火碰头吧，接下来，我们要弄清火花加入幻月游戏的目标，还有她到底想在绘世学院中策划一场怎样的「火花大会」。
Let's rendezvous with Sparkle at the tavern. We must uncover why Sparxie entered the Phantasmoon Games and what sort of "SparxiCon" she's got planned for Graphia Academy.
所以该怎么才能进入酒馆？
So how do we get into the tavern?
我小时候就听过一些都市传说，说「酒馆」的入口存在于这片土地上的每一扇门后。但不经邀请，或是没有机缘寻得路径的人，就无法踏入其中。

When I was little, I heard a few urban legends. They say the entrance to the tavern exists behind every single door in this land. But those who aren't invited, or haven't found their destined path, can never step inside.
这一次，我们已经手握愚者的邀请了。至于开门的钥匙…名片的背面还有一首打油诗：「若想痛饮喧闹，不必费心寻找，留神愚者谜题之邀，引你寻得门扉之钥。」

This time, we already have the Fools' invitation in hand. As for the key to open the door... there's a silly rhyme on the back of the business card: "For revelry and drinks galore, no need to search from door to door. Heed the Fool's riddle with care, to find the key that leads you there."
That rhyme's worse than what Rappa comes up with.
所以，{NICKNAME}，关于「愚者的谜题之邀」…你有什么头绪吗？
So, {NICKNAME}, about the Fool's Riddle... got any leads?
许久之前——你暗自吐槽，都过去这么久了，谁还记得？但你确实记住了，在花火第一次见到你时，她曾对你说起过一个谜语。
A long time ago... You scoff to yourself, who even remembers after all this time? But you do remember. When Sparkle first met you, she told you a riddle.
<color=#dbc291ff>无论抬头或是低头，人类凝望天空时，看到的都是同一轮幻月。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Whether they look up or down, the moon that humanity gazes upon in the sky is always the same Phantasmoon.</color>
抬头还能理解，既然低下了头，又要怎么凝望天空呢？
Looking up makes sense. But looking down... how exactly do you gaze at the sky?
By watching the sky reflected in water.
By gazing at the reflected sky.
{NICKNAME}，看来你和「酒馆」确实有缘。我明白了，谜底是鸽川。
{NICKNAME}, it seems fate ties you to the tavern. I get it now. The answer is Dovebrook.
这趟度假之旅，似乎又回到了咱们最熟悉的「麻烦重重」的状态。
Looks like this vacation trip has gone right back to our usual "trouble magnet" mode.
这才是无名客不得不品的假期。
Now this is the kind of vacation the Nameless just has to savor.
刚才就在这条街，我被一只狸猫偷拍了…
A furbo snapped a pic of me on this street without my consent just now...
无名客有了名气，这可不是什么好事。
Fame isn't exactly good news for the Nameless.
狸了个大谱！浣熊大人，你真的来啦！
Holy furboly! Great Raccoon, you really came!
这儿的事情办得差不多了。算算时间，丹恒与星期日那边也快到了。方便起见，我会通知他们来杂志社碰头。
We're pretty much done here, and Dan Heng and Sunday should be arriving soon as well. I'll just have them meet us here at the publishing house.
Hmm, this place seems to have changed a lot...
有只狸猫在喊你，过去瞧瞧吧？
There's a furbo calling out to you. Why don't we go take a look?
社长大人，请您在电脑前坐好哩！我来告诉您怎么操作~
Please take a seat in front of the computer, President! I'll show you how it works~
...Spirit of the Sky, Spirit of the Earth...
Please give us a new company president~
也许会像整个绘世家族那样，只剩下空有虚名的外壳。
Perhaps they've become like the Graphia family: nothing but empty shells of their former glory.
不不不，我必须纠正你。你要是以为这儿是「酒馆」的全部，那可就大错特错了。
No, no, no, allow me to correct you. If you think this is all there is to the tavern, you're sorely mistaken.
就像一大串葡萄上的一颗果实。这儿只是「酒馆」与这个世界相接的一部分……
Like a single grape on a great bunch, this is just the part where the tavern connects to this world...
抱歉，但这儿看起来…似乎只是一间普通的酒吧？
Sorry, but this looks... like a regular lounge?
哈哈哈，所谓的「二相乐园」也不是什么「乐园」，有人有为此抱怨什么吗？生活不还是照样过嘛？
Hahaha, the so-called "Planarcadia" isn't really an "arcadia" either, but who's complaining? Life goes on, doesn't it?
如果你要找「名副其实」的东西，应该登上星穹列车看看嘛！你知道吗，它居然真的是一架列车，上面找不到任何宇航动力学特征！

If you're looking for something that's "true to its name," take a ride on the Astral Express! Funny thing is, it's literally a train, you know? Can't find a single trace of astronautical engineering on it!
呃…等等，你俩是…星穹列车的领航员，还有车上的浣熊，对吧？我在新闻里见过你们。
Uh... wait, you two are... Navigator of the Astral Express, and the raccoon on board, right? I've seen you in the news.
什么浣熊？是银河球棒侠！
What raccoon? I'm the Galactic Baseballer!
哈哈哈哈哈，朋友们，来大人物啦！来大笑话啦！
HAHAHA! Friends, a big shot is here! A real knee-slapper incoming!
真是列车的人？不是什么角色扮演爱好者吧？——
Are they really from the Express? You're not some cosplay enthusiast, are you?
列车的人也来酒馆？他们有幽默感吗？——
Express folks come to the tavern too? Do they even have a sense of humor?
嗨嗨嗨，给我签个名好吧？就签脚底上，我这辈子不洗——
Hey hey hey, can I get your autograph? Sign the sole of my foot! I'll never wash it again!
兄弟姐妹们，收收好奇心！这两位是我请来的客人！就算是最调皮的孩子也要适可而止，保持礼貌哟！
Everyone, curb your curiosity! These two are my guests. Even the most mischievous among you should know when to stop, and mind your manners!
哟哟，这不是小花火吗？你的笑话我们大家可都听说了……
Well, well, if it isn't little Sparkle? We've all heard your joke...
「假面愚者」去掉假面，那不就只剩下一个蠢货了吗——
Take the Mask from a Masked Fool, and what's left's but a fool...
哎呀呀，「假面愚者」没了蠢货，只有一张空空如也的面具岂不是更好？
Oh my, wouldn't a Masked Fool be better off without the fool? An empty mask sounds even better, no?
What did you do to him?
让他保持两小时的沉默。如果没人把它丢进「黄金告解室」冲掉的话，两小时后，他还能再来找我一次麻烦。
Put him on mute for two hours. If no one flushes him down the "Golden Confessional," he'll be back to hassle me again in two hours.
算是…活着吧？要看你怎么定义「活着」。大部分愚者甚至都不肯承认自己活着，所以他也不能完全算是死了。
Alive... ish? Depends how you define "alive." Most Fools won't even admit they're alive, so he isn't exactly dead either.
别太把傻子的发言当回事，除非你想和他排排坐？
Don't take an idiot's words too seriously, unless you want to join them?
好了，这下终于可以不被打扰地接待客人啦。两位，来这边坐坐，我们聊聊关于那个冒牌货的事情。
Alright, now I can finally entertain my guests without interruptions. You two, this way. Let's talk about the impostor.
喂喂，小灰毛，你要去哪儿？
Hey hey, Gray Hair, where are you headed?
男人疲倦的目光上下打量眼前的年轻人片刻。他微微颔首致意。
The man's weary gaze sizes up the young person before him for a moment. He offers a slight nod in greeting.
你好奇的目光在他的身旁逡巡，他带着一只会说话的…猴？
Your curious gaze circles him. Is that thing by his side a... talking monkey?
他不是我的。他的自由属于他自己。
He's not mine. His freedom belongs to himself.
小朋友，我想你一定把我和你之前见过的某些猿科生物混为一谈了吧？
Kid, I believe you're confusing me with some other primates you've met.
来吧两位，为了迎接你们，进酒吧的第一杯我请，喝点什么？
Alright, you two, first round's on me. What'll it be?
I'm underage. A glass of water please.
Give me the strongest and most hardcore drink you've got!
No thanks. I'd like to stay sober.
哈，这儿是「酒馆」。就算一滴不沾，愚者们的笑话与恶作剧也一定会让你上下颠倒，忘记天地为何物。
Ha! This is a tavern. Even if you don't drink a drop, the Fools' jokes and pranks will turn your world upside down until you can't tell sky from ground!
我们不是来喝酒的，时间分秒流逝。关于火花，你查到什么了吗？
We're not here to drink. Time's ticking. Did you find anything on Sparxie?
别板着个脸嘛，会让桶里的佳酿变酸的。你们没到的时候，勤劳的小花火一直在搜集情报，连一分钟都没闲着。
Don't pull a long face. You'll sour the vintage in the cask. While you were gone, diligent little Sparkle was gathering intel non-stop, and didn't waste a single minute.
火花…她确实假扮成我的模样来过这儿。
Sparxie... She did come here disguised as me.
我打了个电话给乔瓦尼，也许你们不记得他了…他是最近抽签负责管理寄存区的倒霉蛋。老乔告诉我，一周前，「我」来这儿取走了几样东西……

I called Giovanni. You might not remember him... he's the poor sap who drew the short straw to manage the storage area recently. Old Gio told me that a week ago, "I" came here and took a few things...
Among them was a vial of memetic virus.
模因病毒…也难怪她能控制绘世学院，扭曲三月和瓦尔特的认知，让他们误以为自己是学生和老师。
A memetic virus... No wonder she could take over Graphia Academy and distort March and Welt's cognition, making them believe they're a student and teacher.
她要把所有人变成猴子？
She wants to turn everyone into monkeys?
她要把所有人变成傻子？
She wants to turn everyone into fools?
她要和原始博士抢生意？
She wants to undercut Dr. Primitive's business?
八九不离十了，<color=#dbc291ff>所谓的「火花大会」就是散布模因病毒的幌子。</color>
Close enough. The <color=#dbc291ff>so-called "SparxiCon" is a front for spreading a memetic virus</color>.
光知道这一点信息还不够，她要散布什么类型的模因？发病的特征是什么？对她的计划和行动了解更多，才有破解之法。
Knowing that isn't enough. What type of memetic virus is she spreading? What are the symptoms? We need more on her plans and actions before we can counter it.
这我也想到啦，所以我拜访了几位朋友，问出了这个冒牌货出没的地点。要查出更多详细的信息，我们得亲自动手。
Thought of that already. So I visited a few friends and learned where the imposter's been haunting. To dig up details, we'll have to get hands-on.
入此门者，当舍弃一切绝望。想过去，就得取悦我。
Abandon all despair, ye who enter. If you want to pass, then amuse me.
对了，受累问一句，你…不是阿哈本尊吧？
By the way, hate to ask... You're not Aha THEMSELF, are you?
那真是太好了。呵呵，反正就算你是，我也没法辨别你、拦住你，对不？
Well, that's a relief. Heh, not like I could tell if you were or stop you, right?
不，你不是阿哈。呵呵，虽然你有股子会来事儿的气息，但你不是。
No, you're not Aha. Heh. You've got that smooth-talker air, but you're not.
如果你是阿哈的话，你挥挥手就能让我不再忧郁。你做不到吧？
If you were Aha, a wave of your hand would cure my melancholy. You can't do that, can you?
What does that have to do with anything?
这儿不是「欢愉」的酒馆吗？难道你们不欢迎乐子神本尊降临？
Isn't this the tavern of the Elation? Don't you welcome The Laughter gracing you with THEIR presence?
你错了，并非不受欢迎——看到了吗？愚者们在那边立了块牌子：「阿哈、悲悼伶人禁止进入！」…是禁止进入！
You're wrong. It's not that THEY are unwelcome. See that? The Fools put up a sign over there: "Aha and Mourning Actors stay clear from the door!" ...Stay clear!
虽然听起来很可笑，但…这是真的。在六百六十六次邀请阿哈没得到回音后，年轻一代的愚者们集体投票把乐子神开除出了「欢愉」命途。
Ridiculous as it sounds... it's true. After six hundred and sixty-six invitations to Aha went unanswered, the younger Fools voted to expel The Laughter from the Path of Elation.
我懂，就像学生们把老师开除出教室，毫无意义，但气势很足。
I get it. It's like students expelling a teacher from a classroom. The action is meaningless... The message is loud and clear, though.
好了，大门先生，我向你保证，咱们三个里面没有阿哈，也没有悲悼伶人。
All right, Mr. Doorway, I assure you that none of us three is Aha, and none is a Mourning Actor.
唷，是花火啊。哼，是花火吗？不是其他人假扮的花火吧？算了，我分不清，也不在乎。
Ho, it's Sparkle. Hmph, is it really Sparkle? It's not someone else pretending to be Sparkle? I can't tell, and I don't care.
听好了，灰头发的{F#姑娘}{M#小伙}，想让我打开，就得给我来个笑话当是过路费，我一直在等那个能治好我忧郁的笑话。
Listen up, gray-haired {M#lad.}{F#lass.} If you want me to open, pay the toll with saying a joke. I've been waiting for the one joke that can cure my melancholy.
你深深叹了口气，看来你得露一手了——
You let out a deep sigh. Looks like you'll have to show them what you're made of—
The door fell silent for a moment.
可怜的孩子…比起忧郁来说，还是讲一个烂笑话更可怜一些。
Poor child... A bad joke is more pitiful than melancholy.
你没听懂吗？「没有笑话，门先生」和「我希望没有门」，你想怎么理解都行。阿基维利在上，我竟然沦落到了主动给一扇门解释笑话的地步……
Didn't catch it? "No joke, Mr. Doorway," or "There's no way I'll tell a joke." Interpret as you like. By Akivili above, I can't believe I've come to explaining jokes to a door...
门沉默了片刻。被你的烂笑话击中，它突然发出一阵骇人的大笑，像是被一连串机枪子弹打中，陷入死一般的沉默。
The door fell silent for a moment. Struck by your terrible joke, it suddenly burst into a terrifying laugh, like being hit by a barrage of machine gun fire, before falling into a deathly silence.
Be a-door-able and open the door now!
不过是一扇门罢了，什么破笑话收集器。也许门后面根本只是躲着某个灵感枯竭的脱口秀演员，不断从过门而入的客人口中窃取灵感呢？
It's just a door, what a lame joke collector. Maybe there's just some uninspired stand-up comedian hiding behind it, stealing inspiration from everyone who walks through?
门不愿打开？你当然可以选择把它「打」开。
Door won't open? Well, that's not a-door-able.
我没想到，你竟然神通广大到能把我带进「酒馆」，不愧是名侦探的助手。
Didn't expect you to have the pull to get me into the tavern. As expected of a detective's assistant.
早些年我还有幽默感的时代，有个愚者给了我一张邀请函，感谢他吧。
Back when I still had a sense of humor, a Fool gave me an invitation. You can thank him for that.
你还真打算把星核猎手的案子办到底吗？那家伙能付你的可只有黑钱喔？
You're really going to see the Stellaron Hunter case through? They can only pay you in dirty money, you know.
不然咧？弟兄们需要钱。信用点哪分什么黑与白，只分零和一。
What else can I do? The boys need the money. Credits aren't black or white. They're ones and zeros.
好吧。我联系了恶水，他说骗走面具的三个人，其中有一个他似乎在新闻上见过。
All right. I reached out to Caustide. He said that one of the three people who stole the mask looked familiar. He might've seen them in the news.
我按他的描述画了半天疑犯肖像，怀疑那人可能是星穹列车上的无名客，丹恒。
Based on his description, I spent ages sketching the suspect's portrait, and I suspect it might be Dan Heng, the Nameless from the Astral Express.
恶水啊…咱们又欠了他一个人情，这下还不清啦！说起来，丹恒…是仙舟人的名字吧？我是在哪儿听过吗…耳熟得很。
Ah, Caustide... We owe him another favor. No paying this one back, huh? Speaking of which, Dan Heng... That's a Xianzhou name, isn't it? Where have I heard that name before...? It sounds so familiar.
所以，这三人里面哪个是丹恒？灰头发的？还是红头发的？还是那个看起来随时会作妖的黑发小姑娘？
So, which one of these three is Dan Heng? The one with gray hair? The redhead? Or that black-haired girl who looks like she's ready to stir up trouble at any moment?
不，你先别说答案，让我猜猜。
No, don't tell me yet. Let me guess.
我略懂仙舟的语言——「丹」字有一个意思是「红色」。所以丹恒…是红头发的那位小姐，对吧？
I know a bit of the Xianzhou language. The word "dan" can mean "red." So Dan Heng... is the lady with red hair, right?
你的推理能力还是这么感人。行吧，我直接公布答案，这三个人里哪一个都不是丹恒。你平时到底看不看新闻啊？
Your deduction skills never fail to impress. Fine, I'll just give you the answer. None of these three is Dan Heng. Do you even watch the news?
电视、报纸、网络上都是假消息，你让我看什么？
TV, newspapers, the internet... it's all fake news. What do you expect me to look at?
还是谈正事吧。我没找到丹恒行动的踪迹，像是被人抹掉了一样。
Let's get down to business. I couldn't find any trace of Dan Heng's actions. It's like someone wiped them clean.
所以我干脆反其道而行之，盯上了列车组里的其他人，也许顺着{F#她们}{M#他们}能找到面具的线索。
So I decided to try a different approach. Keep tabs on the other members of the Express Crew. Maybe following their trail will lead to clues about the mask.
干得好，老白。对方要往酒馆深处走咯，跟上我。
Nice work, Mister N. They're heading deeper into the tavern. Follow me.
锵锵~欢迎来到「极乐之星」的炫光照耀下——
Ta-da! Welcome to the dazzling lights of the "Blisstar"!
酒馆的中心，二相乐园欢乐的舞池，有些没品位的假面愚者，会把这里当作保持欢笑的诀窍——
The heart of the tavern, Planarcadia's dazzling dance floor. There are some tasteless Masked Fools who consider this place the secret to keeping the laughter going...
假如生活残酷，别去讨公平，摇起来！把自己体内的悲伤摇匀就行了。
If life's cruel, don't beg for fairness. Dance! Shake away that sadness until it's all well-mixed with the joy in your body.
就是悬挂在那儿的巨大灯球啦！对酒馆来说，这东西就像天空中的幻月一样重要。有机会的话，我可以带你到里面开开眼。
That huge light orb up there! For a tavern, it's as essential as the Phantasmoon in the sky. If we get the chance, I can take you inside for a real eye-opener.
说起来，两个月前有个傻瓜在猛灌了几百杯以后突发奇想，打算用超霸王陀螺把它打下来。
Speaking of which, two months ago some idiot, after downing hundreds of drinks, had the bright idea to knock it down with a Super Overlord Spinning Top.
于是大家只好在「极乐之星」的周围加固了一圈钢架，把它密封在「画中世界」里。
So we had to reinforce the Blisstar with a steel frame around it and seal it inside the World in Canvas.
Doesn't the drinksmith care about this nonsense?
你懂的，假面愚者嘛，总爱往酒杯里兑辣椒水，冲马桶里丢炮仗。
You know how the Masked Fools are... Spiking drinks with hot sauce and tossing firecrackers down the toilet.
酒保是件苦差事，没人自愿担纲。打从{RUBY_B#前任酒保}布拉琪{RUBY_E#}消失后，愚者们抽签轮值，挨个担任临时的酒保。
Being a drinksmith is a tough gig. No one volunteers. Since {RUBY_B#previous drinksmith}Bragi{RUBY_E#} vanished, the Fools have been drawing lots to take turns as temporary drinksmiths.
Can't Aha take care of this place?
…阿哈？管管？祂不都被酒馆拒之门外了吗？
...Aha? Take care? Weren't THEY banned from the tavern?
总之，以那位乐子神的性格，祂要是想出手「管管」，只会怂恿某人把这儿炸个底朝天。
And given The Laughter's personality, if THEY "took care" of it, THEY'd just egg someone on to blow the place sky-high.
你说的这个愚者，不会是火花吧？
This Fool you're talking about... It wouldn't happen to be Sparxie, would it?
如果是的话，我现在就该被当成替罪羊，绑在灯球上了。
If it were, I'd already be tied to that light orb as the scapegoat.
言归正传，接下来咱们要去「黄金告解室」，目击证人说火花去过那儿。
Anyway, the next stop is the Golden Confessional. The eyewitness says Sparxie was there.
The Golden Confessional... What kind of place is that?
是个让人放下一切烦恼的地方。哎，说再多也不如亲眼看看，走吧。
A place where you can let go of all your worries. Well, words won't do it justice. Let's go see it for yourself.
目击者说，一周前「我」来过酒馆，灌下几杯「炸弹的第一滴」后，来到了这儿。
Witnesses say a week ago "I" came to the bar, knocked back a few shots of "Bomb's First Drop," then headed here.
「黄金告解室」，豪饮过量的愚者们的救急所。在这儿，咱们抛下多余的部分，轻装上阵前往下一秒。
The Golden Confessional is an emergency shelter for Fools who've had one drink too many. Here, we shed our excess baggage before marching light-footed into the next second.
Wait... isn't this just a bathroom?
黄金告解室就是黄金告解室，它可不是什么厕所！
The Golden Confessional is THE Golden Confessional, not some random bathroom!
这下我老桑博可成了无冕之王喽~
Well well, looks like ol' Sampo's become the king without a crown!
还好，没有想象中的味道…
Phew, it doesn't smell as bad as I imagined...
当然了！这儿只是大家释放坏情绪的地方而已。
Of course! This is just a place where everyone comes to let off some steam.
又见面了，老朋友。听花火说你要来酒馆，老桑博这心里啊，真是装满了高兴！
Well, well, if it isn't my old friend! Sparkle said you'd be coming to the tavern. Old Sampo's heart is bursting with joy!
当然，还有一点点哀伤。你说邀请我天字第一号{F#好姐妹}{M#好哥们}进「酒馆」喝一杯的主意，怎么就让她花火占了先？
And a teensy bit of sorrow. How did Sparkle beat me to inviting my number-one {M#buddy}{F#bestie} to the tavern for a drink?
我就知道在这儿准能见到你！
I knew I'd find you here!
「就知道」？你怎么就把老桑博和这儿联系在了一起？这话有点伤人了，{F#姐们}{M#哥们}。
You knew? And what made you link me to this place? That's kinda harsh, {M#bro.}{F#sis.}
你好啊，姬子小姐，好久不见啦。
Hello, Miss Himeko. Long time no see.
