桑博先生，你好啊。这一回你为什么生意而来？
Mr. Sampo, hello. What business brings you here this time?
跟生意无关，只是来偿还一点人情旧债罢了。
No business, just here to repay an old favor.
我们面前这位愚者小姐向我发来一条求助短信。说有人冒充她的模样在「酒馆」招摇过市。
Miss Fool here sent me a message asking for h-e-l-p. Someone's been parading around the tavern, impersonating her.
这可真是条大新闻！从来只有花火大人冒充别人，没想到有一天玩鹰的也会被鹰啄了眼——
Well, now this is some juicy news! Miss Sparkle's usually the one impersonating others, but look how the tables have turned. The trickster's getting a taste of her own medicine!
闭嘴吧，桑博。我让你来是来偿还人情的，可没让你来传我的八卦。
Shush, Sampo. I brought you here to repay a favor, not to gossip about me.
嗨呀，我也经历过丢失面具的窘境，多亏花火大人大发慈悲，老桑博才不至于走投无路。这不，今天您有求，我必应！
Oh, I've suffered the embarrassment of losing my mask myself. Thanks to Miss Sparkle's mercy, I didn't end up stranded. So here I am today, ready to help you out, no questions asked!
Alright then, let's get to work!
Get to work? What are we doing?
当然是…从这些人类倾吐烦恼的「宝座」中，翻找那位火花小姐留在此处的烦恼。
Naturally... We'll fish around in these "thrones" where humans dump their worries and find the worries that Miss Sparxie left behind.
你想让我们帮你…通马桶？
You want us to... unclog your toilet?
Don't make this kind of jokes!
两位也别太惊讶，先让我来科普一下假面愚者保持心态健康的小秘密——
Don't be too shocked, you two. Let me share a little secret about how we Masked Fools stay mentally healthy...
喝下「炸弹的第一滴」之类的解忧饮品，身体里的有害忆质：什么痛苦啊、烦恼就会一股脑儿地被催吐出来。
Drink a mood-lifter like "Bomb's First Drop," and all the harmful memoria in your body — you know, the pain, the worries — gets purged in one go.
愚者们就是靠这个乐乐呵呵地，毫无心理负担地进行各种恶作剧了。
That's how Fools pull pranks and have a blast without a shred of guilt.
所以，这个厕所的地下沉积着愚者们的忆质。而你想从里面找出火花的烦恼，捕捉她行动前的想法？
So all that memoria has settled under this bathroom. And you want to sift through it to find Sparxie's worries... and catch her thoughts before she acts?
运气好的话，也许还能挖出如何打败她的秘密。怎么了，大姐头，你脸色不太对劲？
If luck's on our side, maybe we'll even dig up the secret to beating her. What's wrong, ma'am? You don't look so hot.
对要做的事，我没意见，但是…徒手干这个？我拒绝。
I've got no objection to the task, but... doing this bare-handed? I refuse.
放心吧，老桑博办事，哪次不是有备而来的？放心，绝不会让你捡个大便宜！
Don't worry, when has ol' Sampo ever come unprepared? Trust me, I won't let you get off that easy!
对不起，拿错了，是这玩意儿。
你们听说过寻水棒吗？…算了，原理我就不啰嗦说明了。
Hey, have you heard of a dowsing rod? Well ...Forget it, I'll spare you the theory.
我把这玩意儿的钻头和花火的脾气做了同调，它会钻出类似情绪的忆质喷泉。
I tuned the drill bit to resonate with Sparkle's temperament. It'll drill out memoria fountains with similar emotions.
不过丑话说在前头，用的时候可得注意安全啊！毕竟火花来这儿都是一周前的事情了，要是钻出些其他什么怪东西，你们可得提防着点。
But fair warning: Use it carefully! It's been a week since Sparxie was here. Keep your guard up in case something else comes bursting out.
这么多马桶，从哪儿找起？
With so many toilets, where do we start?
要问老桑博的话，答案只能是碰碰运气了。
Well, If you ask me... leave it to luck.
我们哪儿来的时间碰运气？我的雷达告诉我，那个自高自大的冒牌货要挑地方排出烦恼，也一定会挑最高的——
We don't have time for luck. My radar says that pompous imposter would pick the highest spot to vent...
没错，就是那个「黄金宝座」。去试试看吧！
Exactly, the "Golden Throne." Give it a try!
{F#姐们}{M#哥们}，你自己选个下钻的地方，开始掘金吧！
{M#Bro,}{F#Girl,} pick a spot to drill and start mining that gold!
桶里传来激烈的水声，仿佛人类的烦恼想要喷薄涌出。
Violent splashing sounds came from the bucket, as if human worries were about to burst forth.
突然，有什么东西从下水道里出现了！
Suddenly, something emerged from the sewer!
What in the world is this?
啊？这看起来可不像是她的烦恼。
Huh? That doesn't seem like something she'd be worried about.
枉我费尽心机，小心翼翼地混进来。我还以为被发现就会壮烈成仁呢……
After going through all this trouble to sneak in... Thought I'd go down in a blaze of glory if I got caught...
…这个地方到底是怎么回事？！假面愚者堕落成这个模样了吗？
...What the heck is going on with this place!? Have the Masked Fools really fallen this far?
我啊，是一个悲悼伶人！很明显的吧。
Me? I'm a Mourning Actor! Isn't it obvious?
你看不出来吗？我现在就很悲伤啊！
Can't you tell? I'm very sad right now!
不妨告诉你吧，我身负着一项悲壮的使命：「酒馆」下达了禁止伶人入内的禁令后，我苦心孤诣潜入此处，并向他们揭示「命运恒久悲哀」的真理。
Let me tell you about my tragic mission: After the tavern issued a ban on Mourning Actors, I painstakingly snuck in here to reveal to them the truth that "destiny is eternally sorrowful."
我失败了！我粉碎了潜入过程中的每一个障碍——但潜入的结果却粉碎了我！
I failed! I smashed every obstacle during the infiltration, only for the outcome to smash me!
昨天，我在吧台向大家揭示我身份的谜底，并且向他们讲述了一个悲壮的故事，做好了准备接受他们最残酷的刑罚和最遥远的流放。
Yesterday, I went on stage at the bar and revealed my true identity to everyone and told them a tragic tale, bracing myself for their harshest punishment and farthest exile.
可是他们…这帮愚者在台下不停吹口哨，还有人给我买了好几轮饮料。有人甚至走上台拥抱我，夸我是「史无前例的假面愚者」。
But they... these Fools kept whistling from below, and some bought me several rounds. Someone even came up on stage to hug me, praising me as "the unprecedented Masked Fool".
桶里传来激烈的水声，仿佛人类的烦恼想要喷薄涌出。
Violent splashing sounds came from the bucket, as if human worries were about to burst forth.
突然，有什么东西从下水道里出现了！
Suddenly, something emerged from the sewer!
What in the world is this?
当心啊{F#姐们}{M#哥们}！这是哪个愚者胡乱塞进下水道的怪物吧？
Watch out, {M#bro!}{F#sis!} Must be some weird thing a Fool dumped into the sewers, huh?
你靠近这散发无上威光的宝座，毫无疑问，它是纯金的。
You draw near the throne that is radiating an aura of supreme power. It's unquestionably made of solid gold.
构成它的每一颗原子曾来自中子星的碰撞、超新星的爆发……但假面愚者却将星星们珍贵的泪水锻造成了承接人类烦恼的器皿。也许在他们眼中，这样便幽了宇宙一默。

Every atom that makes it up came from neutron star collisions and supernova bursts... Yet the Masked Fools forged these precious tears of the stars into vessels to hold human worries. Perhaps in their eyes, this was their way of playing a cosmic joke.
你发现一个问题，比起这王座的高大，你的身材委实渺小，没法将钻头探进水里。
You notice a problem: Compared to the towering throne, you're way too small to reach and dip the Drill Bit into the water.
桑博，你刚才是怎么上去的？
Sampo, how did you get up there just now?
瞧我这记性，走边上那条管道。
Oh right, silly me. Through that pipe on the side.
黄金宝座散发着令人目眩的威严光晕，你真怕自己脚一滑跌入其中。
The golden throne emanates a dazzling aura of authority. You're genuinely afraid you might slip and fall right into it.
你猛力将钻头探入马桶！
You forcefully thrust the drill bit into the toilet!
突然，马桶开始急促向外喷水，有什么东西从下水道里出现了！
Suddenly, the toilet starts gushing water violently, and something emerges from the drain!
看，我说什么来着，那个冒牌货的烦恼出现了！
See? What did I tell you? The impostor's worries have appeared!
真是件稀罕事！过去火花花一直都是顺着网络和大家亲切交流，生平第一次居然顺着下水道网络和自己的粉丝见面了。
What a rare sight! Sparxicle used to always connect with everyone online. But now, for the first time, she's meeting her fans through the sewer network!
抱歉，我们可是你的黑粉！
老实交代吧，你偷走那筒模因病毒想用它做什么？是想借着「火花大会」的幌子把大家变成唯命是从的白痴，还是上蹿下跳的猴子？
Come clean now! What are you planning to do with that memetic virus you stole? Use SparxiCon as a front to turn everyone into mindless zombies, or dancing monkeys?
我怎么会伤害我最最亲爱的粉丝们呢？
How could I ever harm my dearest, most beloved fans?
你劫持了一整座学校的师生，把他们变成你的傀儡，为你加入「幻月游戏」鞍前马后效劳——你该不会想狡辩自己是为他们做了这些的吧？
You took an entire school of teachers and students hostage and turned them into your puppets to help you enter the Phantasmoon Games. You're going to argue that you did it all "for them"?
那还用问！打从我被创造出来的第一天起，我就一直在执行我的创造者要求我做的事情——倾听每个粉丝的提问，用心揣摩他们的痛苦和烦恼。
Of course I did! From the very first day I was created, I've been doing exactly what my creator asked of me: listening to every fan's questions, empathizing with their pain and troubles.
他们为自己的平凡而自卑，为自己被喜欢的人忽视而伤心落泪，为渴望得到他人认可而努力而想要出人头地……
They feel insecure about being ordinary, cry when ignored by those they like, and strive to stand out because they desperately want others' approval...
所有这些心愿，火花都听见了，也会回应！
Sparxie hears every wish, and she answers!
借着这次「幻月游戏」开启的时刻，借由「欢愉」之主的仪式满足他们——
During these Phantasmoon Games, I'll grant their wishes through the Ceremony of the Master of Elation...
不，我会让他们每个人都拥有一项选择，选择成为「我」。
No. I'll give each of them a choice... the choice to become "me."
因为在他们的潜意识里，他们人人都渴望成为火花，人人都想戴上这副光鲜亮丽的面具，在网络上吸引别人的目光，享受别人的赞美。
Because deep down, every one of them longs to become Sparxie. To wear this dazzling mask, capture the internet's attention, and bask in praise.
你们应该听过那句话吧：「在未来，每个人都有机会出名十五分钟。」
You must have heard that saying: "In the future, everyone gets their fifteen minutes of fame."
现在，这个机会到了，<color=#dbc291ff>「火花大会」会让每个观众都成为我。</color>
Now, that moment has come. <color=#dbc291ff>SparxiCon will turn every spectator into me.</color>
玩真的啊？她打算用模因病毒把所有人都转变成自己？
For reals? She plans to use a memetic virus to turn everyone into herself?
原来谜底一直就在谜面上！…不得不说，这个想法，很花火。
Ah, the answer was right there in the riddle all along! ...y'know, I gotta say, that's very Sparkle.
不愧是我的冒牌货，确实疯得有够厉害！
As expected of my impostor. You're absolutely bonkers!
姐姐，现在是自吹自擂的时候吗？一想到我马上就要变成你的样子，我可是一点儿也笑不出来啊！
Sis, is now the time to be tooting your own horn? Just thinking about being turned into a copy of you... I can't even force a smile!
我的{F#姐们}{M#哥们}，这到底哪里欢愉啦？
{M#Bro,}{F#Girl,} what part of this is elating?
喔？到底谁更有资格定义「欢愉」？乐子神吗？愚者吗？公司吗？还是…乐园网络上每一个寻求欢乐的「我」呢？
Oh? And who gets to define "elation"? The Laughter? The Fools? The IPC? Or... every "me" seeking joy on the arcadian internet?
和大家以为的相反，「幻月游戏」的参赛者从来不是你、我这样的谒者，而是那些注视我们的观众。
Contrary to popular belief, the masters of the Phantasmoon Games were never us, the Supplicants, but the spectators watching us.
很遗憾，星际和平网络让人看到了银河里的其他世界。大家的眼界一旦打开，要求就会越来越高，总觉得所听所闻所见不够新鲜、不够有趣、不够刺激。
Sadly, the Interastral Peace Network showed people other worlds in the cosmos. Once horizons widen, expectations climb... nothing they hear or see feels fresh, interesting, or thrilling enough.
每个人也害怕自己在别人眼中不够新鲜、不够有趣、不够刺激。
And everyone fears that they're outdated, uninteresting, or unexciting in others' eyes.
于是整个世界就像一节脱轨的列车，正在驶向刺激和疯狂——星穹列车的无名客，我说的对吗？
So the world's like a derailed train, racing toward thrills and madness... Nameless of the Astral Express, am I wrong?
一团烦恼也认得出我们吗？
Would a bundle of worries even recognize us?
你真的只是一团烦恼吗？
Are you really just a bundle of worries?
Bingo，猜中啦！我就是她的一部分——
Bingo, you got it! I'm a part of her...
只要有屏幕、有我的观众在…到处都会有我的眼睛、我的耳朵。
Wherever there's a screen, wherever my audience is... my eyes and ears will be there too.
我倒想看看，你和这个旧型号能做到什么地步。你们挣扎得越带劲，在「火花大会」上向大家直播星穹列车全员「脱轨」的名场面就会越精彩！
I want to see how far you and this outdated model can go. The harder you struggle, the more spectacular it'll be when I livestream the Astral Express crew's "derailment" at SparxiCon!
我很期待你们的反抗哦，无名客。
I'm looking forward to your resistance, Nameless.
伙计们，当心！这家伙要动真格了！
Heads up, everyone! She's getting serious!
我说花火，你只让我给你「干脏活」，可没说还要兼职打手啊！这笔精神损失费你得补给我啊。
Listen Sparkle, you only asked me to do your "dirty work," but you never said anything about being your thug! You owe me compensation for emotional damage.
再过一阵子大家伙就要变成「我」啦。桑博，先从钱眼里爬出来一会儿，行吗？
Everyone's going to become "me" soon! Sampo, crawl out of your money pit for a moment, will you?
二相乐园的「欢愉」…竟然变成了这样。
To think Planarcadia's "Elation" would end up like this...
我还没离开这儿的年纪，网络不过是用来分享资料的东西。至于直播、虚拟偶像之类的娱乐，更是闻所未闻……
Back when I still lived in this place, the internet was just for sharing information. Live-streaming and virtual idols? We'd never even heard of them...
这次回来，像是一脚踏进了一个陌生的地方，有种回到家，家却已不在原地的错觉。
Coming back now feels like stepping into a foreign land... like returning home only to find home isn't where it used to be.
无论如何…这绝不是欢愉。
Either way... this is definitely not elation.
这只是裹着欢乐外壳的疯狂罢了……
It's just madness wrapped in a cheerful shell...
她笃定了我们就算知道计划要做什么也无力挽回，但我不想就这么认输。
She's convinced that we'll be powerless to stop her plan even if we know what it is, but I'm not ready to roll over just yet.
我知道，我知道，就连我自己也不想变成这个冒牌货的样子…虽然差得不多。
I know, I know. Even I don't want to turn into that phony's look-alike... though we're not that different.
既然愚者会在「酒馆」里收藏模因病毒这样危险的东西，想必也准备了对应的防范措施吧？
Since the Fools stash dangerous things like memetic viruses in the tavern, I assume they must've also prepared some countermeasures?
哈哈，大姐头你真是高看咱们愚者了。这儿是「酒馆」，不是有条不紊的黑塔空间站。
Haha, ma'am, you give us Fools too much credit. This is the tavern, not the well-ordered Herta Space Station.
不过，我确实知道一个地方！运气好的话，应该能逮着个模因病毒清理大师。
But I do know a place! With some luck, we might find a memetic virus clean-up expert.
好好好，既然大家有了线索，也不缺战斗的意志，老桑博今天的活儿也该收工了。
Alright, alright, now that you folks have a lead and no shortage of fighting spirit, old Sampo's calling it a day.
星穹列车总有办法解决危机的，不是吗？有大人物在场，我这个小配角自然没有抢戏的必要了吧？
The Astral Express always has a way of handling crisis-es, doesn't it? With the big shots here, a sidekick like me doesn't need to steal the spotlight.
到时候真要是碰上了棘手的麻烦，你们再摇老桑博也不迟？嘿嘿，我会给各位报个优惠价的。
If you run into real trouble, you can always ring old Sampo then. Hehe, I'll even give you folks a special discount... Sorta.
…「酒馆」里为什么还藏着一座医院？
...Why is there a hospital hidden inside the tavern?
当然是因为能成为愚者的人，多少有些大病——不是头疼脑热的那种，是…心病。
Well, because those who can become Fools are all a bit sick in the head. Not your regular headaches and fevers, but... matters of the heart.
每次有人失心疯地在酒馆里捅了什么娄子，比如把鼻行兽寄生虱洒到每个角落，又或者往酒桶里掺恶语吐真剂……

Every time someone goes bonkers and stirs up trouble in the tavern, like scattering Nosewalker parasite ticks in every corner, or spiking the beer barrels with truth serum that makes people spew insults...
每回大家被闹个鸡犬不宁的时候，总会有愚者出于「欢愉」精神愿意提供治疗。没错，就是送到这儿，「致命玩笑」。
For each time the whole place goes topsy-turvy, there's always some Fool who, in the spirit of the Elation, volunteers to treat them. Yep, they get sent right here, to "Fatal Joke."
怪了，怎么今天连个假扮医生的人影都瞧不见？
Strange, why isn't there even a fake doctor around today?
所以这里没有真的医生？
So there aren't any real doctors here?
就算某个愚者说自己持有合法行医执照，你也不敢信他，是不是？
Even if some Fool claims to have a legit medical license, you wouldn't dare trust them, would you?
请患者不要在走廊上吃牛肉锅，如需用餐，请叫上院长一起吃。谢谢。
Attention patients: Please refrain from eating beef hotpot in the hallway. If you wish to dine, please invite the hospital director to join you. Thank you.
请整形外科哈特曼医生速到院长室。本院没有整形外科，你小子到底是谁！
Would Dr. Hartman from Plastic Surgery please report to the director's office immediately? This hospital doesn't even have a plastic surgery department... Who on earth are you?
请精神卫生科钟珊医生速到一号诊室。打牌三缺一。谢谢。
Dr. Zhongshan from Mental Health Care, please report to Exam Room 1. We're one player short for cards. Thank you.
...Is this a theater or a hospital?
警报，前方发现病人！前方发现病人！请有序排队挂号，等待医生入场诊治。
Alert! Patient detected ahead! Patient detected ahead! Please line up in an orderly fashion for registration and wait for the doctor to begin consultations.
<unbreak>01</unbreak>号病人：阿基维利！有没有「阿基维利」{F#小姐}{M#先生}？
Patient #01: Akivili! Is there a {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} Akivili?
病历显示症状为「星核」的「阿基维利」{F#小姐}{M#先生}在吗？请前往一号诊室就诊。
{M#Mr.}{F#Miss} Akivili, diagnosed with Stellaron symptoms per the records, are you present? Please proceed to Exam Room 1.
…他们都指名道姓了，「阿基维利」{F#小姐}{M#先生}，你就进去瞧瞧呗。
...They called you by name, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} "Akivili." You might as well go take a look.
你终于回来啦，「阿基维利」。
我看了看你的临床记录，星核的病症非常稳定，只需要继续观察就行。
I've reviewed your clinical records. Your Stellaron symptoms are stable. Continued observation will suffice.
哈哈，{NICKNAME}！真是缘分呐，从仙舟放生帮那次奇遇结束后，我一直在想，你这样有趣的人到底什么时候会光临「酒馆」。
Haha, {NICKNAME}! Talk about fate! Ever since our little escapade with the Unshackled on the Xianzhou, I've been wondering when someone as interesting as you would grace our tavern.
下次来吧台找我，我请你喝一杯加了拓扑橄榄和伯纳德分形椒的饮料。
Next time you come to the bar, I'll treat you to a drink with topology olives and Barnsley fractal pepper.
告诉你个好消息，你现在还不用急着接受治疗。不过你身边那位花火小姐可就难说咯。
Good news for you: you don't need to rush into treatment just yet. Though I can't say the same for Miss Sparkle over there.
Patient #02, Miss Sparkle, please come in!
你是少数几个没把我和那个冒牌货认错的人，「医生」。
You're one of the few who didn't mistake me for that impostor, "Doctor."
不过，我得提醒你，花火大人可没病，我健康得很。
But just a reminder: Yours truly isn't sick. I'm perfectly healthy.
来这儿的每个人都说他们自己很健康。
Everyone who comes here says they're perfectly healthy.
我看过那么多病人，你绝对算得上里面症状最严重的那个。看到你的第一眼，我就可以初步下个诊断结论，你的病因是…「自我迷失」。
I've seen so many patients, and you're among the most severe. I could already make an initial diagnosis at first glance. Your ailment is... "loss of self."
一个人如果能幻化成一万个角色，那她还能记得自己最初的模样吗？
If someone can transform into ten thousand characters, would she still remember her original self?
好问题。但是，一个人如果能幻化成一万个角色，那她自己最初的模样还重要吗？
Good question. But if someone could become ten thousand characters, does the original even matter anymore?
说个题外话，医生，你对治疗模因病毒的方案熟不熟？
By the way, doc, are you familiar with any treatment protocols for memetic viruses?
模因病毒！我听说了，市里面送来几例病例。病人有个共同点，他们都是重度网络用户。
Memetic viruses! I've heard about it. The city sent over a few cases. The patients had one thing in common: They were all heavy internet users.
病历就放在房间里，你可以看看嘛。
The medical records are in the room. You can take a look if you want.
病历就放在房间里，你可以看看嘛。
The medical records are in the room. You can take a look if you want.
开玩笑吧？这是…爻光将军的病历？
No way... Are these... General Yao Guang's medical records?
你随手翻动电脑桌面的文档，尚未归档的往期病历简直人才辈出。
You casually browse through the documents on your computer desktop, finding those unarchived medical records are a real parade of characters.
一位患者自称是太一本尊，给她点赞的人都是受赐福的「秩序」行者。
A patient claims to be Ena incarnate, and those who give them a thumbs up are blessed pathstriders of the Order.
下一页记录更为荒诞，患者宣称他才是太一，那个自称是太一的病人，其实是疯掉的药师。
The next record is even more absurd. The patient claims that HE is Ena, and that the person who claims to be Ena is actually Yaoshi who has gone mad.
下一页，患者四处寻找「空格键」，他认为自己所在的系统没有跳跃功能。再下一页……
Next page, the patient searches everywhere for the "Space Bar," believing that their system lacks a jump function. Next page...
你下意识地移开目光，有的事情，还是不要知道的太多为好。
You instinctively look away. Some things are better left unknown.
病历就放在书架上，左手第一个文件。
The medical records are on the bookshelf, first file on the left.
城市里已经开始出现受害者了吗？
Are there already victims in the city?
要想清除模因病毒，帮助零号病人认清现实可是治疗的重要一环。
To eliminate the memetic virus, helping Patient Zero face reality is a crucial phase of the treatment.
你从没来过「致命玩笑」吗？
You've never been to Fatal Joke before?
这不奇怪，我在「酒馆」呆着的时间不多。除此之外，我必须重申，我很健康。
That's not surprising. I don't spend much time at the tavern. And to reiterate: I'm perfectly healthy.
哈哈，我喜欢讳疾忌医的病人，我会亲手击碎他们的自信。
Haha, I love patients who deny their illness. I'll personally shatter their self-confidence.
花火小姐，接下来我要为您开具一份详细的诊断报告！就趁这工夫，请您和同病相怜的病友谈谈吧。
Miss Sparkle, I'm going to write up a detailed diagnosis report for you! In the meantime, why don't you chat with your fellow patients who share your affliction?
花火小姐，在诊断结束前，还请您在这个房间稍等片刻。
Miss Sparkle, please wait in this room until the consultation is complete.
你好啊，你也和我被同样的疾病困扰吗？
Hey there! Are you also troubled by the same illness as me?
我曾经患上过一种名叫「愚者」的病。
I once suffered from a disease called "Fool."
我的身上长出了一个名为「花火」的假面愚者，她慢慢和我融为了一体。她用我来承担扮演时所有的痛苦，她让我遍体鳞伤，自己却狡猾地躲过了一切……

A Masked Fool named "Sparkle" grew out of me, slowly becoming one with me. She used me to bear all the pain caused by her performances, left me battered and bruised, while she slipped away from everything...
不过我的运气够好，我找到了这个名叫「花火」的病灶，我把她…把这颗万恶的毒瘤排出了体外。
But I was lucky enough to find this tumor called "Sparkle," and I... expelled this malignant growth from my body.
你只是个被我抛下的道具而已！
You're just a tool I discarded!
Sparkle, do you still remember me?
今天叫对我名字的人可比过去一周多多了！好感动！
More people got my name right today than in the past week! I'm so touched!
我是你最初的面具啊…「花火型角色」面具。
I am your original mask... the "Sparkle Role" mask.
就是那种生命短暂而璀璨的少女类型角色：和仇敌同归于尽的复仇者、殉情的痴情儿、陷入狂乱的年轻艺术家……
The archetype of a bright maiden doomed for a short life: the avenger who perishes with her nemesis, the lover who dies for love, the young artist driven to madness...
你用我赢得了名声、掌声和数不尽的热切目光——可为什么却要残忍地抛下我呢？
You used me to win fame, applause, and countless eager gazes... so why would you cruelly cast me aside?
求求你，再佩戴我一次吧……
一个演员最不该做的，就是让自己的存在感被捆绑在某一类角色上呢~
The worst thing an actor should do is be tied down to one type of role.
你还是给我安心躺好吧！
Do yourself a favor and stay down!
是、是啊。我一直按着她的要求，保持情绪高昂呢~
Y—Yeah. I'm keeping my spirits high, just like she asked!
花火花火，是你告诉我，爱笑的面具运气不会太差，不是吗？
Sparkle, Sparkle, you're the one who told me that a smiling mask will never have bad luck, aren't you?
这个世界不想看到太多悲伤的、残忍的、愤怒的、痛苦的情绪…是你告诉我，任何时候只要微笑就好。
This world doesn't want to see too much sadness, cruelty, rage, or pain... You told me that I just need to smile, no matter what.
我明明都做到了…但你，为什么要抛下我呢？我现在……我现在只想大吼！大哭！大叫！
I did everything you asked... but why did you abandon me? Right now... Right now, I just want to scream! To cry! To shout!
<size=36>I just want to... DEVOUR YOU WHOLE!!!</size>
你到底抛弃了多少面具啊？
Just how many masks have you thrown away?
别在意啦！每个人一生都要抛下同样多的自我……
Don't worry about it! Everyone sheds just as many versions of themselves in a lifetime...
不，我不要再长出「花火」来——
No, I don't want "Sparkle" to grow out of me again...
拜托，把我和那些面具统统戴上吧，就算你没有那么多脸——
Please... put on all the masks, even if you don't have that many faces...
来啊——让我吃了你！吞下你！
Come on, let me eat you! I'll swallow you whole!
花火小姐，诊断有结论了。您的主要成分是疯狂、幽默感和表演型人格。很不幸，您的配比失衡，早已病入膏肓了。
Miss Sparkle, I have your results. Your main components are madness, humor, and a theatrical personality. Unfortunately, the proportions are badly imbalanced. You're beyond saving.
但，不幸中的万幸是，你的面具从你身上脱落了！她自由了！
But the silver lining is, your mask has fallen off! She's free at last!
这就是一切大家不幸的开始啊。我抛下的每一张面具里还从没有哪一个主意和脾气都这么大的。
And that's where everyone's misfortune began. None of the masks I've cast off ever had such strong opinions or such a temper.
她不仅仅是你的虚拟形象…
She's not just your virtual persona...
火花也是你的愚者面具？
Is Sparxie also one of your Fool's Masks?
她不用再受你的理性之癌侵蚀，她可以做任何你想做而不敢做的事情。
She no longer needs to be corroded by your cancer of rationality. Now, she can do anything that you wanted to do but didn't dare to do.
笑话，世界上还有什么花火大人不敢做的事情？
Ha! As if there's anything Miss Sparkle wouldn't dare to do!
举例来说…不敢佩戴一张面具太久。
For example... you don't dare wear any one mask for too long.
你像蝴蝶蜕去旧皮那样不断抛弃着每一张面具，只为了不被它们定义、束缚，你害怕停下来，停留在某个刻板印象里，你害怕自己有一天不够「欢愉」——

Like a butterfly shedding old skin, you keep discarding every mask, just so you won't be defined or bound by them. You're afraid to stop, to be stuck in some stereotype. You're afraid that one day you won't be "elating" enough...
——所以你才画出了「火花」小姐，在网络上成为她。
...That's why you drew Miss "Sparxie," and became her online.
作为一张光鲜亮丽的面具，人人都会向她倾诉，人人都想成为她，人人都为她贡献出自己的有趣点子，你本以为这会给你的「欢愉」注入生命力——
As a dazzling mask, everyone confides in her, everyone wants to be her, everyone feeds her their clever ideas. You thought this would inject new life into your "elation"...
但很可惜，<color=#dbc291ff>一旦戴上了面具，人就成了面具的附属，人们只在乎面具描绘的形象，不会有人关心底下的你。</color>
But sadly, <color=#dbc291ff>once the mask is on, you become its accessory. People care only about the image the mask paints. No one cares about the you beneath.</color>
而这，就是她拥有生命的原因！
And that is why she came to life!
人类的认同和渴望，会顺着网络的根系为她提供绽放的养料：她会成为一朵妖花，顺应所有人的愿望让人佩戴自己，复制自己，开遍整个二相乐园！多美丽的景象啊……

Human recognition and desire will flow through the internet, providing nourishment for her to bloom: She'll become a bewitching flower, conforming to everyone's wishes, letting them wear her, become her, and blossom across all of Planarcadia! What a beautiful sight...
医生，你有阻止她的办法吗？
Doctor, do you have a way to stop her?
<color=#dbc291ff>「火化花火」，这就是我能开出的最佳治疗方案。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Cremate Sparkle. That's the best treatment I can prescribe.</color>
噗，我还以为你能有什么高招呢？
Pfft. And here I thought you had something clever.
毕竟，一切痛苦有且只有一种彻底的疗法：让自己消失，对吧？
After all, there's only one radical cure for all suffering: make oneself disappear, right?
花火小姐。可不要觉得我是在对你开玩笑。我只在「酒馆」以外的地方才会没个正形。
Miss Sparkle, don't think I'm joking around with you. I only misbehave outside the tavern.
而在这里，我是个医生，不带引号的那种，所以我的疗法也真实有效——一般来说，愚者消失时，她的面具也会失去力量成为死物，毕竟你们是互为表里的存在。

But here I am a doctor, without quotation marks. My treatment is real and effective. Generally, when a Fool vanishes, their mask loses its power and becomes a dead thing. You're two sides of the same coin, after all.
不过，关于「火花」…我说不好，因为在「火花大会」上要佩戴她的，将是二相乐园的亿万普通人，这些人会为她提供滋养和力量。所以，你们的时机稍纵即逝——

But as for "Sparxie"... I can't say for sure. During SparxiCon, she'll be worn by millions of ordinary people in Planarcadia, feeding her with sustenance and strength. Your window of opportunity is therefore fleeting...
去吧，躺到那张床上去，和你的朋友们告别吧。按下那颗按钮，「护士」会过来把你推走。
Go on, lie down on that bed and say goodbye to your friends. Press that button, and the "nurse" will come wheel you away.
酒馆里有扇门，确定、一定以及肯定能通往赛杜尼拉默一颗还没熄灭的恒星。「护士」会把你推到那儿去，一了百了。
There's a door in the tavern that absolutely, positively, leads to a still-burning star in Sedounirama. The "nurse" will send you there, and that'll be the end of it.
Then I'll have to... be impolite.
花火小姐，{NICKNAME}，选择已经交给你们了。至于我…乐子神在上，我得赶快搭下一班飞船离开这破地方了。
Miss Sparkle, {NICKNAME}, the choice is yours. As for me... By The Laughter above, I've got to catch the next ship out of this dump.
假面愚者的面具，代表着你们想要成为的样子。你们用它来聚焦自己的力量，但同样面具也会渐渐束缚住你们。
The mask of the Masked Fool represents what you wish to become. You use it to focus your power, but the mask will gradually bind you as well.
这就是你一直在逃避火花的原因。她从你这边偷走的不只是一筒模因病毒…还有你的力量。
That's why you've been avoiding Sparxie all this time. She didn't just steal a vial of memetic virus... She stole your strength.
也难怪，吧台的愚者说了这样的笑话：「假面愚者」失去了假面，剩下的不过是个愚者而已。
No wonder the Fool at the bar joked: when a Masked Fool loses their mask, what remains is just a fool.
是啊，每个愚者都拥有这样一张假面，至少一张。它们不是装饰，而是我们命运的一部分，是我们亲手造就了它们——
Yes, every Fool has at least one such mask. Not mere decoration, but a part of our destiny, crafted by our own hands...
从悲悼伶人那儿偷走最顺眼的假面；灵感降临时自己亲手绘制的头饰；又或者某一天从天而降扣在自己脸上的东西……

It might be a Mourning Actor mask you took a liking to and stole from them. It might be a head accessory you personally sketched in a moment of inspiration. Or it might be something that one day fell from the sky and latched onto your face...
能成为愚者的人，至少会经历一次这样的命运时刻：覆面的时刻。
To become a Fool, one must experience at least one such instance of destiny: the moment of masking one's face.
透过面具的眼洞，我们获得了不同的视角，瞧见了宇宙中翻涌着无穷无尽的玩笑，还有我们作为生命的可笑本质。
Through the mask's eyeholes, we gain a different perspective, finally seeing how the universe is simply churning with endless jokes and the absurd nature of our existence as living beings.
面具就是我们想成为的样子。如今，这个冒牌货比我更像我了。
The mask is what we want to be. And now, this impostor is more "me" than I am.
动手吧！按下按钮叫来护士，把花火大人火化了！
Do it! Press the button, call the nurse, and cremate Miss Sparkle!
至少这样一来，那个冒牌货短时间内会失去力量。你们应该可以轻松打败她的，对吧？
At least then the impostor will lose her power for a little while. You should be able to take her down easily, right?
呜，你们…不会按铃的，对吧？
Uh... you're not actually going to press it, right?
给一点时间，让我们犹豫犹豫、考虑考虑。
Give us a moment... to hesitate, to think.
等待可是很折磨人的。你俩不会是故意要这么惩罚我吧？喂，小灰毛？你好歹说句话呀！
Waiting is torture, you know. You're not doing this on purpose to punish me, are you? Hey, Gray Hair! Say something!
哈哈哈，我就知道！小灰毛，你还是那个有温度的小灰毛！
Hahaha, I knew it! Gray Hair, you're still the same warm-hearted Gray Hair I know!
悄悄告诉你个事，我刚才趁着大家不注意已经抠掉了按钮的电池。这是个考验，你通过了！
Psst, let me tell you something. While no one was looking, I already popped the battery out of the button. This was a test, and you passed!
难以置信！小灰毛，你的心比贝洛伯格的外宇宙之冰还冷吗？！
Unbelievable! Gray Hair, is your heart colder than Belobog's Ice Out of Space!?
嘿嘿，我一早趁着大家不注意抠掉了按钮的电池。这是个考验，你没通过！
Hehe, I took the battery out of the button earlier while no one watched. It was a test, and you failed!
喂喂喂喂！小灰毛，咱们的交情你都忘光了吗？按钮都快被按冒烟啦！
Hey hey hey! Gray Hair, have you forgotten our friendship? You'll make the button smoke at this rate!
可惜，我一早趁着大家不注意抠掉了按钮的电池。这是个考验，你没通过！
Too bad. I took the battery out of the button earlier while no one watched. It was a test, and you failed!
既然「愚者」自己做出了选择，她应该也想好了回收「假面」的办法，对吧？
Since the Fool made her choice, she must have a plan to reclaim the Mask, right?
如果你敢说个「不」字，我可要按下按钮，让天基炮来「火化」你咯？你那不干净的小手应该没能快到偷走这块电池吧？
If you dare say "no," I'll press THIS button and let the orbital cannon "cremate" you for real. Your sticky little fingers aren't fast enough to steal this battery, are they?
有办法有办法！办法总是有的！
There's a way! There's always a way!
花火大人一定会负起责任，和大家齐心协力阻止「火花大会」的！
Miss Sparkle will definitely take responsibility and work together with everyone to stop SparxiCon!
我们…是不是一直都在被谁看着？
Have we... been watched the whole time?
所以，咱们刚才治疗的一举一动都被观众们看在眼里？…这到底是医院还是戏院？
So the audience watched our every move in that "treatment"? ...Is this a hospital or a theater?
这是人生，生命不息，评判不止。在你看不到的角落里，总有数不尽的评判的目光，为你诊断，为你开出「药方」。
That's life for you. While there's life, there's judgment. In every unseen corner, countless judging eyes are watching, diagnosing, and writing their own "prescriptions."
我不得不承认，「致命玩笑」这地方实在有趣。没能早些到这里逛逛，实在是可惜了。
I must admit, Fatal Joke is a fascinating place. Real shame I didn't come check it out earlier.
别管这些观众了，他们只是来找乐子的，不会帮忙，也帮不上忙。
Ignore the spectators. They're just here for laughs. They won't help, and couldn't if they tried.
你刚才说到你有办法阻止火花，说说吧，你打算怎么做？
You said you had a way to stop Sparxie. Let's hear it. What's the plan?
我收藏着几件…「反花火武装」。
I've got a few... "Anti-Sparkle Weapons" in my collection.
看名字就知道了吧？是花火大人在过去的冒险中收集的道具，也是花火大人的劲敌曾经用来对付我的武器。
The name says it all. These are items Miss Sparkle collected in my past adventures, and weapons that my fierce rivals once used against me.
Why would you go against yourself?
我一直有预感，有一天花火大人会变成这个宇宙中谁也无法遏制的恐怖存在。在那一天到来前，必须有人想办法阻止我才行啊！
I've always had this premonition that one day Miss Sparkle would become an unstoppable terror in this universe. Someone has to find a way to stop me before that day comes!
一次旅行，我遇见了某个和我志趣相投，颇有愚者天分的小姑娘。
On a trip, I met a girl who shared my tastes. She had quite the knack to be a Fool.
在和她斗智斗勇的过程中，她用当地特有的「风滚草」差点把我砸成了花火酱。她还有一台巨大的机甲，身上每个开口都能冲我发射光束。
In our battle of wits, she nearly turned me into Sparkle paste using the local "Tumbleweed" specialty. She also had a massive mech with beam cannons up the wazoo, ready to blast away any time.
我把这些旅途中遇到的厉害宝贝全都悄悄复刻了一份。有了这些「反花火武装」，一定能叫这个冒牌货吃不了兜着走!
I quietly replicated those powerful goodies from my travels. With these Anti-Sparkle Weapons, that impostor won't know what hit her!
不得不说，我真是有先见之明！
I gotta say, I'm quite the visionary!
两位，接下来咱们走寄存区。我已经联系好了乔瓦尼，他正在那儿清点失物呢。
You two, let's head to the storage area next. I've already contacted Giovanni. He's doing an inventory check of the lost items there.
是学校那边传来了情报？
The undercover journalist didn't find the hostages.
潜伏记者发现了特别情况。
The undercover journalist discovered something unusual.
狸猫记者们没找到三月和杨叔，倒是发现火花正在拆除学校中庭的海浪景画。
The furbo journalist couldn't find March or Mr. Yang, but they did spot Sparxie taking down the wave mural in the school courtyard.
喔？令人在意的行为。看来火花那边也在紧锣密鼓地准备着，但她为什么要做这些？
Oh? That's noteworthy. Looks like Sparxie's busy making preparations too. But why do all this?
先不管她，去愚者们的寄存区看看吧。
Never mind her for now. Let's check out the Fools' storage area.
哟，老乔，你好啊。你在那上面干什么？
Hey, Gio. What are you doing up there?
当然是在为你奔忙，为你清点损失啊！等等，你把谁带来了？
Working my tail off for you, tallying the losses! Wait, who'd you bring with you?
是{NICKNAME}啊！我就知道你总有一天会踏入「酒馆」成为我们的一员的。毕竟，拥有假面愚者潜质的人是会相互吸引的。
Oh, it's {NICKNAME}! I knew you'd step into the tavern and become one of us someday. Those with the makings of Masked Fools are naturally drawn to one another.
{NICKNAME}，你认识的愚者朋友可真不少。
{NICKNAME}, you sure know quite a few Fools.
您身后这位美丽的女士…喔，想必是列车领航员姬子女士了。初次见面，请多关照。
And the lovely lady behind you... you must be Miss Himeko, Navigator of the Express. A pleasure to meet you.
乔瓦尼先生，叫我姬子就好。
Mr. Giovanni, just call me Himeko.
本来，非愚者不能踏入此处，但既然是花火将你们领来，{NICKNAME}也算老朋友了，我作为保管员可以破个例。让我为各位介绍一下这里——
Normally only Fools may enter, but since Sparkle brought you, and {NICKNAME} is practically an old friend, I can make an exception as the caretaker. Let me show you around...
老乔，别啰啰嗦嗦的。桑博说你逢人就讲那句介绍词，他都快听出老茧来了——
Gio, cut the spiel. Sampo says you recite that intro so often he's grown calluses on his ears...
想要愚者们的财宝、纪念品和恶作剧道具吗？就来寄存区「大秘宝」吧！他们把一切都放在了这里。
Want the Fools' treasure, souvenirs, and prank gear? Come to the Grand Treasury storage! They've stashed everything here.
Are you trying to advertise to thieves or what?
嗯哼，道具失窃率这么高，多半是这句介绍词害的。
Pfft. With our theft rate, that tagline's probably to blame.
我在某个世界旅行时听来的，你也听过这句话对不对？
Picked it up on a trip to another world. You've heard this phrase too, haven't you?
必须承认，这句话很有诱惑力，所以我才会拿它来当宣传语了——寄存区的造访率此后提升了<unbreak>26%</unbreak>。
I'll admit, it's catchy. That's why I used it as a slogan. Storage area visits went up by <unbreak>26%</unbreak> after that.
正事要紧。我刚才发来的提货消息你瞧见了没，我收藏的「反花火武装」呢？
Business first. Did you see my pickup message I sent? Where's my stored Anti-Sparkle Weapons?
你的寄存清单杂乱无章，从来不做备注。如果不是这次把我叫来检查，天知道你到底藏了多少惊喜？至于「反花火武装」…我倒想问问，那又是什么东西？

Your storage list is a total mess. You never leave any notes! If I hadn't been called to audit, who'd know how many surprises you got stashed away? As for the "Anti-Sparkle Weapons"... I'd love to know what on earth that's supposed to be?
唉，你还是自己进去找找吧！
Bah, why don't you go in and look for yourself!
按你的要求，我把金库入口接通了你的收藏室。
As requested, I've linked the vault entrance to your collection room.
星琼，关于这类宝石的来历众说纷纭。有人说那是太初宇宙成形后冷却的光。有人说它是逝去古兽的灵髓，历亿万年时间凝结如石。

Stellar Jade... There are many theories about where these gems came from. Some say they're light that cooled and crystallized after the primordial universe took shape. Others claim they're the crystallized essence of ancient Leviathans, formed over billions of years.
毫无疑问，它颠倒众生的美丽足可换取这宇宙间的一切——物质的享受，忆庭的光锥，古老的遗器，还有他人的追随……
Without a doubt, its mesmerizing beauty could be traded for everything in this universe — material pleasures, Light Cones of the Garden, ancient Relics, and the devotion of others...
眼前有这么大一颗，它足以令所有人为之疯狂——没错，你要它！你很想要它！你想得快要发狂啦——
There's such a huge one right in front of you, big enough to drive everyone crazy... That's right, you want it! You really want it! You're about to go into a frenzy—
喜欢这件意外的礼物吗？哈哈，星琼确实是诱捕无名客最好的陷阱。
Enjoy the surprise gift? Haha, Stellar Jade is the perfect bait for catching the Nameless.
你还挺好心，我第一次见到贼偷了东西竟然还会把更值钱的宝贝放进金库里。
How generous of you. First time I've seen a thief steal something and leave something even more valuable in the vault.
这不正是我们假面愚者最喜欢的怪盗格调吗？拿走了精心收纳的藏品，就得奉上一件礼物作为回报，安抚失主的心。
Isn't this exactly the type of phantom-thief flair we Masked Fools adore? Remove a carefully curated piece, and leave a gift in place to soothe the owner.
噗，一颗超大号的星琼，确实抵得上一罐模因病毒和几件「反花火武装」的价值不是吗？
Heh, a jumbo-sized Stellar Jade is surely worth a jar of Memetic Virus and a few "Anti-Sparkle Weapons," wouldn't you say?
…你还偷走了我收藏的其他宝贝！
...And you stole my other prized pieces too!?
那些不值钱的破垃圾？就当是我附赠了一次金库保洁服务吧？
That worthless junk? Consider it a complimentary vault cleaning.
在「火花大会」开始前，我想先来一点娱兴的小节目。旧型号，还有无名客，你们应该能突破这个房间的吧？可不要让我失望哟。
Before SparxiCon begins, I'd like a little warm-up entertainment. Old model, and the Nameless, you should be able to break out of this room, right? Don't disappoint me now.
老乔，这里的安保工作真是一塌糊涂！
Gio, the security here is an absolute mess!
你可没资格这么说。这儿连酒保都是临时工，寄存区能有我这样的好心人帮你点数，你就该偷着笑了。
You're in no position to talk. Even the drinksmith here is a temp. Count yourself lucky I'm kind enough to help tally your storage.
她不仅偷走了我的力量、我的收藏，还对花火大人的形象造成了毁灭打击！今天…真是最糟糕的一天！
She didn't just steal my power and my collection... she completely destroyed Miss Sparkle's reputation! This is... the worst day ever!
容我纠正，是花火小姐「迄今为止最糟糕的一天」。
Correction: Miss Sparkle's "worst day so far."
Want to make fun of me? Go ahead.
别误会。我也不觉得「齿轮风滚草」和「巨大机甲」能对散布模因病毒的对手奏效。
Don't get me wrong. I also don't think "gear tumbleweeds" and "giant mechs" would work on someone spreading memetic viruses.
就在刚才，我想到一个法子，也许能压制绘世学院里的模因传染……
I thought of a way just now that might suppress the memetic contagion at Graphia Academy...
不愧是姬子，还有备用方案？
As expected of Himeko. You have a backup plan?
火力要用火力压制。而模因病毒，可以被「水」冲刷殆尽。
You can fight fire with fire, but a memetic virus can be scoured away with "water."
我们在学校的探子发来了线报，说火花正在拆除学校中心的景画。
Our informant at the school reports Sparxie is removing the central mural there.
那幅幻造景画「覆世沧浪图」据说是由绘世本人亲自留下的作品。相传，这朵浪花的来源本是她用来洗去画上错笔的鸽川之水，绘师们说它受到了祝福，因此将它留在学校里。

The imagenated mural "Worldbreaker Waves" is said to be a work left behind by Graphia herself. Legend says the wave comes from the Dovebrook river-water she used to wash off her painting mistakes. The artists say it is blessed. That's why they kept it in the school.
我原本想不通为什么火花要大费周章地拆除它。现在我明白了——「错笔」是染污画卷的冗余信息，而模因病毒则是染污人类心灵的冗余信息。

I couldn't understand why Sparxie went to such lengths to tear it down. Now I do. "Painting mistakes" are redundant information that stain a painting. A memetic virus is redundant information that stains the mind.
要是有人懂得操纵这道鸽川之浪，冲刷这座学校，就能洗刷她散布的感染。这就是火花要藏起那座景画的理由。
If someone knew how to harness this Dovebrook wave to wash over the school, they could cleanse the infection she spread. That's why Sparxie wanted to hide the mural.
所以解决方案就在学校里？
So the solution lies within the school?
也许可以呼叫丹恒使用云吟？
Maybe we can ask Dan Heng to use cloudhymn?
景画上的那朵浪花并非物理意义的水流，不懂幻造技艺的人无法操控。
The waves on the painting aren't physical water. Only those versed in the art of imagenesis can control them.
作为绘世学院毕业的学生，我略通绘艺。<color=#dbc291ff>眼下最直接有效的法子，就是突入学校，夺回对那幅景画的控制——用它来压制火花的行动。</color>

As a Graphia Academy alumna, I know a bit of traditional painting. <color=#dbc291ff>Right now, our most directly effective plan is to break into the school, regain control of the mural, and use it to suppress Sparxie's movements.</color>
走吧，我要让这个冒牌货百倍奉还！
Let's go! I'll make this impostor pay a hundred-fold!
看来这次相逢注定要行色匆匆，我在此预先祝各位一路顺风。
Looks like our paths must part in haste. I wish you all fair winds on your journey ahead.
对了，如果各位自觉前途未卜，心中仍有犹豫，我有个小小的建议——请顺道去「极乐之星」的灯球里看看。
Oh! If any of you feel uncertain about what's next, here's a small suggestion: Take a detour inside the "Blisstar" light orb.
We don't have time to waste.
出战前去向神明作一次小小祈祷，我想无论如何都不能算是浪费时间吧？
A quick prayer to the gods before battle hardly counts as wasting time, does it?
对我等假面愚者来说，这座灯球的意义就像是空中那轮幻月一般重要。
For us Masked Fools, that light orb holds the same significance as the Phantasmoon hanging above.
在灯球的深处，每个人都能寻获「欢愉」的神启。
Deep within the orb, everyone can find the divine revelations of the Elation.
They found something else at the school?
We need to pick up the pace.
乔瓦尼说，在灯球深处我们能寻到「欢愉」的神启？这座灯球莫非又是一个酒馆房间？
Giovanni said we could find the divine revelations of the Elation inside the light orb? Don't tell me this orb is another tavern room?
Bingo！你的直觉可真准，这东西不是一颗负责制造光污染的灯球。你把它当成愚者们的神龛好了。
Bingo! Your intuition's spot-on. It isn't just a light-polluting orb. Think of it as a shrine for Fools.
不是说阿哈不准入内吗？
年轻人只是开革了乐子神进入「酒馆」的资格，可不拒绝与乐子神有关的东西。
The youngsters only revoked The Laughter's right to enter the tavern. They don't reject things associated with THEM.
噗，说「崇拜」未免有点太认真了不是？
Pfft, "worship" sounds a bit too serious, no?
假面愚者大部分人都把乐子神当自己看不见也不正经的损友…偶然在心里面找祂碰个杯还行，祂要真找上你那多半没好事。
Most Masked Fools treat The Laughter like an invisible, mischievous drinking buddy. Fine for a mental toast, but if THEY really come looking for you, it's usually bad news.
就在这樽灯球里，封印着一件与阿哈有关的奇迹。它会回应每个靠近它的愚者。
Inside this light orb is a miracle tied to Aha. It responds to any Fool who approaches.
我带你们开开眼界。来吧，芝麻开门——
Let me show you something mind-blowing. Here we go. Open sesame...
我说！芝、麻、开、门！芝麻开门…芝麻？开门？
I said! O-PEN! SE-SA-ME! Open sesame... Sesame? Open?
…不会吧！在祂眼中，我连假面愚者都算不上了？这还真是个「大惊喜」啊，那冒牌货把我的身份也夺走了！
...No way! So in THEIR eyes I don't even count as a Masked Fool anymore? What a "wonderful surprise"! The impostor stole my identity too!
A Fool who has lost her Mask.
好消息是，至少我们中还有一个假面愚者。
The good news is, at least one of us is still a Masked Fool.
So this is the miracle you meant?
是的。假面愚者间流传着一则神话——
Yes. Among the Masked Fools, a myth is told...
「当欢愉之主攀上存在之树的高枝，祂窥见真空冰冷可憎，星辰机械运转，万物意义让位于虚无。」
"When the Master of Elation climbed the highest boughs of the Tree of Existence, THEY glimpsed the cold, abhorrent void. The stars turned like machinery, and all meaning yielded to nihility."
「祂继续望去，直到目睹一名婴儿落地啼哭犹如受尽委屈，便忍不住纵声大笑，这清澈的笑声撕裂了冰冷死寂的宇宙，回荡诸界至今。」

"THEY gazed further, until THEY witnessed a newborn fall and cry as if wronged beyond measure. Then THEY burst out laughing. That crystalline laughter tore through the cold, dead universe, echoing through the realms to this day."
很多人都以为这撕裂宇宙的笑声只是某种比喻…但，很遗憾，它是真的。
Many think the laughter that tore apart the cosmos is just a metaphor... but sadly, it's real.
「酒馆」里的人称这东西为「太初笑声的回响」，它撕开了一个空间口子。
The tavern folks call this thing the Echo of Primordial Laughter. It tore open a spatial rift.
据说在其他「酒馆」分店里也有，不止一处，没人知道具体的数量，也没人知道它的存在到底意味着什么。我们对它大喊，它没有回音；往它里面扔些垃圾，它也统统笑纳……

They say other tavern branches have this too... in multiple locations. No one knows how many there are or what their existence means. When we shout into it, there's no echo. Toss in trash, and it merrily swallows it all.
没人知道这东西会不会继续开裂，把「酒馆」整个吞下…总之，它就在这儿，就在那儿，永不移动地对着我们笑。
No one knows if this thing will keep widening and swallow the tavern whole... Either way, it just sits there, right over there, motionless grinning at us forever.
该怎么得到乔瓦尼说的神启？
So how do we get this divine revelation that Giovanni mentioned?
Will it tell us what to do?
Just stick your hand in there.
据说在面临命运转折的时刻，愚者只要把手伸进裂缝，就能摸到一件东西——「酒馆」里的人管这叫「乐子神的赐礼」。
It's said at a turning point of destiny, a Fool need only reach into the rift and grasp something. The tavern folks call it The Laughter's Gift.
谁都不知道这件东西会给祈求者带来什么…好运气还是坏运气？但有一点不需要怀疑，它一定会让你的命运变得更混沌。
No one knows what this thing will bring to those who seek it... fortune or otherwise? But one thing's for sure: your destiny's bound to get much more chaotic.
Hey, Gray Hair, wanna give it a try?
Hold on, let me take a deep breath.
做好准备碰碰运气了吗？把手伸进裂隙，你就能摸到一件乐子神的赐礼。
Ready to try your luck? Reach into the fissure, and you'll find a gift from The Laughter.
Hold on, let me take a deep breath.
你忐忑不安地将手伸进巨大的裂隙中——就把它想像成翁法罗斯的真言狮口好了，你不断自我催眠。
With trembling unease, you reach into the gaping fissure. Just pretend it's like the mouth of that Amphorean Verax Leo, you keep telling yourself.
阿基维利保佑…请看在阿基维利的面子上…请别为难我…我的手不好吃……
Akivili have mercy... in Akivili's name... please don't hurt me... My hand doesn't taste good...
你的手仿佛探入了一团柔软、漩动的流体里，一声怪异的猴子叫声在耳畔响起，让你想起了某个关于许愿的不祥故事，随后你察觉自己触到了什么。

Your hand seems to plunge into a soft, swirling fluid, and a bizarre monkey screech echoes in your ears, reminding you of an ominous story about wish-making. Then you sense that you've touched something.
块状的棱角，硌手，微微刺痛，像是在地毯上踩中一小块玩具零件。
Angular and blocky, it hurts to hold, with a slight stinging sensation, like stepping on a small toy part hidden in the carpet.
你知道自己绝对见过这个东西，就在匹诺康尼。
You know for sure you've seen this thing before, right there in Penacony.
与「缭乱忍者」AKA乱破一同大战「御猿邪忍」的奇妙经历浮现心头。答案，如天际高悬的香蕉一般，让你忍不住道破了它的来历——

The extraordinary experience of fighting alongside "The Dazzling Ninja" AKA Rappa against the "Osaru Evil Ninja" flashed through your mind. The answer, like a banana hanging in the sky, compelled you to reveal its origin—
That banana... I've seen it before...
乐子神在上，祂真的回应了。但祂又塞给你另一种模因病毒是要干什么？
The Laughter above, THEY really answered! But what's THEIR deal giving you another memetic virus?
被「火花病毒」感染的观众当然没法反抗火花…我们闯进学校要不了多久就会变成那样——但如果在此之前，我们已经被另一种模因病毒感染了，那就很难说了。

Audiences infected with the Sparxie Virus naturally won't be able to resist Sparxie... We'd end up like that soon after breaking into the school. But if we're already infected with another memetic virus... Well, that changes things.
而这只「香蕉」的意义…正是给我们争取一点抵抗的时间。
And this banana serves exactly that purpose... to buy us some time to resist.
还真有「欢愉」独一份的幽默感啊，现在，我们走吧！
The Elation really has a twisted sense of humor, huh? All right, let's move!
你们俩…是谁？这儿一次只许一个愚者进来的规矩，你们是没听人讲过吗？
Who are you two? Haven't you heard the rule? Only one Fool's allowed in here at a time.
我是谁？一个路过的名侦探，还有他的助手。
Who am I? Just a passing detective, and his assistant.
是我睡太久了吗？还是这个世代的人类已经堕落到了变成猴子也满不在乎的地步了？
Have I been asleep too long? Or has humanity sunk so low they don't even care if they turn into monkeys?
与此同时，无知的罪犯们自以为发现了能改变他们命运的「宝藏」，但他们浑然不觉，自己手里握着的东西足以摧毁整个世界的理智。

Meanwhile, the ignorant criminals believed they had discovered a "treasure" that could change their destiny, completely unaware that what they held in their hands could shatter the sanity of the entire world.
老白，要战斗的时候就别念白了。
Hey, Mister N, cut the narration when it's time to fight.
那我总得做点什么吧？这样？
Well, I gotta do something, right? *shriek* Like this?
你开心就好。听好了，对面仨，把那只「香蕉」放在地上。现在离开，我可以既往不咎。
Whatever floats your boat. Now listen up, you three. Put that banana down and walk away, and I'll let bygones be bygones.
但你们要是敢动别的心思……
But if you try anything funny...
想动{F#她们}{M#他们}的话，得先趟过这些小玩意儿！
If you wanna get to them, you'll have to get through these little toys first!
啧，这几个家伙真的是无名客？我活了大半辈子都没见过和模因病毒打交道的无名客。
Tch, are these folks really the Nameless? In all my years, I've never seen the Nameless dealing with memetic viruses.
如假包换，路过的无名客罢了。
The real deal. Just some Nameless passing through.
老白，我得追他们去了。你赶不上我的，回家等消息吧。
Mister N, I've got to go after them. You won't be able to keep up with me. Just head home and wait for the news.
我发誓，我不会让发生在你身上的悲剧在这个世界重演。
I swear I won't let the tragedy that happened to you repeat itself in this world.
这边！来这边！跑快些！你们该不会想被刚才那家伙逮住吧？
Over here! This way! Run faster! You don't wanna get caught by that guy back there, do you?
我说{F#姐们}{M#哥们}，你们这次落地到底惹到了多少棘手的人啊？
Yo {M#bro,}{F#sis,} just how many troublemakers did you people manage to tick off when you landed?
So who was that just now?
我发誓，花火大人可绝对没招惹这样一号人物。
I swear, Miss Sparkle definitely hasn't gotten involved with someone like that.
我今天眼皮直跳，知道事情多半要糟。老桑博对老顾客可是很念旧的，忍不住就回来看看你们，一看果然。

My eyelid's been twitching all day. Knew something was bound to go wrong. You know old Sampo's got a soft spot for his regulars, so I couldn't help but come check on you folks. And what do you know? I was right.
When push comes to shove, Sampo's the one we can count on...
得亏老桑博服务到家，关键时刻救你们一命。
Good ol' Sampo came through with top-notch service, saving your lives in the nick of time.
既然我们已经做好了准备，也是时候该去绘世学院救人了。桑博先生，你知道酒馆里有哪道门可以尽快回到城市里？
Now that we're all set, it's time to head to Graphia Academy for the rescue mission. Mr. Sampo, do you know which door in the tavern can get us back to the city the quickest?
哈哈，这还用问，要说对酒馆各种「暗道」「门径」的熟悉，你还真找不到第二个能和老桑博比的——
Haha, you don't even need to ask! When it comes to knowing all the "secret passages" and "shortcuts" in this tavern, you won't find anyone who can match old Sampo...
Wh—What are you going to do?
看得出来，{NICKNAME}，「酒馆」没早一点向你发出邀请，是他们没眼光。
I see, {NICKNAME}... the tavern not inviting you sooner was their loss.
这些酒桶里装的饮料，真是笑话酿成的吗？
Is the drink in these barrels really brewed from jokes?
没错。大姐头你懂的不少嘛？
Yep. You know your stuff, ma'am!
Just heard some rumors, that's all.
让我教教两位怎么开路。
Let me show you how to open a path.
按着乐谱演奏，道路自然就会敞开。
Play according to the sheet music, and the path will naturally open up.
桑博，这玩意儿真的有用吗？
Sampo, does this thing even work?
包有用的，你还信不过我老桑博吗？
Of course it works! Don't you trust your old pal Sampo?
到底是哪个除灵师这么不负责任啊？
酒馆的下水道系统不是垃圾站！
The tavern's sewer system is not a dump!
哎呀，前几天我遇到一个粉丝…
Oh man, the other day I ran into this fan...
非要给我看他在网上新发现的「地狱笑话」，说特别好笑。
They insisted on showing me some "gallows humor" jokes they'd found online, saying they were absolutely hilarious.
但他只是给我看了某人被反物质军团杀害的视频，却自顾自大笑了起来。
But all he did was show me a video of someone being killed by the Antimatter Legion, then burst out laughing.
你们也一起来品品这个「地狱笑话」吧！
Come, let's all enjoy this "gallows humor" together!
So, where are we heading next?
致命玩笑？那又是什么地方？
Fatal Joke? What kind of place is that?
这里是…二维市？怎么可能？
Is this... Duomension City? How is that possible?
「酒馆」的空间结构本来就离奇，能看到二维市倒也不奇怪。
The tavern's spatial structure is bizarre to begin with. It's not that strange to see Duomension City here.
小灰毛，我们走吧，我不想和这个庸医浪费时间了。
Gray Hair, let's go. I don't want to waste any more time with this quack.
花火小姐，在诊断结束前，还请您在这个房间稍等片刻。
Miss Sparkle, please wait in this room until the consultation is complete.
诊断结果出来了，花火小姐！
The diagnosis results are in, Miss Sparkle!
喂！什么情况！怎么就把我摁在这儿了！
Hey! What's going on! Why am I pinned here!?
小灰毛？大姐头？来帮帮我？
Gray Hair? Ma'am Navigator? A little help?
你们需要我，我可以帮助你们打败火花！
You need me! I can help you defeat Sparxie!
接下来该进战斗桥段了吧？
So, is it time for the combat sequence now?
呜呼，花火大人劫后余生！
Phew! Miss Sparkle lives to fight another day!
Whoa, that's one massive Stellar Jade!
Let's go in and take a look.
老乔，这是那个冒牌货留下来的东西吗？
Gio, did the impostor leave this behind?
我怎么知道。清点工作做到现在，我才发现有这号货不对板的玩意儿。
How should I know? I've been doing inventory all this time. I only just now noticed something fishy about this thing.
我的「反花火武装」变成了一只破烂孔雀……
My Anti-Sparkle Weapon has turned into a failed science project...
这似乎不是咱们进来的地方了……
This doesn't look like where we came in...
别担心，我让老乔开了条近路。
Don't worry. I had old Gio open a shortcut.
虽然很不甘心…但是，小灰毛，它向你敞开了，灯球承认了你。
I hate to admit it... but Gray Hair, it's opened for you. The light orb has acknowledged you.
舞池下面居然有这么多人……
Wait... there are that many people under the dance floor...?
这儿的尘灵居然会随灯光变色。
The wispae here actually change color with the lights.
这就是酒馆的日常，很嗨吧~
Just another night at the tavern... Fun, right?
真想在列车上也装个灯球啊。
Man, I really wish we had one of these light orbs on the Express.
比起酒馆，这里更像个迷宫。
This place feels more like a maze than a tavern.
这本就是个时空迷宫啊！
Well, it IS a space-time maze after all!
还好吧，我还嫌这儿好玩的地方不够多呢。
Eh, it's alright. I just wish there were more fun spots around here.
危险？看我一棒给它敲碎！
Dangerous? I'll smash it with one swing!
没错，敲碎了全部带回去。
You got it. Smash every last one and bring 'em all back.
后面有东西…那是钥匙吗？
Something's back there... Is that a key?
钥匙融进了水里…水面要有变化了。
The key has dissolved into the water... the water's surface is about to change.
这里可是共愿帮的地盘。
还有不少人敢往这来呢！
Can't believe people still have the guts to come here!
People always come here looking for a "tavern"...
But no one's ever found it.
This is the Xianzhou's Number One Assassin?
怎么有个人不像仙舟人？
How come there's someone who doesn't look like they're from the Xianzhou?
Shh, don't ask questions. You got a death wish or something?
That spear of his looks seriously deadly.
Don't make eye contact with him...
小心捅你一万个透明窟窿！
It'll poke a thousand holes right through you!
Everyone, look sharp! Don't let me down!
蹒跚的愚者静静地躺在地上。和之前比起来，他变得又小又薄，适合随身携带。
The staggering Fool lies quietly on the ground. Compared to before, he's become small and thin, a size perfect for carrying around.
但你非要游，我也没办法。
But if you insist on taking a dip, I can't stop you.
I'm not drunk, hehe, I'm not drunk!
花火被一股无形的力量束缚在了这张床上，这股难以违抗的力量你在早上赖床时曾有体会——没有人能战胜它！
Sparkle finds herself bound to the bed by an invisible force. This irresistible power you've experienced yourself on mornings when you just can't get up. No one can defeat it!
花火被固定在了这张床上！不知钟珊用了什么法子：神话里看不见的绳索？无形的大手？念动力？
Sparkle was pinned to the bed! Who knows what trick Zhongshan pulled: invisible ropes from myths? An unseen giant hand? Telekinesis?
「共愿帮征用中」…看来得找别的路去对岸了。
"Under Synwish Syndicate requisition"... Looks like we'll have to find another way across.
往前，追上这个「月亮的倒影」。
The "moon's reflection" is getting away! Go after it!
In the name of Erudition, traverse the cosmos.
我们再度重逢，天外的救世主。
We meet again, Deliverer from beyond the sky.
我并非您熟知的神礼观众，而是假面愚者，赞达尔•贰•桑原。
I am not the Theoros you know, but the Masked Fool, Zandar Two Kuwabara.
这一次，我选择走上「欢愉」，以我的幽默感击破博识尊。
This time, I choose to walk the path of Elation, and I shall defeat Nous with my sense of humor.
That's somehow both hilarious and infuriating.
I think I've figured out who you are...
Hah, after all, I did say before...
最近的梦想，是加入天才俱乐部，扮演一个天才！
My latest dream is to join the Genius Society and play the role of a genius!
小灰毛，三月宝宝，你们好啊。
Hey there, Gray Hair and darling March!
Sparkle!? Ugh, it was you all along...
是不是很意外？不过这次，我是作为「二相乐园」的文化顾问，特地来为列车当导游的。
Surprised? Well, this time I'm here as Planarcadia's cultural advisor, specially appointed to be the tour director for the Express crew.
你把真正的导游怎么了？
What did you do to the real tour director?
什么话，我就是你们的导游啊。花导。
What are you talking about? I am your director. Director Sparkle.
什么话，这里是「欢愉」的世界，愚者遍地都是。做生意绕开我们？想都别想。
What are you talking about? This is the world of Elation. Fools are everywhere. Don't even think about doing business here without us.
You're the mastermind behind everything, aren't you?
你猜对啦，花火大人正盘算着将两位的命运玩弄于股掌间呢，怕了吗？
Bingo! Miss Sparkle is planning to toy with both of your destinies as if they're just her playthings. Scared yet?
回答正确！星穹列车加十分。
Correct! Ten points for the Astral Express!
我知道，在匹诺康尼，我们是有些小小的纠葛，但你们不是玩得很开心嘛？
I know we had some minor entanglements in Penacony, but you all had fun there, didn't you?
现在，星穹列车成大英雄了。那位{RUBY_B#真珠}首席执行官{RUBY_E#}希望找一位友好相处的熟人带你们参观这里。我就接下这差事咯。
Now, the Astral Express has become quite the hero. Her Excellency the CEO wanted to find someone who got along with you to show you around this place. So I took on that job!
她到底对「友好相处」这个词有什么误解啊……
What kind of misunderstanding does she have about the phrase "got along"...
时间滴答滴答流逝——幸好这里没有炸弹！所以，你们到底跟不跟我走啊？
Time's ticking away! Thankfully there's no bomb here! So, are you coming with me or what?
走吧，这也是开拓的一环。
Let's go, this is also part of Trailblazing.
小心，你面前可是两大泰坦。
Watch out, you've got two Titans right in front of you.
行吧。但接下来，可别再扮成别人的样子啦！
Fine. But from now on, no more pretending to be someone else!
Lame. Anyway... shall we get going?
Is this... a train? Looking sharp!
眼前这一位，既是列车，也是妖怪。
Before us stands not just a train, but a strangeling.
妖怪这种称呼，早就过时啦！
The term strangeling is so outdated!
时代变了，客人们。请按《灵物保护法》的说法称呼我们：幻造种。
Times have changed, dear guests. Please refer to the Faekind Protection Act. We prefer to be called imagenae.
一板一眼的，这么喜欢公司教科书里的学名？算了，就依你吧……
Ugh, so by-the-book. You really love those fancy scientific names from the IPC textbooks, huh? Fine, have it your way...
这位是「二相乐园」的特产物种：<color=#dbc291ff>由画中诞生的灵物，「幻造种」</color>。
This here is a species unique to Planarcadia: <color=#dbc291ff>an imagenae, or a being born from paintings</color>.
很聪明嘛。一下子就理解了。
Pretty sharp, aren't you? You caught on quick.
很久很久以前，这里的画家们发现，只要勾画出想象中的生灵，赋予它们名字，就能将造物带入现实。
Once upon a time, the artists here discovered that by sketching creatures from their imagination and giving them names, they could bring their creations into reality.
<color=#dbc291ff>这种相信未有之物的信心叫「愿力」</color>，它维持着幻造种的存在。要我说，这股力量一定是乐子神的恩赐！
<color=#dbc291ff>This belief in things yet to exist is called "Wishpower,"</color> and it sustains the existence of imagenae. If you ask me, this power must be a blessing from The Laughter!
哎呀扯远啦！这位是「疾锋龙列车」，负责交通运输的幻造种，跟你们也算是同行。
Oops, got sidetracked! This here is the "Bullet Wyrm Express," an imagenae in charge of transportation. You could say they're in the same line of work as you folks.
哈哈哈，两位是星穹列车的无名客吧？你们的八卦，我肚子里的乘客们常常念叨呢！
Hahaha, so you two must be the Nameless from the Astral Express? The passengers in my stomach are always gossiping about you!
有机会，乘坐我试试吧～看看星穹列车和我比起来，到底谁更快！哈哈哈哈哈！
When you get a chance, hop aboard and give me a try~ Let's see who's faster, me or the Astral Express! Hahahahaha!
谢啦，有空咱一定！不过，这里的列车居然是活的生命，幻造种…真是不可思议。
Thanks! We'll definitely do that when we get the chance! But man, who would've thought that the Express here is actually a living being, an imagenae... That's absolutely mind-blowing.
接下来，花导还要带你去见更多不可思议的东西，可别晕咯！
Next up, I'm gonna show you even more mind-blowing stuff, so try not to faint!
快速、安全、舒适！有机会请乘坐我试试吧～
Fast, safe, and comfy! Come take a ride with me some time~
好家伙，站台上有警察？花火，你该不会要被当场逮捕了吧？
Holy smokes, there are cops at the station? Sparkle, don't tell me you're about to get arrested on the spot?
几位好，欢迎来到<color=#dbc291ff>二维市</color>！
得知星穹列车到访，不少市民起了个大早，专程来一睹无名客的风采。要是有人做出出格举动，请随时呼叫我们。
Having heard about the Astral Express's visit, many citizens got up early just to catch a glimpse of the Nameless. If anyone acts out of line, please don't hesitate to call us.
嗨呀，小灰毛，三月宝宝，你们可是大明星啦！
Ooh, Gray Hair and darling March, you're real celebrities now!
那粉毛女孩！有点小兔子可可爱爱的感觉，她就是「三月兔」的原型？
That pink-haired girl! She's got this adorable little bunny vibe going on. Is she the inspiration for "March Bunny"?
她边上的灰头发{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}也太帅气了！应该就是「球棒浣熊」吧！
And that {M#guy}{F#girl} with gray hair next to her is so dashing! {M#He}{F#She} must be the "Baseball Raccoon"!
可{F#她}{M#他}一点也不像浣熊啊？
But {F#s}he doesn't look anything like a raccoon...
二相乐园的朋友们！你们好！
二相乐园的朋友们，你们好啊！
虽然不知道发生了什么，但是…你们好！
I don't know what's going on, but... hello there!
可恶！我也可可爱爱的啊？
喂，你！对，就是你！快夸我可爱！
Hey, you! Yes, you! Hurry up and say I'm cute!
叫错名字是天大的错误！
Getting my name wrong is basically a crime!
给我记好了，是「银河球棒侠」，不是什么「球棒浣熊」！
Drill this into your head. It's the "Galactic Baseballer," not some "Baseball Raccoon"!
And what's this "March Bunny" thing about?
{F#她}{M#他}朝我们说话了！乐子神在上！这是我人生中最精彩的时刻！
{M#He}{F#She} spoke to us! By The Laughter! This is the most amazing moment of my life!
看这边——看这边——列车组——我们——请给我签名——三月小姐我爱你——浣熊{F#小姐}{M#先生}给我一个吻吧——
Here... Look here... Express Crew... We... Please give me your autograph... Miss March I love you... {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Raccoon, give me a kiss...
我拿到了——浣熊大人的签名！——我也要我也要——
I got it... The autograph of the Great Raccoon! I want it too...
这里的人，实在太热情了…我还是第一次遇到这种阵仗。这就是「狂热粉丝」吗？
The people here are way too passionate... I've never experienced anything like this before. So this is what having "rabid fans" feels like?
被众星捧月的感觉，是不是很让人陶醉？可别陷在里面，出不来哟？
Feels intoxicating to be the center of attention, doesn't it? Just don't get too caught up in it. You might not find your way out!
But isn't it a bit too crowded?
两位老板，不要沉迷和粉丝互动啦。今天的行程安排可是很紧张的。
Excuse me. Bosses, stop getting caught up in fan interactions! Today's schedule is really packed.
我头上这根猫条先生！能告诉我怎么带两位离开这儿吗？
Hey, you up there, Mr. Noodle-Looking-Cat! Could you tell me how to get these two out of here?
这位客人，说话好伤人！我是猫条站长，负责泊地站的工作！
Excuse me, that's quite hurtful! I am Stationmaster Meowton, responsible for overseeing Perdido Station!
猫咪…果然是液体的，等等，这只猫咪…是车站的站长？这个世界，也太怪了吧！
Whoa... Cats really are liquid! Wait a sec, this kitty is the stationmaster? This world is so weird!
车站已经被包围了，要是哪位贵客今天在这被狂热粉丝擦破点皮，薅走几根头发，我那点可怜的退休金就全泡汤了！
The station's completely surrounded! If any of our esteemed guests gets so much as a scratch or loses a few strands of hair to these rabid fans today, my measly pension will go right down the drain!
所以，我为星穹列车的贵宾准备了「员工通道」，请快快从那边离开车站！
So I've prepared the "staff passage" for our Astral Express VIPs. Please hurry and exit the station that way!
拜托，请不要往那边走，会引发混乱的！
Please don't go that way. It'll cause chaos!
准确地说，是幻造种的员工通道。很久以前，整~个~乐园都被收进过一幅「画卷」里喔。
To be precise, it's the imagenae staff passage. A long time ago, ALL of this arcadia was sealed inside a "scroll painting."
对画中人来说，不过是进入了另一个维度，很安全的。
For people inside the painting, they just entered another dimension. It was completely safe.
Planarcadia isn't a flat plane though.
那是因为有人将他们带回了现实。猜猜为什么公司会在这儿？
That's because someone brought everything back to reality. Care to guess why the IPC is here?
这座一度沉入画中的国度，就是被公司打捞回来的。
This nation that was once lost in a painting was salvaged by the IPC.
Is this the passage into the painting?
没错，「二相乐园」不得不品的特色，被称为<color=#dbc291ff>「二次元JUMP！」</color>的跃迁入口。
That's right. It's Planarcadia's must-see attraction: the portal entrance known as the <color=#dbc291ff>"Interplanar Jump!"</color>.
虽然文明回到了画外，但画中的世界没有被遗弃，反而成为了人和妖怪生活的一部分。
Though civilization has moved beyond the canvas, the world within the painting wasn't abandoned. Instead, it became part of life for both humans and strangelings.
来吧两位，跟上我的脚步，一起跳进——
Come on, you two. Follow my lead and let's dive into the...
I need a moment to get ready.
小灰毛，你怕啦？咕咚一下钻进去就好。
Gray Hair, getting cold feet? Just dive right in!
来吧两位，跟上我的脚步，一起跳进二次元！
Come on, you two. Follow my lead and let's dive into the Interplanar...
I need a moment to get ready.
小灰毛，你怕啦？咕咚一下钻进去就好。
Gray Hair, getting cold feet? Just dive right in!
我…我差点以为…自己要上天堂了。
I... I thought... I was about to go to heaven.
每次旅行都要从高处掉下来…
Every trip involves falling from high places...
No big deal. I'm already used to this.
周围奇奇怪怪的东西还挺多。
There's quite a lot of weird stuff around here.
没错，这就是「二相乐园」，妖怪纵情往来的浮世，欢愉妙想汇成的乐土。
That's right. This is Planarcadia, a world where strangelings roam freely and a paradise woven from elation and wild imagination.
那趴在高塔上的大怪兽，正盯着咱们瞧呢…心里有点发毛。
That huge creature perched on the tower is staring right at us... It's giving me the creeps.
他倒是不轻易吃人，除非看到——小粉毛！
It doesn't usually eat people, unless it spots... pink hair!
唉唉啊啊啊！干什么，你又一惊一乍吓唬人！
Waaaaah! What's the matter with you, jumping around and scaring people!?
这大家伙叫「雷虬」。别担心，在他眼里，咱们只是地上的小蚂蚁，还不够塞牙缝呢。
That big fella is called a "thundercoil." Don't worry, to him, we're just tiny ants on the ground, not even enough to get stuck between his teeth.
雷虬…听这名字，他不该飞在天上打雷下雨吗？怎么盘在柱子上一动不动？
Thundercoil... With a name like that, shouldn't he be flying around making thunder and rain? Why is he just wrapped around that pillar without moving an inch?
时代变啦。公司颁布了法令，要求幻造种融入「文明社会」。
Times have changed. The IPC issued a decree requiring imagenae to integrate into "civilized society."
在法律上，他们拥有和人类等同的权利，这意味着——他们也得工作！
Legally, they have the same rights as humans, which means... they have to work too!
What? Strangelings have to work too?
这就是公司经营的世界啊，谁敢剥夺幻造种工作的权利？
That's life under IPC management. Who'd dare deny an imagenae their right to work?
现在，雷虬为电视塔增幅电波信号，让全球用户都能稳定收看电视台放送的节目：无聊的直播，无聊的整人游戏……
Now, the thundercoil amplifies TV tower signals, ensuring users worldwide can watch the station's broadcasts without interruption: boring livestreams, lame prank shows...
啊，还有列车到来的大新闻——
Oh, and there's the big news about the Express arriving...
快看，{NICKNAME}，那广告牌又是怎么回事？！
Look, {NICKNAME}, what's up with that billboard!?
Is that... me? Am I really that famous!?
不公平！怎么只有{F#她}{M#他}的巨幅海报，我的呢？
That's not fair! Why does {F#s}he get a huge poster while I don't?
That person looks just like me...
哪里是「像」啊！这不就是你吗！
What do you mean by "looks like"? That IS you!
That's gotta be a violation of my publicity rights!
要是挂在这儿的是本姑娘，我可不会说出这么煞风景的话。
If it were me up there, I wouldn't be saying such negative stuff.
呵，公司为了捧你们，真是造足了势头啊。
Hah, the IPC's really pulling out all the stops to hype you guys up.
可别怪花导多嘴，公司人花出去的每一分钱，都是为了几百几千倍的回报，你们可千万要当心哦。
Don't mind me saying this, but for every penny the IPC spends on you, they expect a return in the hundreds or thousands. You'd better watch your back.
咱们好不容易才从人堆里钻出来，怎么又要钻回去？
We just managed to squeeze our way out of that crowd. Why do you want to dive back in?
这、这是什么？…飞头智械吗？
Wh—What is that...? A decapitated Intellitron?
这是前一次「幻月游戏」结束后诞生的新生命。幻造种「机铠」，由公司一手打造。
This is a new life-form that was born after the last Phantasmoon Games. An imagenae called a "mechatron," created by the IPC.
严格来说，是由公司机器绘制的。
Technically speaking, it was drawn by IPC machines.
虽说在二相乐园，创生幻造种的工作一直是由绘师负责…但公司嘛，总想着用他们那套工业化思维改进一切。
Even though in Planarcadia, the creation of imagenae has always been the artists' responsibility... for the IPC, well, they always want to improve everything with their industrial mindset.
这东西也是幻造种？看起来和机甲没什么差别嘛？
This thing is also an imagenae? Doesn't look that different from a mech to me.
年轻的女孩，我必须纠正你的认知偏差。我们和机甲绝不是同类。
Young lady, I must correct your cognitive bias. We are absolutely not the same as mechs.
我们的诞生不像机甲那样繁琐，诞生的我们也不像智械那么脆弱。因为我们不需要安装智械的逻辑中枢，也无需置入机甲的能源动力炉。

Our creation isn't as complicated as mechs, and we're not as fragile as Intellitrons when we're born. That's because we don't need to install an Intellitron's logic center, nor do we require a mech's power reactor.
向模具流道注入材料，压铸零件，组合拼装。我们机铠一族就此完成，能飞、能跑、能跳，绝不逊色任何科技产物。

Pour materials into the mold channels, die-cast the parts, assemble them together. And just like that, we mechatron are complete. We can fly, run, and jump, second to none among technological marvels.
我明白，靠愿力就能动起来是吧？
I get it. So you move with Wishpower, I suppose?
You mentioned the last Phantasmoon Games?
是啊，十五年前的事了。满月期间，是愿力最高涨的时刻，幻造种也会借这个机会繁衍兴盛……
Yeah, that was fifteen years ago. Wishpower reaches its peak during the full moon, and so imagenae take this chance to multiply and thrive...
就跟纪录片里面说的那样：春天到了，万物复苏，又到了妖怪们繁衍的时节。
Just like they say in documentaries: When spring arrives and nature awakens, it's mating season for the strangelings again.
新鲜劲也该过去了吧？咱们继续走着。
The novelty's probably worn off by now. Let's keep moving.
花导，这些人排个长龙是在干什么？
Director Sparkle, what's with this huge line of people?
Looks like a new release of a comic.
《苍天航路绒绒号》…是什么？好想买一本看看啊。
Fluffy Across the Blue... What's this? I'd love to get a copy and check it out.
噗嗤。我觉得，你们应该不会喜欢这本漫画。
Pfft. I don't think you guys would enjoy this comic.
无梦咖啡馆，是猫咪幻造种开设的连锁店，这里的咖啡与甜品都很美味喔。
Dreamless Coffee is a chain store owned by cat imagenae. The coffee and desserts here are absolutely delicious!
别、别说话！我这就给你买杯咖啡堵住嘴。
S—Stop talking! I'll buy you a coffee if you'd just shush it.
和姬子的咖啡比又如何？
How does it compare to Himeko's coffee?
用姬子姐亲手调制的液体炸弹来对比，对这家店有些失礼了吧。
Comparing it to Himeko's hand-crafted liquid bombs would be a bit unfair to this place.
两位是外星来的旅客吗？欢迎来到二相乐园。银河的局势还好吗？
Are you two travelers from outer space? Welcome to Planarcadia. How's the situation in the cosmos these days?
刚刚击败一位绝灭大君。
Great! All's well that ends well.
呀，这不是星穹列车的英雄吗！真荣幸，能遇见二位。
Oh my, if it isn't the heroes of the Astral Express! What an honor to meet you both.
身为无名客，你们平日一定要经历许多出生入死的冒险吧？想不想无论面对怎样的逆境，都可以永远幸福微笑呢？
As Nameless, you must go on life-and-death adventures all the time, right? Would you like to keep smiling happily forever no matter what adversity comes your way?
永远幸福？真的能做得到吗？
Happy forever? Is that even possible?
永远幸福等于没有幸福。
Eternal happiness means no happiness at all.
是哦，一直吃小甜点，小甜点也变得不甜了。
Yeah, if you keep eating sweets, at some point they stop tasting as sweet as they used to.
假面愚者？当然不是。愚者们追求自身的快乐，而我们想让所有人都幸福。
A Masked Fool? Of course not. The Fools only seek their own happiness, while we want to make everyone happy.
「让所有人幸福」…哈哈哈！这真是我听过最好笑的笑话了。大概只有匹诺康尼那位大人物才这么有幽默感吧。
"Make everyone happy"... Hahaha! That's the funniest joke I've ever heard. The only person with this sense of humor is probably that big shot from Penacony.
Sorry, not interested in your sales pitch.
如果几位有兴趣了解，我就在附近，你们随时可以来找我。
If you're interested in learning more, I'll be around here. Feel free to come find me anytime.
我来自「幸福微笑研究会」。众所周知，此处受乐子神祝福，是一片和平福地。不过即便过着平静的生活，生命仍被数不尽的烦恼和痛苦纠缠着。

I'm from the Research Society of Happy Smiles. As everyone knows, this place is blessed by The Laughter, making it a peaceful paradise. However, even while living a peaceful life, our existence remains entangled in countless worries and suffering.
繁重的工作、微薄的薪水、严苛的上司…打开电视，银河里的坏消息扑面而来…这些统统都是幸福的敌人。
Crushing workloads, measly pay, demanding bosses... Turn on the TV, and all the bad news from across the cosmos hits you in the face... These are all enemies of happiness.
就像星穹列车打败绝灭大君，我们「幸福微笑研究会」的创始人，倾听来自乐子神的天启，发誓要帮助二相乐园的居民打败这些幸福的敌人，让所有人快乐！

Just like how the Astral Express defeated the Lord Ravager, we, the founders of the Research Society of Happy Smiles, have received divine revelation from The Laughter and vow to help the residents of Planarcadia defeat these enemies of happiness and bring joy to everyone!
啧，「酒馆」里每个愚者喝大了都会这么说：听，乐子神在对我说话！
Tsk, every Fool in the Tavern says stuff like this when they get drunk: "Listen, The Laughter is talking to me!"
两位，有没有兴趣加入我们？如果你们能成为研究会的一员，所有成员都会倍感光荣的！
Hey, you two, interested in joining us? It would be such an honor for all our members if you could become part of our society!
小灰毛，三月宝宝，你俩该不会信她的鬼话吧？
Gray Hair, March, don't tell me you two are buying into her nonsense?
这位小姐…看起来神神叨叨的。{NICKNAME}，咱们还是快走吧。
This lady... seems a bit off her rocker. {NICKNAME}, let's get out of here quick.
真的吗？请允许我向您介绍——
Really? Please allow me to introduce...
喂，咱们这街才逛到一半，你怎么就要被别人拐走了！抱歉抱歉，我们才刚来到这里，还有许多地方要逛。下次再为我们介绍吧！

Hey, we're only halfway through exploring this street. How can you let someone whisk you away already! Sorry, sorry, we just arrived here and there are still so many places to check out. You can introduce us next time!
是吗，真遗憾…没关系，获得幸福的机会始终都会等着您。
Oh, is that so? That's a shame... But don't worry, opportunities for happiness will always be waiting for you.
希望能有一天和两位再次畅谈，引领两位获得永远幸福微笑的生活。
I hope we can have another heart-to-heart someday so that you both can be guided to a life filled with eternal happy smiles.
刚才在车站里我就好奇了，这里的马路上似乎到处都有这些五颜六色的小团子。
I've been wondering about this since we were at the station. These colorful little dumplings seem to be all over the streets here.
啊，你们是游客吧？请不要惊慌，这只是一些被称作「尘灵」的小东西。
Ah, you must be tourists? Don't panic. Those are just little things we call "wispae."
人类每时每刻飘过的小小愿望，都可能凝聚成一只尘灵。
The tiny wishes that humans make every moment of the day can condense into wispae.
有人说这些小生命是幻造种的雏形——只是没人为它们描绘形体，所以它们就以最简单最自然的样子出现在世界上。
Some say these little creatures are proto-imagenae. They just never had anyone to give them forms, so they appear in the world in the simplest, most natural state.
看起来倒是可可爱爱的，像团会蠕动的果冻……
They do look pretty adorable, like little wiggly blobs of jelly...
呃，问个不该问的问题，这东西可以吃吗？
Uh, probably shouldn't ask this, but... can we eat them?
虽然它们很调皮，但，请不要伤害他们！
They may be mischievous, but please don't hurt them!
在街边乱吃东西，可是会拉肚子的。
Eating random things off the street will give you an upset stomach.
列车飞过天空时，我看到它了！这就是「幻月」对吧？
When the Express passed through the skies, I saw it! That's the Phantasmoon, right?
传说乐子神亲自画下了它，不过真真假假谁知道啊。
Legend has it The Laughter THEMSELF painted it, but who knows what's true and what's not.
Is this moon also an imagenae?
据说是乐子神亲自画下了它，如果传说属实，它应该算是第一个幻造种了。
Legend has it that The Laughter THEMSELF painted it. If the legend is true, this would make it the first imagenae ever created.
所以，阿哈真的会透过这轮月亮，注视那些参加「幻月游戏」的人吗？
So, does Aha really watch over those who attend the Phantasmoon Games through this moon?
看不出来，三月宝宝和小灰毛也对这场星神游戏感兴趣啊。
Well, well, didn't expect darling March and little Gray Hair to be interested in this Aeonic game too.
We want to join the Phantasmoon Games.
我就知道！乐子神和你们的阿基维利一起旅行过。现在，无名客又被祂的游戏吸引到了这片乐园，真是缘分呐。
I knew it! The Laughter once traveled with your Akivili. And now the Nameless are drawn to THEIR game in this arcadia. Must be fate!
我们对幻月游戏不感兴趣。
We're not interested in the Phantasmoon Games.
哎呀，目光不自然地投向了别处。两位都没什么说谎的天分啊。
Ugh, your eyes suspiciously darted away. Neither of you is very good at lying, it seems.
Do you know about the game?
小灰毛，你算是问对人了。还有谁能比假面愚者更懂「欢愉」呢？
Gray Hair, you've come to the right person. Who could understand the Elation better than Masked Fools?
所以，你想了解「幻月游戏」的哪一面？
So, what aspect of the Phantasmoon Games would you like to know about?
How can we join the Games?
你们应该听说过八位悲悼伶人向月亮献上故事，企图打动阿哈的传说吧？
You must have heard the legend of the eight Mourning Actors who offered their stories to the moon in order to try to move Aha.
这八个人佩戴的「面具」，就是加入游戏的门票。
The "masks" that were worn by these eight people are the tickets to joining the Games.
在满盈的幻月下，选择其一，成为「谒者」，就能和其他七人竞争面见神明的资格。
Under the full Phantasmoon, choose one of the masks and become a Supplicant. Then you can compete with the other seven for the chance to meet the Aeon.
看来，要想加入游戏，得先获得面具才行。
Looks like we'll need to get a mask first if we want to join the Games.
用这个时代能理解的话说，就是「吸引流量」啦！
In modern terms, it's all about "getting views and clicks"!
「流量」？你骗人吧？神话时代哪有这种东西？
"Views and clicks"? Are you kidding me? They didn't have that kind of stuff in mythological times!
传说就是这么讲的。悲悼伶人献上各自的故事，但乐子神看都不看一眼。
That's how the legend goes. The Mourning Actors offered up their stories, but The Laughter didn't even spare them a glance.
于是，为吸引星神的目光，每一场「幻月游戏」都会留下惊人的壮举：什么铸成能拦腰截断大山的宝剑，将雪山变成飘浮的糖霜果冻……

And so, to catch the Aeon's eye, the Phantasmoon Games ended up leaving behind incredible feats each time: From forging swords that could cleave mountains in half, to transforming snowy peaks into floating jellies of sugary frost...
现在也是一样，谒者们必须竭尽全力，吸引乐园民众的关注，积累「愿力」。而乐子神，只会犒赏最激动人心的奇迹。

It's still the same today. The Supplicants must give it their all to capture the attention of the people of this arcadia and accumulate Wishpower. And The Laughter will only reward the most thrilling miracles.
花火对幻月游戏感兴趣吗？
Are you interested in the Phantasmoon Games, Sparkle?
哦？难不成匹诺康尼的对手戏还不能让你尽兴？
Oh? Don't tell me our little drama in Penacony wasn't entertaining enough for you?
小灰毛，这回就算了吧。我最近也遇上了一些小小的麻烦。
Gray Hair, let's drop it this time. I've been dealing with some minor issues lately.
什么麻烦能让你烦恼？不会又在琢磨鬼点子吧？

先卖个关子吧。接下来想去哪儿逛逛呢？
I'll keep you in suspense for now. So, where do you want to hang out next?
啊，真想给杨叔买一台作为伴手礼。
Ah, I'd love to get one of these as a souvenir for Mr. Yang.
大人…也有权利玩玩具啊！
Grown-ups... still have the right to play with toys!
Mr. Yang would be glad to hear that.
嗯，我也觉得，喜欢大机器人的杨叔也是个少年啊。
Yeah, I think so too. Mr. Yang, with all his love for giant robots, is still a kid at heart.
Mechatrons... aren't exactly toys, are they?
女孩，按照《灵物保护法》的规定，禁止买卖幻造种。
Listen, kid. According to the Faekind Protection Act, buying and selling imagenae is strictly forbidden.
Whoa! Sorry! {NICKNAME}, let's get out of here!
小灰毛别乱跑，美食街在前面，你要去哪儿？
Hey, Gray Hair, where are you running off to? The food street's right ahead!
从刚才开始，我就觉得有人在鬼鬼祟祟地跟踪。看来不是我的错觉啊。
I felt like someone was sneakily following us around for a while now. Looks like it wasn't my imagination.
这小东西又是什么来头哦？嘻嘻，他打扮得和{NICKNAME}倒是有点像啊。
What's this little thing's deal, huh? Hehe, it's dressed kinda like {NICKNAME}, isn't it?
You've got some guts taking photos of us...
Could it be one of my super fans?
也不奇怪，眼下星穹列车可是走到哪儿都备受瞩目的大人物。总有人对你们的一举一动关心得很呢……
Not surprising at all. The Astral Express is quite the celebrity these days, turning heads wherever they go. There's always someone keeping a close eye on your every move...
狸了个大谱！《狸狸周刊》独家报道！星穹列车知名浣熊竟与主播火花私会，二人或将联手加入幻月游戏……
Holy furboly! Furbobo Weekly exclusive scoop! Famous raccoon from the Astral Express caught in secret rendezvous with streamer Sparxie, seemingly to join forces for the Phantasmoon Games...
知名浣熊，私会…火花？他在说什么啊？
Famous raccoon, secret rendezvous with... Sparxie? What is he talking about?
不知哪儿来的八卦记者，想搞出什么花边新闻吧？同样是用照相机的设定，三月宝宝比这家伙可爱多了。
Some tabloid journalist trying to stir up a juicy scandal, huh? They might both use cameras, but our darling March is way cuter than this paparazzi creep.
Hey, I can speak for myself!
咔嚓咔嚓！咔嚓咔嚓！狸狸原上谱！星穹列车知名浣熊竟公然表示狸猫不能做记者，疑似存在人类至上主义思想！
*click* *click*! *click* *click*! Breaking news from Furbobo! Famous raccoon from the Astral Express openly claims furbos can't be journalists. Suspected of human supremacist ideology!
咔嚓咔嚓！咔嚓咔嚓！狸了个大谱！星穹列车知名浣熊竟公然干涉新闻自由，疑似要对本报记者进行物理属性攻击！
*click* *click*! *click* *click*! Holy furboly! Breaking news: Famous raccoon from the Astral Express openly violates press freedom. Suspected of attempted physical assault on the reporter!
喂，你这家伙不要乱写报道！还愣着干什么？{NICKNAME}，快点抓住它！
Hey, don't write nonsense in your report! Why are you just standing there? {NICKNAME}, hurry up and catch that thing!
抓不住我～哒嘟嘟～哒嘟嘟～溜了溜了！
Can't catch me~ Boom-boom~ Boom-boom~ I'm outta here!
你跑反了吧？狸猫不是往那边逃了吗？
Hey, you're going the wrong direction! Didn't the furbo run that way?
啊呀我的屁股！狸了个大谱！
做你们的美梦！哒嘟嘟！哒嘟嘟！溜了！
In your dreams! Boom-boom! Boom-boom! I'm outta here!
人好多…去河堤下面看看吧？那应该是它唯一的逃跑路线。

终于把这家伙逼到死路了。
快把偷拍的照片删掉，也不许乱写报道！不然本姑娘可要不客气了！
Delete those sneaky photos, and don't you dare write any of your made-up stories! Or I'm gonna show you what's what!
逃、逃不掉了！…我普狸策虽然只是个小小的八卦记者，但为了捍卫新闻自由，是绝对不会向黑恶势力低头的！
N—No escape now! ...I, Furbulitzer, may just be a humble tabloid journalist, but I'll never bow down to evil forces when it comes to defending freedom of the press!
哦哦呼呼呼呼！燃起来了！
这家伙怎么突然摆出战斗姿态了！
Whoa, why did this guy suddenly get into a combat stance!
这家伙到底在燃个什么劲…
要上了喔！给我乖一点趴下！

呜！请不要残害可怜的打工狸呀！

认、认错人哩。本狸把你错当成了那位著名主播噜！至于列车的浣熊大人……

咱们兄弟几个可是浣熊大人的粉丝！请看，本狸的穿着可全都是照着您那一身打扮来的哩。

Now, let's talk about compensation. Adding up emotional distress, lost wages, nutrition fees, and whatnot... one million credits per person should do it.
吓？一百万？！虚照社长已经拖欠本狸…不是，拖欠全体兄弟好几个月工资哩！要不是为了钱…谁会铤而走险来干八卦记者，偷拍星穹列车的大人物哩？

What? A million!? President Nihilux has already been behind on my... I mean, behind on everyone's wages for months! If it weren't for the money... who'd risk their neck being a tabloid journalist, sneaking photos of the bigwigs on the Astral Express?
本狸现在要钱没有，要命…也没有哩！
Right now I've got no money, and well... no life left to lose either!
Eh, let's just let it slide.
小灰毛，你这么善良可是会吃亏的喔。
Gray Hair, being this kind-hearted is gonna come back to bite you.

这台照相机可是承载本狸新闻理想的工作好伙伴哩，求求你，不要夺走它！

你说的这个虚照社长是你们杂志社的老板吗？

请放心，虚照社长一定会奉上令浣熊大人满意的赔偿金的！一定，一定要来索赔喔！
Rest assured, President Nihilux will definitely present compensation that'll satisfy the Great Raccoon! Please, please make sure to come claim your compensation!
咳咳，可恶，又被它逃了。「一定要来索赔」？不知该不该相信那只狸猫的话。

We oughta wring him for all he's worth.

Money can't buy entertainment this good! Since that scheming little furbo's extended an invitation, might as well go check it out.
眼下的二相乐园，到处充满了盯着你们的眼睛，就像那只狸猫——

那么，花火，你又是怀着什么目的盯着我们的？

三月宝宝居然还在怀疑我？小灰毛，你相信我吗？
My darling March, you still doubt me? What about you, Gray Hair?
人与人之间连一点最基本的信任都没了吗？我可要破防了。
Has all basic trust between people disappeared? Oh, I'm hurt to my core.
我就知道，不愧是最好的小灰毛~
I knew it. You really are the best, Gray Hair~
清醒一点，你可别忘了，在匹诺康尼，她可是把我们耍得团团转。
Wake up! Don't forget how she played us like fiddles back in Penacony.
你确实没有伤害过我们。

说的不错。我又怎么会伤害我最喜欢的找乐子对象呢~
You got that right. Why would I ever hurt my favorite source of joy~
你们现在更应该担心的不是我，也不是刚才的八卦记者。
What you should be worried about right now isn't me or that tabloid journalist from earlier.
名声大噪的星穹列车抵达二相乐园，是前来度假的观光客？还是为星神的游戏而来，渴望分享祂的权柄？对这里的人们而言，你们什么都不用做，就已经站在了聚光灯下。

Has the renowned Astral Express come to Planarcadia as tourists on vacation, or are you here for the Aeon's game, eager to share THEIR authority? For the local residents, you're already in the spotlight without doing anything.
如果决定加入这场游戏，你们最好时刻警惕。
If you decide to join this game, you'd better stay on your toes.
意图加入「幻月游戏」，成为谒者的人可不少。在他们眼中，星穹列车是最合适的「猎物」。我认识的家伙里面，就有一位可能成为你们的敌人……

There are quite a few people looking to join the Phantasmoon Games and become a Supplicant. In their eyes, the Astral Express is the perfect "prey." Among the folks I know, there's one who might become your enemy...
待会儿她在前面的广场上会有一出好戏，我们一起去看看如何？
She's about to put on quite a show at the plaza up ahead. Want to go check it out together?
小灰毛，你这是要跑哪儿去？我们要去的可是广场啊。
Hey Gray Hair, where do you think you're running off to? We're supposed to be heading to the plaza!
在这里，「欢愉」当然是最受敬拜的神明。不过人们践行「欢愉」的法子各有不同。你们瞧见那边漂浮着的巨大@标志了吧？
The Elation is naturally the most venerated deity here. However, people have their own different ways of practicing Elation. You've noticed those massive @ signs floating over there, haven't you?
公司为二相乐园搭建了完备的网络，让人能昼夜不分地浸泡在乐子里。
The IPC has built a comprehensive network in Planarcadia, letting people soak up entertainment around the clock.
{RUBY_B#「世界尽头」}「酒馆」{RUBY_E#}传出风声，公司想控制这一次「幻月游戏」——虽然十五年前他们早就想这么干了。
Word from the {RUBY_B#"World's End"}"tavern"{RUBY_E#} is that the IPC wants to control this year's Phantasmoon Games, though they've been itching to do that for fifteen years already.
在咱们愚者看来，公司人就像一群嗡嗡乱跑的工蜂，四处建设他们那些乏味、机械的商业蜂巢，不知疲倦。
To us Fools, those IPC folks are like a swarm of buzzing worker bees, tirelessly building their dull, mechanical business hives everywhere.
要命的是，这些家伙居然真的以此为乐——他们的「欢愉」无聊得要命！更要命的是，这么无聊的「欢愉」像传染病一样，散播到了二相乐园每个角落。
The worst part is, these folks actually enjoy it. Their Elation is mind-numbingly boring! And even worse, this dull Elation has spread like a plague to every corner of Planarcadia.
Come on in and feel it for yourself.
二相乐园的娱乐，多到能让人不带重样地玩到末日。但你知道这里缺少的是什么吗？真正的乐子！
Planarcadia has enough entertainment to keep you busy until doomsday without repeating anything. But you know what's missing here? Real fun!
成天泡在网上，和成天泡在梦里有什么区别？
What's the difference between being glued to the internet all day and being stuck in a dream?
「幻月游戏」决不能落入公司手中，沦为一场内部竞标的生意谈判，一枚银河势力争权夺利的筹码。

The Phantasmoon Games must not fall into the IPC's hands and be reduced to a business deal decided by internal bidding. It must not become just another bargaining chip in the power struggle between cosmic forces.
她就快出现了。小灰毛，要有耐心。
She'll be here soon. Have some patience, Gray Hair.
你更愿意看到「开拓」加入？
Would you rather see the Trailblaze join in?
你知道的，乐子神和阿基维利可是老朋友了。
You know, The Laughter and Akivili go way back.
你认真得都不像花火了…
You're being so serious. It's not like you at all, Sparkle...
硬找无聊的乐子，花火也是会累的。
