This is a rare opportunity, so let me show you what Miss Sparkle looks like when she gets serious.
我在匹诺康尼见识过「开拓」的潜力。命途碰撞飞溅的火花，真是让人着迷！
I witnessed the potential of the Trailblaze in Penacony. The sparks that fly when Paths collide... It's absolutely mesmerizing!
在二相乐园里，你们又能为「欢愉」献上怎样的惊喜？这里还有「存护」、「巡猎」……
In Planarcadia, what surprises will you bring for the Elation? And there's also the Preservation, The Hunt...
有没有觉得，在「幻月游戏」开启前夕，二相乐园活像是一桌星神的牌局？既然如此——
Don't you think that on the eve of the Phantasmoon Games, Planarcadia looks just like a card game among Aeons? If that's the case...
朋友们，你们有没有听说过「银河战力党」？
Friends, have you ever heard of "Cosmicon Collective"?
这可是眼下这个世界最风靡的集换式卡牌游戏！「酒馆」里也有好多人在玩。
It's the hottest trading card game in the world right now! Tons of people are playing it at the "tavern" too.
卡牌上印着宇宙各路传奇人士，和他们的战力值！只要扔出骰子比拼大小，就能决定谁强谁弱！
The cards feature legendary figures from across the universe, along with their power levels! Just roll the dice and compare numbers to see who's stronger and who's weaker!
Do they have a card of me?
Why don't you take a guess?
这和幻月游戏有什么关系？
What's that got to do with the Phantasmoon Games?
你这是接了哪一家的商单？
Is this a sponsored ad you're pushing?
小灰毛，来陪我打牌吧？就当是在这张小小的牌桌上，预演一次幻月游戏。
Gray Hair, care to play cards with me? Think of it as a rehearsal for the Phantasmoon Games, right here at this tiny card table.
赢了我的话，我就告诉你敌人的名字，也许咱们可以联手和她斗上一斗。
If you beat me, I'll tell you the enemy's name. Maybe we can team up and take her on.
Nah, I've got better stuff to do.
唔？小灰毛，你还有什么别的事？
Hmm? What else do you have to do, Gray Hair?
小灰毛，陪我打一把《银河战力党》吧？
Hey Gray Hair, wanna play a round of Cosmicon Collective with me?
Nah, I've got better stuff to do.
唔？小灰毛，你还有什么别的事？
Hmm? What else do you have to do, Gray Hair?
你要跑哪儿去？眼下就别到处乱逛啦。

火花大人的直播…时间应该快到了。
Lady Sparxie's stream... should be starting soon.
火花？刚才那只狸猫也提到过这个名字。她跟花火又是什么关系？
Sparxie? That furbo from just now mentioned that name too. What's her relationship with Sparkle?
喔？还有人不认识火花大人？我嗅到了新粉丝的味道！

要不您受累给咱们介绍一下这位火花…小姐？

能向不了解的人介绍火花大人，真是太好了！
I'm so glad I get to introduce Lady Sparxie to those who don't know her!
她是二相乐园最可爱的网络主播！也是我们的救世主！我每天下班第一件事就是等待她的直播！
She's the cutest livestreamer in Planarcadia! And our savior! The first thing I do after work every day is wait for her livestream!
她马上就要在这个广场上直播了。留在这里，陪我们一起欣赏她的表演吧。

你们一定要看看火花大人登场的可爱样子啊！

请问大家都在这里等什么呢？

当然是等待火花大人的直播！你们难道不知道火花大人是谁吗？
We're waiting for Miss Sparxie's livestream, of course! Don't tell me you guys don't know who Miss Sparxie is?
我认得你。你是…新闻上提过的那个…对了！搭乘银河列车的有名客！

是星穹列车的无名客啦……

别管什么车不车的。让我来给你们介绍一下伟大的火花大人。

她实在是太可爱了！她是最全能的主播，精通各种才艺，她的风趣，她的每一句话都徘徊在我的梦里！要短短几句话介绍这样完美的存在，根本做不到吧！

She's just so adorable! She's the most versatile streamer ever, mastering all sorts of talents. Her wit and every single word she says echoes in my dreams! It's simply impossible to sum up such a perfect being in just a few sentences!
终于碰见了不关心列车的人…不知为什么，心情居然有点轻松。

直播就要开始了！你可以和我们一起欣赏火花大人的表演！
The livestream is about to start! Why don't you join us, and we can watch Miss Sparxie's performance together!
我每天都要观看火花花的直播。她真的爱我，你们懂吗？只有在观看她的直播时，我才能感受到自己是在被爱着的。
I watch Sparxicle's livestreams every day. She truly loves me, don't you get it? I only feel like I'm loved when I watch her streams.
你清醒一点，火花爱的是我们每一个人，不是你一个人。
Wake up! Sparxie loves all of us, not just you alone.
呵，就是因为你这种人，总是说什么「火花花爱着所有人」，她才不得不把自己隐藏起来，几乎从来不在公共场合露面！
Hah, it's exactly because of people like you, always going on about how "Sparxicle loves everyone," that she has to hide herself away and barely ever appears in public!
哼，如果火花花和我结婚，我一定会保护好她！这样一来，她再也不需要对自己的个人信息如此严防死守了！
Hmph! If I married Sparxicle, I would protect her properly! Then she wouldn't need to be so strict about her personal information anymore!
You're exactly the kind of person she's trying to protect herself from!
这些人看起来不像能正常沟通的样子，我们还是躲远点吧……
These people don't look like they're up for a normal conversation. Let's keep our distance...
你根本就不懂火花花与我之间的爱！
You don't understand anything about the love between me and Sparxicle!
我必须把你这种畸形的爱扼杀在摇篮中！
I must nip this twisted love of yours in the bud!
不愧是小灰毛啊，旗开得胜。
As expected of you, Gray Hair. Starting off with a bang!
既然你赢了，这张卡就送你了。想要更多卡牌的话，就和广场上的牌佬聊聊去吧。
Since you won, this card is yours. If you want more cards, go chat with the card masters at the plaza.
一位即将在广场上直播的主播——她称自己为「火花」。
A streamer who's about to go live at the plaza. She calls herself "Sparxie."
Who's that person on the card?
This is the enemy you were talking about?
你是说那些粉丝等的主播吗？
You mean, the streamer those fans are waiting for?
没错，她就是你的敌人。这位主播和你们一样，一直在寻求加入「幻月游戏」的机会…要不了多久，她就会出现在广场上。
That's right. She's your enemy. This streamer, just like you, has been seeking a chance to join the Phantasmoon Games... It won't be long before she shows up at the plaza.
你惹上的小小麻烦…就是她，对吧？
That little trouble you've gotten yourself into... it's her, isn't it?
唉，还是没逃过三月宝宝的第六感呢。她是咱们共同的敌人。如果你们需要我帮忙……
Darling March, I just can't escape your sixth sense, huh? She's our common enemy. If you need my help...
…看到了！那个把我塞进垃圾桶里的女人，她在那儿！给我抓住她！
...There she is, that woman who stuffed me in the trashcan! She's right there! Get her!
我们生命中抛下的每一件东西，都会以意想不到的方式回到身边……
Everything we leave behind in life has a way of coming back to us in unexpected ways...
既然公司的导游来了，「酒馆」的导游就该走了。
Now that the IPC guide is here, the "tavern" guide will be on her way.
所以，你果然不是公司派来迎接我们的人！
So you really weren't sent by the IPC to welcome us!
啧，美好的相聚时间总是那么短暂。最后，让我为各位献上一个友情提示吧。
Tsk, quality time together is always so short. Before I take my leave, allow me to give you a friendly hint.
请牢牢记住，对所有加入「幻月游戏」的谒者来说，<color=#dbc291ff>无论抬头或是低头，人类凝望天空时，看到的都是同一轮幻月。</color>

Remember this well: For all Supplicants who join the Phantasmoon Games, <color=#dbc291ff>whether they look up or down, the moon that humanity gazes upon in the sky is always the same Phantasmoon</color>.
Is this some kind of... riddle?
记住这个小小的谜语，也许之后再度见面时，你会用上它的。
Remember this little riddle. You might need it when we meet again.
您…不会就是公司委派给我们的导游吧，斯科特先生？
You... wouldn't happen to be the guide the IPC assigned to us, would you, Mr. Skott?
没错！又见面了，两位祖宗！
That's exactly right! We meet again, bosses!
匹诺康尼圣杯战争结束后，大人有大量的砂金先生给了我一份弃暗投明的工作——为战略投资部效劳！
After the Holy Grail War back in Penacony, Mr. Aventurine graciously offered me a chance to turn over a new leaf by working for the Strategic Investment Department!
这不，真珠女士希望找一位曾与列车组友好相处的老熟人来担任导游，我被安排了这份重任！
And as it happens, Madam Pearl wanted to find someone who got along with the Express Crew to be a guide, so I was assigned this important task!
谁知道就在今天来履职前，我突然被人敲了一记闷棍，醒来发现被人给塞进了垃圾箱里。
But just before I came to start my job today, someone suddenly knocked me out cold, and when I woke up, I found myself stuffed in a trashcan.
没错，就是刚才诱拐你们的那个女人！要是让我抓住，我一定让她赔个倾家荡产！
That's right, it was that woman who kidnapped you just now! When I catch her, I'll make her pay until she's completely broke!
What in the world was Aventurine thinking...
嗯，我都开始怀疑他用人的眼光了。
Hmm, I'm starting to question his judgment in picking people.
那位智械姐姐，到底对「友好相处」四个字有什么误解啊？
What's with that Intellitron lady's weird take on "getting along" anyway?
I'm suddenly starting to miss Sparkle...
和眼前这位一比，花火也可爱多了。
Sparkle is way more lovable than this one here.
我知道！你们不想看见我这张神憎鬼厌的脸！鄙人斯科特完全理解各位的烦恼！只要你们平安无事，我就别无他想了。
I knew it! You don't want to see my despicable face! I, Skott, totally understand your frustration! As long as you're safe and sound, that's all I care about.
两位祖宗，是想离开吃点东西，还是继续在这儿玩耍，还是想欣赏鄙人最新研发的动物口技？
So, dear bosses, would you like to grab a bite to eat, keep playing around here, or perhaps enjoy my latest animal impersonation act?
斯科特先生的敬业程度，竟然熟练到让人有一丝心疼。
Mr. Skott's dedication to his work is so intense... it's almost painful to watch.
We're waiting for the "enemy" to show up.
敌人？！我不允许！谁要想伤害我尊贵的两位祖宗，必须从我的尸体上踏过去！
Enemy!? Not on my watch! Anyone who wants to harm my esteemed bosses will have to first step over my dead body!
你还是静静呆在一边吧。
Maybe you should just stay quietly to the side.
只要您吩咐，鄙人林登•斯科特会像影子一样毫无存在感地一边呆着去，直到世界末日！
At your command, I, your humble servant Lyndon Skott, shall fade into the background like a shadow, completely unnoticeable, until the end of time!
烦人的家伙终于走了，我们去广场上瞧瞧这里有什么好玩的。
The annoying guy is finally gone. Let's head into the plaza and see what fun stuff they've got.
What can I do for you, boss?
这…这不好吧？我不是拒绝您的要求，我也可以打，我也是牌佬。
Uh... that's not really appropriate, is it? Not that I'm refusing your request. I can play too. I mean, I'm quite a card player myself.
但现在是我的上班时间，我被安排的工作是您的导游，不是牌友。我得认真工作，可不能三心二意。
But I'm on duty right now, and I was assigned to be your guide, not your card buddy. I need to take my work seriously, can't be splitting my attention like that.
瞧见那边那位牌友了吗？您可以找他聊聊嘛。
Now, you see that card player over there? You can go chat with him instead.
和我打牌就是你的工作！
Playing cards with me IS your job!
既然是您吩咐，那我就恭敬不如从命。我说，你可不能事后打小报告说我不务正业啊。
Since it's your order, I'll humbly obey. But hey, don't go tattling later, saying I'm slacking off on my duties.
我会像影子一样，在一边呆着，静候您的吩咐。
I'll be like a shadow, standing by and awaiting your orders.
不愧是无名客、大英雄！牌技竟然如此了得！
As expected of the Nameless, our great hero! Your card skills are truly remarkable!
不愧是无名客、大英雄！牌技竟然如此了得！
As expected of the Nameless, our great hero! Your card skills are truly remarkable!
您虽败犹荣！下次需要我假装输给您，您就眨眨眼。
You may have lost, but you lost with honor! Just give me a wink next time if you want me to pretend to lose to you.
祖宗，我提供的情绪价值够不够？嘿嘿，记得回去以后多为我美言几句啊。
Boss, am I giving you the good vibes you need? Hehe, don't forget to put in a good word for me when you get back.
对了，这片广场上还有其他牌友，您要是不尽兴，可以找他聊聊。
Oh right, there are other players around this plaza. If you're still up for more, feel free to chat with them.
好大一本书啊，里面写了些什么呢？
Whoa, that's one massive book! I wonder what's written inside?
Hello, how can I help you?
I heard you're looking for someone to play cards?
Wanna play a round of Cosmicon Collective?
这位仁兄只是路过而已。{F#小妹妹}{M#老兄}你搞错啦，想打牌的话找我就好。
This one's just passing through. {M#Buddy,}{F#Lady,} you've got the wrong person... If you wanna play cards, I'm your guy.
下次牌瘾上来，又或是想来交换卡牌，随时找我。
Hit me up any time you're in the mood for a game, or you want to trade some cards.
你好啊，{F#小妹妹}{M#小哥}，在「画中世界」各处穿行的时候还习惯吗？
Hey there, {F#young lady.}{M#buddy!} You getting the hang of traversing the World in Canvas yet?
需要的话可以在我这儿练习一番？
Need some practice? You can always try your luck with me.
先来点简单的练练手吧。
Let's start with something easy to warm up.
想要练习的话，可以随时来找我。
If you ever want to practice, come find me anytime.
你在这附近闲逛好一阵了，你是不是想玩这个广场上的游戏呢？
You've been hanging around here for a while now. Are you interested in playing the games in this Plaza?
那算你找对尘灵了。环顾四周吧，看看世界游戏大全三合一，你喜欢哪个？
Well, you came to the right wispae. Look around! We've got a three-in-one world game collection. Which one catches your eye?
"The Wispae That Wants To Fly But Can't Fly"
Keep flapping, don't drop outta the sky now!
"The Wispae Waiting For Money to Fall From The Sky"
Grab some more, don't hold back.
...Not really in the mood right now.
Drop by again when you're free.
我们仨就是口口口，有品吧？
The three of us are Orisorisoris. Pretty classy, right?
这里都有些什么游戏呢？
So what kind of games do they have here?
「不断向下堕落的尘灵」、「想飞却飞不动的尘灵」、「等着天上掉钱的尘灵」——主要是这三款时尚单品。
"The Wispae That Constantly Falls," "The Wispae That Wants To Fly But Can't Fly," and "The Wispae Waiting For Money to Fall From The Sky" — mainly these three fashionable items.
Why do I get the feeling things are kinda bleak?
…有那种积极的尘灵，肯定也会有这样丧丧的，希望你能喜欢。
...Just like there are upbeat wispae, there are bound to be these gloomy ones too. Hope you'll like them.
Wait, there are only three games?
…这里只有我们仨了，你看着办吧。
...It's just the three of us here. Your call.
...Not really in the mood right now.
Drop by again when you're free.
Drop by again when you're free.
喂喂喂？各位粉丝！久等了，你们听得见吗！
Hello? Hello? All my lovely fans! Sorry to keep you waiting. Can you hear me!?
今天大家有好好工作吗？有好好吃饭吗？
Has everyone been working hard today? Did everyone eat properly?
肚皮饱饱心情好，看火花花看到老！
A full belly makes a happy heart. Let's watch Sparxicle till it gets dark!
今天大家…有好好爱我吗？
Has everyone... been treating me with lots of love today?
一生只爱火花花，变心一定遭雷劈！
Forever devoted to Lady Sparxie. If ever not, may lightning strike me!
嗯？不对劲呀…今天的观众里，怎么有人身上，沾染了{RUBY_B#花火}旧型号{RUBY_E#}的气息呢？
Hm? Something's off... Why do I sense my {RUBY_B#Sparkle}old model{RUBY_E#}'s aura on some people in the audience today?
糟了，这不会是说我们吧！
Oh boy, she must be talking about us!
让我看看，是哪个坏宝宝，去见了不该见的人呢？
Let's see, which naughty ones went to meet someone they shouldn't have?
呀，被你逃出来了啊，电子囚笼里的小宠物。看来我还是要动用一些「爱的力量」才能把你抓回去。
Ah, so my little pets managed to escape from their electronic cage. Looks like I'll have to use the "power of love" to catch you and bring you back.
我贴心的小粉丝们，那两个坏家伙要伤害我，拜托大家，保护火花花好吗！
My dear lovely fans, those two bullies want to hurt me! Please, everyone, protect your beloved Sparxicle, won't you!?
抓住坏东西！抓住坏东西！抓住坏东西！
Get those baddies! Get those baddies! Get those baddies!
喂喂，我们没有恶意，不能谈谈吗？
Hey hey, we mean no harm! Can't we just talk this out?
啊！「没有恶意」，「我们谈谈」？这不是公司进入二相乐园接管一切的时候最爱说的话吗？看来你们是一丘之貉呢！
Ha! "No harm," "talk this out"? Isn't that exactly what the IPC loved to say when they took over Planarcadia? You're all cut from the same cloth!
你们想像公司那样，一手操控乐子神留给这个世界的游戏，对吧？
You want to control the game that The Laughter left for this world, just like the IPC, don't you?
{RUBY_B#阿哈}欢愉之主{RUBY_E#}所留下的仪式，绝不能被你们玷污，变成一个无趣的、可悲的、枯燥的、乏味的、功利的…联谊活动。
The ceremony left by the {RUBY_B#Aha}Master of Elation{RUBY_E#} must not be defiled by the likes of you, and turned into some boring, pathetic, dull, tedious, profit-driven... social mixer.
你对我们的误会可太大了！
恢复「幻月游戏」的乐子——这是假面愚者不可推卸的责任。
Bringing the fun back to the Phantasmoon Games, that's the Masked Fools' unequivocal duty.
我最最可爱的粉丝们～♥快上吧！
My dearest, cutest fans~♥ Let's get this party started!
到此为止！所有人！不许乱动！违法幻造种，你被捕了！
Stand down! Everyone! Don't move a muscle! Imaginae, you're under arrest for breaking the law!
星穹列车的客人，我是「异常防御部」的治安官。别担心，有我在，她没法伤害你们的。
Passengers of the Astral Express, I'm an officer from the Department of Aberration Defense. Don't worry, she won't be able to harm you as long as I'm here.
碍事的家伙，在「幻月游戏」期间，谒者的所作所为，官方应该无权插手吧？
You meddlesome fool, officials have no right to interfere with a Supplicant's actions during the Phantasmoon Games, do they?
持有面具的人才算得上谒者，而你，不过是这片土地上，成千上万个自称「想要加入幻月游戏」却借机闹事的暴乱分子之一。
Only those who possess a mask can be called Supplicants. You're just one of thousands of troublemakers in this land who claim to be "joining the Phantasmoon Games" while actually causing chaos.
二相乐园是法治社会，任何违背法律的行为，就算打着「幻月游戏」的名义行动，「异常防御部」也会严惩不贷。
Planarcadia is a society governed by law. Any act that violates the law, even if done in the name of the Phantasmoon Games, will be severely punished by the Department of Aberration Defense.
什么严惩不贷？哈哈，不过是一条公司的哈巴狗，居然有这么强的自豪感？真是太好笑了。
Severely punished? Haha, you're just a lapdog of the IPC, yet you're still so full of pride. That's very funny.
所以我才说嘛，公司治下的「二相乐园」，无聊到爆~连幻月游戏都变成了乖宝宝们才能参加的过家家。
That's exactly what I'm saying. Planarcadia under the IPC's rule is boring as hell~ Even the Phantasmoon Games have turned into some kiddie play-date for all the goody-two-shoes.
无名客，你们暂时自由了。不过，我会盯着你们的。
Nameless, you're free to go for now. But I'll be keeping my eyes on you.
下次见面时，我一定要把你们变成我的忠实粉丝，变成…我的东西~♥
Next time we meet, I'll turn you into devoted fans. I'll make you... mine~♥
两位，借过一边，我想和你们聊两句。
Excuse me, I'd like to have a word with you two.
汪，你好！我们正在确保火花的粉丝有序离场，请暂时不要接近广场。
Woof, hello! We're making sure Sparxie's fans leave in an orderly fashion, so please stay away from the plaza for now.
再次自我介绍，我是朽叶，「异常防御部」的治安官。
Let me introduce myself again. I'm Kuchiba, an officer from the Department of Aberration Defense.
咱们就不用自我介绍了吧？朽叶小姐应该认识我俩。
We don't need to introduce ourselves, do we? Miss Kuchiba, you probably know who we are.
当然。报纸也好，电视新闻也罢，一直在报道呢。
Of course. The newspapers, TV channels... they've all been reporting on you non-stop.
我以为你是警犬驯养员。
I thought you were a police dog trainer.
警犬？哦，你是说那些「犬灵」吧。人家可是正儿八经的警方执法人员，有些资历比我还深呢。
Police dog? Oh, you mean those "woofae." They're legitimate law enforcement officers, and some of them have even more experience than I do.
不过，作为「异常防御部」的工作人员，我有一些小小特权可以借调他们为我办事。
However, as a staff member of the Department of Aberration Defense, I have some special privileges that allow me to request their assistance.
嗯，如二位所知，二相乐园是个奇妙的世界。被绘师画出的幻造生物，意外获得了生命的物品，画卷深处的异空间，还有我们脚下偶尔颤动的大地……

Mm-hmm. As you both know, Planarcadia is quite a fascinating world. Creatures made real by artists' brushstrokes, objects that unexpectedly come to life, strange dimensions hidden within paintings, and even the ground beneath our feet that occasionally trembles...
这些都是「异常防御部」存在的意义：从管理超自然异常，到注册幻造种、确保他们的存续。
This is what the Department of Aberration Defense exists for: everything from managing supernatural anomalies to registering imagenae and ensuring their continued existence.
当然，还有火花刚刚提到的「幻月游戏」。
And of course, there's the Phantasmoon Games that Sparxie just mentioned.
所以，是谁派你来救我们？
So, who sent you to rescue us?
我猜的没错的话，应该是斯科特先生请你来的吧？
If I'm not mistaken, was it Mr. Skott who sent you here?
原来那位盛气凌人的公司专员叫这个名字。这位…斯科特先生觉得对手不是普通的罪犯，是假面愚者，必须重拳出击，所以一个电话拍到了「异常防御部」。

So that's the name of that high and mighty IPC Specialist. This... Mr. Skott believed he wasn't dealing with ordinary criminals, but with Masked Fools, which required decisive action. So a phone call was immediately made to the Department of Aberration Defense.
倒也不出所料…那接下来我们怎么办？导游跑了，和火花的粉丝打了一架…今天的逛街计划是不是泡汤了？

咱们是不是该打个电话给姬子姐，跟她通报一下情况？

No need to rush, you two. Oh! I bet you haven't tried the local delicacies yet, have you?
这样吧，我带两位去附近先吃点东西，你们也好慢慢消磨时间，等待你们的朋友。
How about this? I'll take you both to grab a bite nearby. That way you can kill some time while waiting for your friend.

请跟我握个手，这只手这辈子就不洗了。

As lively as our darling March!

你就是花火提到的「敌人」吗？

你和花火到底是什么关系？

这个没用的{RUBY_B#花火}旧型号{RUBY_E#}，请你们来救她？
Did that useless {RUBY_B#Sparkle}old model{RUBY_E#} send you to save her?

嘻嘻，让火花花好好给你打扮一下~♥

以火花花之名，在此宣判——你们有罪！

I'm firing up a round of Cosmicon Collective right now!

Not long ago, somewhere in Duomension City...
色彩还原：<unbreak>96.2%</unbreak>。笔触还原：<unbreak>93.6%</unbreak>。结论：在物理层面，我的临摹已达到鉴定临界值。
Color reproduction: <unbreak>96.2%</unbreak>. Brushstroke reproduction: <unbreak>93.6%</unbreak>. Conclusion: On the physical level, my reproduction has reached the appraisal threshold.
这幅赝作，足以被判定为真迹。
This forgery can now be considered the authentic piece.
告诉我，你在为什么烦恼？那不到4%的误差，还是数字外的什么？
Tell me, what troubles you? Is it that less than 4% margin of error? Or something beyond the numbers?
我在处理一项难以量化的属性：艺术性。它是成为这片乐园世界管理者的前提。
I'm grappling with a quality that defies measurement: artistry. It is the prerequisite for becoming the steward of this arcadia.
可你已经是了。「钻石」会记得，你只用六个月就坐上了这个位置。
But you already are its steward. "Diamond" will remember that you only took six months to claim that title.
是五个月又十五天。虚名没有意义，在「二相乐园」，政治的影响力有限。
It was five months and fifteen days. Empty titles mean nothing. In Planarcadia, political influence carries limited weight.
要为这幅画作添笔，理解艺术是必要条件。
To add a stroke to this artwork, one must first understand art.
我了解你。这是结论，不是原因。
I know you. This is the conclusion, not the cause.
你面前这幅《覆世沧浪图》，是哈托彼亚这颗星球历史中的文明…古弁才天国画师之祖「绘世」所留的遗作。传言她施展神迹，幻造出了一个完整的位面，将整个世界收入画卷中。

The piece before you, "Worldbreaker Waves," is a relic from one of the civilizations in Ahatopia's history, the final work left behind by Graphia, the ancestral painter of ancient Benzaitengoku. Legend says she performed a miracle, conjuring an entire plane of existence and sealing the whole world within her scroll.
你想知道，她是如何办到的？
Do you want to know how she did it?
我不否认。人们称之为「神迹」，代表无人知晓本质——换言之，是一片蓝海。
I will not deny it. People call her achievements a "miracle," meaning its true nature remains unknown. In other words, it is an unexplored market.
先有理解，再有投资。理所应当。
Understanding comes first, then investment. That is the natural order.
也许，这就是「钻石」选择你的原因。一名结果和效率至上的智械，被投入一座靠想象运转的国度。
Perhaps this is why "Diamond" chose you. An Intellitron devoted to results and efficiency, cast into a realm sustained by imagination.
「石心十人」期待一场蜕变。祝你在光怪陆离的海洋里，收获自己的「真珠」。
The "Ten Stonehearts" await a metamorphosis. May you find your own "Pearl" in this strange and dazzling sea.
谢谢。但我的任务是：把控「幻月游戏」的进程。自我成长不在其列。
Thank you. But my mission is to oversee the progress of the Phantasmoon Games. Personal growth is not part of the task.
翡翠，容我指出：「石心十人」是十位独立的决策者。你试图将人们捆绑，只会适得其反，致使不必要的折损。
Jade, allow me to point this out: The Ten Stonehearts are ten independent decision-makers. Your attempts to bind people together will only prove counterproductive and bring needless loss.
一如往常，我遵循最优决策：保持中立。这也是我对龙晶的回答。
As always, I follow the optimal choice: neutrality. That is also my answer to Obsidian.
滴水不漏的答复。你的理性美总是令人着迷。
A flawless reply. Your cool logic is always captivating.
真珠大人，那位列车领航员来拜访您了。
Lady Pearl, that Express Navigator has come to see you.
看来，不会再有奢谈艺术的闲暇了。
It seems we no longer have the leisure to speak of art.
言尽于此。请告诉「钻石」，我会履行自己的职责：战略投资。
This is all I have to say. Tell Diamond I will fulfill my duty of strategic investment.
Both of you, please, come in.
Forgive the sudden visit, and thank you for receiving us.
并非贸然。在推演中，「列车组上门拜访」是达成有效沟通的优质选项。我很高兴：一切顺利。
It is not sudden. In my deductions, "a visit from the Express Crew" was an optimal choice for achieving effective communication. I am glad: Everything is proceeding smoothly.
能免去寒暄再好不过。我们的目的，你想必也了然于「芯」了？
To skip the formalities would be best. I imagine that, at your "core," you're already well aware of our purposes?
我知道，二位是为「反毁灭同盟」而来——
I know that you have come for the "Anti-Destruction Alliance"...
拒绝的概率是：<unbreak>91.2%</unbreak>。可否告诉我：为什么？
The probability of refusing the proposal stands at <unbreak>91.2%</unbreak>. Can you tell me: Why?
对抗铁墓一役，列车组见证了众多派系的决心。我们不抵触「同盟」的愿景，但「开拓」必须自立。
The Express Crew bore witness to the resolve of many factions during the battle of Irontomb. We do not oppose the vision of an "alliance," but the Trailblaze must remain independent.
在我们眼里，公司旗下已有「市场开拓部」。而那些被它纳入贸易版图的世界，最后都成了「存护」的基石。
From our perspective, the IPC already has the "Marketing Development Department," and every world it drew into the cosmic trade map eventually became a cornerstone for the Preservation.
合理的担忧。我可以提供易被忽视的数据：近两纪，加入泛银河贸易体系的星球共<unbreak>1263</unbreak>颗，其中<unbreak>63%</unbreak>保留了原生文明形态，背后是战略投资部的努力。

That is a reasonable concern. Allow me to present data that is often overlooked. In the past two Eras, <unbreak>1263</unbreak> planets have joined the Pan-Cosmic Trade System, and <unbreak>63%</unbreak> of them have preserved their native civilizations. This is the result of the Strategic Investment Department's work.
「二相乐园」也是其中之一，「存护」和「欢愉」在这片土地上融洽共存。
Planarcadia is one such world. On this land, the Preservation and the Elation co-exist in harmony.
我理解，在此过程中，每一位参与这场「反毁灭之战」的人都可能陷入犹豫、退缩的情绪。但——
I recognize that throughout this "war against the Destruction," every participant may experience moments of doubt or retreat. But...
基于演算，我们认为沿着「开拓」的路径，基于「存护」的框架，整合「同谐」的人力、「智识」的算力、「巡猎」的军力——「毁灭」的威胁终将被弭平。

Based on extrapolations, we believe by following the route of the Trailblaze and building upon the framework of the Preservation, we shall gather the manpower of the Harmony, the computational strength of the Erudition, and the military might of the Hunt... The threat of the Destruction will ultimately be eliminated.
犹豫等于动摇，动摇意味着被动——我们的敌人将会利用这些裂痕逐个击破、摧毁我们。
Hesitation breeds instability, and instability makes us vulnerable, and our enemies will exploit every crack to break us apart.
你的观点不无道理。但请容我指出一处误差：<unbreak>91.2%</unbreak>，这个数字并不准确。

在你看来，拒绝的概率是<unbreak>100%</unbreak>？

不，是0%。很有趣，「零」或「一」也只在角度差别。
No, it is zero percent. Interestingly, the difference between "zero" and "one" is also only a matter of perspective.
我们前来，不是为了拒绝。相反，星穹列车想要和你合作。
We did not come to refuse the notion. On the contrary, the Astral Express seeks to work with you.
这一点…超出我的推演。请问：是情绪变动，令二位改变了想法？

不，是你刚才的观点启发了我。

在银河这张牌桌上，公司结交的是以百亿人为计的势力。列车与他们相比，原本不值一提。
The IPC deals with powers that command billions of lives in this cosmic game of cards. The Express had always been insignificant compared to them.
一直以来，我们只是真诚地开拓、探索，设法帮助那些陷入危机的世界。
We've simply been earnestly trailblazing and exploring all this time, trying to help worlds in crisis.
而如今，正是这份「真诚」有幸让许多人愿意和列车同行，而无名客的朴素让我们的朋友感到安心，不必担忧自己被吞没。
Now, it is this "earnestness" that has drawn many to journey with the Express, while the Nameless' simplicity assures our friends that they will not be consumed and lose their sense of self.
没错，要说「开拓」有什么过人之处，只有脚下这条「信任」的轨道。
Indeed. If the Trailblaze has any outstanding strength, it is the track of "trust" that we walk.
所以，我们才会来找你，真珠小姐。请你放下石心十人的身份，设想这样一种可能——
That is why we came to you, Miss Pearl. Please set aside your role as one of the Ten Stonehearts and imagine this possibility...
对抗「毁灭」无需同盟，只需同行。
To fight against the Destruction, there is no need for an alliance. What we need is to stand by each other.
公司未必是列车的盟友，战略投资部也一样——但「你」可以是。
The IPC may not stand as an ally of the Express, nor might the Strategic Investment Department... But "you" can.
与「同谐」合力，和「智识」一同数算，校准「巡猎」的锋镝，筑起「存护」的坚盾。
Work with the Harmony, calculate alongside the Erudition, help aim the arrows of the Hunt, and build the steadfast shield of the Preservation.
那么，「开拓」想在其中扮演什么角色？
Then, what part does the Trailblaze wish to play in all this?
舰船的旗帜？似乎和我先前的提案，并无不同。

当然有。穿越风暴的帆，不会在意自身的完整，也绝不试图掌控船的走向。
It is different. A sail that cuts through the storm does not care for its own welfare, nor does it try to command the ship's course.
但它帮助所有有志对抗「毁灭」的人，穿过这场风暴。
But it will help all who wish to fight against the Destruction to traverse safely through the storm.
有趣。逻辑在提醒我：方才的表述只是文字游戏。但……
Interesting. Logic reminds me that those words you spoke are little more than rhetoric. However...
我遵循最优决策：保持中立。
I will follow the optimal decision: neutrality.
你刚才提到，公司从未改变二相乐园，它依然行走在「欢愉」的命途上。
You mentioned that the IPC has never changed Planarcadia, and it still follows the Path of Elation.
但在我看来，与星穹列车一样，只是因为{RUBY_B#哈托彼亚}「二相乐园」{RUBY_E#}尚有价值，才没有被改变。
But in my eyes, {RUBY_B#Ahatopia}Planarcadia{RUBY_E#} has not been altered because it still has value, just like the Astral Express.
公司想利用「幻月游戏」，接触并拉拢{RUBY_B#「欢愉」}一位星神{RUBY_E#}——我说的对吗？
The IPC intends to use the Phantasmoon Games to reach out to {RUBY_B#The Elation}an Aeon{RUBY_E#} and draw THEM in. Am I right?

但，既然姬子女士有意合作，在合理范围内，我可以提供更多信息。
However, since Miss Himeko is open to cooperation, I can share more within reasonable limits.
画中世界的某处，被称为「幻月秘庭」的地点。
A place in the World in Canvas, called the "Phantasmoon Courtyard."
这株古木千年不朽，只在游戏开始前盛放。
This ancient tree has stood for a thousand years, blooming only on the eve of the games.
依照古籍记载，此地是「幻月游戏」的仪式中枢。
According to ancient texts, this is the heart of the "Phantasmoon Games" ceremony.
八张面具，八位谒者。不久之后，当人们佩戴上古老的面具，神坛也将显现它们的形貌——然后，游戏便将开启。
Eight masks. Eight Supplicants. When people don the ancient masks in the near future, the altar will also reveal the masks' forms. Then, the games shall begin.
我听闻：姬子小姐，您身上流淌着绘世的血脉……
I've been told, Miss Himeko, that Graphia's blood courses through your veins...
眼下，「巡猎」的使者也一同在场。这场竞逐「欢愉」的仪式，便是银河形势的缩影。
The messenger of the Hunt is here as well at this moment. This Ceremony to compete for the Elation is but a reflection of cosmic politics.
既然如此，不妨就用「幻月游戏」的结果，来定夺列车成为「风帆」还是「旗帜」？
In that case, why not use the result of the Phantasmoon Games to decide whether the Express will become a "sail" or a "banner"?
不过，参加游戏需要「欢愉假面」，想必公司已经有所准备了？
However, to take part in the games, one must have a "Mask of Elation." I assume the IPC has prepared for that.
截至目前，为我所有的面具共：3张。如果时间再充裕些，还可以掌握更多。
As of now, the number of masks I possess is: three. With more time, I could obtain even more.
在历史上，从未有人想过，或是做到将谒者与面具统一调配。
In all of history, no one has conceived of a unified command of all Supplicants and masks, let alone accomplished that feat.
<color=#dbc291ff>但这次，公司将凭借资源和影响力，尝试「调控」这场游戏。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>But this time, the IPC intends to "regulate" the games with our resources and influence.</color>
天外来客加入「幻月游戏」倒也不稀奇，但公司…竟然想掌控整个游戏？
It is not unusual for visitors from beyond the sky to join the Phantasmoon Games, but the IPC... actually seeks to control the entire thing?
「欢愉」星神向来以变化无常著称，真珠小姐，请务必小心。这是善意的提醒。
The Aeon of Elation is famed for unpredictability. Miss Pearl, you must take care. This is a word of caution.
正因阿哈变化无常，如此「欢愉」的尝试才有成功的可能。
It is precisely because Aha is so mercurial that such an "elated" attempt has a chance to succeed.
打扰您会谈了，真珠女士。
您派出的导游发来消息，说是假面愚者闹事，袭击了他和列车的客人，几个人走散了。
The guide you dispatched has sent word. The Masked Fools have stirred up trouble, attacking him and the Express guests. They were separated in the chaos.
不意外。那些愚者一直对公司虎视眈眈。
That is not surprising. Those Masked Fools have long kept the IPC in their sights.
看来，无论列车如何选择，「幻月游戏」已经开始了。
It seems the Phantasmoon Games have begun, regardless of the Express's choice.
我来联系那两个孩子吧。
I'll get in touch with those two kids.
The three of them returned to the reception room.
真珠小姐，出于安全考虑，我和瓦尔特得先告退了。
Miss Pearl, Welt and I must take our leave now for the sake of security.
两位这就要离开？我原本还有个计划：想和姬子小姐谈谈古弁才天国的艺术史——
Are you both leaving already? I had another plan in mind: to speak with Miss Himeko about the art history of ancient Benzaitengoku...
尤其是您先祖的遗作《覆世沧浪图》，还有她神乎其技的幻造技艺。
Especially your ancestor's final work Worldbreaker Waves and her unparalleled mastery of imagenesis art.
既然真珠小姐有这样的雅兴…姬子，我先出发？
Since Miss Pearl is in such high spirits... Himeko, shall I depart first?
瓦尔特先生，在离开前，请带上这份礼物吧。
Mr. Yang, please accept this gift before you leave.
不，你客气了。列车并不缺行动资金，我不能收下这笔钱。
No, you are too kind. The Express has no shortage of operational funds. I cannot accept this money.
你误会了！向无名客赠送俗物，未免也太过失礼。请先打开这个箱子看看。
You misunderstand. To offer the Nameless something so mundane would be far too discourteous. Please, open this case first and see for yourself.
这是…珠星财团推出的超可动模型「魔动机铠」，是还没面世的新品。
This is... the movable Magico Mechatron model from Pearluxe Corp. It's not even been released to the market yet.
我知道：瓦尔特先生对机器人技术颇有见地，特地选了这份礼物，希望你喜欢。
I am aware: Mr. Yang has an expert understanding of robotics. I chose this gift especially for you, and I hope it pleases you.
这的确是一份厚礼，感谢您的馈赠。
This truly is a most generous gift. Thank you for such an offering.

Everyone, let us drag that intruder out!
They will not be able to hide for long.
用膝盖想也知道，眼下凭你一个人看来是无法打倒火花和她的狂热粉丝了。
It doesn't take a rocket scientist to figure out that you can't defeat Sparxie and her rabid fans all by yourself right now.
门外，急促、嘈杂的脚步声渐渐涌来。
Outside the door, hurried and chaotic footsteps gradually approached.
开门啊！你躲起来也没用！我们待会儿就会把你抓出来！
Open the door! Hiding won't save you! We will drag you out soon enough!
想也知道，蓄谋已久的火花绝对不会留下任何一丝让你逃走的机会。
As expected, Sparxie's been plotting this for a while. She won't leave you even the slightest chance of escape.
门外，急促、嘈杂的脚步声渐渐涌来。
Outside the door, hurried and chaotic footsteps gradually approached.
你躲在里面也没用！待会儿就会把你抓出来！
Hiding won't save you! We will drag you out soon enough!
Have you reached the end of your rope?
外面都是火花的狂热粉丝…眼下还是不要出去为好。
Sparxie's crazed fans are everywhere outside... It is best not to step out for now.
快看！那个灰毛的黑粉在这儿，为了火花花，抓住{F#她}{M#他}！
Look! There is the gray-haired hater. Grab {M#him!}{F#her!} For the sake of Sparxicle!
你一头钻进了档案室，把门反锁起来。
You rushed into the archives room and locked the door behind you.
一幅招贴画，突兀地出现在档案室的黑板上。你发誓自己上一次来这儿的时候，没见过这东西。
A poster, jarringly out of place, has appeared on the archive room's blackboard. You swear you hadn't seen it the last time you were here.
飘飘双耳如扶风弱柳，半阖双眸似秋波欲眠的……
With ears that sway like the feeble willows in a gentle breeze, and half-lidded eyes like autumn waters ready to slumber...
（这个粉毛…我曾在哪里见过的？）
(This pink-haired person... where have I seen this person before?)
Is that right? No, no, that can't be... right...?
The one in the class photo...?
想起来了！是班级的合照里那个狐狸女孩？
I remember now! She's the fox girl in the class photo!
你居然还能记得。看来，这确实就像是漫画里常说的那什么…「命运般的邂逅」。你遇到了一点点麻烦，而我将将好出现在这儿。
So you actually managed to remember. Seems like this is what they call in comics... a "fateful encounter." You stumble into a bit of trouble, and I will happen to show up here.
Hey, come a little closer, will you?
几小时前，有两位无名客也踏进了这里，问出了同样的问题。我就用那些人的答案来回应你的提问好了——
Two Nameless came through here a few hours ago and asked the exact same question. I will use their answers to reply to you...
「这儿是画中世界的某处，被称之为幻月秘庭的地点。按照古籍记载，此地是『幻月游戏』的仪式中枢。」
"This is a place in the World in Canvas, known as the Phantasmoon Courtyard. According to ancient texts, this is the heart of the 'Phantasmoon Games' ceremony."
对了，其中一位无名客正在学校里「假扮」老师呢…哦，我是不是剧透了？这样不好。
Oh, and one of those Nameless is "playing" the part of a teacher at the school... Oh dear, was that a spoiler? That's not good.
So I really am the protagonist!
主角？难怪！你总觉得人生充满了不可思议的奇遇。人人对你另眼相看，回回总能死里逃生。你有种说不清道不明的朦胧感受，你对这个宇宙很重要。

The protagonist? No wonder! You always feel like your life is full of incredible adventures. Everyone treats you differently, and you somehow manage to escape death every single time. You have this vague, indescribable feeling that you're important to this universe.
而这个女孩仅用两个字就精准概括了你，「主角」。毫无疑问，她是个天才！
And this girl summed you up perfectly with just one word: "protagonist". No doubt about it, she's a genius!
主角？这个称呼有点自恋吧？
Protagonist? That sounds a bit self-aggrandizing.
你第一次听到有人用这么夸张的说法称呼你。她有什么目的？你不禁怀疑。
It's the first time someone's called you something so over the top. What's her angle? You can't help but feel suspicious.
你年轻、{F#美丽}{M#英俊}、才华横溢，但最重要的是，你还拥有为人谦逊低调的高贵品质。你打算大声告诉这个女孩，你不是什么主角，你是——

You're young, {F#beautiful}{M#handsome}, and incredibly talented, but most importantly, you possess the noble quality of being humble and low-key. You're about to tell this girl loudly that you're not some protagonist, you're—
虽然严格来说，每个人都是自己人生的主角。但你不一样…你是《苍天航路绒绒号》的主角，对吧？
Technically, everyone is the protagonist of their own story. But you are different... You are the protagonist of the Fluffy Across the Blue, aren't you?
银河…球棒浣熊？唔？你长得也不像浣熊啊。
Galactic... baseballer raccoon? Hm? You do not really look like a raccoon.
忘了自我介绍，我叫绯英。请多关照。
Ah, I forgot to introduce myself. You can call me Evanescia. Great seeing you!
围绕神木下的一池静谧之水，八座神坛遥遥相对，仿佛暗合某种古老的阵仪。
Around the tranquil pond beneath the sacred tree, eight altars stand facing one another, seemingly arranged in an ancient ceremonial formation.
空底座下镌刻一行几乎不可辨认的文字：「焚烧众愿，调伏诸恶」。
Beneath the empty pedestal, there's a barely legible inscription: "Incinerate all Wishes, subdue every evil."
水中有月亮的倒影…可是这儿也照不见月亮啊？
There's a reflection of the moon in the water... but you can't even see the moon from here.
第一位佩戴面具的谒者出现了，很快，「幻月游戏」就要开始了。
The first Supplicant wearing a mask has appeared. The Phantasmoon Games will soon begin.
别害怕，把我当成观众就好，就像是读者看漫画那样的关系。
Do not be afraid. Just think of me as part of the audience, like a reader following a comic.
一点小小的经验。就像一个人看了许多漫画后，自然而然就会对超能力战斗和校园恋爱无师自通。
A bit of experience. Just like someone who has read enough comics can get superpowered battles and schoolyard romances without any instructions.
你刚才说那个…苍什么号？
What did you just say... Fluffy something?
你不会没看过吧？最近在这个世界大火的漫画？
Do you seriously mean you've never read it? The comic that has taken this world by storm?
以星穹列车的冒险故事为原型，讲述可爱的小动物们搭乘火车在银河里旅行的…《苍天航路绒绒号》？
It is inspired by the adventures of the Astral Express, telling the tale of cute little animals riding a train across the cosmos... Fluffy Across the Blue?
有人画了星穹列车的漫画？
They actually made a comic about the Astral Express?
是啊，这里可是「二相乐园」，什么故事都可能被改编成漫画的。
Of course. This is Planarcadia. Any story can be turned into a comic here.
可恶，得狠狠敲作者一笔。
Darn it, we ought to wring a hefty sum from that author.
…你这个人好怪啊。明明上一刻还被人追得四处逃窜，一眨眼又能若无其事地谈起这种不着四六的事情。这是眼下该关心的事吗？
...You are such a curious one. You were fleeing for your life a moment ago, yet now you can talk so casually about such nonsense. Is that really what matters right now?
不过，这份松弛感，很好玩。
Still, that sense of ease... it is entertaining.
看在你能取悦我片刻的份上，我来给你一点小小的帮助。说罢，想要什么样的？
Since you managed to amuse me for a moment, I will grant you a little aid. So, what would you like?
你这是买凶杀人？不好吧。
You are hiring a killer? That will not do.
这个故事可是很健康的。
This story is meant to stay wholesome.
你想离开这儿？比赛还没开始，你已经失了先手哦。近在咫尺的参赛资格，还有朋友统统落入了敌人手里。
You want to escape? The match has not even begun, and you have already lost your initiative. The enemy had both taken your qualification to join and your friends.
就这么狼狈地离开，好吗？
Is to leave in such disgrace truly what you want?
What could you possibly do to help?
我不习惯别人用问题来回答我的问题。想想清楚再开口呀。
I don't like it when someone answers my question with another question. Think before you speak.
看眼神，你似乎很不甘心呢，浣熊{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
I can see it in your eyes, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} Raccoon. You will not accept defeat.
I must join the Phantasmoon Games.
这份斗志，很有趣。在古老时代的「幻月游戏」里，总会有不知死活的谒者戴上面具，向幻月展现他们的疯狂、奇想与幽默感——
That resolve is interesting. There will always be foolhardy Supplicants donning the mask in these ancient Phantasmoon Games, laying before the Phantasmoon their madness, fancies, and humor...
用计斩杀天外降到地表的魔物，偷取神明的笑声铸成足以拦腰斩断大山的名刀，或者去到画中世界的深处骗回逝者之魂灵……

They would weave schemes to slay monsters descending upon this planet from beyond the sky, steal the laughter of the gods to forge blades that could split mountains, or descend into depths of the World in Canvas, to swindle the souls of the departed...
像这样有趣的人，已经很久很久没有出现了。也许你有机会成为其中之一？毕竟，你是「主角」嘛。
Such entertaining individuals have not appeared for ages. Perhaps you have a chance to become one of them? After all, you are the "protagonist."
我可以借你一点点力量。不过，需要对等的代价——这样才不算违背规则。
I can lend you a little power, but an equal price is required. Otherwise, it would violate the rules.
你必须在一个昼夜间击败追逼你至此的敌人。如若不然，你的灵魂将属于她，作她永世的奴仆。这个条件，你接受吗？
You must defeat the enemy who pursued you here within the next day and night. If you fail, your soul will be enslaved by her for all eternity. Do you accept?
As if I had a choice!
天上幻月，地上神木，于此时见证此誓，如天之恒，如月之升，永无破弃。
Phantasmoon above and sacred tree below, witness this oath at this moment. As constant as the vault of heaven, as certain as the moon's rise, let it be never forsworn.
来吧，让我把你变得…更像{RUBY_B#「浣熊」}「主角」{RUBY_E#}一点。
Now come. Let me make you... more of a "{RUBY_B#raccoon}protagonist{RUBY_E#}."
Gray Hair... Are you all right?
Sparxie has taken over a school!
我怎么一点也不意外呢？听起来就像是我做梦时会做，她醒来就会做的事情。
Can't say I am surprised. It sounds exactly like something I would dream of, and something she would carry out the moment she awoke.
不过，比起以前「幻月游戏」里发生的某些事情，情况还不算太糟。
Still, it ain't too bad compared to the horrors that unfolded in previous Phantasmoon Games.
至少你还有几个朋友帮得上忙，对吧？
At least you still have friends willing to stand by you, right?
火花到底和你什么关系？
What exactly is your actual connection to Sparxie?
呃…我在这儿偶尔也会给自己找点活儿，网络主播是其中之一。「火花」就是我在网络上直播时所用的ID，我一笔一笔画出了她。
Uh... Now and then I do odd jobs here... livestreaming is one of them. Sparxie is the name I used to stream online. An avatar that I personally sketched line by line.
为了让自己不在的时候，直播工作也能照常进行，我给了这个虚拟形象一丁点力量。
To keep the streams running even when I was absent, I breathed a trace of power into that avatar.
但谁能想到，从幻月满月后，一切就都变得不对劲了。
Who would've figured that everything changed after the Phantasmoon turned full...
她不再只是个虚拟形象？
She's no more than just a virtual avatar?
You and Sparxie are one and the same!
这家伙不过是个渴望从网络上吸引所有人关注的庸俗画皮罢了。你可别拿她和我相提并论。
She's nothing more than a basic skin that's desperate for online attention! Don't compare her with me.
人们向她倾诉心愿和渴望，到头来，这家伙也被这些心思给裹挟了。
People offloaded their wishes and desires to her, and in the end, she too got consumed by these emotions.
唉，创作出的形象一旦被大家的关注赋予了自己的想法，就连我这个作者也奈何不了她了。
Once a creation gains a will of its own from the attention of the masses, even its creator can no longer restrain it.
我一直在关注你们，本想着什么时候能出手帮帮你。不过很可惜，你们不是和公司的人混一块，就是和「异常防御部」的人走一起。
I've been watching you from the start, waiting for the right moment to step in and help. Sadly, you were either with the IPC's people or with the Department of Aberration Defense.
结果，你和三月宝宝一路走进了那所冒着不祥气息的学校，那一刻，我就知道事情不在我的掌控中了。
Then you and darling March wandered right into that school of bad omens. That was when I realized things had slipped out of my hands.
所以，说说呗，那所学校里发生了什么？
So, tell me, what happened in that school?
你简单讲了讲绘世学院里的情况。
You briefly explained the situation at Graphia Academy.
你想告诉她，这短短几小时就像一个荒诞的梦，但手边那张奇怪的纸糊面具却证明一切真实不虚。
You want to tell her that these few hours felt like some absurd dream, but the strange paper mask beside you proves that everything was real.
（这是能够加入幻月游戏的欢愉假面吗？）
(Is this the mask of Elation that grants entry into the Phantasmoon Games?)
还能怎么办？快联系你那些列车上的伙伴吧。当然咯，文明社会，你也可以试着把电话打给治安局嘛。
What do you think? Call your companions on the Express ASAP. Or, since this is a civilized society, you could try phoning the Security Bureau.
不过，这些事情显然已经超出了他们能力的范围啦。听说在过去，谒者们的行动根本无人能管。哎呀，那可真是个自由自在的好时代啊。
But these matters are obviously far beyond what they can do. They say that no one could restrain the Supplicants' actions in the past. Aww, those were the good ol' days of freedom.
Not even the security officers would intervene?
哈哈哈，小灰毛，你未免也太天真了吧。你去过那么多的世界，面对天崩地裂、末日降临的危机时，官方又能怎么办啊？不要为难人家啦。
Hahaha, Gray Hair, you are so naive! You've been to countless worlds. When the skies collapse and the end draws near, what can the authorities possibly do? Don't make their jobs too hard.
「幻月游戏」可是欢愉之主定下的仪式，每一场游戏结束，这世界总会诞生翻天覆地的奇迹：新生的幻造种，不可思议的异象，充满希望的未来。

The Phantasmoon Games are nothing less than a ceremony set down by the Master of Elation. Amazing miracles always appear in the world after every game ends, like the birth of new imagenae, unthinkable phenomena, or a future brimming with hope.
你听过这样的问题吧：「如果有机会让世界科技进步一百年，却要牺牲一只小猫咪，你愿意吗？」
Perhaps you have heard the question: "If the world's science and technology could leap forward by a hundred years at the cost of a single kitten's life, would you kill the kitten?"
哇哦，很冷酷嘛。恭喜你，你和这个世界选择了一样的回答。
Wow, how ruthless. Then you chose the same answer as this world did.
哼哼…二相乐园显然选择了「愿意」。
但现在它威胁到的是人啊？
But it's human lives that are now at risk!
自然灾害、交通事故、突发恶疾…这个世界每天光是这些死亡原因的人数就够凑出一座小城的人口了。「幻月游戏」不过是在地图上抹去一座学校，听起来是不是好多了？

Natural disasters, traffic accidents, sudden illnesses... the number of deaths from such causes in this world could fill a small city every day. The Phantasmoon Games are just erasing one school from the map. Isn't that much better?
我想你一定会问，在兑换未来的仪式上，生命的价值真的可以如此计算吗？
You probably want to ask whether the worth of human lives can truly be calculated in that way in this ceremony, where we surrender that cost to purchase the future.
好啦，现在不是讨论伦理问题的时候吧？小灰毛，你到底打不打算救你的三月宝宝和杨叔啊？
Whatever. This is not the time to debate over ethics. Gray Hair, are you gonna save darling March and Mr. Yang or not?
时候不早了，真珠小姐，列车这边另有事需要处理……
The hour grows late, Miss Pearl. Matters regarding the Express demand our attention...
无论是同盟，还是「幻月游戏」，如果您有更进一步合作的意愿，我随时敞开大门。
Be it the alliance or the Phantasmoon Games, if you seek deeper cooperation, my doors remain open.
Then, I shall take my leave.
人类的社交模型，真是复杂。我的推演依旧未能覆盖星穹列车全部的策略树。
How intricate human social interaction models are. My extrapolation still cannot account for the full strategy tree of the Astral Express.
大人，玉阙仙舟的爻光将军前来拜访。需要让她等候吗？
Master, General Yao Guang of the Xianzhou Yuque is here to see you. Shall we have her wait?
不，仙舟也将成为重要盟友。必须有足够的接触与模仿，才能理解他们的行动策略。
No. The Xianzhou will also become a key ally. Only through enough contact and emulation can we hope to comprehend their methods and strategies.
结论：今天剩下的时间，应该无法临摹作画了。请爻光将军进来吧。
Conclusion: I don't think I'll be able to keep copying the painting for the rest of today. Let General Yao Guang in.
鄙人是遍智格物院荣誉院长、十方光映法界之主、仙舟非物质文化遗产雀形拳传人、戎韬将军——爻光。

I am the honorary dean of the Omniscience Sapientia Academe, master of the Deca-Light Reflection Barrier, bearer of the Xianzhou's intangible cultural heritage "the sparrow-shaped fist," and the Seer Strategist— General Yao Guang.
感谢您的拨冗接见，真珠女士。
Thank you for seeing me despite your busy schedule, Madam Pearl.
差一点误判为语言处理进程出错：以为您将整个使团的人带进了房间。
For a moment, I nearly mistook your words as a fault in language processing: I believed you had brought the entire delegation inside.
银河中有幽默感的智械可不多。我听说您和{RUBY_B#螺丝咕姆}那位天才{RUBY_E#}一样，是由螺丝星的星体差分机所造就的诸多奇迹之一。果然闻名不如见面。

Few Intellitrons in the cosmos have a sense of humor. I have heard that, like {RUBY_B#Screwllum}that genius{RUBY_E#}, you are one of the many wonders wrought by the Celestial Differentiator of Planet Screwllum. Meeting you in person far outshines your reputation.
我观真珠女士「机」人天相，内涵冰清，外彰玉润，忍不住给您算了一卦。卦象涨落于离、乾之间，是大有之相，爻动于六五。

Madam Pearl, seeing how you have a "calculating" look, and with your heart pristine and your outer form so dazzling, I could not help but cast a divination for you. The hexagram lies between Fire and Heaven, demonstrating a bountiful harvest with your fortunes lying at the zenith or even beyond.
我未曾学习占卦，还请将军为我解读一二。
I have no training in divination. General, may I ask you to interpret it?
啊，换成智械也能听懂的语言，我以仙舟的预测算法推演您的运势，得卦为<unbreak>101111</unbreak>，是个大吉大利的征兆——若以诚信待人，将大有收获。

Ah, then let me speak in terms even an Intellitron can follow. I extrapolated your fortune using the Xianzhou's predictive algorithms. The result is <unbreak>101111</unbreak>, a sign of great blessing. If you treat others with sincerity, abundance will follow.
帝弓天将的传奇，我闻名已久：景元将军的智谋、飞霄将军的骁勇、怀炎将军的工巧……
I have long heard of the Arbiter Generals' legends: the strategy of General Jing Yuan, the courage of General Feixiao, the ingenuity of General Huaiyan...
我偶尔猜想：那些不常现身人前的仙舟将军会是怎样的人物？
Often, I have wondered: what kind of figures are the Xianzhou generals who remain away from the public eye?
今日与爻光将军相逢，不免觉得：以您的美丽，应该时常抛头露面。
Meeting General Yao Guang today, I cannot help but think that: with such beauty, you should step into the light more often.
看来您学习了不少仙舟的语料——甚至晓得如何「激将」。
Looks like you've studied the words of the Xianzhou well. You've even learned the art of "provocation."
前面几位被您夸赞各擅胜场，到了我这儿，怎么偏偏只剩下一句「美丽」？
You praised the others for their individual and unique talents, yet when it comes to me, the only thing you had to say was "beauty"?
将军万勿多心。在我看来：美丽之物最为珍贵，维持其存在也最为不易。
Do not misunderstand me, general. To me, beauty is the rarest of treasures and the most fragile to preserve.
何况，关于您的情报实在太少，如何恭维是一道难解之题。
Besides, intel on you is truly scarce. It is quite difficult for me to find ways to compliment you.
不过，我知道：「玉阙」是众仙舟之智囊，玉阙的将军是卜者之尊。仅以决断局势而论——「是否加入反毁灭同盟」一事，没人比您更适合投出仙舟联盟的一票。

But what I do know is: The Yuque is the think tank of the Xianzhou ships, and its general is the master of all diviners. Speaking purely of deciding the course of affairs, no one is better suited than you to cast the Xianzhou Alliance's vote on whether to join the Anti-Destruction Alliance.
那么，对于这一议题，您意下如何？
So, general, what is your decision in this?
这议题如此宏大，我又怎能轻言决断？不过，我想先送一条重要的情报给你，以作互通有无的见面礼……
This topic is far too great for me to decide on a whim. But as a gift and to complement the respective gaps in our knowledge, allow me first to offer you a piece of vital intelligence...
<color=#dbc291ff>也借此有请公司，亮明口头空谈以外的诚意。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>And with it, I ask the IPC to show sincerity beyond empty words.</color>
我不太明白您的逻辑：「毁灭」的威胁临近，合作似乎无需更多的理由。
I do not follow your logic: with the threat of the Destruction looming, what need is there for further reasons to cooperate?
树立一位大敌为目标，说服过去的对手成为盟友，再借机蚕食——公司的丰功伟绩里，这类例子不算少。
Set a mighty foe as a common goal, convince former enemies to turn allies, then devour them in turn... Such feats are hardly rare in the IPC's annals of glory.
我理解：仙舟质疑公司的诚意。
I understand. The Xianzhou questions the IPC's sincerity.
不如说我们想请公司展示诚意——礼尚往来，我先送上的这条情报非同小可，耽误不得。
It would be better to say we ask the IPC to demonstrate its sincerity. Courtesy demands reciprocity, and the intel I now offer you is both urgent and weighty.
提问：眼下还有什么事情比结成「反毁灭同盟」更重要？
Question: what could be more important at this moment than forming the Anti-Destruction Alliance?
纳努克不会在这几天里毁掉整个宇宙，但有个家伙倒有可能在这几天里毁掉这「二相乐园」。
Nanook won't erase the universe in the next few days, but someone else might destroy Planarcadia within that time.
您听说过「星核猎手」的成员，刃，对吧？
You have heard of Blade, the Stellaron Hunter, right?
公司一直重金悬赏，但我未曾见过。
The IPC has long placed a great bounty on his head, though I have never laid eyes on him.
就在最近，玉阙截获了一条情报。这个男人以所谓「仙舟第一杀手」的名义接下了当地帮派「共愿帮」的雇佣。
The Yuque recently intercepted a report. Styling himself as "Xianzhou's Number One Assassin," this man accepted a contract from the Synwish Syndicate, a local organized violence group.
他来这儿要做什么，我不得而知。但此人是仙舟重犯，十恶大逆，本领高强，等闲难有敌手。我作为玉阙将军，会一手担负起将之捉拿归案的义务，以免他在此生出事端。

I do not know his exact aim here, but he is a major criminal of the Xianzhou. He is guilty of the Ten Unpardonable Sins and is a formidable fighter, with few able to match him. As General of the Yuque, I will take it upon myself to bring him in before he can cause disaster here.
哈托彼亚这颗星球也是泛银河贸易体系的一员，刃是公司通缉的重犯。既然他踏入这里，就在当地的法治管辖中。
This planet, Ahatopia, is part of the Pan-Cosmic Trade System, and Blade is a wanted criminal of the IPC. Since he has set foot here, he falls under its law.
爻光将军，您想要的诚意，是希望由我们捉拿此人，移交仙舟？
General Yao Guang, is the sincerity you seek for us to capture this man and deliver him into the hands of the Xianzhou?
我听闻「幻月游戏」开启在即，举世翘首期盼，您恐怕也难以从中抽身。如果这个灾星能悄无声息地「自行离去」，岂不是皆大欢喜？

I hear the Phantasmoon Games are about to begin, with the entire nation awaiting it with bated breath. I imagine you will also find it hard to extract yourself from the festivities. If this cursed man were to quietly "depart on his own" at this time... would that not be a perfect outcome for all?
我的理解：您想要在「二相乐园」之上行事自由的权利。
This is my understanding: you wish for the right to act freely within Planarcadia.
在一同对抗「毁灭」之前，还有什么比这次合作更能展示我们彼此诚意的？
Apart from this cooperation, what better proof of sincerity could there be before we join forces against the Destruction?
成交。我不怀疑：帝弓天将的实力。但，我怀疑：「仙舟第一杀手」真的会悄无声息地「离去」吗？
Deal. What I do not doubt: the might of an Arbiter General. However, I do doubt: will "the Xianzhou's Number One Assassin" truly "leave" without a commotion?
按照我的推演，即便不考虑「命运的奴隶」对他们的指引，单论逮捕星核猎手个体，其成功率也不足<unbreak>9.8</unbreak>％。
By my extrapolations, even without accounting for the guidance of Destiny's Slave, the probability of capturing a single Stellaron Hunter is less than <unbreak>9.8</unbreak> percent.
连一成都不到吗？身为卜者的我，却不是这么看待概率的。
Not even ten percent? As a diviner, that's not how I see probability.
<color=#dbc291ff>哪怕成事机会仅有「半成」，在我以身入局时，我总会把它看作「十成十」。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Even if the chance of success is only a coin toss, once I enter the fray myself... I always treat it as a "one-hundred-percent certainty."</color>
哇，这落英缤纷的上学路…充满了青春的气氛啊！值得拍一张照。
Wow, this path to school, lined with falling blossoms... it's such a youthful feeling! Definitely worth a photo.
确实有不少电视剧在这儿取过景。
Yes, quite a few TV dramas have been filmed here.
想来应该是那种适合情侣分手、爱人错过的经典电视剧吧？
I imagine it is perfect for those classic series where couples part ways or lovers miss their chance, right?
没错。从这条路笔直往前走一阵，就到绘世学院了。
Exactly. Follow this road straight ahead for a while, and you will arrive at Graphia Academy.
听说火花大人要宣布大新闻！
I heard Sparxie has some big news to announce!
呃啊，看起来这位火花小姐实在很有知名度。
Wow... it seems this Sparxie really is a celebrity.
那个高个的褐发眼镜男是谁啊？
Who's that tall guy with brown hair and glasses?
褐色头发、戴眼镜、高个…怎么听起来像杨叔啊？
Brown hair, glasses, tall... why does that sound like Mr. Yang?
哎？不可能的吧？杨叔有这么惹人怜爱吗…哈哈？
Huh? No way. Is Mr. Yang really that lovable... haha?
斯科特同学又顶撞了老师。
Skott talked back to the teacher again.
那个三年级的黄毛混混？
Skott? That blond-haired delinquent from third year?
三月七同学和{NICKNAME}同学，转学手续已经办理完成，请在听到广播后立刻前往校长室。
March 7th, {NICKNAME}, your transfer procedures have been completed. Please proceed to the dean's office immediately.
转、转学手续？这又是怎么回事啊？
T—Transfer procedures? What's going on here?
Let's go take a look, shall we?
学校…学生？这一切到底怎么回事？
School... students? What in the world is going on here?
想办的事还挺多，该从哪件做起呢？
I have so many things I want to do. Where should I start?
是去上课？还是去应付斯科特？还是…到处逛逛？
Should I head to class, deal with Skott, or... just wander around?
是我眼花了吗？怎么还有一个我？
Am I seeing things? Why is there another me?
斯科特说，要在天台和我决斗。
Skott said he wants to duel me on the rooftop.
不如先抄小道上去，看看有没有埋伏？
Why not take the side path up and see if there's an ambush?
不教训你这个白痴，实在难消我心头之恨！
I cannot rest until I teach an idiot like you a lesson!
等等，你怎么不亲自上场啊斯科特？
Hey, why aren't you getting in on this yourself, Skott?
这是正义的围殴！你到底懂不懂决斗的法则！
This is justice by numbers! Do you even understand the rules of a duel!?
虽然啵啵娃老师躲了起来，但我们可以拍下她残留的记忆。
Even though Ms. Dollie is in hiding, we can still capture her lingering memories.
Follow the trail of these memosprites...
很近了…这儿有啵啵娃老师的记忆碎片。
We're getting real close... There is a fragment of Ms. Dollie's memory here.
教室的门…果然锁起来了。
The door to this classroom... it's locked, just as I thought.
Better look for another way in.
I can jump even higher now!
粉丝们~为我怦然心动，为我争斗吧！
My dear fans, be charmed by me! Fight for me!
把你们的欢喜、忧愁、痴迷，统统献给我…
Gimme all your joy, sorrow, and obsession! Gimme every last drop of it...
这些粉丝…不是一般的厉害！
These fans... they're far too strong!
糟了，这样下去——哎，你是哪位老师？
This is bad, if this continues... wait, who are you?
啊，好可惜，丹恒同学还是走了……
Ah, what a shame... Dan Heng's gone after all...
话说利索了，是转学走了。
Whoa, easy there. He got transferred.
我还没来得及向他告白呢……
I didn't even get the chance to confess my feelings...
听说他就是收了太多告白信不胜其扰转学走的。
Word is he chose to transfer 'cause he got so swamped with so many love letters he just couldn't deal with them anymore.
看到了吗，{NICKNAME}和{F#她}{M#他}的宿敌又吵起来了。
See that? {NICKNAME} and {F#her}{M#his} arch-nemesis are at it again.
估计是为了棒球社的事情吧？
Probably about the Baseball Club, right?
谁知道呢，也许是情感上的宿敌也说不定…听说斯科特这小子最近心有所属了。
Who knows? Maybe they're romantic rivals or something... I heard Skott's got his eye on someone lately.
我知道！你说的是隔壁班的拉克什米！
I know! You're talking about Rakshmi from the class next door!
你的心声告诉我，对于我，你仍有疑虑。
Your thoughts tell me that you still have doubts about me.
约在此地碰头，是想让我为你解惑一二？
Did you ask to meet here so I could clear up some of your doubts?
能随时倾听对方的心思，「调律」这个能力还真是方便啊。
Being able to hear others' thoughts anytime... this "tuning" ability sure comes in handy.
和戎韬将军来去无踪的本事一比，不过是些微末小道罢了。
Compared to the Seer Strategist's ability to come and go as she pleases, this is nothing but a parlor trick.
久闻仙舟人看重礼数，我已到了，将军却还是真人不露相，未免有些失礼了吧？
I've heard that Xianzhou folks are big on etiquette. Yet here I am, and you're still playing hide-and-seek. General, isn't that a bit discourteous?
抱歉…我总会突然消失这个老毛病，实在是身不由己。
Sorry... I have this old problem of suddenly disappearing. It's really something beyond my control.
至于原因，恕我无法透露。失礼之处，还请多多包涵。
As for the reason, I'm afraid I can't disclose it. Please forgive my rudeness.
又或者，你要是真的好奇，也可以用「调律」自己来寻找答案啊？
Or, if you're truly that curious, why not use your "tuning" and find out?
你知道我不会这么做的。
You know I won't do that.
Besides, I couldn't even if I wanted to right now.
此时，四周人群的思想就像海潮一样涌向我。
At this moment, the crowd's thoughts are crashing over me like a tidal wave.
我没法隔绝这些杂讯，光是束缚自己的念头不让它们卷入别人的意识，就已精疲力竭了。
I can't block out all this mental noise. Just keeping my own thoughts from getting tangled up in everyone else's is hard enough.
原来如此，所以刚才和姬子小姐会谈时，我闯入了你们俩的「私人通信」，也是这么回事吧。
I see. So that's why, when you were speaking with Miss Himeko earlier, I accidentally intruded on your "private conversation."
我的「调律」正在失控。这副面具…扭曲了我的能力。
My "tuning" is spiraling out of control. This mask... is distorting my abilities.
…我却不这么看，失控是暂时的。那副面具在增强你的力量。
...I see it differently. The loss of control is temporary. That mask is amplifying your power.
这怎么可能？「同谐」赐下的调律之力，「欢愉」如何能擅动祂的权能？
How is this possible? This "tuning" power is bestowed by the Harmony. How could the Elation meddle with THEIR authority?
也许，「欢愉」只是为这份权能注入了更多「燃料」也说不定呢？
Perhaps the Elation simply poured more "fuel" into this divine authority?
依我愚见，<color=#dbc291ff>这张面具将谒者和二相乐园的众生联为一体，抽汲此间相同命途的力量，供你们使用。</color>
In my humble opinion, <color=#dbc291ff>this mask binds the Supplicant to all beings of Planarcadia, drawing strength from those who share the same Path here for your use.</color>
这就是你能听到别人的心声如海潮般涌向你的原因…你的「调律」正在不断扩张，你已成了这曲旋律的中心。
That's why you're hearing others' thoughts surge toward you like a tide... Your "tuning" is steadily expanding, and you've become the center of this melody.
将军还真是送了我一份「重礼」啊。
You sure gave me quite the "gift," general.
只是如此贵重的礼物，为何却偏要扣在我的脸上…我需要一个坦诚回答。
But why would such a precious gift be placed on my face...? I need an honest answer.
理由？我之前不是解释了吗？
You want to know the reason? Didn't I explain it already?
与我有关的理由，言之成理。但我更想听的是，与你自己有关的答案。
Your reasons about me make sense, but what I really want is your answer... about yourself.
洞察未来的玉阙将军，为何不把这副面具扣在自己脸上，靠着它给予的力量，亲身入局？
General of the Yuque who sees into the future... why not wear the mask yourself and personally step into the fray with its power?
言语可以虚饰伪装，唯有「调律」才能揭开真相。
Words can deceive, but only "tuning" lays the truth bare.
星期日先生，不妨用你被增强过的「调律」力量，亲自体会这个答案的重量吧。
Mr. Sunday, why not use your enhanced "tuning" to feel the weight of that answer for yourself?
Well then... pardon my intrusion, Lady Yao Guang.
啊…这只停在我肩上的鸟儿，就是「调律」感应之力的具现？
Ah... so this bird on my shoulder is the manifestation of the "tuning's" resonance?
正是。而我能看到的这些人头顶的符号……
Exactly. And these symbols I see floating above people's heads...
...Would be the "Weal and Woe Signs" you mentioned, general?
没错。成为帝弓天将，须得经历「天虹封典」、「帝弓垂眸」以及「受赐威灵」三道仪式，如此方能算得上接掌符节，名实相称。

That's right. To become an Arbiter-General, one must undergo three ceremonies: the "Rainbow Ordainment," the "Reignbow's Gaze," and the "Bestowal of Spiritus." Only then can one truly take up the mantle and live up to the title.
我接任玉阙将军时受赐的帝弓威灵，名唤「时轮天雉明王」，于帝弓七相中代表「巡猎」的眼界，是预视、决断与自制的象征。

When I was appointed as the Yuque's general, I was bestowed with the Reignbow Spiritus called "Kālacakra Skyplume," which represents the vision of the Hunt among the seven aspects of the Reignbow: a symbol of foresight, verdict, and self-discipline.
正是靠着它，我才拥有了判读气运的「观自在眼」。
Thanks to that, I gained the "Eye of Īśvara," which allows me to read the flow of destiny.
自抵达这个世界之日起，我举目所见，往来行人皆头顶赤红的「凶签」，无一例外。最迟不过数日，将有一场灭顶灾变到来。
Since the day I arrived on this world, every person I've seen bore a crimson "Woe Sign" above their head without exception. Within days at most, a catastrophic disaster will befall this place.
所以，我看到城市远方升起的这蓬红光是……？
So, that red glow rising from the edge of the city is...?
那是二相乐园所有人的「凶签」汇聚而成的光焰。
The blazing light formed by the convergence of all those "Woe Signs" in Planarcadia.
这么说来，将军更应佩戴面具才对——您洞知未来的能力一经增强，便不必畏惧占卜结果中的「死兆」了。
In that case, general, it's all the more reason for you to wear the mask. Once your sight into the future is strengthened, you won't need to fear the "deathly omen" in your readings.
星期日先生，卜者有一条「事不二卜」的铁律，不知你是否听过？
Mr. Sunday, have you heard the diviners' iron law? "Never divine the same matter twice"?
匹诺康尼的占卜者用卡牌占卜前也会告诫顾客，不能因为占卜结果不顺心意，就要再来一次。这其中难道有什么讲究？
In Penacony, diviners also warn clients beforehand: You can't ask for another spread just because you dislike the result. There's a reason for that, isn't there?
占卜未来，本质上是一种观测与计算，是对未来的干涉。而每一次测算，都会将混沌不清的未来推向某个确定的坍缩结果，即便这结果并不为人所乐见。

Divining the future is, in essence, a form of observation and calculation. It's an interference with the future. Each reading drives the murky future toward a definite outcome, a collapsed quantum state, even if that outcome isn't to one's liking.
不瞒你说，动身前往这二相乐园时，本座确实做好了亲自踏入「幻月游戏」的打算。
To be honest, when I set out for Planarcadia, I had fully intended to personally participate in the Phantasmoon Games.
但在面具入手的瞬间，我已明了佩戴它的后果——这件奇物一旦加身，「观自在眼」将超脱目光所限，遍入此界，时轮天雉明王会以每秒百亿次计判读众生的未来。

But the moment I laid hands on the mask, I understood the consequences of wearing it. Once this miraculous item is donned, the "Eye of Īśvara" would transcend mere sight and permeate throughout this realm. The Kālacakra Skyplume would predict the future of all beings at tens of billions of instances per second.
…你是说，只是靠你双眼观察，我们的未来就会被决定？
...You're saying that, simply by your observation, our future would become fixed?
不错，就像{RUBY_B#博识尊}遍智天君{RUBY_E#}阐演天道，锚下命定的时刻。
Indeed, just like how {RUBY_B#Nous}the Wisdomwalker{RUBY_E#} expounded the way of destiny, anchoring the fated moments.
如果戴上面具，我就成了这二相乐园之上的博识尊，我会「亲眼」将诸位推入黑暗的命运，囚锁在命定的死局里，再无一点拯救的希望。

If I wore the mask, I would become the Nous of Planarcadia, and I would "personally anchor" a destiny that drives us all into a bottomless darkness. We will become locked in a dead end with not a shred of hope for salvation.
好险，我通过了考验。这一局，尚有一线生机。
Close one. I passed the trial. There's still a sliver of hope in this round.
...Now that makes me even more curious.
恕我失礼，二相乐园亿万生灵的吉凶命运，和将军本来也没什么关系。列车、公司与你只是一面之缘。
Pardon my bluntness, but the fate of billions in Planarcadia never had much to do with you, General. Your encounter with the Express and the IPC was merely a chance meeting.
你是仙舟的使者，既然预见了「一位帝弓天将在此殒落」的征兆，你就该随时登船撤离……
You are a messenger of the Xianzhou. Since you foresaw the omen — that "an Arbiter General will fall here" — you could have boarded your ship and left at any time...
为什么要选择留下来帮助我们，帮助这个世界挣脱眼前的死局？
Why choose to stay and help us? To help this world break free of this deathtrap?
那是因为…本座心怀大爱，慈悲为怀，只因每一条生命都弥足珍贵——
Because... I am guided by great compassion. Every life is precious beyond measure...
这些个场面话，想来骗不了你这位匹诺康尼前主公吧？
Such diplomatic pleasantries won't fool the former master of Penacony like yourself, would they?
那你看看这个理由怎么样？星穹列车抗击「毁灭」，屡建奇功，于未来肩负不可或缺的重任，我绝不能坐看诸位陷入灭顶之灾——

Then, how about this reason? The Astral Express has distinguished itself time and again against the Destruction, and bears an irreplaceable duty for the future. I can't just sit idly and watch you face annihilation...
唉，饶了我吧，本座真的不擅长外交辞令啊。
*sigh* Give me a break. I really am terrible at all this diplomatic talk.
星期日先生，是什么让你觉得，我所做的一切，只是为了拯救二相乐园？
Mr. Sunday, what makes you think that everything I've done is just to save Planarcadia?
「福兮，祸之所伏；祸兮，福之所倚。」一部分人的吉运，往往导致另一些人的凶命；而一部分人面临的死局，也许潜藏着另一群人的生机。
"Weal is where Woe lurks. Woe is where Weal leans." The good fortune of some often births the ill fate of others, and a dead end for someone may hide an opportunity for another.
这个生死百转、否泰错变的凶危之地，在我眼中恰恰也是绝佳的博弈之地。
This treacherous land where life and death turn again and again, where fortune flips to misfortune, is, in my eyes, the perfect board for a game of wits.
不知星期日先生是否听过三十年前的「方壶血战」？
Mr. Sunday, have you heard of the "Battle of the Fanghu" thirty years ago?
我确实听过一些战争的传闻，但对细节所知不多。将军是想说，此刻的二相乐园，就和当年的方壶仙舟一样凶险？
I've heard rumors of that war, but not the details. General, are you suggesting Planarcadia is now facing dangers just as perilous as the Xianzhou Fanghu was back then?
三十年前，丰饶孽物的联军撕开阵线，杀入了方壶本土。孽物们唤醒了一颗活化的妖星，意欲击沉方壶仙舟。
Thirty years ago, the Abundance Axis broke our lines and invaded the Fanghu homeland. The abominations awakened a living demonic star, intending to sink the Xianzhou Fanghu.
联盟无计可施，遂兵行险着，采纳了我师妹提出的计划，操纵观星器具「瞰云镜」向帝弓发射信号求援，俟其光矢击落妖星。

With no other options, the Alliance staked everything on my junior soror's plan... to operate the astronomical observation device, the Cloudpeer Telescope, to signal the Reignbow for aid, using THEIR Lux Arrow to strike down the demon star.
而负责操作「瞰云镜」的那人将有去无回，十死无生。
Whoever operated the Cloudpeer Telescope would not return. It was to be a one-way trip.
您猜错了。那位自愿成仁者，是教我卜筮之道的师父。时任玉阙太卜的竟天先生，是唯一有权限操作那件器物的重臣。他接受天命，前往「方壶」。

You guessed wrong. The one who offered his life was my master, who taught me divination. It was Master Jingtian, then the Yuque's Master Diviner, and the only high official authorized to operate that device. He accepted his fate and ventured to the Fanghu.
与他一同踏入死地的，还有彼时护卫「瞰云镜」的前代曜青将军月御，以及她所率领的青丘军士卒。
Going with him into certain death were Yueyu, the previous Yaoqing General who guarded the Cloudpeer Telescope, and the Verdant Knights under her command.
而我负责勘定整个计划的可行性，补足其缺漏。我启用「十方光映法界」，一次次计算，一次次推占。
I was responsible for assessing the entire plan's feasibility and mending its gaps. I activated the Deca-Light Reflection Barrier, calculating and casting lots again and again.
我目睹着代表众多可能性的「星光」于法界中闪烁…微弱明灭，终至被一位神明沉思的巨影吞没，消失在天渊深邃的黑暗里。

I watched as the "starlight" representing countless possibilities flickered within the reflections — faint, wavering — until the vast shadow of a pondering god swallowed them whole, and they vanished into the abyssal dark at the edges of the universe.
至此，我明白，我已将师父和万千军士的性命砌进了无从逃脱的死路。光矢坠下时，他们将与敌人…还有那颗妖星一同灰飞烟灭。

In that moment, I understood that I had cemented my master and countless soldiers into an inescapable doom. When the Lux Arrow fell, they would perish along with the enemy and that demonic star... all reduced to ashes.
你们牺牲了许多战友，只为确保敌人的死亡？
You sacrificed so many comrades just to ensure the enemy's fall?
在匹诺康尼人听来，这样的事情一定很残忍吧？
To Penaconians, that must seem incredibly cruel, right?
…诞生在和平年代的我无权置评。也许匹诺康尼的创立者们能理解其中的无奈。
...As someone born in an era of peace, I have no right to judge. Perhaps the founders of Penacony could understand the necessity.
无论残忍与否，这都是我的职责。因此，我也必须见证并铭记他们的牺牲。
Cruel or not, it was my duty. And so I had to witness, and remember their sacrifice.
在目睹光矢坠下的那一刻，我意识到，<color=#dbc291ff>仙舟联盟竟然牵引了一位星神的行动轨迹。</color>
When I saw the Lux Arrow descend, I realized <color=#dbc291ff>the Xianzhou Alliance had actually directed an Aeon's actions.</color>
这个念头照亮了我余生的使命。在这冰冷无情的银河里，要想从绝望死局中争得一线生机，星神的介入往往是唯一的希望。
This realization illuminated the mission of my remaining years. In this cold, merciless cosmos, when you're trapped in despair, an Aeon's intervention is often the only hope.
我们并非目视{RUBY_B#星神}天体{RUBY_E#}运行却无能为力的蝼蚁。是我们献出自己微不足道的命运的一部分，铸就了{RUBY_B#命途}祂们的轨迹{RUBY_E#}。

We are not ants, helpless beneath the celestial spheres as we simply watch the {RUBY_B#Aeons}stars{RUBY_E#} turn. Instead, {RUBY_B#Paths}THEIR trails{RUBY_E#} were forged by us, who offered up a portion of our insignificant destiny.
伟大如星神，也可以被我们的意志所牵引！
Even beings as mighty as the Aeons can be pulled by our will!
…这就是你想在二相乐园做的事？
...Is this what you want to do in Planarcadia?
不错。我要握住那些曾被我亲手埋葬的「可能性的星光」，一如三十年前的方壶之战，一位天将陨落，一尊星神垂迹。
Indeed. I will seize those "starlights of possibility" I once buried with my own hands. Just like the Battle of the Fanghu thirty years ago: an Arbiter-General will fall, and an Aeon will descend.
我要将命定的死兆铸为算筹，我要邀请那位{RUBY_B#阿哈}钟情拨弄命运的神明{RUBY_E#}入局。
I will forge the destined death into wagers and game pieces, and invite {RUBY_B#Aha}the god who delights in meddling with destiny{RUBY_E#} to sit at my table.
<color=#dbc291ff>这一次，我要请祂…入我卦中，为银河的未来摇出大吉之签！</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>This time, I will invite THEM into my calculations... to draw a Great Weal for the cosmos's future!</color>
星期日先生，这一念狂想，曾登临{RUBY_B#太一}「秩序」{RUBY_E#}神座的你，想必也能够理解吧？
Mr. Sunday, surely you can understand this mad idea of mine, having once reached the divine throne of {RUBY_B#Ena}Order{RUBY_E#} yourself?
…我们的共同点，绝不止「狂想」这一处。
Our common ground goes far beyond "mad ideas."
只是，我复苏的是一位在深渊中瞑目已死的神明。将军又怎么能确定，那位最善变的星神愿意被你的狂想牵引？
But I was reviving a god who already lay dead and buried in the infinite dark. General... how can you be sure that the most capricious Aeon would be led by your fancy?
你听说过这样一则「欢愉」的神话吗？
Have you heard this myth about the Elation?
传闻阿哈曾攀上存在之树的高枝，祂放眼四望，只见星辰冰冷运转如机器，一切的意义让位于虚无…唯独一名婴儿降生的啼哭却引来祂的哈哈大笑。

They say Aha once climbed to the highest bough of the Tree of Existence. Gazing out, THEY saw stars turning coldly like machines, and the meaning of everything yielded to nihility... Only the cry of a newborn made THEM burst into laughter.
星期日先生，请回答我：阿哈因何而欢笑？
Mr. Sunday, answer me: why did Aha laugh?
我想是因为，祂终于看到一位观众来到了宇宙这个空旷许久的舞台前。
I think it's because THEY finally saw an audience arrive at this long-empty stage we call the universe.
答得好啊！你比外表看起来要幽默多了嘛！
Well said! You're way funnier than you look!
卜筮之道有云「天衍四九，人遁其一」。我们是这恒盲无智的宇宙所能创造出的最大的变数。
As divination teaches: "Heaven creates forty-nine paths. Humans find the one unseen." WE are the greatest variable this blind, mindless universe can produce.
宇宙与众神为我们设谜，而我们将会给祂们意外…一个「终末」以外的答案。
The universe and the gods set riddles for us, and we shall give THEM a surprise... An answer beyond the Finality.
Ah, looks like it's about time...
莫非，将军又要不告而别了？
Don't tell me you're disappearing without a goodbye again, general?
不，这一次，我们俩要将目光投向同一个地方，「亲眼」从命运中凿开一线可能。
No. This time, we will set our eyes on the same place and carve a sliver of possibility out of destiny with our own "sight."
您说的该不会是…姬子{F#她们}{M#他们}前往的那所学校？
Could you be talking about... the school where Himeko and the others went?
嗯，今日那儿赤光烛天，正是一处「凶位」。乐园的第一场灾变，将会从那儿爆发。
Yes. The crimson light there pierces the sky today, marking it as a locus of Woe. The arcadia's first calamity will erupt there.
早知道该在他们出发前，求将军给他们几个「锦囊妙计」啊……
I should've asked you to give them a few "secret strategies" before they left...
算了，反正写的都是些无关痛痒的说笑打趣…就饶了他们吧。
