Oh cribs! The Underboss... is getting serious!
怖鬼大人，请接受鄙人的挑战！向我们共愿帮展示您引以为豪的杀人之术吧！
Lady Terror in Fog, I humbly challenge you! Show the Synwish Syndicate the assassination skills you're so proud of!
二当家，不好啦！又有两个怪人出现了！
Underboss! Bad news! Two more weird dudes just showed up!
Cut your bull. I can see for myself!
我确实没想到，拜会盟友，竟然变成了硬闯当地帮派的会堂。
Never thought visiting an ally would mean crashing into a local gang's hall.
Ah, this will take some explaining...
真是阴差阳错，但能在这见到一位老朋友…也罢。
What a twist of fate... but for us to reunite with an old friend here... so be it.
你们两个，不许插手！给我听好了！这是一场堂堂正正的决斗！
You two, stand down! Listen well! This will be an honorable duel!
A duel? You dare duel a Xianzh—
…一位仙舟第一杀手，你们还敢如此放肆？
...a Xianzhou's Number One Assassin, and you still dare to act so brazen?
等等，「一位」？什么叫「一位」仙舟第一杀手？你们几个…到底是什么来头？！
Wait, "a"? What do you mean, "a" Xianzhou's Number One Assassin? Who exactly are you!?
狡兔尚且三窟，是谁和你说…「仙舟第一杀手」只有一人？
Even a cunning hare keeps three burrows. Who ever told you... there was only one "Xianzhou's Number One Assassin"?
So... there are three of you?
是三百个！时移世易，「仙舟第一杀手」早已品牌化了。我身边这一位……
No! It's three hundred! Times have changed. The title "Xianzhou's Number One Assassin" is already a brand. At my side stands...
正是组织内排名第七的天环杀手，人称「报丧鸟」！他会给所有目标带来甜梦般的安眠。
The organization's seventh-ranked Halovian Reaper, the "Winged Deathknell"! He sends every target into the sweetest sleep of death.
而这位，则是组织内排名第二，仅在我之后的无情刺客！枪如流星人如龙，人称「玉面龙」！

And this one is the second-ranked assassin in the organization, a ruthless killer surpassed only by me! His spear strikes like a falling star, and his presence soars like a dragon. They call him the "Jadedragon"!
你可以称我「鸣火狐」。小女子忝列组织内第一把交椅，不过平日里只做些商务接洽和人力资源的工作。
You can call me "Whistling Flamefox." I humbly hold the top position in our organization, though I mostly handle business relations and HR work.
听起来有点难以置信，是吗？
大姐，事到如今，说什么都没有意义啦。
Come on, Madam, it's pointless to say anything now.
为了让眼前这位先生了解您所言非虚，还是让{RUBY_B#丹恒}二哥{RUBY_E#}露一两手枪术，也好让这些人心服口服。
If you want this gentleman to know you speak the truth, let {RUBY_B#Dan Heng}our brother{RUBY_E#} show off a bit of his spear work. That will convince them.
哈哈哈哈，我看那就不必了吧！
Hahaha, I say there's no need for that!
恶水，你小子非要试试成色，没讨着好吧？早点放人家进来和我见面不就没事了？
Caustide, you insisted on testing them and got nothing out of it, did you? If you had let them meet me sooner, none of this would have happened.
老大！我可不能把您的大业随便托付给不知底细的人！
Boss! I cannot hand your grand enterprise over to people we know nothing about!
您就是雇佣我们的共愿帮老大？
You are the one who hired us? The boss of the Synwish Syndicate?
是我。我叫池波，共愿帮这一代的头领。实在抱歉，帮里都是些不懂事的大老粗，过后我会好好管教。
That's me. I am Polwave, current leader of the Synwish Syndicate. My apologies. Our gang is full of roughnecks. I will make sure they are disciplined.
关于「那笔生意」，我们在楼上详谈吧。其他人，统统散了吧！
As for "that business," we'll discuss it upstairs. Everyone else, clear out!
久违了，停云女士，匹诺康尼一别也有些时日了。
Long time no see, Lady Tingyun. It's been a while since we last met in Penacony.
两位能临机应变，小女子感激不尽。为免暴露更多信息，刚才胡乱称呼，得罪之处还请见谅。
I am truly grateful for your quick thinking. To avoid revealing too much, I made up false names and titles for you two just now... But if you were offended, then I beg your forgiveness.
这儿堪称是非之地，两位怎么来这儿了？
This place is a hotbed of trouble. What brings you two here?
我和星期日与仙舟的使团搭上线时，收到他们的请求，说使团中有人异乡迷途，不慎陷落当地帮派之手，希望我们伸出援手。

When Sunday and I contacted the Xianzhou delegation, they asked for our help. They claimed someone from their group had lost their way here in a foreign land and was captured by a local gang, and they wanted us to help.
虽说一听就是另有隐情，但我们还是来了。
It was clear there was more to the story, but we came anyway.
Who would've thought... it turned out to be true.
「迷途陷落」？当中有些误会——唉，两位这则流言，恐怕是爻老板精心安排的「命数」吧。
"Lost"? "Captured"? There must be some misunderstanding... Alas, this rumor was likely a "destiny" arranged by Madam Yao.
你刚才提到「爻老板」，莫非是玉阙仙舟的戎韬将军？
Did you just say "Madam Yao"? Do you mean the Seer Strategist from the Xianzhou Yuque?
我在匹诺康尼时也偶有耳闻，听说她是位深居简出的卜者将军。这次，联盟派了她前来？
I happened to hear of her back in Penacony too. They say she is the diviner general, one who lives in seclusion. Did the Alliance send her this time?
停云女士亲涉险地，莫非是要务在身？
Lady Tingyun, you stepped into such danger yourself... do you have a vital mission?
两位不是外人，我就不瞒二位了，就是她差我来此执行任务。
You two are no strangers... so I will speak plainly. She's the one who sent me here on this mission.
共愿帮请来「仙舟第一杀手」，想雇佣这位凶名卓著的人物参与「幻月游戏」。但按使团所获情报，那人的真实身份是星核猎手，刃。

The Synwish Syndicate invited the notorious "Xianzhou's Number One Assassin" with the intention of hiring this person to participate in the Phantasmoon Games. But the delegation's intelligence revealed that the person was none other than the Stellaron Hunter, Blade.
我冒用这一名号前来此地，就是为了探明星核猎手为何，以及如何入局。
I assumed the title to come here to uncover why the Stellaron Hunters are involved... and how he will enter the game.
So how's it going so far?
虽说阴差阳错之下，一切都很顺利，但接下来该如何做，小女子也还蒙在鼓里。
By sheer twists of fate, everything has gone smoothly so far. But as for what comes next... I still don't know anything either.
不过，临行前爻老板曾交予我三只锦囊，内藏妙计…嗯，姑且先当作妙计吧。眼下，也到了拆开第二只的时候。
Still, Madam Yao entrusted me with three pouches before I departed, each said to hold a stratagem. Well... let us call them stratagems for now. And at this moment, it is time to open the second.
「你还是说出我的身份了吗？无妨！我给你派来援手咯，想怎么用都可以，第三个见了共愿帮头目再拆！b（￣▽￣）」
"So you revealed my identity after all? No worries! I've sent you some backup. Use them however you like. Open the third pouch only after you've met the Synwish Syndicate's boss. b（￣▽￣）"
爻老板，难怪您也有「相声将军」的名头呐……
No wonder they also call Madam Yao the "Crosstalk General"...
上面说，两位会为我解围，让我安心去见共愿帮的头目——两位意下如何？
It says the two of you will help me clear the way, so I can safely meet the Synwish Syndicate's boss. What do you say?
这里万分凶险，我们当然会与停云小姐随行。
This place is perilous. Of course we will accompany you, Miss Tingyun.
至于星核猎手，我同样对他们很感兴趣。
As for the Stellaron Hunters... I, too, find them intriguing.
丹恒，能再陪我打听些消息吗？
Dan Heng, will you help me gather a bit more information?
一不留神，鸽川的风景就变得面目全非了。
Before I even realized, the scenery of Dovebrook became unrecognizable.
以前哪儿会有{RUBY_B#机铠}铁坨子{RUBY_E#}满街跑呢？更别提把我们这些帮派分子当成害虫处理了。
Back then, who would have imagined {RUBY_B#mechatrons}iron hulks{RUBY_E#} running wild on the streets, let alone us gang members being treated like vermin?
您找我们来，显然不是来怀旧的吧？
You didn't call us here just to reminisce, did you?
哈哈，当然不是！三位，请原谅恶水这家伙无礼的试探行为。
Haha, of course not! Please forgive Caustide's rude little test.
这只井底之蛙，总是搞不明白年轻人为什么喜欢从银河里传来的东西。机铠、蒙面英雄、星穹列车……
That narrow-minded fellow never understands why young people flock to things that come from other planets, like mechatrons, masked heroes, and the Astral Express...
他不明白，<color=#dbc291ff>银河里来的东西更新鲜，银河里来的大人物也更可怕。</color>
What he does not see is that <color=#dbc291ff>while cosmic novelties are more enticing, big shots that hail from the cosmos are even more fearsome.</color>
您是聪明人，再装下去不过是自讨没趣。我们并非「仙舟第一杀手」，这点您应该心知肚明？
You're a clever one, so there's no point in keeping up this charade. We're not "Xianzhou's Number One Assassins." You knew that already, didn't you?
我虽然不像仙舟人那样长寿，但好歹有些看人的眼光。你们不是第一杀手，但本领胜似第一杀手。
I may not live as long as those Xianzhou folks, but I've got a decent eye for sizing people up. You might not be the number one assassins, but your skills surpass even such assassins.
所以，我不在乎你们是谁。抛出大价钱请来了「快刀」，又何必管它是什么牌子？
So I don't care who you are. I paid good money for a "sharp blade"...but I don't give a fig about its brand.
那这把快刀，您是想用在哪儿？
And where do you intend to use this blade?
别误会，我不是想看到血流成河，而是想给共愿帮动一场手术。三位请看——
Don't get me wrong. I am not looking for bloodshed. Instead, I intend to perform surgery on the Synwish Syndicate. Look here...
靠着一些关系，我有幸得到了这张可以加入星神游戏的「欢愉假面」，有人对这宝贝趋之若鹜，也有人担心它是祸根。
Through certain connections, I secured this "Mask of Elation," the entry pass to the Aeonic game. Some covet this treasure, while others fear it a curse.
你们冒认「仙舟第一杀手」，应该是为它而来的吧？你们想争夺神明的奖赏，对吗？
Now, you claimed the name of "Xianzhou's Number One Assassins," so surely you came for this. You want the god's reward, don't you?
您是雇主，仪式的奖赏本该由您拿下才对。池波先生打算向星神索取什么？
You are our employer. Therefore, the festival's prize should rightfully be yours. What do you want from the Aeon, Mr. Polwave?
星神？我可没有那样不切实际的奢望。
The Aeon? I harbor no such unrealistic desire.
这份索取的机会，我把它当成给三位的报酬。我只想沾沾光——
I'll leave this prize for you to claim as your reward. I'm happy enough to share in a bit of your glory...
无论成败，我只希望几位被采访时广而告之，你们是由鸽川的「共愿帮」资助，这样就好。
Whether you win or lose, all I ask is that when the press comes knocking, you say this: You were sponsored by the Synwish Syndicate of Dovebrook. That is enough for me.
原来这是一场赞助生意？共愿帮是想要借此扬名？
So this is a sponsorship deal? The Synwish Syndicate only wants fame?
我们既然不是您雇佣的人，您不担心我们出尔反尔？无视您的要求？
Since we are not truly in your employ, are you not afraid we might break our promise and ignore your request?
你们真要对我的诉求漠不关心，又何必问呢？我刚才说过，本人虽不像仙舟人那样长寿，但好歹有些看人的眼光。
If you truly cared nothing for what I asked, why even raise the question? As I said before, I may not have the long life of the Xianzhou people, but I do know how to judge people.
容小女子再多问一嘴，您执着扬名，是为了什么？
One more question from me, please. Why are you so set on chasing fame?
在二相乐园，人们投注在幻造种身上的目光，对他们的好奇和诉求，就是令他们得以存在的愿力。
In Planarcadia, imagenae exist due to Wishpower, and that Wishpower comes from the attention, curiosity, and demands humans place upon these imagenae.
共愿帮的存在，最初是为了供养那些不被关注、没有愿力、也无人需要的幻造种。
The Synwish Syndicate was founded to provide for those imagenae who were ignored, had no Wishpower, and were not needed by humanity.
可惜，自打那个{RUBY_B#真珠}贝壳女士{RUBY_E#}上台后，我们打打杀杀的路要到头了。
Unfortunately, ever since that {RUBY_B#Pearl}seashell woman{RUBY_E#} rose to power, our path of blood and violence had run its course.
所以，我想让「共愿帮」换个形式存在，让它拥有比过去多得多的关注！
That's why I want the Synwish Syndicate to take on a new form, one that will draw more attention than ever before!
「共愿妖怪养老基金会」，你们觉得这个名字怎么样？
The Synwish Strangeling Pension Foundation. What do you think of the name?
哈哈哈哈，那么，三位是否打算接下这单生意？
Hahaha! So, will the three of you accept this job?
A moment later, somewhere in Dovebrook District
…这位池波先生的目标，倒是意外地脚踏实地。
能活到这把年纪的帮派首领，靠的不是保镖，而是生存智慧。
A gang leader won't survive this long by relying on bodyguards. It's about having a sharp instinct for survival.
他想让组织洗白，只怕也没那么容易。依小女子愚见，那位二当家就未必会和他的老大同心同德。
He wants to launder his gang clean, but that will not be easy. In my view, the underboss may not see eye to eye with his boss.
多谢二位的保护，我能有惊无险地离开。
My thanks to you both. With your protection, I managed to leave without harm.
只是，带走了本该属于「仙舟第一杀手」的面具…这么一想，这副面具都有些扎手了。
Yet, we carried off the mask meant for the so-called "Xianzhou's Number One Assassin"... when I think of it that way, this mask feels thorny in my hands.
{RUBY_B#刃}那个男人{RUBY_E#}…想要加入幻月游戏？他想做什么？
{RUBY_B#Blade}That man{RUBY_E#}... He seeks to enter the Phantasmoon Games? What does he plan to do?
无论他为何而来，兹事体大，恐怕小女子得先失陪了，待到回禀爻光将军后再作决断。
Whatever his purpose, this matter is grave. I'm afraid I must take my leave for now and report to General Yao Guang before making any decisions.
不必了，我在此等各位已有一阵子了。
No need for that. I've been waiting here for you all for some time.
爻老板，你竟然亲自来了？
Madam Yao, you came in person?
这不，冒昧给你身后两位递上了假消息，致二位一番奔波，还是得老老实实来请罪啊。至于为何到此…停云姑娘，第三只锦囊，你怕是还没拆开吧？

Well, you see, I must admit I passed false information to the two behind you, sending them on a wild goose chase. I should personally ask for their forgiveness. As for why I am here... Miss Tingyun, you still have not opened the third pouch, have you?
「无论对方给什么，照单全收带给我。˶╹ᵕ╹˶ಣ」
"Whatever they give you, just take it all and bring them to me. ˶╹ᵕ╹˶ಣ"
What kind of after-the-fact strategy is this?
将军，您若是开口讲明，我和星期日断不会拒绝。为何却要骗我们「使团有人迷途失陷」？
General, had you spoken plainly, Sunday and I would never have refused you. Why did you lie to us and claim that someone was "lost and captured"?
若没有「前任龙尊」和「匹诺康尼在逃主公」两位现身，停云姑娘恐怕仍要困在那群莽夫无休止的试探中。「迷途失陷」，正是我卜测所见的未来。

If not for the appearance of the "former Vidyadhara high elder" and the "runaway master of Penacony," Miss Tingyun would still be trapped in those brutes' endless probing. Her being "lost and captured" was exactly the future I divined.
我还算到共愿帮要遭血光之灾，若此事成真，多半是因为武力纠缠间，停云姑娘没能留住力。而两位一来，共愿帮也保住了性命。

I also foresaw bloodshed awaiting the Synwish Syndicate. Had it come true, it would have been because Miss Tingyun failed to restrain her strength during the clash. Yet with you two here, the gangsters' lives were spared.
您果然算到了我身体的异状。
You even foresaw the anomaly with my body.
有时候纵然算到了命数，未必就能改得了。万幸，一切没往最糟的结果发展。
Sometimes, even when fate is foreseen, it cannot be changed. Fortunately, things did not come to the worst.
星期日先生，久仰大名！你在匹诺康尼的登神壮举，本座有幸借着{RUBY_B#观自在眼}千只翎眼{RUBY_E#}遥遥看了全程直播，堪称壮丽绝伦！

As for Mr. Sunday, I've heard so much about you. With my {RUBY_B#Eye of Īśvara}thousand feathered eyes{RUBY_E#}, I had the privilege of watching the broadcast of your entire god-ascending feat in Penacony from far away. Truly magnificent!
行差踏错的一步，将军还是不要再提了。
Let's not speak of that misstep anymore, general.
倒是我们如您所愿带回了面具。您打算如何用它？不只想单单握在手中，以绝星核猎手入局的心思吧。
Rather, we have brought back the mask as you asked. How do you intend to use it? Surely not just to hold it and block the Stellaron Hunter's entry?
本该如此，但是一因生百果，面具既然到了我手上，能有的花样多着呢。
That was the plan, but from one cause spring a hundred outcomes. Now that the mask is in my hands, there are many possibilities.
借它将刃诱来，合力围杀，你觉得如何？又或者——
What do you say about using it to lure Blade here and strike him down together? Or perhaps...
<color=#dbc291ff>本座亲自戴上这副假面，逐鹿「幻月游戏」，倒也有趣？</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>I could wear the mask myself and personally compete in the Phantasmoon Games. That'd be interesting, right?</color>
这面具戴一副少一副，星核猎手也会为此头疼，哈哈，真是一举两得。
Each mask used is gone for good. The Stellaron Hunters will be left with a real headache. Hahaha, that'd be truly killing two birds with one stone.
爻老板，这可是要命的麻烦事，说笑不得呀。
Madam Yao, this is deadly business. It's no laughing matter.
「要命」…停云姑娘，本座正是为此而来的呢。
"Deadly"... Miss Tingyun, that is exactly why I am here.
当然，不是为了刃的命，他与仙舟的因缘多年来早就断得七七八八，倒也不必非得让本座截胡了别人的任命，为他前来此处。
Not to put Blade in his grave, that is. His ties to the Xianzhou have long since frayed. There was no need for me to snatch someone else's assignment and come here only for his sake.
所以仙舟派来的使节原本另有其人？
So the Xianzhou envoy was supposed to be someone else?
不瞒诸位，二相乐园本该由「神策将军」景元出使——罗浮云骑大战铁墓归来，这份荣耀本该归他。

To be frank, this journey to Planarcadia was meant for Jing Yuan, the Divine Foresight. The Luofu Cloud Knights recently returned from the great battle against Irontomb, and the honor should have been his.
只是临行前，我为此次出使所涉各方占上几卦，却得到如下结果——
Yet before his departure, I cast several divinations on all parties involved and received this result...
焚如，死如，弃如…小女子虽然不懂占卜，但能看得出来，这可不是什么吉兆。
Incineration. Death. Abandonment... I may not know divination, but even I can tell that there is no good omen.
很遗憾，玉阙和罗浮两位顶尖卜者，也就是我和我师妹符玄，彼此印证推演后，结论出奇地一致——

Unfortunately, the two top diviners of the Yuque and the Luofu — in other words, my junior soror Fu Xuan and I — cross-checked each other's extrapolations and came to the same astonishing conclusion...
<color=#dbc291ff>在这座「欢愉」的乐园中，会有一位帝弓天将陨落。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>An Arbiter General will fall in this arcadia of Elation.</color>
明知如此，你还要代替景元出使？
Even so, you're still taking the mission meant for Jing Yuan?
是，我向元帅进言，接了这份差事。没别的，只是本座从未见过这般离奇的命数，很有兴趣见证一番。
Yes. I contacted the Marshal and took over the task. I've simply never seen such a bizarre fate and wanted to witness it.
Even if it means your death?
若能在这场幻月游戏中为登神片刻而死，也不算辱没仙舟的声名。停云姑娘，把面具给我吧。
If I can die in these Phantasmoon Games to achieve a moment of godhood... Then my death won't have sullied the Xianzhou's honor. Miss Tingyun, hand me the mask.
这…抱歉，星期日，身体本能地察觉到了危险。
Umm... sorry, Sunday. My body instinctively sensed danger.
「加入幻月游戏的假面一旦被佩戴，便会与谒者本人紧密联结在一起——它会显现出佩戴者灵魂的形状。」我在《涯海星槎胜览》中看过类似的记述。

"Once the mask for joining the Phantasmoon Games is worn, it binds tightly to the Supplicant and manifests the shape of the wearer's soul." I read something like this in the Views of the Universe from a Starskiff.
如今验明正身，这幅面具确实是真品。
It's confirmed now. This mask is indeed genuine.
恭喜你啊，星期日先生，你现在已经是这堂堂星神游戏中的谒者了。
Congratulations, Mr. Sunday. You're now a Supplicant in the Aeonic game.
戎韬将军，你究竟想做什么？你两次贸然行事，是要与星穹列车交恶吗？
What exactly are you trying to do, Seer Strategist? Twice now you've acted without warning. Do you mean to make an enemy out of the Astral Express?
Let me take care of this.
（不要担心。我当然不是这位将军的对手。）
(Don't worry. I'm no match for this general.)
爻光将军…你到底是如何窥探到了我的所思所想？我以「调律」检视过了，没有外力侵入的痕迹。
General Yao Guang... How'd you pierce my thoughts? I ran a check with my "tuning," and there were no signs of any outside intrusion.
都说卜者算不准人心，要我说，不过是些庸手的托辞——星期日先生，你对「幻月游戏」很感兴趣，甚至冒出了「若能戴上这副面具又会如何」的念头，对吧？
They say a diviner can't read hearts. I call that the excuse of mediocrity. Mr. Sunday, you're fascinated by the Phantasmoon Games. You even wondered "what if I wore this mask," didn't you?
这种念头，也是能靠卜卦算出来的？
You can even divine thoughts like that?
不能，我只是善用「眼睛」看。虽然星期日先生从未向你索要端详面具，但从刚才到现在，他的双眼至少三次看向这件奇物。
No. I'm simply good at seeing using my "eyes." Though Mr. Sunday never asked to examine the mask, he's glanced at it at least three times since we started the conversation.
以他这等人物的心性涵养，我实在想不出「感兴趣」之外的第二种解释。
Given the character and manners of someone as noble as him, I can't think of any motive for this action but "genuine interest."
嗯，我确实有这样的想法，刚才的片刻，我甚至冒出了佩戴它的念头。
Yes. I did think of it. For a moment, I even considered putting it on.
所以，我只是将你想要的给了你。这可不是什么突然陷害，不过是给了你一份意想不到的「礼物」罢了——
So I merely gave you what you desired. This is no trap. It's just an unexpected "gift"...
幻月游戏进行期间，本座会提供一切力所能及的援手，助你夺得谒见星神的机会。
During the Phantasmoon Games, I'll give every ounce of aid I can to help you seize your chance to have an audience with the Aeon.
爻光将军…就我所知，先一步抛出重利，往往是为了诱人亏输。
General Yao Guang... As far as I know, throwing out heavy profits first is usually a lure to make others lose.
我们不过是初识，我想不明白，是什么让你愿意做到这一步？
We've only just met. I don't understand why you'd go this far?
何必妄自菲薄？<color=#dbc291ff>本座机关算尽，正是为了自「不可能」中凿开一线「可能」。</color>
Why belittle yourself? <color=#dbc291ff>Every move I've made is to carve a sliver of "possibility" from "the impossible."</color>
以我「观自在眼」所见，你是这片土地上，唯一不必为我做些什么，只要按自己的心意行事，就能带来变数的人。
With my Eye of Īśvara, I see you're the only one in this land who doesn't need to do a thing for me. Simply acting on your own will can bring change.
嗯，丹恒，我确实想对这个世界了解得更深入一些。
Indeed. Dan Heng, I do want to learn more about this world.
因为这片「欢愉」的世界令我感到好奇，「二相乐园」…真的是乐园吗？
Because this world of Elation fascinates me. Is Planarcadia... truly a paradise? An arcadia that its name claims?
我曾为了建成乐园，抱着错误的愿景一意孤行，甚至对乐园应当是什么样貌，至今也无法笃定地给出回答。
I once pursued a mistaken vision of paradise with stubborn resolve. Even now, I can't say for sure what a true paradise should look like.
所以，我想亲自验证，这片「乐园」是否真如其所名？
That's why I want to see with my own eyes whether this "arcadia" lives up to its name.
这么说来，只要星期日先生行动起来，爻老板，你之前占卦所得的「死兆」……
So then, as long as Mr. Sunday acts, that "omen of death" Madam Yao foresaw...
——当然还是死定啦！难道你指望送出一份厚礼，就能随便逃出生天吗？
Of course it would still come to pass! Did you think just a lavish gift could let you stroll out of destiny's shackles alive?
容小女子多嘴一句，此事仙舟是否知情？
Pardon me for butting in... But does the Xianzhou know about this?
事关重大，我怎么会擅作主张？我和玉阙六御商议过了，若我有什么三长两短，我会推荐一位合适人选继任。
This is such serious business. I'd never make this decision on my own. I've talked it over with the Six Charioteers of the Yuque. If something happens to me, I'll line up a solid successor.
自我出使之日起，为防万一，她将前往玉阙，与玉阙六御所提的其他候选人一同在遍智格物院受训术数、兵法、治平之道。

She headed to the Yuque on the day I left on this mission, just in case anything went wrong. There, with the other potential successors picked by the Six Charioteers, she'll train at the Omniscience Sapientia Academe in divination arts, war strategies, and civil governance.
您是说符玄大人？她会接替您掌握玉阙符节？
You mean Lady Fu Xuan? She'd take over the Yuque after you?
若是这趟旅程我未能归返，罗浮太卜司的青雀也许有望接过「戎韬将军」的符节，节制「玉阙」……
If I don't make it back from this trip, maybe Qingque from the Luofu Divination Commission could take the Seer Strategist's position and command the Yuque...
...Qingque and Yuque. What a perfectly rhymed match!
个中详情…三位，我们换个地方谈谈吧，如何？
As for the details... shall we discuss this somewhere else, you three?
一段时间后，为了寻回失窃物品，一位不速之客悄然潜入了鸽川区。
Some time later, in search of stolen items, an uninvited guest quietly slipped into Dovebrook District.
从地图上看，「不死神探事务所」就在这了。
Map says the "Ashen Detective Agency" should be right here.
...But why's there just a magazine publisher's office?
狸了个大谱！听说绘世学院那边出了个大新闻！
Holy furboly! Heard big drama hit Graphia Academy!
狸猫？在拍照？阿哈眷顾的土地上真是什么都有，去问问路吧。
A furbo? Taking photos? You really can find anything in the land blessed by Aha. Let's go ask for directions.
你好啊，小狸猫，你知道这附近有没有一家「不死神探事务所」？
Hey, little furbo. Know if there's an "Ashen Detective Agency" nearby?
…不知道哩。但是，如果地上有一万信用点的话，可能会想起来喔？
...Beats me. But if I find <unbreak>10,000</unbreak> credits on the ground, I might recall the spot?
问个路要收一万？算了…办正事要紧。
Ten thousand for directions? Hmmm... Fine, job first.
啊，天哪，我信用账户里的一万信用点不知怎么竟然跑到了你的账户里。现在，可以告诉我了吗？
Oh wow, looks like <unbreak>10,000</unbreak> credits from my account just hopped to end up in yours for no reason. Now, spill?
出手好大方的小姐！你要找的地方就在楼上喔。那位侦探借我们老板的地盘开办事务所。
Whoa, generous miss! The place you're looking for is upstairs. That detective's renting my boss's space for his agency.
但这家伙白天睡大觉，晚上大门紧锁。谁也不知道他靠什么生活！难道，他是吸血鬼吗？
But he's zonked out in the day, and his doors are locked at night. No clue how he earns any money. Maybe he's a vampire?
这不就是没开门吗？那，我该怎么见到这位不死神探呢？
So they're closed? Then how do I meet this Ashen Detective?
…不知道哩。但是，如果地上有五万信用点的话，可能会想起来喔？
...Beats me. But if I find <unbreak>50,000</unbreak> credits on the ground, I might recall that too?
臭狸猫，你丫真是欠收拾啊，竟敢诈骗咱们的客人！
You stinky furbo, begging for a smack, scamming our guest!
你好，我是「旁白」，是「不死神探事务所」的接待员，也是那位侦探先生的助手。
Hi, I'm "Narrator," receptionist at the Ashen Detective Agency, and the assistant of that Mr. Detective.
「旁白」？谁家好人会给自己的宠物起这么个名字啊？
"Narrator"? What sane person gives their pet that name?
楼上那位就是了。对了，你没被那只臭狸猫骗了钱吧？
That would be the dude upstairs. By the way, that mangy furbo didn't fleece you, right?
要不要我替你撵上那只臭狸猫，把钱要回来。
Do you want me to catch that sneaky furbo for you and get your money back?
就不麻烦你了…好了，钱回来了。连带还有那家伙信用点户头里剩下的二十六块五毛余额。
Nah, save your breath... Got it fixed. Money's back in my account, plus the last <unbreak>26.5</unbreak> credits from that guy's account balance.
不错嘛，朋克洛德的黑客。
大叔，你还蛮有见识的。那么，可以麻烦你带个路吗？
You seem pretty knowledgeable. So, would you mind showing me the way?
让您见笑，还得走条「小道」。杂志社的房东躲债逃走了，债主轮番上门轰炸，侦探先生干脆把正门给封死了。

Sorry, but you will have to take a "side path." The landlord of this magazine office fled to dodge his debts, and creditors have been storming in one after another. In the end, Mr. Detective sealed the front door entirely.
所以，侦探先生就住在这儿？
So this is where the detective lives?
没错，办公居住一体化，确实寒碜了点。这个点，他应该在睡大觉吧，我们这儿也难得来一次客人。
Yes, his office and living quarters are one and the same. It is a little shabby, I admit. At this hour... he is probably fast asleep. Visitors here are rare indeed.
难得来一次客人…听起来真叫人悲伤啊。
Visitors being rare... that really does sound a little sad.
您跟我来，我这就把他叫醒。
Please, come with me. I will wake him at once.
先办正事吧，晚点再闲逛。
Let's get down to business. I can stroll around later.
不死途先生，这位小姐并不是来送外卖的。
Mr. Ashveil, this lady is not here for food delivery.
Oh, then she must be here to kill me?
不是送外卖的，也不是来杀我的。真是怪了…噢！难道是，委托人！你是来委托我查案的！
Not here to deliver food, AND not here to kill me. How strange... Oh! Then you must be a client! You are here to hire me for a case!
你的猜测顺序实在是令人有些心疼。没错，我是来委托你查案的，有东西失窃了。
Your order of guesses is a little heartbreaking. Yes, I am here to commission you. Something has been stolen.
<color=#dbc291ff>丢了人，连带着我本该拿到手的一张古老面具。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>A person, along with an ancient mask that should have been mine.</color>
哼哼，有点意思。你是来加入「幻月游戏」的？
Heh, interesting. Are you here to join the Phantasmoon Games?
此刻，侦探的内心升起了一团疑云——她到底是什么来头？
At that moment, a cloud of suspicion rises in the detective's mind. Who exactly is this girl?
老白，谈生意的时候就不要配音了。
Mister N, stop the voiceover when we're talking business.
哎？要停下来吗？你付我时薪九百信用点外加两根香蕉不就是干这个的吗？
Huh? Stop? You pay me nine hundred credits an hour plus two bananas just for this, don't you?
对，但干活的时候，多少给我提几个词。侦探和助手，两个人中好歹得有一个懂点推理吧？
Yes, but at least throw me a few clues while you work. Between a detective and their assistant, at least one of them should know a thing or two about deduction, right?
一个名字突然在侦探先生那空空如也的脑袋里升起。这个表面看来不起眼的女孩，却是名列公司通缉榜赏金前十的恐怖分子，星核猎手——
A name flashed through the otherwise empty mind of the detective. This unremarkable-looking girl was in fact one of the top ten most wanted terrorists on the IPC's bounty list, a Stellaron Hunter...
是银狼，她是银狼啊！不死途先生，你的脑袋让冰箱门给挤了吗？
It's Silver Wolf! She's Silver Wolf! Mr. Ashveil, did you get your head caught in the fridge door or something?
我感觉需要再销毁一遍自己的信息了。
I feel like I need to wipe my personal data again.
星际和平公司悬赏金额最高的通缉犯，跑来委托一个穷困潦倒的侦探——这类故事我倒是看过不少。
One of the Interastral Peace Corporation's most wanted fugitives with the highest bounties, comes to commission a broke detective... I have seen plenty of stories like this.
下一步，我就该身不由己地被卷入一场大阴谋里，开始逃亡，对吧？
So, the next thing would be me getting dragged into a massive conspiracy and forced to run for my life, right?
别被害妄想了。我来找你，是因为我挖进治安局的刑事档案记录系统看了看。
Drop the paranoia. I came to you because I hacked into the Security Bureau's criminal records system.
不查不知道，一查吓一跳，那些警方奇案怪案的资料中，你被聘用的次数可是多得很呢。
What I found was shocking. In all those bizarre police cases, you were hired again and again.
「同谐教团圣餐奇案」「幽灵疾锋龙列车案」「幽灵连续复活事件」「奇笑馆超不连续密室杀人案」…都是你帮忙解决的。

"The Curious Case of the Harmony Sect Communion," "The Mystery of the Ghost Bullet Wyrm Express," "The Serial Ghost Resurrection Incident," "The Super-Non-Serial Locked-Room Murders at Kooky House"... you helped solve them all.
你不是最有名的，但你应该是这里最有能耐的侦探，对吗？
You may not be the most famous, but you're probably the most capable detective around here, right?
还有没有点隐私啊…算了，说说看，面具是怎么丢的。
Is nothing private anymore... Whatever. Tell me, how did you lose your mask?
今天本该是和共愿帮碰头的日子……
Today was supposed to be our meeting with the Synwish Syndicate...
好的，那么接下来谈谈委托费的问题吧。
Alright, now let's talk about the commission fee.
拜托，我一句话都还没说完……？
Excuse me? I haven't even finished my sentence yet...?
真正的名侦探，即便足不出户也能对案情了如指掌。
A true great detective can know a case without ever leaving the room.
他睡着的时候，我会负责搜罗情报。关于共愿帮今天的遭遇，还有那三个骗走面具的「仙舟第一杀手」，我们已经大致了解情况了。
While he sleeps, I gather the intel. We already have the basics about today's fiasco with the Synwish Syndicate, and those three "Xianzhou's Number One Assassins" who scammed the mask.
能搞定吗？钱不是问题。对了，你们收黑钱吗？
Can you handle it? Money is not a problem. Do you take dirty money?
不好意思，不收黑钱。也请您务必不要在付款后将报酬连同账户余额一同撤回。
Sorry, no dirty money. And please do not withdraw your payment plus the account balance after paying.
哦，那这样吧，这儿不是公司的地盘吗？你把我扭送领赏吧。
Oh, then how about this? This is the IPC's turf, right? Turn me in for the bounty.
你拿完赏金我就跑路。星核猎手偶尔也会用这招赚点经费。
You take the reward, and I bolt afterward. We Stellaron Hunters sometimes use that trick to raise funds.
…要不然我们还是谈谈收黑钱的可能性吧。三千万信用点，事后给就行。
...Or maybe we could discuss the possibility of taking dirty money. Thirty million credits. Pay us after the work's done.
成交，那我这几天努努力。这是我的联系方式，你们有消息了随时告诉我。
Deal. I'll try to get that money over the next few days. Here's my contact info. Update me the moment you have any news.
事后给？咱们事务所什么时候有这个规矩了？
Pay us after the work? When did our office have a rule like that?
就在刚才。老白啊老白，难道你还真想收下一笔黑钱？我想到了另一个来钱的路子。让我先联系一下某位大人物。
That rule got made just now. Oh, my dear Mister N, did you truly want to take dirty money? I have come up with another way to make money. Let me reach out to a certain big shot first.
真珠女士，我得到了一个可靠的消息！
Madam Pearl, I've obtained solid intel!
…不死途先生？你会在这时候主动来电，概率可不到5％。
...Mr. Ashveil? The chance of you initiating a call at this hour is under five percent.
推测：也许你愿意考虑我的<color=#dbc291ff>提议</color>了？
Let me guess: Perhaps you are finally ready to consider my <color=#dbc291ff>offer</color>?
不，我发现了星核猎手的踪迹！他们现在就在二相乐园，甚至还准备加入「幻月游戏」搅局！
No, I've found the trail of the Stellaron Hunters! They are here in Planarcadia, and they even plan to crash the Phantasmoon Games!
我可以把她的坐标给你，神不知鬼不觉……
I can send you her coordinates quietly, without anyone noticing...
「幻月游戏」…打从贵公司决定速通开始，它就注定不只是一局逗闷子的游戏了。您希望我加入，实在是有些虐待老人了吧。
The Phantasmoon Games... The moment your IPC chose to speedrun it, it was fated to be more than just a game of fun. And you want me to take part? That is asking a bit much of an old man.
早知道刚才就应该答应那个黑客的要求，把她扭送领赏才对啊。
We should've taken that hacker's deal earlier and turned her in for the bounty.
意外之喜。真珠还藏着其他面具啊…那就好办多了。
An unexpected bonus. So Pearl still has other masks hidden away... That makes things much easier.
看来谈完生意顺道窃听一下合作伙伴这个好习惯…还得保持。
Seems that listening in on one's partners after wrapping up business is a habit worth keeping.
还没。不过我有了新线索。丢了一张面具，我再找一张不就是了。
Not yet. But I've got a new lead. We might've lost one mask, so I just need to find another.
好。答应我，下次别再用什么「仙舟第一杀手」的名目在暗网上接活了，好吗？
Fine. Promise me this: Next time, don't take contracts on the dark web using names like "Xianzhou's Number One Assassin."
好好好。对了，你能告诉我吗，这次艾利欧给了你什么剧本？
Okay, okay. By the way, can you tell me what script Elio gave you this time?
（该办正事了。共愿帮盘踞在哪里呢？）
(Time to get down to business. Where could the Synwish Syndicate be hiding?)
（共愿帮这边的接头人，应该很显眼才是。）
(The contact from the Syndicate should stand out.)
那边几个人…也是共愿帮的成员？
Those people over there... are they also members of the Synwish Syndicate?
共愿帮的总部就在河对岸，够气派吧？
That's the Synwish Syndicate headquarters across the river. Quite impressive, don't you think?
Is this... the passage in the painting?
当然，目前被咱们共愿帮征用中！
Of course. The Synwish Syndicate has it under our command for now!
二当家您回来了！二当家您辛苦了！
Underboss, you are back. Thanks for your hard work!
Is this the one the boss brought in?
（对这班不知轻重的莽夫，恐怕我得收着点力了……）
(Looks like I'll have to hold back against these reckless brutes...)
不愧是怖•鬼人！好大的力气！
As expected of The Terror in Fog! Such incredible strength!
体内那股「毁灭」的力量…还是难以驾驭…
That power of the Destruction within me... it's still hard to control...
爻老板，我已如你所说，竭尽所能让他们别死了。
Madam Yao, I've done everything in my power to keep them alive, as you said.
我不想取你性命，你自觉退下吧。
I don't want to take your life. Back down while you still can.
共愿帮的男儿何惧死亡！！别小瞧我的气概！！
A true warrior of the Synwish Syndicate fears no death!!! Don't underestimate my resolve!!!
「第一杀手」们，你们要去哪儿？老大在楼上等着呢！
"Number One Assassins," where are you going? The boss is waiting upstairs!
看不出来，这儿装修得颇有品味。
I gotta say, this place is decorated with a touch of style.
暴力组织不是总得展示暴力的，更多时候，他们需要展示财力。
A gang does not always flaunt brute force. More often, they need to flaunt wealth.
So there is even a shooting button? That's interesting.
Why are there so many... furbos?
都是这间杂志社的员工。
They're all employees of this magazine company.
这画面怎么像游戏里的惩罚环节...…
Why does this scene feel like a punishment round from a game...
职场求生，可比游戏残酷多了。
Office survival's way more brutal than any game.
诸位，欢迎莅临珠星的总部大楼。
Ladies and gentlemen, welcome to the headquarters of the Pearluxe Corp.
姬子姐说这是家综合娱乐公司，当时咱就在想——那它的总部可不能是座普普通通的写字楼啊。
Back when Himeko said this was an entertainment company, I knew their headquarters wouldn't be some ordinary old office building.
但，这也太有特色了吧！超大的机器人雕像，这完全就是一座超级机库嘛！
But this is way too much! That giant robot statue... This place is totally like some supersized mecha hangar!
哈哈，您说得一点没错！按创始人的要求，敝公司本部的大厅被特意修建成了如今的样貌。
Haha, you're absolutely right! In accordance with the vision of our founder, our lobby was intentionally constructed as you see it now.
为消费者实现超越期待的梦想，这正是珠星一向坚守的设计宗旨。如果各位中有熟悉珠星作品的观众，应该能认出，这是——

To realize dreams that far exceed what consumers imagine has always been Pearluxe Corp's core design philosophy, and we have never strayed from it. If any of you are familiar with our company's works, you may recognize this as—
「机铠战士系列」，《破晓战队》的行动基地。
"Mechatron Warrior Series," the Daybreak Squadron's base of operations.
啊哈哈，看来杨先生是本公司动画的资深爱好者啊。
Ahaha, looks like Mr. Yang here is quite a fan of our company's animated works!
星穹列车的各位，<color=#dbc291ff>在正式会谈开始前，真珠女士希望各位能在这里游览体验一番，她已派出专人作陪，还请贵宾们稍作等待。</color>

Now, <color=#dbc291ff>Madam Pearl would like to invite everyone from the Astral Express to take a tour before your official meeting begins. She has arranged for a member of our staff to accompany you, so please wait here a moment.</color>
我明白了，费伦先生，有劳您一路的迎接。
I understand, Mr. Feiron. Thank you for escorting us all this way.
那么，我先失陪了。侦探先生，这边请。
Well then, I'll take my leave. This way, Detective.
喔？真珠在会谈前希望我们先在这儿逛逛？还真是奇怪的安排……
Really? Pearl wants us to look around here before the meeting? That seems kinda weird...
这会和她提出的合作有关吗？我很好奇。也许这是她对自己另一重身份的「自我介绍」。
Could it be related to her proposed collaboration? Perhaps this is her way of "introducing" her other identity.
不管怎么样，有逛逛，一切就好！趁接待的人还没来，咱们四下看看？
It's all good as long as we get a chance to look around, that works for me! Why don't we explore while we wait for our new guide?
杨叔，这不是你最喜欢的大、机、器、人嘛！
Mr. Yang, isn't this your favorite gi-ant ro-bot!
怎么看都不是造物引擎吧！
There's no way that's an Engine of Creation!
Behold the mechatron, standing tall astride the earth!
咱词穷了，总之就一个字，太帅了——！
I don't know what to say... Except: THIS! IS! AWESOME!
我看到了看到了，别那么大声。我们是来做客的，在外面还是得保持仪态庄重。
I saw it, please, just keep it down. We're here as their guests, we should be careful about what sort of impression we leave.
仔细一看，这台机铠的许多部件都没能安装。
Looking more closely, it appears many of this mechatron's components were never installed.
真是遗憾啊，好想看看拼装完成的机铠，动起来的它会是何等英姿！
What a shame! I was hoping to see it finished, to see the completed mechatron! Imagine how it would look in motion! What a glorious sight that would be!
杨叔，快跟咱讲讲，这台大机器人和你做动画师时设计的那个…「阿拉哈托」，到底哪个更厉害啊？
Really? In that case, Mr. Yang, let's hear it: Which one's stronger, this giant robot or that "Arahato" you designed back when you were an animator?
这是在人家的地头，跨作品比较机器人的战力未免对创作者们有些失礼了吧。
Seeing as we're on someone else's property, comparing robots from different works would be most disrespectful to the creators themselves.
C'mon, tell us! Pretty please? I wanna know too!
Comparing things is human nature! We can't help ourselves!
是啊，我看《银河战力党》的玩家们总会把各个角色的战斗力比来比去的。
Yeah! Like how Cosmicon Collective players are always obsessed with powerscaling all the characters!
阿拉哈托是机器人动画，破晓战队是真人英雄剧…这两者真没法比较。
Arahato is an animation all about robots, while Daybreak Squadron is a live action hero drama... The two really cannot be compared.
好标准的成年人式回答啊。
唉，你们就放过我这个已经不再热血的成年人吧。难得来这么有趣的地方，小三月，{NICKNAME}，咱们三个人一起在这巨大的机铠下合个影吧？

My days of being a hotheaded young man are well behind me, so please, cut this "mature" old man some slack, would you? We don't usually come to a place this cool, so why don't the three of us take a photo under this massive mechatron?
好耶，让我设个自动拍摄，这样咱们就能一块儿照进去了。
Now we're talking! Let me set the self-timer, so we can all get in the shot together.
Don't forget to turn on the beauty filter!
为什么照片里突然多了一个人？
Where did this extra person in the photo come from?
大白天的，怎么还能在人气这么旺的地方闹鬼呢？
A ghost? But it's daytime! And there's way too many people here anyway!
真是…好伟大的一张脸啊！
Wow, this truly is... a magnificent face!
和新闻上看到时完全不一样，能近距离端详，简直有种不真实的感觉。
It's nothing like how it looks on the news... Being able to see it up close feels almost surreal.
靠太近了？对不住，怪我没有把握好距离感。
Am I too close? Sorry, my bad, I'm not great with personal space.
嘿嘿～打量这么伟大的脸，这种冲动完全是不可抗力啊，你就原谅我吧。
Hehe~ Sorry, sorry! It's impossible not to stare at a face this amazing! You'll forgive me, right?
Any closer and I'm calling the cops.
嘿嘿～打量这么伟大的脸，这种冲动完全是不可抗力啊，你就原谅我吧。
Hehe~ Sorry, sorry! It's impossible not to stare at a face this amazing! You'll forgive me, right?
下次别吓我了，不然你赔不起。
Don't scare me like that again. You can't afford the consequences.
哎，那你可能要失望了，因为我真的没有钱。
*sigh* You're probably gonna be disappointed then, 'cause I'm totally broke.
哎呀，忘了向各位出示了，这是我的工牌。我是珠星财团幻造技术研发部专员，虚照，在星际和平公司的职级是P<unbreak>30</unbreak>。
Oh right, I forgot to show you my ID. Right, here we are! I'm Nihilux, and I work at Pearluxe Corp's Imagenesis Technology Department. I'm a P<unbreak>30</unbreak> agent who works for the IPC.
How high up the corporate ladder is P<unbreak>30</unbreak>?
稍微高级一些的牛马罢了。和诸位平时往来的战投部大人物们肯定不能比。
Just a slightly higher-ranking workhorse, that's all. Not on the same level as those big shots from the Strategic Investment Department who you folks usually deal with.
啊！是真珠女士派我来大厅迎接列车的贵客的。
Ah! Madam Pearl sent me to the lobby to pick you up!
诸位都是有名的超•银河级英雄，脸在新闻上刷了不止一次，我一眼就认出来了！所以迫不及待地闪过来想和诸位合照一张，嘿嘿，见谅见谅！

All of you are famous super-cosmic-level heroes whose faces have been all over the news more times than I can count, so of course I recognized you right away and just couldn't help rushing over here to snap a selfie with you! Hehe, hope you don't mind!
原来如此，你好啊，虚照小姐。
I see. Then hello, Miss Nihilux.
各位好！接下来将由我担任导游，引领大家全方位、深入这座大楼的各处区域打卡游览。
Hello everyone! Starting now, I'll be your tour guide, taking you on a comprehensive and in-depth tour to every single must-visit place in this building!
无论是会让瓦尔特先生感兴趣的机铠幻造，还是三月小姐关心的《苍天航路绒绒号》的动画产品，将由我来为各位揭晓这些大热产品背后的秘密！
From the mechatron imagenesis that managed to pique Mr. Yang's interest, to Miss March's favorite Fluffy Across the Blue merchandise, I'll reveal all the secrets behind our hottest products!
真的吗？我都有点迫不及待了！
当然是真的，一路上各位有什么想看的，想了解的，甚至想要的，全都可以告诉我！
Of course I'm being serious! If there's anything you want to see, learn about, or even get your hands on along the way, anything at all, just let me know!
杨先生，你对这座机铠雕像恋恋不舍，是想多拍几张留念合照吗？
Mr. Yang, you seem reluctant to part with the mechatron. Want to take a few more pictures with it?
我只是好奇…这台巨大的机器人在多久之后会完工？
I'm just curious... when will this giant robot be completed?
嘿嘿，小小剧透一下，这其实也是今天参观流程的一环喔，<color=#dbc291ff>我们想邀请列车英雄参与这座机铠雕像的装配。</color>
Hehe, here's a little spoiler: That's actually part of today's tour! <color=#dbc291ff>We'd like to invite the heroes of the Astral Express to help complete this mechatron statue.</color>
那它在完成装配后，能像二相乐园的其他机铠那样行动吗？
Will it be able to move like the other mechatrons in Planarcadia once it's done?
这恐怕…就有些难度了。各位应该听说过吧？机铠是由愿力驱动的幻造种，内部并没有什么复杂机械结构。
That's... I'm afraid it'll be a bit tricky. You're probably all aware that mechatrons are imagenae driven by Wishpower, which means they don't actually have any complex machinery inside them.
人嘛，看着没有生命的外物时，总会不自觉将它想像成有生命，可以思考和活动的存在。就是这种「移情作用」产生的愿力赋予了机铠——不，赋予了所有幻造种以生命。

You know how humans tend to unconsciously imagine inanimate objects as living things that can think and move? It's this empathetic projection that grants Wishpower to mechatrons, no, to all imagenae, giving them life.
那这台大机铠怎么就不行了？
So what's wrong with this giant mechatron, then?
俺寻思，这大机铠也能动啊？
I'm thinkin' this big ol' bot oughta be able to move too, yeah?
光你一个人寻思当然是不行滴。越大的幻造种，就需要越庞大的愿力维持。
Think away, but one person's thoughts alone won't cut it. The bigger the imagenae, the more Wishpower needed to sustain it.
<color=#dbc291ff>要让这样巨大的幻造种活过来，必须跨越「不可能存在」的思维桎梏才行。这就需要承载巨大愿望的故事和不受拘束的想象力。</color>

<color=#dbc291ff>We'd need to break free from the mental shackles of "impossibility" to bring such a massive imagenae to life. That in turn requires stories filled with the grandest of wishes and imaginations that know no bounds.</color>
可惜呀，现代人类的思维太现实啦。人们总会忍不住去想，这么大的机铠，到底是怎么动起来的？这么巨大的重量，它为什么没被压垮呢？
Alas! Modern humans think way too practically. People can't help but wonder: "How does such a huge mechatron even move? Given how massive it is, why doesn't it just collapse under its own weight?"
只消掺杂一点点怀疑，巨型机铠屹立于大地之上，就是个遥不可及的梦。也许，它要是出现在原始人社会里倒是更容易活过来吧。

The tiniest seed of doubt, and the giant mechatron, standing tall astride the earth becomes nothing but an impossibility. Maybe it'd have a better chance of coming to life in a more primitive society.
高兴点嘛，您今天有机会将这台巨大机铠拼装完成——这可是多少机器人爱好者们求之不得的一刻啊。
Cheer up! Today's your chance to finish building this massive mechatron! Think of how many robot enthusiasts would kill for this kind of opportunity!
有句俗话说得好啊：发财梦，英雄心，千般努力归珠星。
There's a saying that goes: Dreams of wealth, the heart of a hero, and countless efforts all lead to Pearluxe Corp.
不管是小孩还是大人，大家总会做些美梦：成为从邪恶势力的手中拯救世界的英雄！与巨大的机铠合体放出酷炫的大招！珠星出售这些梦想，然后从中大赚特赚。

Whether you're a kid or an adult, everyone has their own sweet dreams: Becoming a hero who saves the world from evil forces! Merging with a giant mechatron to unleash awesome ultimate moves! Pearluxe Corp sells these dreams and makes a killing off of them.
诸位看，这个区域销售珠星生产的机铠模玩，其中销量最好的还是「破晓战队」系列。
If I could have everyone's attention, you can buy models of Pearluxe Corp's mechatrons in this area, among them, is the best-selling "Daybreak Squadron" series.
哇，这个玩具…看起来好精巧，难怪杨叔会对这些机铠念念不忘。
Wow, look at this... it's so intricate! No wonder Mr. Yang's got mechatrons on the brain.
咳咳，真羡慕二相乐园的孩子啊。我成长的年代里，机器人玩具还是稀罕东西。
I very much envy the kids here in Planarcadia. Back in my day, robot toys were still quite the luxury.
哈哈，看着几位眼放光的样子，我不禁想起，自己也曾经年轻过。
Haha, seeing all your eyes light up like that reminded me that I too was once young.
那时候的我，有一阵子穷得就连去便利店里买盒牛奶都要犹豫半天。我在心里默默告诉自己，我一定要努力奋斗，一定可以大发横财的。

Back then, there was a stretch when I was so broke that I'd spend ages debating whether to buy a carton of milk from the convenience store. I kept telling myself that I had to work hard so I could get rich someday.
那…有钱的目标，您实现了吗？
Soooo... Did you manage to get rich?
经过多年的努力和打拼，姐姐我呀，终于也不再年轻了。
After years of hard work and hustling, at the very least, I'm no longer young.
You are both young and beautiful.
呜呜，小嘴儿真甜。不过姐姐有自己保持年轻的秘诀……
Aww, aren't you the sweetest! But I do have my secret to staying young...
那就是谎报年龄，你也多学着点吧。咳咳，说回努力和打拼……
That is, lying about your actual age. Keep that in mind, just in case! *ahem* Now, back to the grind...
You also ended up in the hands of Pearluxe Corp.
怎么可能！悄咪咪地告诉你们，其实我还有别的身份和兼职。
That's not true! Let me tell you a secret: I actually have other identities and side gigs.
喔？难道您除了珠星的工作之外另有产业？
Oh? Don't tell me you have another business venture outside your job at Pearluxe Corp?
欸嘿嘿…也不算什么产业，一笔小买卖罢了。
Hehe... it's not really a business, just a small side hustle.
大发横财不敢说，但小赚一笔的目标，姐姐我就快要做到咯。
I wouldn't call it striking it rich, but I'm pretty close to making a sweet little profit.
别吊咱们胃口啦，虚照小姐，快展开讲讲？
Don't keep us in suspense, Miss Nihilux! Just spill the beans, pretty please?
说出来怕你们不信，我有几位朋友，他们一直在试图创造一种去中心化的数字货币来对抗公司的信用点体系。
You might not believe this, but I have some friends who've been trying to create a decentralized digital currency to fight against the IPC's credit system.
没错，这些人来自「游牧矿工」这个派系，他们发现了可以盗取博识尊算力「挖矿」的方法，正在挖掘一种总量有限的「博识币」。姐姐我已经拿全部身家重仓了这个项目！

That's right, these people are from the Nomadic Miners faction. They've discovered a way to hijack Nous' computing power for mining and are digging up a limited supply of Learned Coins. And I have gone all-in with everything I got on this project!
总觉得…这种行为的风险不小。
I feel like... this is a very risky way of doing things.
哈哈，人生嘛，起起落落是常事。风险越高，收益越大！
Haha, life's full of ups and downs, right? The higher the risk, the bigger the reward!
哎，等等…这，这不对吧！这不是帕姆吗？！
Hey, wait... This, this isn't right! Isn't this Pom-Pom!?
Oh wow, that's some really fine craftsmanship.
这是「合金帕姆王」的玩具模型，目前尚未正式投放市场销售。这不算什么，之后各位还会见到更酷炫的玩具呢。
This is a toy model of Alloy King Pom-Pom, which hasn't been officially released to the market yet. But just you wait, you'll see even cooler toys coming up later.
这东西的版权，真的没有问题吗？!
Are you sure there's no copyright issue with this thing!?
嗯…其实嘛，这是《苍天航路绒绒号》的帕姆，和星穹列车的帕姆无关。
Uh... actually, this is Pom-Pom from Fluffy Across the Blue, which is totally unrelated to the Pom-Pom from Astral Express.
帕姆王和帕姆还是不一样的，跨作品比较的行为不可取啊。
King Pom-Pom and Pom-Pom are different characters. You really shouldn't be making cross-franchise comparisons!
Copyright stuff is really complicated, huh...
没错，世界上最复杂的事情之一，就是知识产权问题了。
You got that right. Intellectual property is one of the most complicated things in the world.
有全宇宙最强的法务团队服务呢，相信一切版权问题都不成问题——除非公司想让它成为问题。
With the best legal team in the universe at our service, I'm sure all copyright issues will be a breeze, unless the IPC wants them to be an issue.
Why is it called King Pom-Pom?
作为列车长，它也算是星穹列车的无冕之王了，对吧？总不能叫他王帕姆吧。
As the conductor, Pom-Pom is basically the uncrowned king of the Astral Express, I'd say? We can't exactly call them Pom-Pom Kong, can we?
唔，要说送给列车的纪念品，恐怕没什么能比这款玩具更合适的了！
Hmm, speaking of souvenirs for the Express, I bet nothing could be more perfect than this toy!
不过，单单送出个礼物，似乎缺了那么点意思。
But if it feels a bit one-sided if I'm the only one giving a gift here
我有个不情之请：我想请{NICKNAME}去那边的无头机铠雕像同我合个影，再为照片签个名，作为给珠星的员工们留下的纪念品，如何？

I have a small favor to ask: {NICKNAME}, would you mind taking a photo with me by that headless mechatron statue over there? And maybe signing the photo too? I'd love to leave it as a memento for the staff at Pearluxe Corp. How's that sound?
要是你愿意的话，我可以动用我手头的权限，把还未面世的「帕姆王-合金武装<unbreak>999</unbreak>」镀金开模原型送给各位——全宇宙仅此一台，考虑一下，{NICKNAME}亲！

If you're willing, I can pull a few strings and use my access privileges to give you all the gold-plated prototype of the yet-to-be-released "King Pom-Pom: Alloy Armor <unbreak>999</unbreak>," the only one in the entire universe. Just give it a thought, {NICKNAME}!
全宇宙仅此一件的纪念品，列车长一定喜欢！
A one-of-a-kind souvenir in the entire universe, our conductor will definitely love it!
As expected of a P<unbreak>30</unbreak> agent!
哪儿的话，星穹列车的英雄们驾临此处，若不送出点好东西，又怎么能配得上各位的身份。
It's nothing, really. When heroes from the Astral Express grace our humble establishment, how could we not offer something special? It would be unworthy of your status otherwise.
一尊珠星机铠主题的合影雕塑。你可以来到雕塑背后，将自己伟大的脸摆放在合适的位置上…再调整好合适的相机视角，看上去就像你是机铠战士一样。

A Pearluxe-Corp-themed sculpture for taking group photos. You can go behind the sculpture and place your amazing face in an appropriate spot... Adjust the camera to a suitable angle, and you'll look like a mechatron warrior.
简直是人机一体，准备好拍照了吗？
Man and mechatron in perfect harmony! Ready to take a photo?
噫嘻嘻，好喜欢这张照片！突然生出私心，想要把它私藏起来了。
Hehehe, I love this one so much! I suddenly have this selfish urge to keep it all to myself.
但说好的独家礼物你可不能忘喔！
And don't forget about that exclusive gift you promised!
没问题，不仅如此，我还可以每人送一套普通版作为封口费！走，去收银区结账吧。
You bet! In fact, I'll throw in a normal edition for each one of you as hush money! Come on, let's head to checkout.
How are you doing? It's my pleasure to serve you.
我想给这三位到访的星穹列车的贵客一人送出一套「合金帕姆王」模玩作为礼物。
I'd like to present each of our three distinguished guests from the Astral Express with an "Alloy King Pom-Pom" toy model as a gift.
好的，没问题。礼品记账的话，能麻烦您报一下工号吗？
Sure, you got it. For the gift expense record, could you please provide your employee ID?
相关消费请帮我记在这个工号名下。
Please charge these expenses to this employee ID.
诶，这是…真珠女士的工号？！
Huh, this is... Madam Pearl's ID number!?
毕竟，几位可是由真珠女士请来的贵客啊，礼物当然要以她的名义送出才够尊贵嘛。
After all, you are esteemed guests invited by Madam Pearl herself. It would only be fitting for the gifts to be presented in her name.
I see, please wait a moment.
您的「合金帕姆王」打包好了，请问您是现在带走，还是使用寄送服务？
Your "Alloy King Pom-Pom" is all packed up. Would you like to take it with you, or shall we use our delivery service?
接下来我们还有参观流程，就麻烦你们直接寄送到星穹列车上吧。
Since we still have the tour to go through, please just have it delivered to the Astral Express.
没问题，也祝列车的几位贵客参观愉快。
No problem! Hope you enjoy your visit here!
不，你就是那个——浣熊前辈！啊…也不对，你是星穹列车的{NICKNAME}！嗷嗷！还有三月兔小姐本人也来了吗？
No way, you're... {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} Raccoon! Ah... no, that's not right, you're {NICKNAME} from the Astral Express! Wow! And is Miss March Bunny herself here too?
…你好，我还是更喜欢别人叫我本名三月七。这位是瓦尔特•杨先生。
...Hi, I actually prefer to be called by my real name, March 7th. This is Mr. Yang.
一次遇见了三位列车组乘员，好幸运啊！我是大家的粉丝，尤其是{NICKNAME}前辈！《苍天航路绒绒号》每一期我都没错过，典藏本也都买了！

How lucky to meet three members of the Express Crew at once! I'm a huge fan of you all, especially my senior {NICKNAME}! I haven't missed a single episode of Fluffy Across the Blue, and I've even bought all the collector's editions!
可恶，居然当着本姑娘的面说更喜欢{NICKNAME}…还好咱没那么小心眼。
How could this guy say he likes {NICKNAME} more than me to my face... Good thing I'm not that petty.
放宽心，小三月。很难说这个世界的人喜爱的究竟是真正的列车组，还是绒绒号里的小动物列车组。
Don't worry, March. It's hard to tell if people in this world love the real Express Crew, or just the cute animal crew from The Fluffy.
我可不止追绒绒号的连载，各位在贝城、仙舟、匹诺康尼，还有翁法罗斯的冒险新闻，我一直都有关注！可惜，翁法罗斯之战的视频资源网上实在太少了。

I don't just follow The Fluffy series! I've been keeping tabs on all your adventures in Belobog, the Xianzhou, Penacony, and Amphoreus! Though it's such a shame there's so little video footage of the Amphorean War online.
对了，我昨天还重温了前辈在《圣杯/今晚留下来》再度踏上开拓之旅的情节！呜呜，前辈的发言真是太励志啦！
Oh right, I just rewatched the scene where the Trailblazer embarked on another trailblazing expedition in Holy Grail/stay night! Your speech was so inspiring!
快别说了，怪不好意思的。
Aw, stop it, you're making me blush.
能走到现在，是大家的功劳！
I couldn't have made it this far without some team effort!
身为传奇英雄竟然还这么谦逊，不愧是吾辈的表率！
Such modesty from a legendary hero. What a stellar role model for all of us!
对了，我家里还珍藏着一个垃圾桶，早知道今天能遇见{NICKNAME}前辈，我就该把那个桶带上的。
Oh right, I have a precious trashcan in my collection at home. If I'd've known I'd meet my senior {NICKNAME} today, I'd have brought that can with me.
我能冒昧地要个签名吗？…就、就请签在衣服上吧，这件衣服我打算一辈子都不洗了！
Could I ask for your autograph, if that's okay with you? J-just sign my clothes, please! I'm never gonna wash this ever again!
哈哈，小朋友这个样子和十分钟前的我简直一模一样。
Haha, you're acting exactly like me from ten minutes ago, kid.
别担心，{NICKNAME}是不会立刻飞走的。倒是你，噼里啪啦讲了半天，来个自我介绍，让你的偶像{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}了解你一下吧。
Don't worry, {NICKNAME} won't fly away just yet. As for you, you've been chattering away nonstop... How about giving us a proper introduction so that your idol gets to know you better.
Sorry! I got way too excited!
我是《破晓战队》里的灰烬战士，本名…本名不重要，你们叫我「灰烬」就好！
I'm Warrior Cinderborne from Daybreak Squadron, and my real name... well, my real name doesn't matter. Just call me Cinderborne!
几位要是不着急的话，可以和我再聊几句吗？
If you're not in a hurry, would you mind chatting with me for a bit?
我其实不太了解破晓战队…
I actually don't know much about Daybreak Squadron...
《破晓战队》是满愿电视台超级英雄剧「机铠战士系列」中人气最高的一作，讲述与机铠们合体作战的少年少女们，对抗黑暗之蛇，拯救二相乐园的故事。

Daybreak Squadron is the most popular superhero drama in Fulwish TV's Mechatron Warrior Series, following the story of young heroes fighting alongside mechatrons against the Shadow Slither to save Planarcadia.
真没想到…杨先生对咱们的故事背景这么熟悉！
I never expected... Mr. Yang to be so familiar with our story's background!
毕竟，我也是你们的忠实观众啊。
After all, I'm a loyal fan of your show.
So what do you usually get up to around here?
我只是个小演员，在电视剧里扮演着英雄。就像{NICKNAME}前辈的事迹鼓舞着我一样，破晓战队也在努力鼓舞大家，对抗生活中的一切困难！
I'm just a small-time actor, playing a hero on TV. And like how my senior {NICKNAME}'s deeds inspired me, Daybreak Squadron has also motivated people to fight against all challenges in real life!
最近，满愿电视台向「异常防御部」提交的申请得到了许可，剧里的「魔动机铠•破晓战士」可以在现世中行动了。我和几个朋友很荣幸能和真正的疾锋龙一起战斗！

Recently, Fulwish TV got approval from the Department of Aberration Defense, so now the "Magico Mechatron: Daybreak Warriors" from the show can operate in reality. My friends and I are just honored to fight alongside the real Bullet Wyrm!
抱歉，我没听明白，所以，你还是不是演员？
Sorry, I didn't quite understand that. So, are you still an actor or not?
该怎么说呢，我和战队的伙伴们既是演员，也是真正的蒙面英雄！一旦城市发生灾害，邪恶威胁市民时，我们会和机铠战士一起出现，保护大家的！

How should I put this... My teammates and I are both actors AND real masked heroes! Whenever disaster strikes the city or evil threatens citizens, we show up alongside mechatron warriors to protect everyone!
What brings you to Pearluxe Corp today?
我今天来是为测试机铠性能，顺便参加一些广告拍摄的工作。
I'm here today to test a mechatron's performance and do some advertising shoots while I'm at it.
满愿电视台和咱们一直都有合作，战队变身使用的也是由珠星财团幻造的机铠。
Fulwish TV and Pearluxe Corp have always been partners. Even the squad's transformation mechatron is imagenated by Pearluxe Corp.
《破晓战队》的剧集越受欢迎，给予机铠的愿力就越多，也会让战队在现实中大放异彩。而他们的战队越是活跃，珠星的模玩自然就卖得越好——真是完美的良性闭环！

The more popular Daybreak Squadron's drama becomes, the more Wishpower flows into the mechatrons, making the squad shine even brighter in reality. And the more active they are, the better Pearluxe Corp's model kits sell. It's a perfect virtuous cycle!
我们该继续参观流程了吧？
Shouldn't we continue with the tour now?
占用了几位宝贵的时间闲聊，真是抱歉！
Sorry for taking up your precious time with all this chit-chat!
如果列车组还没有参观战斗测试区——我想毛遂自荐成为{NICKNAME}前辈战斗测试的对手，不知您意下如何？
If the Crew hasn't visited the combat testing area yet, I'd like to volunteer myself as my senior {NICKNAME}'s opponent for the test, if that's alright with you?
不会对这儿造成破坏吗？
Wouldn't it cause damage to the place?
我当然知道前辈的球棒一击就能把咱们全都打飞。这一次，是想请您体验机铠同步战斗！
Of course I know your bat could send us all flying with a single hit. This time, we'd like to invite you to experience synchronized mechatron combat!
星穹列车的大英雄能有幸指点我们，留下一些数据，这里的工作人员一定会很高兴的！
The hero of the Astral Express gracing us with guidance and leaving some data would surely make the staff here very happy!
哎呀，真是赶巧，战斗测试区也在今天的参观环节里。
Oh, what perfect timing! The combat testing area is also part of today's tour.
哈哈，{NICKNAME}，这就是名气的重量，可不要让仰望你的后辈失望啊。
Haha, {NICKNAME}, that's the weight of fame for ya! Don't let down those kids who look up to you.
唉，真拿可爱的后辈没办法。
Honestly, that's my weakness, I can't allow myself to let adorable kids down.
<color=#dbc291ff>我先让各位操作大厅里那座机铠的装配流程……</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>First have everyone take part in the assembly process for the mechatron in the control room...</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>然后以这座机铠为模板，为{NICKNAME}生产一台小型机，让{F#她}{M#他}体验一下战斗测试项目。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Then, using this mechatron as a template, we'll build a smaller unit for {NICKNAME} so {M#he}{F#she} can try out the combat test program.</color>
这里是珠星的机铠幻造设计室。
This is Pearluxe Corp's Mechatron Imagenesis Design Lab.
距今十五年前，二相乐园的第一批机铠于此地诞生，一经面世便立刻赢得了广泛的社会影响力。
Fifteen years ago, the first mechatrons of Planarcadia were born here, and they immediately gained widespread social influence upon their debut.
现如今，机铠已经成为了大街小巷最常见、最具代表性的符号。
Today, mechatrons have become the most common and iconic symbol throughout the streets.
可以说，机铠是第一个，也是目前唯一能被流水线量产的幻造种。
You could say that mechatrons are the first, and currently only, imagenae that can be mass-produced on assembly lines.
二相乐园需要这么多机铠吗？
Does Planarcadia really need that many mechatrons?
像机铠这样可以随心所欲生产、停产的幻造种，简直是再理想不过的二相乐园居民了——也许，也是再理想不过的公司雇员了。
Imagenae such as mechatrons, which can be produced and discontinued at will, are the perfect residents for Planarcadia, and perhaps, the perfect IPC employees too.
在某些人看来，要是能制造出一支无穷无尽的机铠大军那可就更好了。
In some people's eyes, being able to create an infinite army of mechatrons would be even better.
唔，珠星财团确实促进了二相乐园幻造种向现代化转变。
Hmm, Pearluxe Corp has indeed driven the modernization of imagenae in Planarcadia.
说不定未来还会有更加奇特的幻造种被创造出来呢。
Who knows, maybe even stranger imagenae will be created in the future!
不知道各位客人是否了解，要想在二相乐园创生幻造种，第一步要做些什么？
Say, dear guests, do you know what the first step is to creating an imagenae in Planarcadia?
不愧是无名客，对自己踏足世界的风土人情很了解嘛。
As expected of the Nameless, you're quite knowledgeable about the customs and culture of the world you've set foot in.
…很遗憾，祂不在服务区。是绘制形体啦……
Sorry, but THEY're out of the service area right now. Actually, it's about drawing the physical form...
向异常防御部递交申请…
Submitting an application to the Department of Aberration Defense?
…某种意义上说，这个答案倒也不能算错。
...Well, in a way, that answer isn't exactly wrong.
但就像人类立法也管不住刮风下雨一样，平均每年有二十二万例未经许可的非法幻造种在人类有意无意的创造下来到世上，「异常防御部」也只能睁一只眼闭一只眼。

But just like how human laws can't control wind and rain, an average of <unbreak>220,000</unbreak> unauthorized imagenae come into existence each year through humanity's intentional or unintentional creation, and the Department of Aberration Defense can only turn a blind eye.
「绘制形体」，意味着人类以画笔将虚构之物绘画成形。这原本是绘师的专业领域。
Drawing the physical form means humans using brushes to give shape to fictional beings, which was originally the domain of professional artists.
但在这儿，集体创作、统一规格的机铠设计图取代了传统作画，提高了标准化工作效率，减少了愿力资源浪费——总之，这就是大家追求的「工业化冲击」。

But here, collective creation and standardized mechatron blueprints have replaced traditional artwork, improving standardized workflow efficiency and reducing Wishpower resource waste. In short, this is THE industrial revolution everyone's been chasing.
连幻造这样像魔法一样的技艺…居然也能工业化。我突然有些佩服公司了。
To think that even imagenesis, a skill as magical as this... could be industrialized. I'm suddenly starting to admire the IPC.
这不算什么！本公司志在于乐园历<unbreak>2030</unbreak>年到来之前，创造<unbreak>20</unbreak>亿投入社会生产与服务的机铠——其中还包含了像破晓战队那样具有战斗能力的特殊机铠。

That's nothing! Our company aims to create 2 billion mechatrons for social production and public services before Arcadian Calendar <unbreak>2030</unbreak>, and that includes special combat mechatrons like the Daybreak Squadron!
真是个惊人的数字，但人们的愿力真的能支撑这样规模的幻造种数量吗？
That's a staggering number, but can the Wishpower of the people here really sustain so many imagenae?
所以珠星才会制作一部又一部的动画和英雄片啊。在其他世界，这些不过是消遣之物，但在这里，它可是货真价实的精神能量的培养基。
That's why Pearluxe Corp keeps churning out animations and hero shows one after another. In other places, these are just entertainment, but here, they're legit breeding grounds for spiritual energy.
这一切都将服务于真珠女士的远大目标和理想！
All of this shall serve Madam Pearl's grand goals and ideals!
好了，回到话题的原点，第一步，让我们先去打印「机铠结构设计图」吧。
Alright, back to square one. First step, let's go print the mechatron structure blueprint.
请根据您的设计需要，调整机铠设计参数。
Please adjust the mechatron design parameters according to your needs.
假装调整参数，最后恢复默认。
Pretend to adjust the parameters, then restore to default.
打开预设参数，认真挑选一组。
Open the preset parameters and carefully pick a set.
坚持仔细调整每个参数到满意…
Keep fine-tuning each parameter until satisfied...
机铠装配设计图已更新，处理中……
在生成图纸的间歇，你突然意识到，这是个体验项目。
While waiting for the blueprint to generate, it suddenly hits you: This is just a trial project.
难道说，不管我怎么调整，最终打印出来的结果都是一模一样的？
Could it be that no matter how much I adjust it, the final printout always comes out exactly the same?
你的怀疑，很有道理…不过请先回答我的问题，对于你来说，你是更喜欢「付出努力收获的成就感」，还是「轻松完成的便捷感」？
Your suspicion makes sense... But please answer my question first: Which do you prefer, the sense of achievement that comes from hard work, or the convenience of getting things done easily?
The sense of achievement that comes from hard work.
The convenience of getting things done easily.
那就对了，全自动化的幻造蓝图设计系统完美适配你的要求——你可以精心设置每一个参数，也可以一键跳过，到最后自动化系统总会产出符合标准的成果。

You got that right! The fully automated imagenesis blueprint design system perfectly matches your needs. You can meticulously adjust every parameter, or just hit one button to skip it all, and the automated system will always produce results that meet the standards.
很伟大吧！就像当年螺丝星的发明家们总会问自己的：如果自己造出的一切成果已经在「至上打孔带」中预先记录了，那么发明的意义何在？

Amazing, right? Just like how the inventors on Planet Screwllum used to ask themselves: If all their inventions were already pre-recorded in the Supreme Punch Tape, what's the point of inventing in the first place?
打印已完成，请取出图纸。
Printing complete. Please retrieve your blueprint.
你刚才的话就是答案，我们享受的并非创造结果，而是其中的「欢愉」。
What you just said is the answer: It's not about the results of creation, but the "Elation" we experience in the process.
您好，请出示您的「机铠装配设计图」。
Hello, please show me your mechatron assembly blueprint.
没问题，设计图已经录入。机铠的板件已经准备就绪，祝您体验愉快！
No problem, the blueprint has been recorded. The mechatron parts are ready to go. Hope you enjoy the experience!
Mr. Yang, you're not coming along?
不用啦，你还是带上杨叔吧！
Nah, you should take Mr. Yang with you instead!
不了不了，我和小三月在一旁看着你玩就好。
No, no, March and I will just watch you play from the side.
那么，接下来，请{NICKNAME}按照我的指引，完成机铠拼装。
Now then, {NICKNAME}, please follow my guidance to complete the mechatron assembly.
本次体验主要包括三块板件的拼装——手臂、肩甲，以及机铠背后的破晓战刃。
This experience mainly involves assembling three parts: The arm, the shoulder armor, and the Daybreak Blade on the back of the mechatron.
去吧！{NICKNAME}，拼装「魔动机铠•破晓战士」，拯救我们的城市！
Go for it, {NICKNAME}! Assemble the "Magico Mechatron: Daybreak Warriors" and save our city!
去吧，我和小三月在一旁看着你玩就好。
Go ahead. March and I will watch you play from the side.
快去吧，你的小粉丝还等着你呢。
Go now. Your little fans are waiting for you.
大功告成，由你亲手完成的巨型机铠，从今天就将矗立在这座大厅的中央！
Mission accomplished! The colossal mechatron you built with your own hands will now stand proudly in the center of this hall!
星穹列车的大英雄亲临此处，留下设计图，并为机铠雕像的落成贡献了自己的灵感！——这对市场部门来说是多好的宣发物料！

The great hero of the Astral Express has graced this place, left behind a blueprint, and even contributed their own inspiration to the completion of the mechatron statue! What outstanding promotional material this is for the marketing department.
哼哼，新的英雄于此诞生。
Heh heh, a new hero is born right here.
进入其中吧！{NICKNAME}，成为二相乐园的守护者——！
Step forth, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, and become the Guardian of Planarcadia!
检测到强大愿力供应个体，即将启动对接——
Powerful Wishpower supply entity detected, initiating link...
装配完成了，接下来的环节，莫非是……？
Assembly complete. Could the next step be...?
Bingo！机铠装配结束，随之而来的当然是激动人心的战斗啦！
That's right! With the completion of mechatron assembly, it's time for some heart-pounding combat!
你的小迷弟灰烬可是满心期盼你能给他们一点指点呢！
Your little fanboy, Cinderborne, is eagerly awaiting some pointers from you!
虽然没法驱动这座大家伙，但我打印了一台小型机体。接下来，该让你体验一下机铠是如何战斗的了。
While we can't power up this big guy, I've printed a small unit. Now, it's time to show you how a mechatron fights.
我…和机铠合为一体了？这…又是哪里啊？
I... merged with the mechatron? Where... where am I now?
当然是——战斗测试沙盒啦！
Why of course, it's the Combat Testing Sandbox!
朝着我们走来的，可是星穹列车大名鼎鼎的开拓者{NICKNAME}？
Could it be the one and only Trailblazer {NICKNAME} of the Astral Express walking towards us?
正是，请叫我「银河球棒侠」。
That's right, please call me Galactic Baseballer.
银河球棒侠，我们一直在期待你的到来！
Galactic Baseballer, we've been expecting you!
我去，对面这是什么造型？
Whoa, what's with that crazy getup over there?
这就是我们破晓战队的机铠，帅吧！
This is Daybreak Squadron's mechatron. Pretty cool, huh?
我都变这样了，你也能认出我？
You can still recognize me in this form?
当然了，毕竟你可是我们心目中的前辈啊！
You bet! After all, you're our beloved hero!
尽管二维市的巨影危机已经被解除，但是属于你和破晓战队的战斗才刚刚开始。
Although the giant shadow crisis in Duomension City has been dispelled, the real battle for you and the Daybreak Squadron is only just beginning.
…作为新旧两代超级英雄，你们将在这里分出高下！
...As the old and new generations of superheroes, you will face off here to determine the victor!
烈火铸魂！燃尽晦暗！燎原的恒星，赤焰战士！
Forged by raging fire! Burn away the darkness! The star that sets the world ablaze—Blazeweaver!
划破长空！翼展如电！碧蓝的苍穹，苍翼战士！
Slice through the skies! Wings of lightning! From the blue heavens descend—Azurewing!
驱散永夜！光芒如炬！辉耀的祈愿，曙光战士！
Shatter the eternal night! Light blazing bright! The radiant vow of hope—Dawnlance!
斩破绝望！锋锐如钢！不灭的利刃，灰烬战士！——前辈，加油！
Cut through despair! Unyielding blade of steel! Edge that never fades—Cinderborne! You can do it, friend!
暗夜终尽，黎明降临！破晓战队，登场！
Darkness wanes, and dawn awakens! The Daybreak Squadron arises!
破晓战队！这也太帅了吧！
Daybreak Squadron! That was so cool!
等等，现在是什么剧情了？
Hold on, where are we in the story now?
尬到抠脚！这是什么情况？
This is so cringe! What's going on?
这是一次来自破晓战队的正式挑战！星穹列车的大英雄！
This is an official challenge from the Daybreak Squadron, great hero of the Astral Express!
{NICKNAME}，如果我们战胜了你，希望你能接受我们的邀请，成为<color=#dbc291ff>「破晓战队的名誉幻之第五人」</color>，一起守护二相乐园的和平！

{NICKNAME}, if we defeat you, we hope you'll accept our invitation to become the <color=#dbc291ff>"Honorary Phantom Fifth Member of the Daybreak Squadron"</color> and help us safeguard the peace of Planarcadia!
别吧，我还想继续开拓呢…
Nah, I still want to continue Trailblazing...
他是灰色，我用什么颜色呢？
He's already gray. So, what other color can I use?
粉色、绿色、黑色…我们还有很多颜色，你可以指定任意RGB值！
Pink, Green... we've got tons of colors, you can set any RGB value you want!
对了小灰，你不是还有话想和前辈说吗？现在就是最好的机会了！
Hey Gray, didn't you have something to tell your hero? Now's your perfect chance!
{NICKNAME}前辈，你知道吗？每次机铠变身时，我都会想象自己就是你，我会想象你在遇到危难时会怎么做；是你的冒险故事给了我力量……

My friend, {NICKNAME}, you know what? Every time I transform into a mechatron, I imagine I'm you. I think about what you would do when facing danger. It is your adventure stories that give me strength...
接下来我会全力以赴，也请您不要手下留情！
So I'll give it my all from now on. Please don't hold back!
Cut the chatter. Let's get to it!
就让我给你一些指点吧！
In that case, let me give you some pointers!
在幻月升起的地平线上一决胜负吧。
Let's settle this on the horizon where the Phantasmoon rises.
You really got into character! {NICKNAME}, that was some great acting!
诶…刚才我们是在摄影棚里战斗吗？！
Eh... Were we just fighting in a film studio?
哈哈，你该不会以为自己在真正的城市里和他们交手吧？那可不成，真珠女士的保险基金可是要赔到破产的！
Haha, don't tell me you actually thought you were fighting them in a real city? That ain't gonna happen. Madam Pearl's insurance fund would collapse!
真真假假都不重要，重要的是你的体验——你，有没有玩得很开心？
It doesn't matter if it was a real fight or a fake one. What matters is your experience: Did you have fun?
Heck yeah, I wish I could go for another round.
用户反馈了五星好评。感谢亲的好评，您的满意和肯定是我们最大的动力！
The user gave us a five-star review. Thank you for your kind feedback! Your satisfaction and approval are our greatest motivators!
呃…总之默认用户反馈五星好评。希望下次还能为您服务。
Uh... anyway, I'll just take it as a default 5-star review. Hope to serve you again next time.
...How could you just automatically give it a positive rating?
破晓战队的人好像在等你，看来你给他们好好上了一堂战斗课啊。去给这些后辈讲几句吧？
Looks like the Daybreak Squadron is waiting for you. You gave them quite a combat lesson, it appears! Why don't you go share a few words with those youngsters?
不愧是{NICKNAME}前辈，真是太帅了！呜呜呜，感觉我这辈子都值了……
As expected of my senior {NICKNAME}, that was awesome! My life is now complete...
在加入破晓战队之前，小灰可一直都是你的粉丝。
Before joining Daybreak Squadron, Gray had always been your fan.
这小子对星穹列车的故事如数家珍，总是将你视作榜样…就算是作为队长的我，在他的心中也远不及你。

That kid knows every story about the Astral Express like the back of his hand, and he's always looked up to you as his role model... Even as his leader, I'm nowhere near as important to him as you are.
真是一场精彩的战斗！哎，比起战胜你，我们更希望小灰能给你留下深刻印象。
What an amazing battle! Well, more than beating you, we were hoping Gray would leave a lasting impression on you.
毕竟对于一位粉丝来说，被偶像记在心里才是最高的赞赏，不是吗？
After all, being remembered by their idol is the highest form of praise for a fan, isn't it?
你们战队的关系真好啊。
Your team really gets along well.
当然的，除了{NICKNAME}前辈，破晓战队的哥哥姐姐们就是我最信任的人了。
Oh, you bet! Besides my senior {NICKNAME}, my teammates in the Daybreak Squadron are the ones I trust the most.
我会记住今天这场战斗的。
I will remember this battle today.
能在{NICKNAME}前辈的心中留下一个「灰烬战士」的名字，我就已经很满足了。
I'm already satisfied just knowing that the name Cinderborne will remain in my senior {NICKNAME}'s memory.
可惜啊，如果{NICKNAME}真的能成为我们小队的第五人，我们的知名度还会进一步上升…毕竟还有很多人认为我们只是在「扮演英雄」。
It's a shame though... if {NICKNAME} could really become the fifth member of our team, our recognition would rise even further... after all, many people still think we're just playing hero.
那是因为我们还没做出什么像样的壮举嘛……
That's only because we haven't done anything truly heroic yet...
不必担心，以二维市的状况，迟早会出现炸翻天的大危机——那时候就有我们大展身手的用武之地啦！哈哈。
Don't worry! Given the state of Duomension City, a mind-blowing crisis is bound to happen sooner or later. And that's when we'll get our chance to shine! Haha.
是啊，我昨天刚从一场瓦斯爆炸事故里救了五个人，希望他们快点养好伤，好好宣传一下破晓战队的神勇。
Yeah, just yesterday I rescued five people from a gas explosion. Hope they recover soon and spread the word about how awesome Daybreak Squadron is!
你们又在若无其事说些怪话了！
There you go again, casually saying the strangest things!
要像星穹列车那样，不要为证明什么而行动，只要在自己的道路上一直走下去就好。迟早有一天，破晓战队会得到所有人的认可！
Like the Astral Express, we don't need to act to prove something so long as we stay true to our own path. Sooner or later, Daybreak Squadron will be recognized by everyone!
哈哈，你这个笨蛋，脑子里只有星穹列车吗？要不你干脆去星穹列车当个无名客吧！
Haha, silly you! Is the Astral Express all you ever think about? Why don't you just go join the Express as one of the Nameless!
你就别拿我开玩笑了，队长！我还是个不成熟的家伙，怎么有资格登上列车和前辈并肩作战呢？
Come on, don't make fun of me! I'm still just a rookie. How could I possibly be worthy of boarding the Express and fighting alongside seasoned veterans?
只要坚持在自己的道路上…
So long as you stay true to your own path...
你们都是了不起的英雄。
You guys are all remarkable heroes.
每个在自己的生命里坚持下去的人，都是英雄！
Anyone who perseveres in their own life is a hero indeed!
最后，我想拜托您和我们大家合照！
And lastly, I wonder if you could take a picture with the rest of us?
哈哈哈哈，既然如此，开拓者{NICKNAME}，请和我们一起合个影吧！
Hahaha, Trailblazer {NICKNAME}, please take a photo together with us!
时间差不多了，接下来该去和真珠女士会面了。
Time's about up. We should meet with Madam Pearl now.
对了，在走之前要不要和你的迷弟告别一下？
Oh right, wanna say goodbye to your big fan before we go?
阿蓝，阿黄，你们刚才的表现真是不错。录下来作为宣传素材，一定能涨不少粉丝！
Blue, Yellow, you guys were amazing back there. If we record this for promo material, we'll definitely get a ton of new followers!
嘿嘿，要是咱们几个能打败无名客就好了…机铠大战的时候，其实就差那么一点点。
Hehe, if only we could've beaten the Nameless... We were actually so close during that mechatron fight.
说什么啊，咱们怎么可能打赢{NICKNAME}前辈啊！
What are you talking about? There's no way we could've beaten {NICKNAME}!
其实…也不是完全不可能，对吧？自从接受了转变，我感觉自己的头脑也好、身体也罢，一下子就变得轻快多了！小灰，你真的应该和我们一样……
Well... It's not entirely impossible, I'd say. Ever since I converted, I feel like both my mind and body have become so much lighter! Gray, you really should join us and do the same...
哈哈，小灰，作为蒙面英雄就是要面对各种危险的。如果在我们最需要你的时候，你却无法为这支队伍贡献自己的力量，你一定也会感到难过的吧！
Haha, Gray, being a masked hero means facing all kinds of dangers. You'd definitely feel pretty bad if you couldn't contribute your strength to the team when we needed you the most!
啊，你的偶像来看你了。咱们几个就不在这碍事了。后台等你哦，小灰。
Oh, looks like your idol's here to see you. We'll wait for you backstage, Gray.
我？我没事，我好的很，不愧是前辈，轻松就打倒了我们。
Me? I'm fine, totally fine. It was no surprise that you took us down without breaking a sweat.
Sorry, I didn't go easy on you just now.
哎？怎么突然道歉起来了。没事的。不愧是前辈啊，轻松就打倒了我们几个。
Huh? Why the sudden apology? It's fine. It was no surprise that you took us down without breaking a sweat.
是我，太软弱了啊…不管战斗也好，处世也好，都犹豫不决。虽然我知道自己不可能成为像{NICKNAME}那样了不起的英雄，但我一直也在努力向着你的形象靠近。

It's me... I'm just too weak... I'm always hesitant, whether in combat or dealing with life. Even though I know I can never become an amazing hero like you, {NICKNAME}, I've always been trying my best to get closer to being like you.
不怕你笑话，从小没有谁教过我做人做事的原则。高中没读多久，就跟着街头的大哥混在一起。每次挥拳威胁别人时，还以为自己很有英雄气概。

It's a bit embarrassing to admit, but no one ever taught me the principles of how to live and behave growing up. I dropped out of high school pretty early and started hanging out with street gangs. Every time I threw a punch to intimidate someone, I thought I was being a hero.
只是，看到那些人害怕的样子，又隐隐觉得我是不是做错了。
But when I saw how scared those people were, I had this nagging feeling that maybe I was doing something wrong.
后来我在网上看到星穹列车的故事…了解了{NICKNAME}前辈的传奇，我才意识到什么是真正的英雄。一想到过去的自己多么…幼稚、混蛋，我就下定决心脱离了原来的团体。

Later, when I read about the Astral Express story online... and learned about your legendary deeds, {NICKNAME}, I finally understood what it meant to be a true hero. Looking back at how... immature and awful I was, I made up my mind to leave my old organization.
现在，我也有了和前辈一样可以成为英雄的机会——我和破晓战队的哥哥姐姐一起，能为二相乐园的居民带去幸福的笑容，也可以在有危险出现时守护他们……

Now, I too have a chance to become a hero like you. Together with my brothers and sisters in the Daybreak Squadron, I can bring happy smiles to residents of Planarcadia and protect them whenever danger appears...
但我…实在太弱小了。我没有列车无名客那样强大的力量，甚至没什么特别的长处…我也许走上了一条不太合适自己的路啊。
But I'm... just too weak. I don't have the immense strength like the Express Nameless, I don't even have any special talents... Maybe I've chosen a path that doesn't really work for me.
想为别人而战就是长处。
The desire to fight for others is a strength in itself.
我不想说些人定胜天的话来敷衍你。但我觉得，善良是无法靠后天获得的能力，力量却可以……
I don't want to give you empty platitudes about humans triumphing over fate. But I do believe that while kindness isn't something you can learn, strength is something you can acquire...
你想为你身边的人战斗，想给别人带去笑容的心意，就是你最大的长处。
Your desire to fight for those around you, and your wish to bring smiles to others... that's your greatest strength.
无名客的长处并非力量。
Strength isn't the Nameless' strong suit.
笨蛋，这个银河里有太多拥有力量的人，但不是每一个拥有力量的人都会选择成为无名客。
Silly you, there are plenty of powerful ones in this cosmos, but not everyone with strength chooses to become a Nameless.
你想为你身边的人战斗，想给别人带去笑容的心意，这就是最好的开始。
Your desire to fight for those around you, and your wish to bring smiles to others... that's a good place to start.
谢谢你，前辈！谢谢你肯听我絮絮叨叨说这些。
Thank you, Trailblazer! Thanks for listening to my ramblings.
Let me give you my autograph.
C-Could you please sign that famous line...
May this journey lead us starward?
That one is not bad either.
嗯，因为先看到了星星，无名客才有了旅途。我觉得你眼中已经有了星星。
Yeah, it was the stars that first set the Nameless on their journey. And now I can see that same starlight in your eyes.
Rules are made to be broken!
That's the one! That's exactly it!
规则是一种边界，任何让自己超越边界的人，都是某种意义的无名客。
Rules are boundaries, and anyone who pushes beyond those boundaries becomes, in a sense, one of the Nameless.
我会用余生来记住今天的！再见前辈，希望下一次见面，我可以成为像您一样的真正的英雄。
I'll remember today for the rest of my life! Goodbye, Trailblazer. I hope by the next time we meet, I'll be a true hero just like you.
今天的参观流程到这儿也差不多了。这一路下来，不知你有何感想？
Well, that about wraps up today's tour. After seeing everything, what do you think?
Looks like I've got quite a few fans!
你才发现吗？这可是你加入幻月游戏的最大优势…一个已然广为流传的故事。
You're only realizing that now? That's your greatest advantage in joining the Phantasmoon Games... a story that's already spread far and wide.
珠星的影响力可真不小。
Pearluxe Corp's influence is truly something else.
嗯，比起管理这个世界的权力，那位大人更强大的力量来自珠星——这座企业所编织的故事和梦想，能左右二相乐园的未来，也将成为全新幻造种诞生的苗床。

Indeed. Rather than the power to rule this world directly, that individual draws even greater strength from Pearluxe. The stories and dreams spun by this enterprise are capable of steering the future of Planarcadia, and of serving as the cradle for new imagenae.
在这座大楼的顶部，真珠女士正在等待着你，磋商幻月游戏的事宜。
Madam Pearl is waiting for you at the top of this building to discuss matters regarding the Phantasmoon Games.
我想给你一些小小的提醒：幻月游戏的规则从未要求谒者间必须竞争。
Let me give you a little reminder: The rules of Phantasmoon Games have never required any competition between Supplicants.
What are you trying to say?
Hmm... you seem to be well-versed in this.
啊，作为这家公司的雇员，我说得实在太多了。你的小伙伴正在大厅等你，快去和他们集合吧，别让他们等太久了。
As an IPC employee, I've said far too much. Your friends are waiting for you in the hall. You should go meet up with them. Don't keep them waiting too long.
我和杨叔在屏幕上观看了全过程哦——
Mr. Yang and I watched the whole thing on the screen!
不止拼装了机铠，给自己的迷弟签了名，还过了一把超级英雄的瘾…{NICKNAME}，玩得开心吗？
Not only did you assemble the mechatron and give autographs to your fan, but you also got to live out your superhero fantasy... did you have fun, {NICKNAME}?
哈哈，杨叔看你的眼神也慈爱了起来，像是在看游乐园木马上的孩子一样。
Haha, Mr. Yang's looking at you with such loving eyes, like a parent watching a kid riding on a carousel at an amusement park.
确实，看着{NICKNAME}快乐的样子，我就想到了年轻时的自己，真令人怀念啊。
Indeed, seeing {NICKNAME} so happy reminds me of my younger self. Those were the days...
说什么呢，杨叔现在依然年轻！欸对了，咱们在这儿转悠了老半天，该看的也都看完了，这真珠女士到底打的是什么算盘？
What are you talking about? Mr. Yang, you're still young as ever! Oh right, we've been wandering around here for ages and seen everything there is to see. What's this Madam Pearl really up to?
她想向我们展示的一切我看明白了，只是，还有些问题我想和虚照小姐确认一下。
I understand everything she wanted to show us. There are just a few questions I'd like to confirm with Miss Nihilux.
...Miss Nihilux? Wait, where did she go?
啊，你们几位在这儿啊，我们俩可是到处找了个遍。秘书办公室派了这位菲尔德专员来陪同诸位打发等候的时光，但他却说没能接到几位……
Ah, there you all are! We've been looking everywhere for you. The secretary's office sent agent Feld here to keep you company while you wait, but he said he couldn't find any of you...
What? This guy's the assigned agent?
那刚才的虚照小姐又是谁？
Then who was that Miss Nihilux from earlier?
我就觉得…那女人很可疑。
Just as I thought... that woman seems pretty suspicious.
等等，如果这位菲尔德先生是派来迎接我们的人，那虚照小姐又是谁？
Wait, if Mr. Feld is the one who's supposed to meet us, then who is Miss Nihilux?
…IPC的职级P<unbreak>30</unbreak>，珠星财团的幻造技术研发部专员，虚照。
...agent Nihilux, an IPC ranking P<unbreak>30</unbreak>, who works at Pearluxe Corp's Imagenesis Technology Department.
P<unbreak>30</unbreak>？幻造技术研发部？珠星哪来什么幻造技术研发部呢……
P<unbreak>30</unbreak>? Imagenesis Technology Department? Since when did Pearluxe Corp have an Imagenesis Technology Department...
该不会是什么商业间谍混进了这栋楼里？
Could she be some kind of corporate spy who snuck into the building?
这下可真麻烦了，安保人员都是干什么吃的！几位，有没有受伤？又或者受骗交给她财物之类的东西？
This is a real mess. What are those security guards even doing!? Distinguished guests, are you hurt? Or did she trick you into giving her money or anything like that?
I can't believe she lied to me. I'm hurt.
Ah, I gave her an autographed photo.
果然，我早觉得她不对劲了…
Just as I thought, I knew something was off about her...
Why didn't you say so earlier?
这位姐姐看起来毫无破绽，很熟练地带我们在这儿转悠了一圈，我还以为她是你们派来的人呢。
This lady seemed totally legit. She smoothly guided us around the place like a pro. I thought she was one of your people!
我得赶快把这事上报给安保部门，趁着那家伙没走多远，抓她个现行。
I need to report this to security right away. She can't have gone far, let's catch her in the act.
那就拜托了。星穹列车的诸位，真珠女士已等候多时，方便的话不妨现在出发，我来为各位引路。
Thank you for your help. Astral Express crew, Madam Pearl has been waiting for quite some time. If it's convenient, shall we head out now? I'll show you the way.
星穹列车的诸位，你们好，又见面了。
Hello, guests from the Astral Express, nice to see you again.
感谢您的盛情款待，真珠女士。
Thank you for your gracious hospitality, Madam Pearl.
听闻在底楼大厅里发生了一桩小小的骗局，有人冒充珠星的员工接近各位。希望她没有打搅到你们的兴致。
I understand there was a minor incident in the lower lobby, involving someone impersonating a Pearluxe employee. I hope it didn't spoil your enjoyment.
我们没事啦。倒是您这边，没弄丢什么贵重技术和设计图之类的机密信息吧？
We're fine, don't worry about us. But how are things with you? Did you lose any valuable tech, blueprints, or top secret information?
不，珠星的数据防火墙无人染指，安保网络所监控的各项财产也安然无恙，只是我的工号名下增添了一笔报销账目。
No, Pearluxe's data firewall remains untouched, and all assets under security network surveillance are intact. The only change is an additional expense claim under my employee ID.
…罢了，可以初步判断：这是某人一时兴起的所为。
...Never mind, I can make a preliminary assessment that this was the result of someone's momentary impulse.
最近的意外多如豪雨前的浓云，将不可知的阴霾投在我的决策蓝图上。
Lately, mishaps have been piling up like dark clouds before a downpour, casting shadows of uncertainty over my plans.
Could you be referring to... the Herald of Death?
鸽川区有三十三位公民横死，一位前往负责洽谈收购「欢愉假面」的公司专员意外殉职。对方不仅明目张胆地威胁治安，同时也在向公司发起挑衅。我有预感：这不过是个开始。

Thirty-three citizens were found dead in the Dovebrook District. In addition, an IPC Specialist assigned to negotiate the purchase of a "Mask of Elation" died in an unexpected incident. This party has made overt threats to public order and is clearly challenging the IPC. My intuition tells me this is only the beginning.
管理企业和经营资本有一个共通点：厌恶风险，追求稳定。而我，身兼二者之任。
Managing capital and managing a corporation share one thing in common, that is, an aversion to risk and a pursuit of stability. And I bear both responsibilities.
作为二相乐园的执行官，我对这个世界的安全负有不可推脱的义务。
As the executive officer of Planarcadia, I bear an inescapable responsibility for the safety of this world.
作为石心十人，我希望迅速、安全地结束「幻月游戏」。
As one of the Ten Stonehearts, I hope to bring the Phantasmoon Games to a swift and safe conclusion.
比起再一次上演绘世学院里那场危险的战斗，<color=#dbc291ff>我更希望这一次的幻月游戏中，谒者们能向这个世界的居民展示喜乐而非哀怒的「奇迹」。</color>

Rather than staging another dangerous battle like what happened at Graphia Academy, <color=#dbc291ff>I hope the Supplicants can show the people of this world miracles of joy and happiness instead of sorrow and rage during the Phantasmoon Games.</color>
因此，我想听听列车的诉求。{NICKNAME}，请告诉我……
Therefore, I'd like to hear the Express's request. {NICKNAME}, please tell me...
你加入幻月游戏的最终目标是什么？
What's your ultimate goal for joining the Phantasmoon Games?
在出发前，你曾向姬子谈起幻月游戏的目标……
Before setting off, you spoke to Himeko about your goals for the Phantasmoon Games...
{NICKNAME}，你刚才说，想和我聊聊幻月游戏的事情？
{NICKNAME}, you mentioned earlier that you wanted to talk about the Phantasmoon Games with me?
About the goal of Phantasmoon Games.
嗯，想谈谈参与幻月游戏的最终目的。
Hmm, I'd like to talk about our ultimate goal for participating in the Phantasmoon Games.
我觉得「幻月游戏」的规则和奖赏，有些太模糊了。
