I think the rules and rewards for the Phantasmoon Games are a little too vague.
嗯。十五年前，我加入游戏时也是这么想的。这场游戏允许谒者做任何事，不论善恶，这也就意味着游戏推进过程中的一切都处于失控。

Hmm. That's exactly what I thought when I joined the games fifteen years ago. These games allow Supplicants to do anything, good or evil... As a result, everything that unfolds in the course of these games exists beyond control.
更模糊的是，胜利者分享「欢愉」权能时又能做成些什么？从哈托彼亚古来的传说与历史记录来看，胜者通常会先见到阿哈本尊示现。

What's more vague, is what can winners do when they share the power of "the Elation"? According to legends and historical records from Ahatopia, victors typically first witness the manifestation of Aha THEMSELVES.
祂会倾听胜出者的愿望，然后许可对方使用自己的权能。而这份力量的应用场景又似乎宽泛到漫无边际。当人的面前有无数选择时，情况比没有选择还要棘手。

THEY listen to the victor's wishes and grant them permission to use THEIR power. And the applications of this power seem to be boundlessly vast. When faced with countless choices, the situation becomes even more thorny than having no choice at all.
有时我在想，如果我们当时答应了翡翠成为「反毁灭同盟」的领袖，这趟旅行又会怎样……
Sometimes I wonder, if we had agreed to become the leader of the Anti-Destruction Alliance, how would this trip have turned out...
I want Aha to be the leader.
<color=#dbc291ff>如果胜利，我会放弃分享阿哈的权能，要求祂来当「反毁灭同盟」的领袖。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>If I win, I'll give up sharing Aha's power and ask THEM to be the leader of the Anti-Destruction Alliance.</color>
哈哈哈哈，这个想法真的很有趣，充满了画面感。
HAHAHA, that's such a hilarious idea. I can totally picture it!
嗯，我明白。这个点子实在很妙。
Hmm, I get it. That's actually a brilliant idea.
首先，这比接过神明的权柄，在一分钟内尽情挥霍有价值得多了。
To begin with, this is far more meaningful than taking up a god's authority and squandering it freely for a single minute.
其次，把一位星神放在对抗宇宙头号威胁的大义名分上，无论公司还是那位神明本尊恐怕都挑不出毛病。
Secondly, placing an Aeon on the righteous cause of opposing the universe's greatest threat is something neither the IPC nor the god itself could reasonably object to.
最后，这也可以避免我们目前所面临的风险：与公司合作，却要提防在「反毁灭同盟」运作的过程中卷入公司的野心。

Finally, this would also help us avoid the risk we currently face: cooperating with the IPC while remaining wary of being drawn into its ambitions during the operation of the "Anti-Destruction Alliance."
如果交涉得当，也许阿哈可以站在星穹列车的背后，就像我们和仙舟间的合作一样，互不干涉却能遥遥援助。

If we handle the negotiations well, perhaps Aha could stand behind the Astral Express, just like our cooperation with the Xianzhou, where we could maintain distance from one another while offering support from afar.
唯一的问题是：阿哈会同意吗？
The only question is: Will Aha agree?
别担心帕，以我对这家伙的了解，祂会同意的。
Don't worry about that. From what I know about THEM, THEY'll agree.
要是违背自己制定的游戏规则，又怎么能算得上游戏之神呢？何况，祂还欠着列车一笔债帕。
What kind of God of Games would THEY be if THEY broke THEIR own rules? Besides, THEY still owe the Express a debt.
这是祂与阿基维利一起旅行期间欠下的列车债务欠条，上面还有祂的签字画押呢！
This is THEIR IOU for the Express debt from when THEY were traveling with Akivili, complete with THEIR signature and seal!
{NICKNAME}乘客，用这个要挟祂，那家伙会同意你的请求的帕！
Passenger {NICKNAME}, use this to blackmail THEM! That one will definitely give in to your demands!
你是说，你想让阿哈担当起「反毁灭同盟」的领袖责任。
So you're saying you want Aha to take on the leadership of the Anti-Destruction Alliance.
理性推演：失败，无法计算其成功率。我差一点就被这个奇怪的方案卡住了思考进程。
Logical extrapolation: Failed. Success rate indeterminable. This peculiar proposal nearly brought my thought process to a halt.
这个诉求太过缺乏条理，虽然在非理性的背景下它似乎又潜藏着某种合理性——
This request is far too lacking in structure, yet within an irrational context it seems to conceal a certain kind of logic—
——如果宇宙是欢愉之主的游乐场，那么祂理应为这座即将被摧毁的游乐场做些什么。
...If the universe is the Master of Elation's playground, then THEY should do something about this playground that's about to be destroyed.
不愧是开拓之人，思维如此…跳脱。受教了，{NICKNAME}。
As expected of the Trailblazer, your thinking is so... out of the box. I've learned something today, {NICKNAME}.
不过我认为，你在这场游戏中的赢面并不高，因为……
However, I don't think you stand much of a chance in the games, because...
我已加入其中，成了谒者。
So, is this gonna be a boss fight?
幻月游戏中并没有哪条规则要求谒者间必须诉诸战斗。你我之间并无敌对的必要。
Not a single rule in the Phantasmoon Games requires Supplicants to engage in combat, so there's no need for hostility between us.
Can Intellitrons also become a Supplicant?
这是一个古老的问题：「智械是否拥有灵魂？」
This is an age-old question: "Do Intellitrons possess a soul?"
面具回应了我，这意味着「欢愉」认可了思考机器亦有寻求欢愉的潜力。我也许是幻月游戏有史以来第一位智械谒者。

The mask responded to me, which means the Elation has acknowledged that Intellitrons also have the potential to seek pleasure. And I am perhaps the first Intellitron Supplicant in the history of the Phantasmoon Games.
二相乐园的管理者…成了谒者？
同时她手中还握有珠星财团这样庞大的资产。
At the same time, she has at her disposal assets of staggering magnitude... Pearluxe Corp among them.
有钱又有权，这么说来，她的胜算岂不是比我们高出许多许多？
With money and power on her side, wouldn't her chances of success be way higher than ours?
正如我之前给姬子小姐的提议：我愿意与星穹列车合作，为安然推进幻月游戏而努力。
As I previously proposed to Miss Himeko: I'm willing to cooperate with the Astral Express to ensure the smooth progression of the Phantasmoon Games.
但星穹列车并非您唯一的合作伙伴吧？
But the Astral Express isn't your only partner, is it?
我还另有两位盟友。但，诸位是我最看好的合作对象。星穹列车一旦加入，将最大程度确保这场星神游戏的安全和胜利。
I have two other allies. However, you all are my most promising ones. Once the Astral Express joins, it will maximize the safety and success of this Aeonic game.
而我，也会尽我所能满足合作者的愿望——在那有限的一分钟内。
And I will do everything in my power to fulfill my partners' wishes, within that limited minute.
This is just like the Anti-Destruction Alliance...
正如我们之前告诉您的，我们的策略是「成为风帆，共同进退」。星穹列车并非孑然独行的谒者，我们在游戏中也有自己的合作伙伴。
As we told you before, our strategy is to "become a sail, advance and retreat together." The Astral Express is not a lone Supplicant, since we have our own allies in the Games.
盟友：火花？确实，你们击败了她，夺走了面具。但以她一贯的决策风格来看，火花并非可靠的盟友。
An ally like Sparxie? It's true that you defeated her and took her mask. But given her typical decision-making style, Sparxie isn't exactly what you'd call a reliable ally.
除她之外，我还有一张面具。
Besides her mask, I also have another one.
除她之外，我另有一位盟友。
Besides her, I have another ally.
推论：共愿帮丢失的面具？我本以为它落入了仙舟人的手中。莫非，爻光把它交给了你们？
Hypothesis: The Synwish Syndicate's missing mask? I thought it fell into the Xianzhou's hands. Don't tell me... Yao Guang gave it to you guys?
没错，三张面具对三张面具，目前咱们可是平手。
That's right, three against three. We're tied at the moment.
未知变量加入，我会修正演算。但结论似乎并无改变，毕竟我作为这个世界管理者，拥有资源上的天然优势。
With this new variable in play, I'll have to adjust my extrapolations. But the conclusion seems unchanged. After all, as the administrator of this world, I have the natural advantage in resources.
公司的高管、二相乐园的管理者、石心十人之一亲自加入了游戏，听起来确实唬人。不过仔细想想，这个身份难道不是真珠女士要克服的最大困难吗？

An IPC senior executive, Planarcadia's administrator, a member of the Ten Stonehearts, joining the games personally. It certainly has an intimidating ring to it. But when you think about it, isn't this identity precisely the greatest burden Madam Pearl has to overcome?
{NICKNAME}说得不错，您的身份实在过于敏感了。您想掌控这场游戏，安全迅速地结束它，但二相乐园的居民们未必这么想。
{NICKNAME} is right, your identity is far too sensitive. You want to control these games and end it safely and quickly, but Planarcadia's citizens might not see it this way.
他们只看到了只手遮天的大公司、有权有势的公司高管操弄一切…您的每一个行动都会倍受质疑。
All they see is the all-powerful IPC and an influential executive pulling all the strings... Your every action will be scrutinized twice over.
People don't want to see the IPC win.
People want to see heroes triumph.
敏锐的观察力，值得赞赏。
A sharp observation, I must say. Quite impressive.
但我不认为您自己会忽视这一点。真珠女士，您如此不惜一切，又是想从幻月游戏中得到什么？
But I do not believe you yourself would overlook this. Madam Pearl, what is it that you seek to obtain from the Phantasmoon Games, at any cost?
我想要的是一样失落在这个世界历史中的宝物……
What I seek is a treasure lost to this world's history...
<color=#dbc291ff>I want to recreate Graphia's divine art of "Imagenesis."</color>
...Does that have something to do with painting?
听起来难以置信，是吗？我的诞生，源于螺丝星的星体差分机所分配的母题：「艺术」。
Hard to believe, no? My birth originated from the theme assigned by the Celestial Differentiator of Planet Screwllum: "art."
最初的我，只是一台仿造人类画作的机器。对于智械来说，生成艺术品并非难事。
At first, I was nothing more than a machine that imitated human paintings. For an Intellitron, generating works of art is no great challenge.
我日复一日学习、日复一日穷举。我可以瞬间解析一切画作的比例结构与颜料成分，我可以精准复刻绘世画作的每一个像素，但我无法像她一样创造。

Day after day, I studied. Day after day, I exhausted every possibility. I could instantly analyze the proportional structure and pigment composition of any painting. I could precisely reproduce every pixel of Graphia's masterpieces, yet I could not create as she did.
绘世的至高创造，是在幻月游戏的尾声开辟了「画中世界」。我想洞察那一刻她的所思所想，触碰创造的真髓。
Graphia's ultimate creation was establishing the "World in Canvas" at the end of the Phantasmoon Games. I want to understand her thoughts at that moment, and touch the essence of creation.
这是您个人的追求，还是公司对这个世界的诉求？
Is this your personal pursuit, or the IPC's demands on this world?
二者皆有。公司的视角更为功利：「画中世界」是一个足以躲开反物质军团战火的维度，他们也一直渴望掌握这项技术。

Both. The IPC's point of view is far more pragmatic: The "World in Canvas" is a dimension that can shield us from the Antimatter Legion's warfare, and they've always been eager to master this technology.
很遗憾，看来我们暂时无法说服彼此退让。
Unfortunately, it seems we can't convince each other to back out for now.
那么，我有另一个提议：不妨改变一下视角，将目光投向尚未浮出水面的那两位谒者。
Then, I have another proposal: Why don't we shift our perspective and turn our attention to those two Supplicants who haven't surfaced yet?
这两人目标不明、能力成谜，若放任不管，极有可能会重演当年告死魔的悲剧。我有一个合作方案，有助于判明他们的情报。同时，我也愿意和各位分享这份情报。

These two individuals' objectives are unclear, and their abilities remain a mystery. If left unchecked, we might see a repeat of the Herald of Death tragedy. I have a cooperation proposal that could help us gather intelligence on them. And I'm willing to share this piece of information with you all.
I'm guessing that doesn't come for free, right?
不错。但各位需要付出的，也不过是一点名气罢了。
That is correct. But all you need to do is sacrifice a tiny sliver of your reputation.
A tiny sliver of your reputation.
在谈合作细节前，诸位是想歇一歇，喝口茶润润嗓子？还是接着谈下去？
Before we move on to the details of our cooperation, would you like to take a short break and have some tea to wet your whistles, or shall we continue?
Having some tea wouldn't be a bad idea.
Sprayed me right in my face, ah, this smell... Is that...
这是爻光将军赠我的仙舟特产，是名为「苏打豆汁」的珍物。
This is a specialty from the Xianzhou, a precious item called "mung bean soda" that General Yao Guang gifted me.
作为智械，我无福消受人类的饮品，因此特意留给贵客们享用。
As an Intellitron, I can't enjoy human beverages, so I've specially saved this for my esteemed guests.
我们和这种饮料还真有缘分啊。
Seems we really do have a special connection with these drinks.
<color=#dbc291ff>我想以珠星作为主办方，为星穹列车举行一场博览会…至于名字，就叫：「星铁FES」如何？</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>I was thinking of having Pearluxe Corp host an expo for the Astral Express... As for the name, how about: "Star Rail FEST"?</color>
「星铁FES」？您是说…举办一场《苍天航路绒绒号》的漫展？
"Star Rail FEST"? You mean hosting... a Fluffy Across the Blue convention?
正确，但不完全正确。绒绒号在这个世界广为人知，它是个不错的联动要素。
Correct, but not entirely. The Fluffy is well-known in this world, so it's a good collaboration element.
但我想要的是：一场规模空前的星穹列车展，绒绒号只是其中的点缀。这场盛会的主角是你们：列车组的乘员们。你们会亲临现场，与这个世界的人们见面。

But what I want is an unprecedented Astral Express exhibition, with The Fluffy being just a small part of it. The real stars of this grand event will be you, the Express Crew. You'll be there in person to meet the people of this world.
您想用这场展会引诱那两位身份不明的谒者现身？
Are you trying to use this exhibition to lure those two unidentified Supplicants out of hiding?
啊？万一他们都不怀好意，那我们不就成了吸引火力的目标吗？
Huh? What if they're up to no good? Won't that just make us walking targets?
还有什么能比与银河里的英雄面对面更能鼓舞一个世界的居民？
What could be more inspiring to the people of a world than standing face to face with heroes of the cosmos?
这可是一股巨大的愿力。星穹列车就是促成这股愿力诞生的源泉。
That's an enormous amount of Wishpower. And the Astral Express is the very source from which this Wishpower originates.
你愿意拱手将优势让给我们？
You're willing to hand over the advantage to us?
后来居上的方案还有很多。比起进展，我更在意计划面临什么样的未知风险。
There are many ways to take the lead afterward. I'm less concerned about the progress than about the unknown risks our plan might face.
我们双方可以共同为所有人展示这样一个「奇迹」：一座描绘英雄传奇的游乐园。
Together, we can create a "miracle" for all to witness: an arcadia devoted to the legends of heroes.
我也会请来满愿电视台之类的主流媒体进行合作宣传。毫无疑问，作为回报，愿力将流向你们。
I'll also get Fulwish TV and other mainstream media outlets involved for promotional cooperation. And in return, Wishpower will flow to you, of this I have no doubt.
在「星铁FES」正式开启前，我还想拜托各位一件事：<color=#dbc291ff>我想请列车组登门拜访，见一见《苍天航路绒绒号》的原作者，模糊二维马。</color>
Before the "Star Rail FEST" officially begins, I have one more favor to ask of you all: I'd like the Express Crew to pay a visit to Blurry_QR_Colt, the original author of Fluffy Across the Blue.
珠星不是拥有绒绒号的版权吗？
Doesn't Pearluxe own the rights to The Fluffy?
自出道以来这位作者一直隐姓埋名，真容从不显露人前。但如果故事里的真人原型能到府上拜访，想必给足了他面子，也能说服他到场签售，再添一把火。

Since their debut, this author has remained anonymous, never revealing their true identity in public. But if the real-life inspiration behind the story were to pay them a personal visit, it would surely be a great honor, and likely persuade them to attend a signing, stoking the excitement even further.
既然商议已定，就拜托诸位了。我会差遣秘书及时与各位互通有无。
Now that we've reached an agreement, I'll leave it in your capable hands. My secretary will be in touch to keep all parties apprised.
对了，{NICKNAME}，在离开前，还请收下这件小小的礼物，作为你我第一次合作成立的纪念吧。
By the way, {NICKNAME}, before you leave, please accept this small gift as a memento of our first collaboration.
我详细观摩了同僚们在匹诺康尼与合作伙伴往来的记录。其中砂金先生习惯赠送代表好运的小礼物这个技巧让我颇受启发。

I've studied in detail the records of my colleagues' interactions with partners in Penacony, and I was particularly inspired by Aventurine's technique of giving small gifts that symbolize good fortune.
因此，请把这枚筹码当成是你我合作好运开始的象征带在身上。诸位，一路走好。
So, please keep this chip with you as a symbol of good fortune for our future cooperation. Take care, everyone.
Well, we'll be on our way then.
这样的场面，你会觉得紧张吗？放轻松，以后会慢慢习惯的。
Do you feel nervous in a situation like this? Relax, you'll get used to it soon.
作为你的私家侦探，我有义务提醒你，一场盛况空前的展会，将会成为重演「血涂游戏」的绝佳时机。
As your private detective, I must warn you that a grand exhibition of unprecedented scale would make for a perfect opportunity to reenact the "Bloodstained Games."
我明白。所以，我要交给你一个任务：在「星铁FES」上保护这些无名客。
I understand. That's why I have a mission for you: Protect the Nameless at "Star Rail FEST."
以他们的实力，需要我来保护？难不成在你的推演里，会有更大的麻烦到来？
You actually think they would need my protection with their strength? Don't tell me your extrapolations predict even bigger trouble ahead?
潜藏在一次次推演之下，总有些小小的不安信号上浮到我的思考界面中。我必须为此做好万全的准备。
Hidden beneath each extrapolation, tiny signals of unease keep bubbling up to my thought interface. I must be thoroughly prepared for whatever may come.
既然你接下了面具，也该谈谈报酬了。你想要什么？老样子，钱？
Now that you've taken up the mask, let's talk about payment. What do you want? The same as always, money?
谈报酬前，先谈谈「告死魔」吧。虽然「异常防御部」封存、销毁了关于血涂游戏的资料。但我还是查到了一些不寻常的蛛丝马迹……

Before we talk about payment, let's discuss the Herald of Death. Although the Department of Aberration Defense sealed and destroyed all records of the Bloodstained Games, I still managed to uncover some unusual leads...
告死魔事件结束后，受害者家属集体得到了一笔数字大到足以填满任何巨大创伤的赔偿金。所以我想，也许可以从二相乐园的官方支出里找找门道。

After the Herald of Death incident, the victims' families collectively received compensation so massive it could fill any gaping wound. So I figured, maybe we could find some leads by looking into official Planarcadia expenditures.
有趣的是，当年公示的财报中却遍寻不着这个条目。你猜猜，这笔钱到底走了谁的帐？
Here's the interesting part: This item was nowhere to be found in that year's public financial report. Care to guess whose books this money went through?
是星际和平公司的「技术研发部」支付了这笔堪称天文数字的赔款。
It was you, the omnipresent IPC. To be precise, it was the IPC's Technology Department that paid this astronomical compensation.
为什么一颗小小边星上的死亡事件要让IPC科学家们的经费大出血？难道他们除了搞科研外，还心系慈善不成？
Why would a lethal incident on some minor frontier planet cause IPC scientists to hemorrhage funding? Don't tell me they're moonlighting as philanthropists on top of their research work?
按照人类戏剧的套路，这时候我是不是该来点掌声？能查到这些信息，足见名侦探不死途的人脉与实力。
Following the usual human drama tropes, am I supposed to give you a round of applause now? Being able to dig up all this information really shows your connections and capabilities, Detective Ashveil.
电影里你这样的大人物通常会把手抬起来，露出黑洞洞的枪口。
In movies, a big shot like you would usually raise a hand right about now, revealing the dark muzzle of a gun.
「对不起，你知道的太多了。」砰！枪响，然后我这个翻出真相的倒霉蛋就该一命呜呼了。
"I'm afraid you've learned too much." And BANG! That's when the gun goes off, and I, the poor sap who uncovered the truth, am supposed to bite the dust.
抱歉，我的手正放在支票簿上，抽不开空。不死途先生，告诉我：这次合作的报酬数字，你想填几个零？
Sorry, my hand is on the checkbook and unavailable. Mr. Ashveil, tell me: How many zeros would you like to see on that check for our cooperation?
确实，钱不是问题。一亿信用点？
Indeed, money isn't the issue. A hundred million credits?
你把我当受害者家属收买？告诉我，为什么是「技术研发部」付钱抹平了这事？
Are you trying to buy me off like some poor victim's family? Tell me, why did the Technology Department pay to sweep this under the rug?
三个亿。我知道，你一直很需要钱：冷冻睡眠，赡养那些殉难兄弟的遗属，还要治疗那些活着的人——让钱落入需要它的人手中，这不正是战略投资的意义所在？

Three hundred million. I know you've always needed money: For cryosleep, supporting the families of fallen comrades, and for treating those who survived. Isn't this exactly what strategic investment is about? Putting money in the hands of those who need it?
我不是你的打手，智械！告诉我答案！
I'm not your lackey, Intellitron! Tell me the answer!
五个亿，我可以装作计数进程出错，给你填上十个亿。金钱或答案，二择一，你来选。
<unbreak>500</unbreak> million. I could pretend there's a glitch in my calculation process and make it a cool billion for you. Money or answer, your call.
…出人意料的选择。颠覆了我对你决策树的一贯认知——备注：这句话绝不含有嘲讽的语义。
...An unexpected choice. It defies my usual understanding of your decision tree. Note: I say this without sarcasm or ridicule.
答案是：我知道的不多。也许你很难相信，作为首席执行官，我的权力并不是无限的。何况……
The answer is: I don't know much. Hard to believe, perhaps, but as CEO, my power isn't unlimited. Besides...
<color=#dbc291ff>告死魔已是十五年前的往事了。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>The Herald of Death affair lies fifteen years in the past.</color>
这个世界就像是多年未了的一局残棋，前任棋士埋下的暗手总是不断成为我今日的挑战。
This world is like an unfinished game of chess that's been dragging on for years. The hidden moves laid by the previous player keep becoming my challenges, even today.
但既然你邀请我一起下完这局棋，那么共享情报是必须的。
But since you've invited me to finish this game together, sharing intel is a must.
合理，我会分享我所知的「答案」。
Reasonable. I'll share what I know about the answer.
「告死魔」马库斯•安塔利，博识学会「完美进化学派」最后一位成员。五年前，他已被验明正身，执行死刑了——备注：各种意义上的「死刑」。

Marcus Antali, the Herald of Death, last member of the Intelligentsia Guild's "School of Evolutionary Perfection." Five years ago, his identity was confirmed, and he was executed. Note: Executed in every sense of the word.
「技术研发部」的负责人亚婆离女士接手了他的遗物，相关的记录连我也无权阅读。
Ms. Yabuli, head of the Technology Department, took possession of his belongings, and even I don't have the clearance to access those records.
难怪，四舍五入，这家伙可以算得上公司的人。这也解释了「技术研发部」付钱的理由。但最近的这场凶案，手法和当年如出一辙，如果告死魔本尊已经死了……

No wonder. So that guy was practically IPC personnel, give or take. That also explains why the Technology Department shelled out the compensation. Yet the method behind this latest killing is identical to the one from years ago, if the Herald of Death is truly dead...
「一个连环杀手死而复生」，这是所有可能性中最不需要我们担忧的。连环杀手即便死而复生，也不过是一个被星神游戏排除在外的连环杀手。
A serial killer coming back from the dead is the least of our worries. Even if a serial killer does come back to life, he's still just a serial killer who's been shut out of the Aeonic game.
更值得警惕的是：有人想要利用「告死魔」的遗产。亚婆离女士带走了那家伙留下的一切，唯独没有带走这个世界居民对他的恐惧。

What's more concerning is this: Someone wants to exploit the legacy of the Herald of Death. Ms. Yabuli took away everything that man left behind, except for the fear he instilled in the people of this world.
而在幻月游戏中，不仅奇迹可以激起愿力，恐惧也可以。按照我的推演，「新告死魔」的登场也许会成为游戏失控的开始。

And during the Phantasmoon Games, not only can miracles trigger Wishpower, but fear too. Based on my extrapolations, the appearance of this new Herald of Death might mark the beginning of the festival spiraling out of control.
难怪你如此急着结束它。
No wonder you're in such a hurry to end the Games.
不死途先生，我向来敬重你，但眼下，我更需要借助你的实力。
Mr. Ashveil, I've always respected you, but right now, I need to rely on your strength even more.
敬重…年轻时的我更想得到的是「公司的畏惧」，时间还真是无情啊。
"Respect"... When I was younger, what I really wanted was to make the IPC fear me. The passage of time's not exactly kind, is it?
成交，真珠女士。但我还要索取另一样报酬——
Deal, Madam Pearl. But I will require one more form of compensation—
无论这个「新告死魔」是谁，必须由我亲手制裁。这一次，不会再有漫长的审讯。
Whoever this new Herald of Death is, I must deliver justice with my own hands. This time, there won't be any lengthy interrogation.
以二相乐园首席执行官的权力，我赦免因你复仇而生的一切罪名。
By the authority vested in me as CEO of Planarcadia, I pardon all crimes committed in the course of your revenge.
放手去做吧，不死途先生。
Go ahead and do what you must, Mr. Ashveil.
小三月的逛逛之魂又觉醒了，我们不要走太远喔。
Looks like March's inner explorer has been awakened again. Let's not wander too far this time, shall we?
Mr. Yang! Over here, quick, come on!
哈哈，站在这么大的机铠下方，很有感觉！
Haha, standing below a huge mechatron like this is just incredible!
杨叔果然还是个热血少年啊~
Looks like Mr. Yang's still young at heart after all~
咱们先去商品区走走，我来给各位送上一份纪念品。
Why don't we head to the gift shop first? I'll get you all some souvenirs.
礼物送出，接下来我带大家去参观机铠设计室。
Now that the gifts are done, I'll take you to the mechatron design lab.
这是我最期待的环节了。
This is the part I've been looking forward to the most.
拼装的第一步，就是将连接在板件上的零件一个个取下来。
The first step of assembly is to remove each part from the frame one by one.
模型剪钳、笔刀、砂纸、打磨棒…本公司概不提供。
Nippers, hobby knife, sandpaper, sanding stick... Pearluxe doesn't provide any of these.
但是别担心！起爆装置会解决你的一切困扰，勇敢踩上去吧！
But don't worry! The explosive device will solve all your problems, just step on it bravely!
尽管看上去非常粗暴，但它一个水口都没留，这正是我们引以为傲的珠星魔法！
It may look brutal, but it leaves no burrs. And that's the magic that we at Pearluxe Corp are so proud of!
接下来，请启动「维修用机械臂」，对准肩部接合基座，将手臂接入。
Next, please activate the mechanical maintenance arm and align it with the shoulder joint base to connect the arm.
很好，手臂的部分暂时完成了。
Good, we're done with the arm for now.
接下来请启动移动式整备架，将机铠调整至肩甲板件处。
Next, activate the mobile maintenance rack and adjust the mech armor to the shoulder armor panel position.
和刚才一样，第一步，先将零件从板件上拆下来。
Just like before, the first step is to remove the parts from the frame.
人造重力场方向调整中，请注意安全。
Artificial gravity field adjusting, please exercise caution.
请启动推进器，将肩甲推向单元接口处。
Activate the thruster and push the shoulder armor towards the unit interface.
太美丽了，巨型机铠。不愧是珠星之魂！
Beautiful, absolutely beautiful! This giant mechatron is truly the soul of Pearluxe Corp!
接下来就是最后的模块了，请为它安装好背部的破晓战刃。
Now for the final part. Please install the Daybreak Blade on its back.
Aim at the mounting point on the back, and fire!
看啊！那耀眼的色彩如同星间穿行的列车！
Look! Those dazzling colors are like an express train traversing through the stars!
覆盖全身的强化铠甲，是守护市民的坚固壁垒！
Enhanced full-body armor, a steadfast shield for the people!
Roar! Let your blazing soul ignite!
这一击，承载着所有市民的希望！喝啊啊啊啊——！
This strike carries the hopes of all citizens! HYAAAAAAH!
什么？英雄竟然被违章建筑给挡住了！城市啊，你在做什么啊——！
What!? Our hero got blocked by an illegal building! City!? What are you doing!
没办法了！打碎它吧，英雄！
No choice left! Smash it to pieces, hero!
你只管解决城市的危机，赔偿的事就交给真珠女士来想办法吧！
Just focus on dealing with the city's crisis and let Madam Pearl worry about the compensation!
二维市已经渡过了最艰难的时刻，是继续前进，还是将怪物全数解决？英雄，你来决定！
Duomension City has made it through the worst of it! Hero, now it's your call. Do we press on, or wipe out the monsters entirely? Hero, you decide!
藏身此处的怪兽竟不知何时灰飞烟灭了！
The monsters that were hiding here seem to have been reduced to nothing.
Who is it? Who could it be? Is that...
就让我们俩探探你的实力。
Let the two of us see what you're made of.
来吧！大名鼎鼎的开拓者{NICKNAME}。
Come on! One and only Trailblazer {NICKNAME}.
不愧是星穹列车的英雄…好强！
As expected of the Astral Express hero... so powerful!
接下来就交给大哥和小灰了！
Boss, Gray, I'll leave the rest to you!
The honor is mine to cross blades with you!
作为英雄，我们可绝不会后退。
As heroes, we'll never back down.
这是饱含我全部敬意的一击！来吧！
This strike contains all my respect! Bring it on!
…什么？就连无敌的{NICKNAME}也要到达极限了吗！
...What? Even the invincible {NICKNAME} is reaching {M#his}{F#her} limit!?
听啊！那是人们的愿望，那是汇聚而至的力量！那是，无限的可能性！
Listen! Those are the people's wishes, power converging as one! That is... limitless possibility!
Everyone's wishes... I've received them all!
呜啊…{NICKNAME}前辈好近，我的心跳得好大声……
Woah... my senior {NICKNAME} is so close to me that my heart's beating like crazy...
暗夜终尽，黎明降临！破晓战队，登场！
Darkness wanes, and dawn awakens! The Daybreak Squadron arises!
诸位，登上这架电梯，直至顶层即可。
Dear guests, please take this elevator straight to the top floor.
请告知真珠女士，列车的三位客人即将抵达。
Please inform Madam Pearl that the three guests from the Express will arrive shortly.
我为几位客人准备了一些茶点，请尝尝。
I've prepared some refreshments for you. Please help yourself.
你要往哪儿跑啊？真珠女士和我们的磋商还没结束呢！
Where do you think you're going? Our negotiations with Madam Pearl aren't over yet!
大家好，欢迎收看满愿电视台《乐园早知道》特别新闻栏目！我是主持人噗噗！
Hello everyone, welcome to Fulwish TV's special news segment, Arcadian Morning Report! I'm your host, Poofy!
大家好，我是主持人雪雪！
Hi everyone, I'm your host, Snowie!
由珠星财团出资，速建重工承接建设的「星铁FES」展会现场正式竣工。
The "Star Rail Fest" exhibition venue, funded by Pearluxe Corp and constructed by Turbogen Heavy Industries, has officially been completed.
凭借现代化的幻造技术，仅耗时一日，天际线观览云岛上就展现一派全新气象。
Thanks to modern imagenesis technology, it took only a day for the skyline's Lookout Cloud to take on a completely new look.
从今天开始，「观览云岛线」正式开通「星铁FES」展区站点。
Starting today, the Lookout Cloud Line is officially opening up a stop for the Star Rail Fest exhibition areas.
首日开放的展区包含「贝洛伯格区」、「仙舟罗浮区」、「匹诺康尼区」三处，为您呈现星穹列车的传奇冒险之旅。在建中的「翁法罗斯区」也将随后续计划开放。

The exhibition areas opening on day one include the Belobog Area, Xianzhou Luofu Area, and Penacony Area, showcasing the legendary adventures of the Astral Express. The Amphoreus Area, which is currently under construction, will open in due course.
在本次活动中，珠星诚邀星穹列车的多位乘员莅临参观、接受采访——其中包括最近加入「幻月游戏」，成为谒者的{NICKNAME}。
For this event, Pearluxe cordially invites several crew members of the Astral Express to visit and be interviewed, including {NICKNAME}, who recently joined the Phantasmoon Games as a Supplicant.
那可真是太令人期待了！听说珠星还邀请到了《苍天航路绒绒号》的漫画作者模糊二维马老师到场签售，这也会是作者本人首次以真面目亮相……

That is certainly something to look forward to! I heard Pearluxe has also invited Blurry_QR_Colt, the author of Fluffy Across the Blue, for a signing session. It'll be the first time the author reveals their true face in public...
一场敛聚愿力的展会，确实是个有趣的企划。得亏真珠能想出这个奇怪的点子。
An exhibition to gather Wishpower, now that's an interesting scheme. Leave it to Pearl to come up with such a bizarre idea.
珠星擅长为孩子和成年人营造梦想，而星穹列车正是一个令这个世界倍感新奇的天外之梦。
Pearluxe excels at creating dreams for both children and adults, and the Astral Express is exactly the kind of otherworldly dream that fascinates the people of this world.
这样做倒是对双方都有利。
This arrangement works out well for both parties.
唔，真珠也在动用珠星的资源为我们进行宣传。
Mm-hmm, Pearl is also mobilizing Pearluxe's resources to promote us.
在和真珠对谈时，我向她提过「成为风帆，共同进退」的理念。这一场合作，确实发挥出了我们各自的优势。
When I talked with Pearl, I shared with her the idea of becoming a sail, advancing and retreating together. This collaboration could truly bring out the best of our respective strengths.
我有时候也会猜想，翡翠将我们邀请到这里，是否有为自己的同僚送上「幻月游戏胜利砝码」的意图……
Sometimes I wonder if Jade invited us here with the intention of giving her colleagues a "winning edge" in the Phantasmoon Games...
对真珠而言，这场星神游戏恐怕也是学习和观察我们行动风格的好机会。
For Pearl, this Aeonic game is probably also a good opportunity to observe and study the way we operate.
不过，比起咱们平日里打交道的对手，这位智械执行官倒是难得的理性决策者，她的合作提议相对更值得信任。
Though, compared to our usual opponents, this Intellitron executive is a surprisingly rational decision-maker. Her proposal for cooperation seems more trustworthy than most.
比起理性，我更担心「非理性」的因素……
It's not rationality that concerns me. It's the "irrational" factors...
You mean... the new Herald of Death?
没错。鸽川血案的消息已经在网上传开了，虽然「异常防御部」的人尽力压制了各种流言传播的势头，但许多人还是把它和十五年前的告死魔联系在了一起。

Exactly. News of the Dovebrook bloodbath has already blown up online. The Department of Aberration Defense tried to clamp down on the rumors, but plenty of people are still linking it to the Herald of Death from fifteen years ago.
这场汇集人数众多的展会很有可能成为目标，被新告死魔利用。
With such a large crowd gathering there, this exhibition could very well become a target for the new Herald of Death.
真珠对这样的情况，应该不至于毫无准备吧？
Pearl must have contingency plans for situations like this, right?
Maybe we're the ace up her sleeve.
可能是那位路过的侦探。
It could be that detective "who passed by".
无论真珠有什么准备，我们都要将告死魔袭击现场的可能性考虑在内。这次出席，我们除了向这个世界的民众展示星穹列车的形象外，还要随时警惕任何异动。

Whatever Pearl has planned, we must consider the possibility that the Herald of Death might attack the venue. We won't just be there to showcase the Astral Express to the people of this world. We'll also need to stay on high alert for any suspicious activity.
时间差不多了，你们该出发了。
It's about time. You should get going.
Just us? Aren't you coming with us, Mr. Yang?
列车上总得有人留守，陪陪列车长，也好随时响应突发事件啊。
Someone's got to stay behind on the Express to keep the conductor company and be ready for any emergencies that pop up.
你们几个，游玩时也要注意安全，有任何情况随时联络我。
You guys have fun out there, but stay safe. Contact me right away if anything comes up.
What about Dan Heng and Sunday?
他们俩都随爻光将军行动去了。丹恒在追踪刃的下落，星期日与停云小姐一起行动，都脱不开身。这一次的展会应该没法到场了。

They're both out on a mission with General Yao Guang. Dan Heng is tracking Blade's whereabouts, while Sunday is working with Miss Tingyun. Both of them are tied up. Looks like they won't be able to make it to the exhibition this time.
得，分享一路见闻的重任又落在小三月的肩膀上咯。那我多拍几张照片，回来后好跟你们好好讲讲展会的事情。
Hah, looks like the heavy burden of documenting our travels falls on yours truly once again. I'll make sure to snap tons of pics, so I can tell you guys all about the exhibition when we get back!
Star Rail FEST, here we come!
请前往「星铁FES」的乘客做好上车准备。啊！这不是星穹列车的英雄吗！
Passengers heading to Star Rail Fest, please prepare to board. Ah! If it isn't the heroes of the Astral Express!
车车们早就在打赌，谁能在展会开启当天迎接无名客前往「星铁FES」——这可是超乐园级的殊荣哎！没想到，幸运儿竟是我！
The trains have been placing bets on who'll get to escort the Nameless to Star Rail FEST on opening day. It's such a suuuper-duper arcadian honor! And can you believe it? Turns out I'm the lucky one!
这一路上我已经感受到大家的热情化作愿力的浪潮，难怪兄弟姐妹们跑起来都倍儿有精神！
I could already feel everyone's enthusiasm turning into waves of Wishpower along the way! No wonder everyone's running around with such high spirits!
噔～噔～蹬～蹬，列车即将启动，请英雄们坐稳扶好。
Ding~ Ding~ Dong~ Dong~ The Express is about to depart. Heroes, please stay seated and hold on tight.
本专列开往：「星铁FES」展会。乐子神在上，愿二相乐园的微笑能晕染你我的面庞。
This special train is bound for the "Star Rail FEST" Exhibition. By The Laughter above, may the smile of Planarcadia grace our faces.
We have things to take care of.
啊！你、你们不会嫌我话多，要等下一列吧！这种事情，不要哇！
Ah! Y—You guys aren't thinking of waiting for the next train just 'cause I talk too much, are you!? Please don't do that to me!
嘿嘿，能接无名客前往星铁FES——这可是超乐园级的殊荣哎！我真是超乐园级的幸运！
Hehe, getting to escort the Nameless to Star Rail FEST... What a suuuper-duper arcadian honor! I'm just sooo lucky!
What are we waiting for, everyone? Let's get going!
We have things to take care of.
我会耐心等待英雄们做好准备的，今天不接上你们我是不会发车的！
I'll patiently wait around until you heroes are ready. I'm not taking off without you today!
家人们，我已安全入场，没有抢到票的小伙伴们，今天可以在我的直播间带各位看完整个FES。
Chat, I've made it in safely! For those who couldn't get tickets, you can catch the entire FEST through my livestream today.
身边这位是我的搭……你这是在干什么？
Next to me is my partn— Wait, what are you doing?
我是冷面小青龙——丹恒是也！
Tis I, Cold Dragon Young... Dan Heng!
你哪里搞的头套，这也太怪了。
Where'd you get that mask from? It looks so weird.
顾不了那么多是也。当务之急是找到模糊二维马老师给我的漫画签名是也。
Such trifles matter not! What doth matter most is securing the autograph of Master Blurry_QR_Colt upon this book of mine!
签名会还没到时间呢。再说仙舟人说话并不会每一句都带「是也」的。
The signing event hasn't even started yet. Besides, Xianzhou people don't talk like that.
跨越星海，家在这里！列车全员，永不分离！
Through stars we soar, the Express is our home! One crew one heart, we'll never roam!
Wow, that's some next-level fandom energy!
星穹列车，我们喜欢你，我们喜欢{NICKNAME}、三月七、丹恒！
Astral Express, we love you! We love {NICKNAME}, March 7th, and Dan Heng!
星穹列车，我们喜欢你，我们喜欢列车长、姬子、瓦尔特！
Astral Express, we love you! We love the conductor, Himeko, and Welt!
嘘，嘘，这里可不比翁法罗斯啊，当心有「家族」的人听到。关于星期日先生的事咱们还是少在公开场合提为妙。
Shh, shh, this isn't Amphoreus, y'know. Watch what you say. The Family's got ears everywhere. It's best if we keep quiet about Mr. Sunday while we're out in public.
总觉得带上「闭嘴」，会让每句话都像是在吵架。
I feel like adding "Shush" to a sentence always makes it sound like an argument.
Wanna take a photo together, Himeko?
不、不用了，比起被自己的粉丝簇拥，我还是更喜欢和真珠谈判的严肃氛围。
N-No thanks. I'd take tense negotiations with Pearl over getting mobbed by my own fans any day.
居然还有让姬子姐害怕的社交场合。
Who'd've thought there'd be social situations that even Himeko's afraid of?
要是丹恒和杨叔也在…很难想象他们看到这一幕会露出什么表情。
If Dan Heng and Mr. Yang were here... I can't even imagine the looks on their faces.
...I wish we could share this all with our friends.
我很确定丹恒一定不会想赏这个景啦。
I'm pretty sure Dan Heng wouldn't want to experience this.
Elation, it really has that arcadian vibe.
无论如何，我从没想过星穹列车会在我的故乡变成一个…大受欢迎的偶像团体，还会有以我们的冒险旅程为原型的漫画与动画。
Never in my wildest dreams did I imagine that the Astral Express would become... a super popular idol group in my homeland, complete with book and TV adaptations based on our adventures.
但不得不说，这确实很二相乐园。
But I have to admit, this is very Planarcadia.
That's just how the Astral Express rolls!
Exactly! That's just how we roll!
这么多粉丝，比咱们着陆那天车站里来迎接的数量还多…搞得我都有些飘飘然了。
So many fans out there, even more than the crowd that came to welcome us at the station when we landed... It's kinda going to my head.
哎！不行不行！我们必须万分戒备，谁知道那个谒者会不会藏在人群中对我们和我们的粉丝图谋不轨！所以……
Hold on, that's not good! We need to be on high alert. Who knows if that Supplicant is hiding in the crowd, plotting something against us and our fans! So...
所以，本姑娘要以身涉险，亲自去排查一下。
So, I'm gonna brave the danger and check things out myself.
You just want to go have fun, don't you?
可不要走太远，一会儿还有官方人员需要我们配合进行演讲之类的活动。
Don't wander off too far, though. We still have official business later... speeches and other activities that we need to show up for.
知道啦，我们就在这附近转转。
Got it. We'll just hang around here.
你们去逛吧，我也在这儿到处看看。
You guys go explore. I'll take a look around here too.
啊！你这身打扮，扮演「三月兔」的原型是吧？还原度好高啊喂！
Wow! With that outfit, you must be cosplaying as March Bunny, am I right? The accuracy is just insane!
大家都是同好，推销介绍什么的就免了。但我要事先说明，列车长天下第一可爱！
Since we're all fans here, let's skip the sales pitch. But I gotta say this upfront: The conductor is the cutest in the whole universe!
这我同意，列车长天下第一可爱！不过走近一瞧，有的东西似乎很眼熟？
I agree. The conductor is the cutest in the whole universe! But wait a minute, some of your stuff looks familiar to me...
有眼力！一看就是重度粉丝。
Sharp eye! You're definitely a hardcore fan.
我们与开拓之旅途径世界的艺术家进行深度合作，才制作出了这些产品。
We collaborated closely with artists from different worlds along the trailblazing expedition to create these products.
哈哈，我大概能猜到都有谁。
Haha, I can pretty much guess who they are.
鄙人不才，没有大师们的美术功底，但也撰写过些小文章，在同人圈算小有人气。这次出摊，顺便也替自己宣传宣传。

I may not be that talented or have the artistic skills of a master, but I've written some articles and gained a bit of popularity in the fan community. So while I'm here at the booth, I thought I might as well do some self-promotion.
你的视线向桌上投去，顷刻间，触目惊心的文字映入你剧震的瞳孔。
Your gaze falls upon the table, and in an instant, the shocking words sear themselves into your widening eyes.
以第一人称视角讲述粉毛美少女三月的冒险小说，充满作者最黑暗深邃的校园幻想。
A novel recounting the adventures of the pink-haired beauty March from a first-person POV, filled with the author's darkest, deepest school-life fantasies.
「你们中如果有超级骇客、星际战士、言灵能力者、或身负星神诅咒的人，就来找我吧，咱就把话搁这儿了。」
"If any of you happen to be super hackers, space warriors, spirit whisperers, or those cursed by Aeons, come find me. I've said my piece."
「在虚构的故事中寻找真实感，这可是人之常情啊！」
"Looking for a sense of truth in fictional stories is just human nature!"
根据仙舟古典话本改编的幻想小说。讲述鲁珀特二世与一百零八位智械豪杰的爱恨情仇，并最终因其陨落的宏大历史传奇。

A fantasy novel adapted from a classic Xianzhou script. It chronicles the epic saga of Rubert II and the love and hatred shared among the one hundred and eight Intellitron heroes, ultimately leading to his downfall.
「鲁珀特二世，智周寰宇，深察玄微，博识尊赐其尊号曰『智深』。」
"Rubert II, wise throughout the universe, profound in his insights, was bestowed the title 'Profound One' by Nous."
「若二世哥哥欢喜，我等便杀上王座，夺了鲁珀特一世那厮的鸟位！」
"If it pleases you, my king, we shall storm the throne and snatch that bloody seat from Rubert I!"
「银河向东流，鲁珀特的野史参星斗。」
"Among the countless stars are whispered the secret chronicles of Rubert."
讲述第九开拓帝国的皇帝帕姆，与麾下的二十位无名客义子一同征服宇宙的战争题材小说。
A war-themed novel recounting the story of Emperor Pom-Pom from the Ninth Trailblaze Empire and, under their command, twenty adopted children of the Nameless, as they conquered the universe together.
"Our destiny lies only among the sea of stars!"
「开拓帝国历<unbreak>40000</unbreak>年六月一日，凌晨二时五十五分，杨瓦特的生命在三十三岁的时候倒下了。」
"On June 1st, year <unbreak>40,000</unbreak> of the Trailblaze Empire Era, at 2:<unbreak>55</unbreak> AM, Watt Yang's life came to an end at the age of thirty-three."
"Three minutes later, he sat up again."
出乎意料地以星核宿主小浣熊为主角的家庭题材同人漫画。
A surprisingly wholesome family-themed fancomic starring a raccoon who hosts a Stellaron.
讲述银河顶级通缉犯组成家庭并执行各种任务的趣事，一家人还养了一只会代打游戏的猫，叫银狼。
A fun little tale about the cosmos's most wanted criminals forming a family and going on all sorts of missions. They even kept a cat that grinds video games for them... by the name of Silver Wolf.
「对不起，卡芙卡，离开你，你还能活下去，离开老叔，他就死了。」
"I'm sorry, Kafka. You can survive without me. But if I leave Mr. Yang, he won't make it."
「那银狼怎么办…难道你要把她放归大自然吗？」
"What about Silver Wolf... Are you planning to release her back into the wild?"
算了，翻开这些东西会幻听。
Forget it, looking through these things is making me hear things.
这地方的人真的什么都敢写，什么都敢画。真的……
The folks here seriously don't hold back. Nothing's off-limits to them...
买一件商品送一本小说，会场限定，先到先得哦。出手晚了，没准儿就成永远的遗憾了。
Buy one item, get a free novel! It's a venue-exclusive deal. First come, first served. Better act fast, or you might regret it forever!
前段日子的绒绒号玩偶刚上架就被一个神秘大叔截住，说什么…给学生当美术参考，跟进货似的装了一整车，连倒狗都抢不过他。

When The Fluffy figurines hit the shelves the other day, this mysterious old guy snatched them all up, saying something about... using them as art references for students. He loaded up a whole cart like he was stocking inventory. Even the scalpers were no match for him, I'd say!
他走后没多久，一兔耳朵的小妹也来买玩偶，这位一看就是收藏党，都是成套买。
Not long after he left, a girl with bunny ears came to buy figurines too. She was clearly a collector, buying complete sets of everything.
然后，她发现自己想收集的每个系列，都差了一只姬奇猫！所有姬奇猫都被大叔买走了。
Then, she discovered that in every collection she wanted, there was one Himekat missing! That old man bought all the Himekats.
这太恐怖了！不行，趁着还有货，我必须立刻使用我的钱包！
That's horrifying! I can't let this happen to me. I have to make the best use of my wallet while things are still in stock!
Now you're making me want one too.
Don't fall for this consumerist trap!
{NICKNAME}，你有没有体验过那种，就，一些小商品看着很奇怪，但你就是忍不住去买，不知不觉——
{NICKNAME}, you know that feeling when you see some weird little gadgets, and you just can't help but buy them, and before you know it...
整个房间就堆满了，只能偷偷藏到好朋友那个大房间的床底下。
Your whole room is full of stuff, so you have to secretly hide them under your best friend's big bed.
啊～不行，我的钱包在颤抖！我的零花钱在哀嚎。我要和自己的本能战斗对抗一下……
Ahh~ this is not good. My wallet is trembling! My pocket money is crying out in pain. I need to battle against my own instincts for a bit...
{NICKNAME}，你先去周围逛逛吧，等我战斗结束了就来找你，不要跑太远哦。
{NICKNAME}, go look around without me for awhile. I'll come find you once I'm done with this battle. Just don't wander too far, okay?
你说，星穹列车的人，真的能给二相乐园带来幸福吗？
Do you think the people from the Astral Express can really bring happiness to Planarcadia?
既然只是来度假的，又为什么要闯入这个世界神圣的仪式呢？他们真的尊重过这个世界的人怎么想吗？
If they're just here on vacation, why did they go barging into our world's sacred ceremony? Did they ever stop to think about how the people of this world would feel about that?
他们不是拯救过许多危机吗？如果，二相乐园发生了危机，他们会尽全力保护这个世界的。
Haven't they resolved countless crises before? If Planarcadia is ever in grave danger, they would do everything in their power to protect this world.
那和救火队又有什么区别？我说的是，给二相乐园长久的幸福——他们能做到吗？
How's that any different from a fire brigade? What I mean is, can they really bring lasting happiness to Planarcadia?
能给这个世界带来幸福的，只有幸研会。
Only the Smiles Society can bring happiness to this world.
哔哔，发现垃圾，执行清扫指令。
Beep beep, trash detected, initiating cleaning protocol.
你们把列车长开发成什么了…
What in the world did you guys turn the conductor into...
这是珠星造「净」字新型号保洁卫生合金帕姆机铠，简称「保姆」。其实咱们珠星的技术人员还有个开发代号……
This is Pearluxe's new "Clean" series sanitation alloy Pom-Pom mechatron, or "Pommy" for short. Actually, our tech team had another codename for it...
他们叫它「苦力帕」。您要不要预购一台？
They call it "Mop-Pom." Would you like to pre-order one?
（有点心动，要不要买一台回去减轻列车长的工作强度？）
(I'm kinda tempted. Should I get one to help lighten our conductor's workload?)
珠星造「净」字新型号保洁卫生合金帕姆机铠，简称「保姆」转向你，似乎在评估你的体积、分析你的化学构成。
This is Pearluxe's new "Clean" series sanitation alloy Pom-Pom mechatron, or "Pommy" for short. Actually, our tech team had another codename for it...
哔哔，发现攻击性不可燃垃圾，执行清扫指令。
Beep beep, aggressive non-flammable trash detected, initiating cleaning protocol.
糟了，下手是不是太重了。
Oh no, did I go too hard on it?
（展会似乎还没正式开始剪票，先在这儿逛逛吧。）
(Looks like they haven't started checking tickets for the exhibition yet. Let's just hang around here for a bit.)
你好，{NICKNAME}！打扰了！我们是满愿电视台的！真幸运能在这儿碰到您！您现在有空吗？
Hi, {NICKNAME}! Sorry to bother you! We're with Fulwish TV! It's our lucky day running into you here! Do you have a moment?
就一小会儿，接受一下我们简短的采访？
Mind doing a short interview with us? It won't take long.
观众们对您这位新晋的谒者、还有星穹列车的冒险故事，可都好奇得不得了呢！
Our audience is absolutely dying to hear about the new Supplicant in town and your adventures aboard the Astral Express!
简短点，我稍后还有安排。
Keep it brief, I've got plans later.
没问题，不过我们的采访最好简短些，因为主办方可能对我们还有安排。
No problem, but let's keep the interview brief, since the organizers might have other plans for us.
第一个问题：作为列车重新启程的站点，我想先请您谈谈自己对二相乐园的感想。
First question: Seeing as Planarcadia was the starting point of the Express's new voyage, how would you describe your impressions of this place?
二相乐园…确实让我印象深刻。一个古老的世界，又显得如此新潮…五光十色。
Planarcadia... has left quite an impression on me. An ancient world that somehow feels so modern... so vibrant and colorful.
人人都在追逐热点，寻找乐子…我觉得，这里更像是一个永不落幕的狂欢节。
Everyone's chasing the latest trends, looking for fun... I'd say this place is more like a never-ending carnival.
有意思。幻月游戏的历史上，像您这样知名的银河大人物参与可是极其罕见的事。作为星穹列车的谒者，您在这场「游戏」中想要为这个世界带来怎样的改变？

Interesting. Throughout the history of the Phantasmoon Games, it's been extremely rare to have such a renowned cosmic figure as yourself participating. As the Astral Express's Supplicant, what kind of changes do you hope to bring to this world in these Games?
Who am I to change anything here?
我只是一个过客啊，哪儿有资格去改变这个世界？
I'm just a passerby. Who am I to change this world?
但如果可以的话，我希望向大家展示「开拓」所代表的精神力量。
But if I can, I hope to show everyone the spiritual strength of what the Trailblaze represents.
令人印象深刻的回答！说到这个，您加入游戏后率先击败了代表假面愚者的火花小姐。对于未来可能面临的本土谒者的挑战，您作何感想？

That's an impressive answer! Speaking of which, after joining the games, you immediately went to defeat Miss Sparxie, who represented the Masked Fools. What are your thoughts on potentially facing native Supplicants in the future?
I just wanted to stop Sparxie, and that's it.
我不想和本土谒者为敌。
I don't want to be enemies with the native Supplicants.
火花通过混乱和疯狂找乐子，这种失控的「欢愉」太危险了。
Sparxie gets her kicks through chaos and madness. That kind of out-of-control Elation is way too dangerous.
至于其他的本土谒者，只要他们不会让游戏变得危险…我更愿意合作，而不是靠暴力打败他们。
As for the other native Supplicants, as long as they don't make the games dangerous... I'd rather cooperate with them than defeat them through violence.
说起本土的谒者，我们注意到「星铁FES」是由珠星财团为列车举办的欢迎仪式。有传言说公司也是列车的资助者，请问您这一次参与「游戏」代表的究竟是列车还是公司？

Speaking of local Supplicants, we've noticed that "Star Rail FEST" is Pearluxe Corp's way of rolling out the red carpet for the Express. There are rumors that the IPC is also sponsoring the Express. So, I have to ask: Are you representing the Express or the IPC in these Games?
I'm just attending because I was invited.
公司的利益？怎么可能！虽然星铁FES的规模也远超我的预期，真珠女士和珠星盛情邀请，我也心怀感激……
The IPC's interests? Nah. Even though Star Rail FEST has exceeded my expectations, and Madam Pearl and Pearluxe extended such a warm invitation, which I'm truly grateful for...
但说到底，这是属于所有人的嘉年华，我只是其中一个宾客，不是这里的主人。
At the end of the day, this is a festival for everyone, and I'm just one of the guests. I'm not the master of this place.
不愧是媒体…这几个尖锐的问题让你不免汗流浃背。你几乎把这辈子所能打的一切官腔都给透支了。
It's the media alright... Those hard-hitting questions had you sweating bullets. You burned through every ounce of corporate speak you'll ever have in this lifetime.
你每一个微表情都在向外呐喊：快点结束这场采访吧！
Every micro-expression on your face is screaming: End this interview already!
谢谢您宝贵的时间，接下来，咱们就不耽误您在展会现场的安排了。
Thank you for your valuable time. We won't keep you from your plans at the exhibition any longer.
又见面了，{NICKNAME}。你运气真好，居然没被粉丝团团围住淹没。
Nice to see you again, {NICKNAME}. You're lucky you haven't been completely swarmed by fans yet.
绒绒号的主角原型水灵灵地在此，大家却认不出来，真是个超大冷笑话。该不会他们把你当成某个Coser了？你别说，很有可能。

Here you are, the original inspiration for The Fluffy's main character, fresh as a daisy, yet no one recognizes you. Talk about irony! Don't tell me they think you're just some cosplayers? Come to think of it, that's actually quite possible.
How come you're not being swarmed by fans?
毕竟没有哪个读者见过我本人的真容嘛。但是！等签售开始就不同了。
Well, none of my readers have seen my real face yet. But that's all gonna change once the book signing starts.
模糊二维马老师，你来了。
嘘！声音再低一点。我怕被狂热粉丝们淹没！
Shh! Keep your voice down. I'm afraid of being swarmed by rabid fans!
说起来真是令人伤心，主办方居然只给我安排了一个不着调的小摊位。我还以为会有主席台之类的显眼地方坐坐呢。
It's honestly heartbreaking that the organizers only gave me this dinky little booth. I was hoping for something more prominent, like a spot on the main stage or something.
我知道。对了，要不要收下今天模糊二维马老师签售的第<unbreak>000000001</unbreak>号漫画珍藏本？
I know. Hey, wanna have the #000000001 collector's edition comic that Blurry_QR_Colt signed today?
Sure, mind telling me if it's free?
说话生分了不是…当然是免费的咯！但你懂，免费的才是最贵的嘛~
Whoa, since when did we get all polite... Of course it's free! But you know what they say, nothing's more expensive than free stuff~
Hard to say no to that, right?
没错，这么有纪念价值的东西，不可以拒绝！
Exactly, something this memorable can hardly be refused!
这个序列号太夸张了吧…
This serial number seems a bit much...
知道什么叫美好的祝愿吗…卖得多有什么不好啊，也有你一份版税呢。
Ever heard of "wishful thinking"...? Besides, what's wrong with selling a ton of copies? You're getting royalties too, you know.
Hold up, what's this extra thing?
应援棒。主办方给了我几千根，让我每签售一本就给粉丝发上一根。
Light sticks. The organizers gave me thousands of them and told me to hand one out to each fan who gets a book signed.
他们真的好会差使人。我本想说，难道我不是举世闻名的《苍天航路绒绒号》的作者模糊二维马大人吗？你们把姐姐我当成什么了？

They really know how to push someone around. I wanted to give them a piece of my mind! Am I not the world-renowned author of Fluffy Across the Blue, the great Blurry_QR_Colt? Who exactly do they think I am, chopped liver?
但你说的对，这是「星铁FES」…今天的我只是个配角。
But you're right, this is Star Rail FEST... Today I'm just a side character.
算算时间，该去摊位上和工作人员开始签售了。我不耽误你玩了，拜拜。
Anyway, it's about time to head to the booth and meet up with the staff to start the signing session. I won't keep you from enjoying yourself any longer. Bye-bye!
啊啊，真对不起！你…不要紧吧？
Ah, I'm so sorry! Are you... alright?
What are you, a cannonball or something?
对、对不起…我真的不知道自己全力冲刺时会有这么大的力气。
S-Sorry... I had no idea I could pack such a punch when sprinting at full speed.
得亏我的身体还算结实。
绯英，你真是英魂不散啊。
Evanescia, you just won't stop haunting me, huh?
本来只是想模仿一下「和叼着面包的女高中生在路上相撞」的漫画桥段的……
I just wanted to recreate that classic teen rom-com moment. You know, "bumping into a schoolgirl running late with toast in her mouth"...
我为什么在这儿？大概是因为…剧情需要吧！
Why am I here? Well, probably because... the plot demands it!
你找借口的水平未免也太烂了吧！
That's got to be the lamest excuse I've ever heard!
这都多少年前的老梗了…
这么经典的桥段这么快就不流行了吗！唉……
How could such a classic trope fall out of fashion so quickly!?
你接近我到底有什么目的？
What's your real motive for getting close to me?
喂喂，幻月游戏里好歹是我帮了你一把唉，拿看反派的眼神瞪我，这样好吗？
Hey hey, I helped you out during the Phantasmoon Games, didn't I? Is it really fair to glare at me like I'm some kind of villain?
你突然意识到，正是眼前的少女给了你在第一场谒者之战中翻盘的机会。无论她为何接近你，至少她应该对你没有恶意。

It suddenly hits you... This girl in front of you is the one who gave you the chance to turn the tables in your first battle of the Supplicants. Whatever her reasons for approaching you, she clearly doesn't mean you any harm.
嘿嘿，我可是全程观赏了你在绘世学院的战斗。
Hehe, I watched your whole fight at Graphia Academy.
对于那些有缘来到这场游戏中的人，只要他们能展露出自己的「愿」，我当然愿意结一份善缘啦。
I'm more than happy to befriend those who are destined to be part of these games, as long as they can show me their "wish."
你不是来收回面具的吧？
You're not here to take back the mask, are you?
怎么会，这副面具已经烙印上你灵魂的形状了。我要回来也没什么用啦。
Of course not! That mask has already been imprinted with the shape of your soul. Even if I took it back, it wouldn't be of any use to me.
How were you able to draw the mask?
曾经有个老朋友教过我画画，而我恰好又很有天分。
An old friend of mine once taught me how to draw. And as it turns out, I'm a natural.
就你那画面具时的那几笔鬼涂鸦……
If you call those {F#bad}{M#lousy} doodles you made when drawing the mask "talent"...
我一直在想，自己幻造出来的东西到底能不能骗过幻月的眼睛？
I'd always wondered if something I imagenated could actually fool the Phantasmoon's eyes.
你看，我送给你的这张「临时门票」大有可为，这证明我的画技又精进一筹啦。
See? This "temporary ticket" I gave you shows great promise, proof that my artistic skills have leveled up!
话说到这，你是不是应该…报答我一下？
Speaking of which, shouldn't you... show me some gratitude?
Just so we're clear, I'm completely broke.
Have mercy. I've got no soul to spare.
从来只听说过狐狸报恩…
I've only ever heard of foxes returning favors...
黄牛太猖狂了，我没抢到展会的门票…你能带我进去吗？
The scalpers are completely out of control! I couldn't snag a single ticket to the exhibition... Could you sneak me in?
此刻，有两个声音出现在你的耳朵两侧。它们对你说——
At this very moment, two voices appear on either side of you. They tell you—
（她确实有恩于咱们，但堂堂无名客，怎么能做帮人逃票这种不道德的事？）
(She did help us out before, but as a dignified Nameless, how could I do something as unethical as helping someone sneak in without a ticket?)
（吃人嘴软，拿人手短，就这么点小忙都不帮？再说了，咱们过去是这么有道德的人吗？我怎么不记得？）
(After all she's done for us, you're gonna be stingy about a tiny favor? Besides, since when were we such paragons of virtue? I sure don't remember any of that!)
啊？居然还挺有原则，看来得用这招——
Huh? Didn't expect you to be so principled... Guess I'll have to use this trick...
小浣熊，其实我一直是你的粉丝，从绒绒号第一卷第一话第一页开始，我就已经被你深深地吸引。
Little raccoon, I've actually been a huge fan of yours all along. From the very first page of The Fluffy, Volume 1, Chapter 1, I was already captivated by you.
那天下午，当我从绘世学院的教学楼下路过，瞥见窗边的你。我就知道，我的心已经被你夺走，此生再不会有悲喜。

That afternoon, as I passed by the Graphia Academy building, I caught a glimpse of you by the window. Right then, I knew my heart had been stolen and nothing else would ever make me feel so alive again.
能和你在展会里经历一段快乐的时光，这就是我今生最大的愿望。
Getting to share a few happy moments with you at this exhibition... That's all I could ever ask for in this lifetime.
Okay, stop it, you're scaring me.
先说好，被抓了别供出我。
Let's just get one thing straight: Don't rat me out if you get caught.
别再念了，我答应还不行吗！
Alright, alright, I'll do it! Stop nagging already!
哼哼，果然无论是谁对赞美自己的彩虹屁都无力抵抗！
Hehehe, just as I thought. No one's immune to some good old-fashioned glazing!
走吧，耽误了不少时间，我得先和朋友会合。
Let's go. We've wasted enough time. I need to meet up with my friends first.
唉！{NICKNAME}，我最后还是没管住自己的钱包！
Ugh! {NICKNAME}, I tried, but I still just couldn't keep my wallet shut!
等等，你背后的这个小姐姐看起来有点眼熟，我们是不是在哪儿见过？
Wait, that girl behind you looks kinda familiar. Have we met somewhere before?
That's a pretty lame pickup line.
你在胡言乱语说什么啊？我真的见过她…好像，就在绘世学院里？
What are you talking about? I've definitely seen her... I think it was at Graphia Academy?
This is my pink-haired spirit sidekick.
总感觉你在暗戳戳地骂我…我真的见过她…好像，就在绘世学院里？
I feel like you're throwing shade at me... Anyway, I've definitely seen her... I think it was at Graphia Academy?
仔细一看，这不是绒绒号里的「三月兔」吗？还原度好高啊喂，尤其是这对耳朵。
Wait a sec, isn't this March Bunny from The Fluffy? The attention to detail is insane, especially those ears!
自我介绍一下，我叫绯英，一个普通的绒绒号粉丝。啊啊你一定就是三月兔的原型吧？真人比新闻里还漂亮好几倍呢。
Let me introduce myself. I'm Evanescia, just a normal fan of The Fluffy. Ah, you must be the inspiration for March Bunny! You're way prettier in person than in the news!
三月兔，其实我一直是你的粉丝，从第一卷第一话第一页开始，我就已经被你深深地吸引。
March Bunny, I've actually been a huge fan of yours all along. From the very first page of Volume 1, Chapter 1, I was already captivated by you.
能和你在展会里经历一段快乐的时光，这就是我今生最大的愿望。可我连一张展会的票都买不到，只能站在这里遥望台阶上的世界。

Getting to share a few happy moments with you at this exhibition... That's all I could ever ask for in this lifetime. But I can't even get a single ticket, so I can only stand here gazing up at that world from afar.
你的台词查重率太高了。
Hey, are you recycling your lines?
呵，天呐，绒绒号领域大神。
Oh my goodness, a legendary expert on The Fluffy.
呜呜呜，小可怜，你就放心吧，姐姐一定帮你实现愿望。
Aww, you poor thing, don't you worry! I will definitely make your wish come true.
March, she's making it all up!
三月，你可不要被这么成熟的小妹妹给骗了啊！
March, don't let yourself be fooled by such a seasoned swindler!
怎么就突然结为姐妹了！
You've just met, and you're besties already!?
{F#你要不要加入啊？}{M#这是突然间福至心灵的情谊，你不懂！}
{F#Wanna join us?}{M#It's like our souls just clicked on a cosmic level! You wouldn't get it!}
这么可爱的狐狸小妹妹，她能有什么坏心思？总不会像幻胧那样吧？再说这儿又没有星核和建木。
Such an adorable little fox girl could never have any bad intentions. It's not like she's another Phantylia, right? Besides, this place doesn't even have any Stellaron or Ambrosial Arbor.
英子你放心，包在我身上！
Don't worry, Nescia! Just leave it to me!
That's great! Thank you so much, Miss March!
啊，姬子姐给我发消息，时候差不多了，咱们该进场了。
Ah, Himeko just messaged me. It's about time to head in now.
哇，这不是{NICKNAME}和三月七吗？还原度好高啊。在这么多装成无名客逃票的人里，你们绝对是最像的！
Wow, if it isn't {NICKNAME} and March 7th! Such incredible cosplay accuracy. Out of all the people trying to sneak in disguised as the Nameless, you two are definitely the most convincing!
你有没有考虑过一种可能，{F#她们}{M#他们}就是本人？贵客还要检票，这成什么体统。
Have you considered the possibility that they might be the real deal? And how inappropriate it is to ask our distinguished guests for tickets?
你们好啊，又见面了。总部安排我在这儿等候迎接各位。姬子女士已经入场了。{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}、三月七小姐，还有这位是……？
Hello there, we meet again! HQ arranged for me to wait here and welcome all of you. Miss Himeko has already entered the venue. {M#Mr.}{F#Miss.} {NICKNAME}, Miss March 7th, and this is...?
你好，我叫绯英，是{NICKNAME}的好朋友。
Our new pet aboard the Express.
你好，我叫绯英，是星穹列车的新增随宠。
Hi, I'm Evanescia, the new pet aboard the Astral Express.
她开玩笑呢，这位是我们俩的好朋友。
She's just kidding. This is our good friend.
你说什么呀？这里就我俩。
What are you talking about? It's just the two of us here.
你好，我叫绯英，是星穹列车的英灵。
Hi there! I'm Evanescia, the evanescent spirit of the Astral Express.
Huh!? You can see her too, right?
{F#她们}{M#他们}跟你们开玩笑呢！这位是我和{NICKNAME}的朋友，能否通融一下……
They're just messing with you! She is a friend of ours. Is it possible for you to make an exception just this once...
呵呵，您几位真是太幽默了。
Heh, you folks sure have a great sense of humor.
既然是各位的朋友，没关系，请进吧！
Since you're friends with our guests here, I guess it's all good. Come on in!
各位游客、各位观众你们好！本次「星铁FES」展会正式揭幕之前，请允许我感谢主办方珠星娱乐，同时也感谢噗噜兴业、速建重工、以及满愿电视台的协力支持。

Hello, dear visitors and spectators! Before we officially kick off the "Star Rail FEST" exhibition, I'd like to thank our host, Pearluxe Entertainment, as well as extend our gratitude to Ploo Industries, Turbogen Heavy Industries, and Fulwish TV for their collaborative support.
现已开放的展区，将为您沉浸式重现星穹列车穿梭星海的奇妙冒险之旅！如今各位正身处——贝洛伯格！

The exhibition areas now open will transport you straight into the Astral Express's incredible journey across the sea of stars! And right now, ladies and gentlemen, you're standing in none other than... Belobog!
现在，让我们高声呼唤，来自冰雪的英雄之名吧！
Now, let me hear you call out the name of our hero from the ice and snow!
加油啊！加油啊！可可利亚大人加油啊！
Come on! Come on! You've got this, Madam Cocolia!
长大了，我要做大守护者，变成冰霜巨人和暴走的超古代兵器战斗！
When I grow up, I wanna be the Supreme Guardian and turn into a Frost Giant to fight those rampaging Super Ancient Weapons!
下辈子，我要做大守护者，变成魔法少女保护二相乐园。
In my next life, I wanna be the Supreme Guardian and turn into a magical girl to protect Planarcadia.
这不对吧，为什么大家都在支持…可可利亚？
Wait, this isn't right... Why is everyone supporting... Cocolia?
为什么主持人是火花啊！
流量最大的美少女主播，被请来参加流量最大的活动，有什么问题？
What's wrong with having the most popular streamer girl host the biggest event?
你你你、你不是应该正在被「异常防御部」通缉中吗？
W—W—Wait, aren't you supposed to be on the Department of Aberration Defense's wanted list?
没错呀…所以打完这份工我就得立刻潜逃了。说起来，也许该用花火的身份躲一阵。毕竟，他们要抓的是「火花」，和我「花火」又有什么关系？

That's right... So I'll have to go into hiding right after this job. Come to think of it, maybe I should lie low using my Sparkle identity. After all, what does Sparkle have to do with this Sparxie they're after?
对了，无名客，你要不可怜可怜我，把面具还我……
Oh right, Nameless, won't you take pity on me and give me back my mask...
哟吼，既然两位星穹列车的无名客来到了现场，那就让我们展开一场紧张刺激的绒绒号知识问答环节！
Yoohoo! Since we have two Nameless from the Astral Express here with us today, let's kick off an exciting The Fluffy trivia quiz!
Actually, I've never read the comics...
I haven't had a chance to study up yet...
火花的攻击又要来了吗？
Is Sparxie going to strike again?
请听题——在绒绒号贝洛伯格卷最终话，「大守护者的纽带」中，可可利亚召唤了什么与她并肩作战？
Here's your question: In the final chapter of The Fluffy's Belobog arc, "The Supreme Guardian's Bond," what did Cocolia summon to fight by her side?
能变身冰之巨人的守护者魔棒！
The Guardian Wand that could transform her into an Ice Giant!
看得出来，这位小妹妹是绒绒号的忠实读者啊，竟然比两位无名客答得都快！
Well, well, looks like this young lady here is quite the devoted reader of The Fluffy, answering even faster than the Nameless!
Shouldn't it be the Engine of Creation?
对哦，我都快忘记最初唤醒造物引擎的是她了。
Oh right, I almost forgot she was the one who first awakened the Engine of Creation.
It was clearly the Lance of the Eternal Freeze.
那俩大冰碴子，确实让人印象深刻。
Those two huge chunks of ice were definitely quite impressive.
Hey, why are you stealing my thunder?
我可是绒绒号的死忠读者啊！
I'm a die-hard fan of The Fluffy, you know!
而且冰之巨人是怎么回事？可可利亚虽然会变身，但也不至于大到和造物引擎一个量级。
And what's the deal with this Ice Giant? Sure, Cocolia can transform, but she shouldn't be anywhere near the size of the Engine of Creation!
什么，可可利亚女士以人类之躯和造物引擎作战？那不是…更炫酷了嘛！呃，可是漫画里没画这段啊！
What? Lady Cocolia fought the Engine of Creation in her human form? That... That just makes it even more awesome! Ugh, but they didn't show that part in the comic!

这就是真珠所猜想的，潜在水面之下的谒者吗？
Is this the Supplicant lurking beneath the surface that Pearl theorized about?
但四个破晓战士中究竟谁才是谒者？看实力，也许是红色的那一个……
But which of the four Daybreak Warriors is the Supplicant? Judging from their strength, I think it might be the red one...
先别发呆了，咱们还是到展区外看看情况吧！
Forget it! We should go check out what's happening outside the exhibition area!
唉，平白无故打断了一场演出。不过，其实我也没那么想看「云五战队集结」的舞台剧啦。
Interrupting a show for no reason. But to be honest, I wasn't dying to watch that "High-Cloud Squadron Assembles" play anyway.
所以…关于仙舟的故事，不会也是模糊老师瞎编的…吧？
So... don't tell me this whole Xianzhou story is also something Blurry made up...?
奇怪，我怎么一点儿也不意外。
Funny, can't say I'm surprised at all.
幻胧可不是我一个人打败的。
I didn't defeat Phantylia on my own.
It was Jing Yuan and Dan Heng working together...
我可不敢贪天之功为己功，其实幻胧是景元将军和丹恒联手打败的。
I wouldn't dare take credit for what I didn't do, since it was in fact General Jing Yuan and Dan Heng who teamed up to defeat Phantylia.
至于云上五骁，那五个人建功立业的时代，已经是七百多年前了。
As for the High-Cloud Quintet, it's been over seven hundred years since those five made their mark.
听起来也许很离谱，仙舟人的寿命普遍都很长。你看过绒绒号的漫画，里面应该有介绍这些设定吧。
I know it may sound wild, but Xianzhou folks generally live really long lives. You've read The Fluffy comics, haven't you? Pretty sure they covered all that lore in there.
有啊，长生不死…有人觉得那是诅咒。不过我却觉得，「丰饶」并没有祂的名声那么可怕。
Yeah, immortality... Some see it as a curse. But personally, I don't think the Abundance is as terrifying as THEIR reputation suggests.
Better not say that out loud...
别在仙舟人面前这么说喔。
Don't say that in front of Xianzhou folks.
差点忘了咱们现在已经不在仙舟了…敞开了谈谈丰饶，应该没问题吧。
I almost forgot we're not in the Xianzhou anymore... Should be fine to talk openly about the Abundance now, I guess?
是没问题啦。但仙舟人对丰饶的态度也不算空穴来风——咱们和步离人交过手，和魔阴身打过架……
Yeah, that's not an issue. But the Xianzhou's attitude towards the Abundance isn't totally baseless. We've clashed with the borisin, fought against the mara-struck...
啊，一想到要是当年那场仗没能打赢幻胧，宇宙里可就诞生一个不死不灭的绝灭大君了。
Ah, just imagine if we hadn't won that battle against Phantylia back then, the universe would've ended up with an immortal, indestructible Lord Ravager!
其实，在我看来，「丰饶」与「欢愉」的相性还挺不错的。
Actually, I think the Abundance and Elation make quite a good match.
毕竟，只有拥有无穷的生命，才能追求无穷的喜乐。
After all, only with infinite life can one pursue infinite joy.
在我看来，活着的人，有选择死亡的权利。但活着的人，也有选择活下去的权利。
In my opinion, those who are alive have the right to choose death. But they also have the right to choose to live on.
毕竟总有什么东西，值得你在睡去后为明天睁开眼睛。
After all, there's always something out there that makes tomorrow worth waking up to.
好文绉绉的发言啊。这孩子，一认真说起话来感觉皱纹都上来了……
Wow, getting all philosophical on me now. When this kid gets serious like that, I swear you can practically see the wrinkles forming...
欸嘿！说起醒啊睡啊的，我们是不是接下来该去逛逛「匹诺康尼区」了！
Hehe! Since we're talking about waking up, shouldn't we head over to the Penacony Exhibition Area next?
啊，还要继续逛展？咱们是不是得提防着一些了？既然破晓战队都上门挑战来了，会不会还有其他谒者在我们看不见的地方憋坏呢？

Huh, you want to keep exploring? We need to be a bit more careful now, don't you think? I mean, the Daybreak Squadron already came gunning for us. Who knows if there are other Supplicants lurking around, just waiting to make their move?
哎呀，三月姐，不要一副担惊受怕的样子嘛，小浣熊不是三下五除二就收拾了对手吗？
Oh come on, March, don't be such a worrywart! Didn't our little raccoon take out those guys in no time at all?
Rest assured, I've got your back!
好有安全感的发言啊！小浣熊，其实我一直是你的粉丝——
Such reassuring words! Little raccoon, I've actually been a huge fan of yours all along...
三月，{NICKNAME}，你们没事吧？瓦尔特提醒我收看直播，我看到了破晓战队向{NICKNAME}发起挑战。
March, {NICKNAME}, are you alright? Welt told me to watch the livestream, and I saw the Daybreak Squadron challenging {NICKNAME}.
你做的很好，我猜他们的用意正是通过挑战来激起支持他们的观众的愿力。
You did well. I bet their intention was to stir up their supporters' Wishpower through the challenge.
如果你贸然伤到他们，也许转而会将许多支持者推向他们那一边。
If you'd hurt them recklessly, it might've pushed many supporters straight into their arms.
又见到你了！列车领航员，姬子小姐！
Nice to see you again! Express Navigator, Miss Himeko!
恕我眼拙，我们以前见过吗？
Pardon my poor memory, but have we met before?
当然啦！…我在新闻上见过你不止一次！久仰久仰！
Of course! ...I've seen you in the news more than once! It's such an honor to meet you!
这位绯英小妹妹，应该是绘世学院的学生吧？我和{NICKNAME}在逛展时遇见了她，她可是绒绒号和列车的双重粉丝呢！
This is Evanescia. I think she's a student from Graphia Academy? {NICKNAME} and I ran into her at this expo, and she's a huge fan of both The Fluffy and the Express!
She's the one who drew my mask.
你所说的在幻月秘庭里见到的女孩，就是她？
So that girl you saw in the Phantasmoon Courtyard... It was her?
等、等等…她给你画了面具？也就是说，英子其实根本一点儿也不普通是吗？
W—Wait a second... She made you a mask? So you're telling me Nescia isn't just a normal girl?
A Miss Fox here to return a favor... maybe?
我嘛，和你一样，是一位幻月游戏的观众，只是身处的位置有一点特殊啦。
Me? I'm no different from you, just a spectator of the Phantasmoon Games. Though I suppose my position is a bit... special.
和两位这一路，我玩得很开心。没想到，绒绒号背后的故事居然也这么有趣。
I had so much fun tagging along with you two. Who would've thought that The Fluffy had such an interesting backstory?
我想，是时候要和各位暂别了！
I think it's time to say goodbye for now!
既然被点破了身份，灰姑娘的魔法也要失灵啦。一时兴起的游玩，不妨就用一时兴起的离开做结好了~
Now that my identity has been exposed, Cinderella's magic is about to wear off. And since this little adventure started on a whim, might as well end it on one too~
小浣熊，你应该能感受到，这场展会所带来的关注、喜悦，随着你满足人们的「愿」，力量也在涌入你的面具。
Little raccoon, you can feel it, can't you? All that attention, all that joy from the exhibition. As you fulfill people's "wishes," that power has been flowing straight into your mask.
它或会成就一段善缘，也可能造就一颗恶果。无论你选择什么，我都希望，你不要成为一个无趣的角色。
It might spark something beautiful, or plant the seeds of something sinister. Whatever you choose, I just hope you won't become a boring character.
啊，我是不是又说的有点太多了……
Ah, I'm rambling again, aren't I...?
那这样吧…临走之前，猜个谜缓解一下尴尬气氛好了：你知道花儿为什么如此美丽吗？
Well then... Before I go, let me break this awkward moment with a riddle: Do you know why flowers are so beautiful?
不是…你背后的花哪来的？
Wait... Where did those flowers behind you come from?
怎么啦，美少女自带背景，不行啊？
What's wrong? Can't a pretty girl have her own special effects?
知道你这人没个正形，看来我只好自问自答了。
I know you're never serious about anything, so I guess I'll just have to answer my own question.
因为一同走在花下的人？
Is it because of the person walking among the flowers?
You're quite the romantic, aren't you?
But I have to say, wrong~ answer~
你谜语人的毛病又犯了？
Is your Riddler syndrome acting up again?
知道你这人没个正形，看来我只好自问自答了。
I know you're never serious about anything, so I guess I'll just have to answer my own question.
因为花总是<color=#dbc291ff>转瞬飘逝</color>啊。
你自带的背景，没带走啊……
You left your own special effects behind...
幻月游戏…总是会出现出乎意料的人，出乎意料的事情。虽然这位绯英小姐说她只是一个观众，但是……
Unexpected people and unexpected things always make an appearance in the Phantasmoon Games... Although Miss Evanescia claims to be just a spectator...
能绘制面具并且令人成为谒者…怎么想她的身份都不可能普通。
As someone who can create masks and allow others to become Supplicants... there's no way she's just some ordinary girl.
也不知发生在{NICKNAME}身上的事情，究竟意味着什么。
I just don't know what to make of everything happening to {NICKNAME}.
She doesn't seem to have any ill intentions.
Mom, I promise she won't lead me astray.
Alright, time for us to head out.
继续前进，去下一站的「匹诺康尼区」。
Let's continue forward, to the next stop: the Penacony Exhibition Area.
我有预感，破晓战队的挑战还没有结束，作为展会的主角，如果为了避免冲突而离开，落到所有观众眼中，或许会被视为不战而逃。
I have a feeling that the Daybreak Squadron's challenge isn't over yet. As the stars of this exhibition, if you left just to avoid conflict, all the spectators might think you chickened out and fled.
可恶，破晓战队这一出搞得我浑身不自在，总担心有人在偷偷盯着我们。
Darn it, this whole Daybreak Squadron business has got me on edge. Somehow I can't shake the feeling we're being watched.
说个好消息吧，至少{NICKNAME}不是孤立无援的，真珠派出的人正在赶往「匹诺康尼区」与我们汇合。
Here's some good news: At least {NICKNAME} isn't completely without help. Pearl's people are on their way to the Penacony Exhibition Area to join up with us.
如果我趴到轨道上，会不会被列车碾到？
Would I get run over by the Express if I lay down on the tracks?
会的，而且会被撞进二次元，说不定能转生异世界，成为勇者什么的！
Yep, and you'd get blasted straight into a comic book! Who knows, maybe you'll be reborn as some superhero or something!
That's what I'd call true happiness.
…真没想到，他们居然还原了列车飞驰撞击「神主日」的那一幕。
...It's hard to believe they recreated the scene where the Express crashes into The Great Septimus!
明明前面几个展区都做得这么搞笑，这神主日倒挺还原。
All the previous exhibitions were so hilarious, but they really nailed The Great Septimus part.
Like they say: Once you turn to the dark side, you get triple the power.
你什么意思？是不是在点本姑娘？
What's that supposed to mean? You taking a jab at me?
I was thinking of inviting Sunny over here.
So, where's the person Pearl sent?
Yoohoo~ How ya doing, Gray Hair?
我不会把面具还你的，死心吧你！
I'm not giving the mask back to you. Get over it!
我听说你和超级英雄们大打出手的事情啦，不过，出于惺惺相惜的对手情谊，我想给你提个醒——
I heard about your big fight with the superheroes. And since I actually respect you as a rival, I thought I'd give you a heads-up.
你可能以为自己在幻月游戏中大赢特赢，但大部分人未必是这么看的。
You might think you scored a massive win in the Phantasmoon Games, but most people probably don't see it that way.
总之，新闻正在播，去看看吧！
Anyway, the news is on right now. Why don't you go check it out?
就在刚才！正在举行的「星铁FES」展会现场，爆发了极其恶劣的暴力事件！
Just moments ago! An extremely violent incident broke out at the ongoing "Star Rail FEST" exhibition venue!
星穹列车的谒者{NICKNAME}，竟公然对深受乐园居民爱戴的本土英雄团队——「破晓战队」发动了残忍的袭击！ 现场一片混乱！
The Astral Express Supplicant {NICKNAME} brazenly launched a brutal attack on the beloved local heroes, the Daybreak Squadron! The scene descended into total chaos!
天啊！这太可怕了！这位无名客不是才击败了火花，拯救了绘世学院吗？
Oh my! This is terrifying! Didn't this Nameless just defeat Sparxie and save Graphia Academy?
难道这一场胜利还不够吗？难道{F#她}{M#他}也如同被击败的火花一样，威胁到我们所有人的安全？
Was that victory still not enough? Could {M#he,}{F#she,} like the defeated Sparxie, now be a threat to everyone's safety?
令人心寒！现场传来的视频片段中，{NICKNAME}宣称此举是为了向这个世界展示星穹列车的所谓「开拓精神」！
How chilling! In the video footage from the scene, {NICKNAME} claimed {M#his}{F#her} act was to demonstrate the so-called "Trailblazing Spirit" of the Astral Express to this world!
对上我，你们不可能胜利！
You don't stand a chance against me.
难道这就是{F#她}{M#他}口中的「开拓」？用蛮横无理的暴力手段，来打击乐园本土的守护者、践踏我们自己的英雄吗？
Is this what {M#he}{F#she} calls "the Trailblaze"? Using brute force and violence to strike down the guardians of this arcadia and trample over our own heroes?
这到底是…是{F#她}{M#他}一时冲动兽性大发？还是说，{F#她}{M#他}冷漠无情的本性终于彻底暴露？
Was it... a sudden violent outburst? Or was this the moment {F#her}{M#his} true heartless nature finally came to light?
满愿电视台将持续追踪报导这场骇人听闻的事件！请您锁定频道，切勿走开！
Fulwish TV will continue to follow this shocking incident! Stay tuned and don't go away!
哈哈，现在网络上也都传开啦~
Haha, it's all over the internet now~
有人说你是暴力狂，还有人认为是你搞出了鸽川血案，你就是告死魔二代。
Some say you're a violent maniac, others think you're behind the bloodbath in Dovebrook, that you're the second Herald of Death.
喂喂，请问此时此刻的你心情如何啊，如何啊？
Oopsie, how are you feeling right about now, hmmm?
Go ahead and laugh all you want.
怎么会~作为著名网络主播，可怜的火花花一直倍受网络暴力的困扰啊~
How could I? As a famous streamer, poor little Sparxicle has always been troubled by constant cyberbullying~
还有个来自星穹列车的无名客给我好一顿线下暴力~嘤嘤。
And then there was some Nameless from the Astral Express who gave me quite the beating IRL~
Someone's definitely pulling strings behind my back.
当然啦，肯定是有人在背后装神弄鬼，煽动舆情。作为这一行的头部主播，火花花看一眼就知道啦。
Of course, someone's definitely pulling strings behind the scenes and stirring up drama. As a top streamer in this field, Sparxicle can spot these tricks from a mile away!
对了，你是不是还接受了电视台的新闻采访？
Oh right, didn't you also do a TV news interview?
I didn't say anything in particular, did I?
你说了什么并不重要。重要的是，你说了。
It's not about what you said... It's that you said it.
来来来，我发给你采访的视频吧！
Here, let me send you the interview video!
多的话我就不说了，既然你能打败花火大人…不对，是火花大人，我也不希望你在这几个跳梁小丑面前一败涂地。
I won't go any further, but since you managed to defeat Miss Sparkle... no, I mean Miss Sparxie, I don't want to see you embarrass yourself in front of those clowns.
你好，{NICKNAME}！打扰了！我们是满愿电视台的！真幸运能在这儿碰到您！您现在有空吗？
Hi, {NICKNAME}! Sorry to bother you! We're with Fulwish TV! It's our lucky day running into you here! Do you have a moment?
简短点，我稍后还有安排。
Keep it brief, I've got plans later.
第一个问题：作为列车重新启程的站点，我想先请您谈谈自己对二相乐园的感想。
First question: Seeing as Planarcadia was the starting point of the Express's new voyage, how would you describe your impressions of this place?
二相乐园…人人都在追逐热点，寻找乐子。
Planarcadia... Everyone's chasing the latest trends, looking for fun.
有意思。幻月游戏的历史上，像您这样知名的银河大人物参与可是极其罕见的事。作为星穹列车的谒者，您在这场「游戏」中想要为这个世界带来怎样的改变？

Interesting. Throughout the history of the Phantasmoon Games, it's been extremely rare to have such a renowned cosmic figure as yourself participating. As the Astral Express's Supplicant, what kind of changes do you hope to bring to this world in these Games?
向大家展示「开拓」的力量，去改变这个世界！
Show everyone the strength of the Trailblaze, to change this world!
令人印象深刻的回答！说到这个，您加入游戏后率先击败了代表假面愚者的火花小姐。对于未来可能面临的本土谒者的挑战，您作何感想？

That's an impressive answer! Speaking of which, after joining the games, you immediately went to defeat Miss Sparxie, who represented the Masked Fools. What are your thoughts on potentially facing native Supplicants in the future?
其他的本土谒者…太危险了。我更愿意靠暴力打败他们。
The other native Supplicants... way too dangerous. I'd rather defeat them through violence.
说起本土的谒者，我们注意到「星铁FES」是由珠星财团为列车举办的欢迎仪式。有传言说公司也是列车的资助者，请问您这一次参与「游戏」代表的究竟是列车还是公司？

Speaking of local Supplicants, we've noticed that "Star Rail FEST" is Pearluxe Corp's way of rolling out the red carpet for the Express. There are rumors that the IPC is also sponsoring the Express. So, I have to ask: Are you representing the Express or the IPC in these Games?
说到底，公司的利益。真珠女士和珠星盛情邀请，我不是宾客，我是这里的主人。
At the end of the day, this is a festival for the IPC's interests. Madam Pearl and Pearluxe extended such a warm invitation. I'm not one of the guests. I'm the master of this place.
啊这…这、这这这！这根本就是恶意剪辑栽赃{NICKNAME}吧！太不要脸了！
W—Wait, what!? This... This is a totally malicious edit to frame {NICKNAME}! How shameless!
虽然每个字都是我说的…
Well, technically those were all my words...
…确实，每个字都出自我的嘴巴。但拼凑起来，就变成了宣战发言。
...Indeed, every word came from my mouth. But when pieced together, it turned into a declaration of war.
They sure know how to twist other people's words...
十五年过去了，幻月游戏的竞争方式，发生了某种变化。破晓战队的挑衅，反倒成了烟雾弹…对手深谙如何操控舆论的利刃在台下出招。

Over these fifteen years, the nature of competition in the Phantasmoon Games has evolved. The Daybreak Squadron's taunts were just smoke and mirrors. The real game is being played in the shadows, where our opponents have mastered the art of weaponizing public opinion.
细想也是必然。毕竟这场「游戏」真正的主角，从来不是台上的谒者…而是那些目光所系的观众。
Come to think of it, it's only natural. After all, the true stars of the Games were never the Supplicants on stage... but rather the audience whose gazes they command.
确实，观众们现在可是热血沸腾，等着看{NICKNAME}大显神威呢…
Indeed, the audience is all fired up, waiting to see you work your magic, {NICKNAME}...
不过嘛~我敢打赌，他们心底更想看到的，是破晓战队狠狠挫一挫星穹列车的锐气。
But you know what~ I bet what they really want to see deep down is the Daybreak Squadron taking the Astral Express down a peg or two.
哟，星穹列车的各位，又见面了。
Well, well, if it isn't the folks from the Astral Express. Fancy meeting you again.
网上的风暴…比你们阻止「火花大会」那一天，更猛烈数倍。
This storm online... is several times more intense than the day you stopped SparxiCon.
朽叶小姐！你也看到这些假新闻了吧？
Miss Kuchiba! You've seen all this fake news too, right?
Aren't you guys a bit late for this?
抱歉，路上…有点小耽搁。自打进了展区，至少遇到七个家伙堵着我索要那个叫「瓦尔特」的签名。
Sorry, got a bit... held up on the way. Since I entered the exhibition area, at least seven folks stopped me asking for the autograph of this guy called Welt.
真珠指派我们追踪共愿帮的灭门惨案…但种种可疑的蛛丝马迹，把线头从幸福微笑研究会一路牵上了…破晓战队。
Pearl assigned us to investigate the Synwish Syndicate massacre... but every suspicious thread we followed led us from the Research Society of Happy Smiles straight to... the Daybreak Squadron.
然后是那个在幕后编织蛛网的家伙——满愿。
And then there's the one pulling the strings behind the scenes: Fulwish.
怎么，听过这个名字？那就有意思了。
Oh? You know that name? Now this is getting interesting.
她是我的学妹，十五年前，她也是绘世学院现场唯一生还的学生。
She was my junior at school. Fifteen years ago, she was also the only student who survived at Graphia Academy.
好消息是，你这位学妹活得比谁都滋润。名下有电视台、慈善组织，家大业大，有钱有势。
The good news is, your junior is living better than anyone else. She owns TV stations, charity organizations, has a huge business empire, and wields both wealth and power.
坏消息嘛…她恐怕想在幻月游戏期间谋划点什么，最最糟糕的那种。我的直觉告诉我，共愿帮满门的血债…恐怕也得记在她的账上。

As for the bad news... She's probably plotting something for the Phantasmoon Games, and I mean the worst kind of something. My gut tells me that the Synwish Syndicate massacre... well, that's probably on her tab too.
真珠女士把不死途先生派来负责诸位的安全…当然，我明白，以无名客的身手本不需要加派人手保护，但真珠女士不想冒任何风险。

Madam Pearl sent Mr. Ashveil to ensure everyone's safety... Of course, I understand that with the Nameless' skills, there's no real need for extra protection. But Madam Pearl didn't want to take any chances.
简而言之，请各位把我当黑手套来用就成，不必客气。
Long story short, feel free to use me as muscle. No need to be shy about it.
所以我们还继续去帕姆塔顶吗？
So, are we still heading to the top of Pom-Pom tower?
我们应该继续前进。如果我猜的没错，破晓战队还会在那里进行第二次袭击。
We should keep moving forward. If my guess is right, the Daybreak Squadron will launch their second attack there.
抛下公平公正、和谐友好的幻想吧。打从此刻起，幻月游戏随时都可能要步十五年前的后尘了——
Forget about any fantasies of fairness and harmony. From this moment on, the Phantasmoon Games could follow in the footsteps of what happened fifteen years ago...
一旦这场战斗向流血的方向发展，恐惧会透过屏幕，成为某位谒者的愿力……
Once this battle turns bloody, fear will seep through the screen and become some Supplicant's Wishpower...
瞧，这就是现代社会的弊端，好事不出门，坏事传千里。
See, that's the problem with modern society. Good news stays home while bad news spreads like wildfire.
啊，这个展区的内容我知道，得亏看了三月小妹妹让给我的漫画。
Oh, I know about this exhibition area! Thanks to the comic Miss March gave me.
看不出来，你居然还看漫画。
Huh, wouldn't have pegged you for a comic book reader.
去祭拜恶水的路上顺道翻了翻，虽然那一册故事前不着村后不着店，倒是有趣的很。
I flipped through it on my way to pay respects to Caustide. Even though that volume's story was pretty random and all over the place, it was quite interesting.
一群毛茸茸的动物为了唤醒匹诺康尼的其他动物，占领了苏乐达汽水工厂……
A group of furry animals took over the SoulGlad soda factory to wake up the other animals in Penacony...
用苏乐达给列车补充燃料…这广告打得也太生硬了。
Using SoulGlad as fuel for the Express... Talk about forced product placement.
Time to get to work, detective.
破晓战队…本以为他们也是列车的粉丝，没想到转眼间大家变成了敌人。
Daybreak Squadron... I thought they were fans of the Express too, but in the blink of an eye, we somehow became enemies.
也许这些人未必是敌人，他们可能受到了背后之人的挑唆。
They might not be the real enemy here. Someone could be pulling their strings from the shadows.
如果可以，我更希望说服他们退让——一旦开战，就会像火里倾倒燃油一样，在观众心中激起好战的情绪……
If possible, I'd rather persuade them to back down, since once a battle starts, it'll be like pouring fuel into a fire, stoking the audience's bloodlust...
这样的「游戏」只会陷入疯狂，我不希望十五年前的景象再度出现在这片土地上。
A Phantasmoon Game like that would only descend into madness. And I certainly do not want to see what happened fifteen years ago repeat itself on these lands.
星穹列车，我还以为你不会来了。呀，你带上了…帮手？
The Astral Express, just as I thought you weren't going to show up. Oh, you brought... help?
还是个老熟人…大叔，好久不见了。
And it's an old friend... Been a while, old man.
你们该不会是一伙的吧？
Don't tell me you're in cahoots with them?
在鸽川生活过的人，彼此都有些缘分。既然你们把我当成老熟人，我不想摆出大人不可一世的态度来告诉你们该做什么、不该做什么。

People who have lived in Dovebrook share a special connection. Since you're treating me as an old friend, I don't want to act like some high-and-mighty adult telling you what you should and shouldn't do.
我只会告诉你们，眼下你们在干的事情，已经跨过了危险的边界…无论满愿给你们下达了什么指示，现在罢手，一切还来得及。
I'll only tell you this: What you're doing right now has already crossed a dangerous line... Whatever orders Fulwish gave you, there's still time to turn back if you stop now.
还有你，真弘。在我如此发自肺腑地告诫后，你依旧要站在满愿这一边吗？
And you, Magnus. After my heartfelt warning, do you still insist on taking Fulwish's side?
大叔，幻月游戏的谒者挑战不受任何约束，你无权阻止我们——
Listen up, old man! Supplicants' challenges during the Phantasmoon Games have no restrictions. That means you have no right to stop us...
我们不是告死魔——这一次我们不是为了杀戮而来的！
We're not the Herald of Death, and we're definitely not here for bloodshed this time!
我们会向人们证明，我们才是能守护他们幸福的英雄！
We will prove to the people that we are true heroes who can protect their happiness!
星穹列车…这些天外来客，说自己从绝灭大君的手中拯救了银河…但谁知道真相呢？
The Astral Express... These visitors from beyond the sky claim they saved the cosmos from a Lord Ravager... but who knows what the truth really is?
所谓的「拯救银河」，也许只是公司的一个企划…就像曾经的我们一样，在电视里卖力地演出，努力想去安慰电视机前的孩子——
This so-called "saving the cosmos" might just be another scheme of the IPC... Just like us back then, putting on a show on TV, desperately trying to comfort the kids in front of the screen...
告诉那些孩子…告诉过去的自己，在告死魔来的时候，会有英雄挡在所有人面前的。
Tell those children... Tell my past self that, when the Herald of Death comes, there will be heroes who put themselves between everyone else and the threat.
可是，十五年前我们这些孩子需要人保护的时候，星穹列车的无名客又在哪儿？！
But where were the Nameless of the Astral Express when we children needed protection fifteen years ago!?
小灰，别被他们骗了，别被这些光鲜亮丽的银河英雄骗了啊！
Gray, don't be fooled by these flashy cosmic heroes!
星穹列车根本不在意我们的幸福，他们像所有观光客一样来了又走…不！他们比观光客更无情！因为他们要践踏欢愉的仪式，要夺走乐园居民们的目光！
