The Astral Express doesn't care about our happiness at all. They come and go like all tourists... No! They're even more heartless than tourists! Because they're here to trample on the Elation's ceremony and steal the arcadian people's attention!
他们把我们这些原住民对「英雄」的幻想，替换成了他们的模样，只为满足他们名叫「开拓精神」的虚荣心！
They replaced our fantasies of heroes with their own image, all to satisfy their vanity called "the Trailblazing spirit"!
告诉我，{NICKNAME}，你这辈子有没有哪怕一刻，体会过在黄昏的血地里发抖的感觉……
Tell me, {NICKNAME}, have you ever, even for a moment, felt what it's like to tremble on blood-soaked ground at dusk...
我还记得自己在空间站面对末日兽的时刻……
I still remember that moment when I faced the Doomsday Beast on the space station...
每一次战斗，我都会恐惧。
There's not a single time I go into a fight that I'm not terrified.
我害怕失去伙伴…害怕死亡…我害怕的事情有很多。
I'm afraid of losing my companions... afraid of death... There are so many things that I fear.
You're directing your hatred at the wrong person.
你仇恨的不是星穹列车，你只是在恨你自己…那个年幼时无能为力，没法保护所有人的自己。但我想告诉你，无能为力从来都不是你的错。
It's not the Astral Express you hate. You're just hating yourself... that powerless child who couldn't protect everyone. But I want to tell you, being powerless was never your fault.
星穹列车宇宙第一！星穹列车宇宙最强！
The Astral Express is the GOAT! The Astral Express is number one in the universe!
废什么话！撕起来，打个头破血流！我要看到血流成河！
Quit yapping! Tear 'em to shreds! Beat 'em to a pulp! I want a bloodbath!
破晓战队，把这群外星佬揍趴下！
Daybreak Squadron, beat these alien punks to the ground!
闭嘴！都给我闭嘴！作为孩子，无能为力确实不是我的错。但我们…血涂游戏的遗孤们绝不会一直无能为力下去。
Shut up! All of you, shut up! As a kid, it wasn't my fault that I was powerless. But we... the orphans of the Bloodstained Games won't remain that way forever.
我们…经受了「幸福手术」的转变。我们战胜了过去那个弱小的自己，我们成了破晓战士！我们变强了！
We've... undergone the Happiness Surgery transformation. We've overcome our weak former selves and become Daybreak Warriors! We've grown stronger!
奇怪，明明已经抹除了痛苦…为什么我刚才还会那么害怕，还会有眼泪？
Strange... Even though our suffering was erased, why was I so scared just now? And why were there tears?
大哥，因为…这些痛苦一直都在！是时候战胜它了！是时候用幸福的力量，最后一次战胜它了！
Brother, that's only because... this pain has been here all along! It's time to overcome it! It's time to use the power of happiness to defeat it once and for all!
说的不错。让我们做该做的事情吧——
Well said. Then let's finish what needs to be done...
<color=#dbc291ff>从这些外来者手中，把哈托彼亚人心目中的英雄形象，夺回来！</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Let's reclaim from these outsiders the image of heroes that the people of Ahatopia hold dear!</color>
抱歉，不死途大哥，英雄是不能背叛同伴的！
Sorry, Mr. Ashveil, but a hero never betrays his companions!
我们是破晓战队，是四人同心、保护世界的战士，我不会让伙伴们还有那些支持我们的人失望。
We are the Daybreak Squadron, four warriors of one heart, united to protect the world. I won't let down my companions or those who believe in us.
我们才是真正的英雄。看看这座列车长的雕塑吧，它空有一副躯壳。哪怕是坐拥无数资源的珠星财团，也没法为它赋予生命。
We are the true heroes. Look at this statue of the conductor, it's just an empty shell. Even Pearluxe Corp, with countless resources at their disposal, can't breathe life into it.
但我们可以。就让我来证明给你们看吧——
But we can. Let me prove it to you...
What are you guys going to do!?
别对列车长的雕像动手！
快阻止他们！别让他们打着星穹列车的招牌，败坏咱们的名声。
Stop them! Don't let them drag the Astral Express's name through the mud!
我将提供愿力，令它苏醒。
I shall provide the Wishpower to awaken it.
我将成为骨架，使它站立。
I shall become its skeleton and allow it to stand.
我将化作燃料，催它前进！
I shall turn into the fuel that drives it forward!
我将成为核心，令引擎奏响「永恒的喜乐」！
I shall become the core that makes the engine sing the song of Eternal Joy!
感谢乘坐本次列车，乐子神在上，祝您游览愉快。
Thank you for riding with us today. May The Laughter watch over you, and please enjoy your journey.
哇，展区入口挤满了列车粉丝……
Wow, the exhibition entrance is packed with Express fans...
快点快点，再晚就抢不到了！
Hurry up, hurry up! We'll miss out if we're late!
Are those hired cosplayers over there?
May the trio stay together forever!
So, how's that for pure love, huh?
星穹列车，真的会给二相乐园带来幸福吗？
Will the Astral Express truly bring happiness to Planarcadia?
列车那个{F#女孩}{M#男孩}来了——快，准备一下！
That Express {M#boy}{F#girl} is here! Quick, get ready!
没事，有这些素材就够了。
No worries, this material will do just fine.
Hey {NICKNAME}, over here! I'm right here~
接下来要买什么呢…球棒浣熊、三月兔、汪汪丹的玩偶？
What should I get next... A Baseball Raccoon, March Bunny, or Woof Woof Dan plushie?
还是…让模糊老师给签个名？
Or... maybe I should get an autograph from Blurry?
各位，星穹列车的嘉宾即将入场，请准备好你们的欢呼！
Ladies and gentlemen, the guests from the Astral Express are about to make their entrance. Get ready to make some noise!
欢迎乘坐绒绒号接驳列车！一起开拓未来帕！
Welcome aboard The Fluffy Shuttle Express! Together, we'll trailblaze into the future!
Next stop: Xianzhou Luofu Exhibition Area.
乘客您好，绒绒号接驳列车即将起航。下一站，「仙舟罗浮展区」。
Welcome aboard, passengers! The Fluffy Shuttle Express is about to depart. Next stop: Xianzhou Luofu Exhibition Area.
观众们的情绪高涨，连愿力都凝结成了「点赞」的形态。
The audience is brimming with excitement. Their Wishpower is even crystallizing into the shape of "like" buttons.
收集它们，为列车充满燃料吧。
Collect them to fuel up the Express!
「仙舟罗浮展区」即将到站，请乘客坐稳扶好，耐心等待。
We're approaching the Xianzhou Luofu Exhibition Area. Please remain seated and hold on tight.
我来游览，我做苦工，我将水管疏通好，一切献给观众们……
I come to sight-see. I do hard labor. I fix these pipes... All for the audience...
终于搞定了！此时此刻，我无比想念丹恒！
Finally done! I've never missed Dan Heng as much as I do now!
幻月游戏是寻找最接近欢愉之人的仪式！
The Phantasmoon Games are a ceremony to find those closest to Elation!
我们会向所有人展现破晓战士的英姿！
We'll show everyone the heroism of the Daybreak Warriors!
A powerful hit! Come at me again!
我们的身体经受过转变，不会有事的！
Our bodies have been transformed, so we'll be just fine!
对上我，你们不可能胜利！
You don't stand a chance against me.
乘客您好，绒绒号接驳列车即将起航。下一站，「匹诺康尼展区」。
Welcome aboard, passengers! The Fluffy Shuttle Express is about to depart. Next stop: Penacony Exhibition Area.
星穹列车一定是公司派来的狗！
The Astral Express? Just another IPC lapdog!
为了二相乐园，加油！破晓战队。
For Planarcadia! Let's go, Daybreak Squadron!
「匹诺康尼展区」即将到站，请乘客坐稳扶好，耐心等待。
We're approaching the Penacony Exhibition Area. Please remain seated and hold on tight.
要想往上走，得先给接驳的列车「加足燃料」。
To move forward, we'll need to "fuel up" the shuttle Express first.
来吧，让我们给列车「补充燃料」吧！
准备好了吗，列车要发车了！
Ready to roll? The Express is about to depart!
Look, the Express people are here!
快，躲远点，万一两边打起来伤到就惨了。
Quick, stay back! It'd be terrible if you got caught in the crossfire.
星穹列车，我们等你很久了！
Astral Express, we've been waiting for you for quite a while!
清理掉…垃圾，大家都…快乐！
Clean up... the trash, and everyone will... be happy!
不干净的…不快乐的…统统…扫除！
The unclean... and the unhappy... Sweep it... all away!
它真的动起来了！是阿哈赐予我们的力量！
It's really moving! This is the power bestowed upon us by Aha!
I will stop you at all costs!
我绝不容许你们用列车长的形象肆意破坏！
I won't let you trash the conductor's image like this!
你们听见了吗？阿哈在呼唤我们！哈哈，我们不必再恐惧了！
Did you hear that? Aha is beckoning us! Haha, we don't have to be afraid anymore!
让笑容传染！让笑声永恒！哈哈哈哈哈哈哈！
Let smiles spread! Let laughter be eternal! HAHAHAHAHA!
We promised... to protect... the arcadia...
污垢…痛苦…好多…清除痛苦！大家都！笑起来！
Filth... pain...so much... eliminate pain! Everyone! Smile!
星穹列车，只是公司的一条狗！
The Astral Express is nothing but the IPC's lapdog!
没关系，我们已经处理过一条公司狗了！不介意再多来几条！
No worries, we've already dealt with one of them! Won't mind handling a few more!
Surely... That did the trick this time!
重启…自我修复…要——带来幸福！
Aww, Baseball Raccoon is so adorable!
你怎么把瘦脸特效关了？
Why'd you turn off the face slimming filter?
你看看我们是做什么的？
你居然认不出这角色吗？
Wait, you don't recognize this character?
May I ask what role is he playing?
球棒浣熊，你把垃圾藏哪儿了？
Baseball Raccoon, where'd you hide the trash?
投降吧，外面全都是列车长…
Give it up, you're surrounded by conductors...
Wow, this tail looks so real...
为了你，我变成狼人模样～
I transformed myself into a werewolf, just for you~
Gemini Takes You on a Tour of Star Rail FEST
Hey! Don't say things like that!
我记得失控的列车带我们向下坠落，穿过了一座废弃的隧道。按理说，这里应该是地底深处的某个车站了。
I remember the out-of-control Express taking us down and through an abandoned tunnel. Theoretically speaking, this should be a station deep underground.
但这些破碎的建筑，远处古怪的空间，我们真是在地底车站吗？二相乐园的地底，有这么大的空间？
But what's with all these ruined buildings and that weird space in the distance? Is this really an underground station? A place this big exists beneath Planarcadia?
也许，这儿已不在现实中了。我们可能因为某些不知名的原因掉进了「画中世界」的某处。
Perhaps we're no longer in reality. We may have landed somewhere within the World in Canvas for unknown reasons.
Th—Then, can we still make it back?
我们得尽快找齐所有人，离开这儿。
We need to find everyone and get out of here as soon as possible.
Where's Mr. Ashveil and the others?
…看，我们重生了？我们…果然和共愿帮那样的垃圾不同。
...We've been reborn? See, I knew we weren't like those Synwish Syndicate trash.
是啊，大哥，我们是英雄！我们是正义！我们是不死的幸福！
You're right, Red! We're heroes! We are justice! We are the undying happiness!
如果你们是正义，那就让我来扮演必要的恶人。
If you are justice, then forgive me for playing the necessary evil.
各位，不要再执迷不悟了！再这样下去，你们真的会……
Everyone, please, this has to stop! If this goes on, you'll all...
笑一笑吧！来到永恒的极乐，真正的幸福。
Just smile! Embrace the everlasting bliss and true happiness.
拜托了，你们听我一句话吧。
I beg you... Please listen to me.
只要跟朽叶小姐回去，去「异常防御部」，向他们解释发生了什么，一切都还来得及。
It's not too late. We can still go back to the Department of Aberration Defense with Miss Kuchiba and explain everything.
放弃吧，现在的他们只是会对快乐做出反应的生物而已。
It's no use. They are just creatures that can only react to joy now.
所有人都会幸福，所有人都不会死去，笑吧，笑吧。
All shall be blessed with happiness! All shall live forever! So smile, and laugh...
笑声会传染到整个二相乐园。
And let our laughter infect all of Planarcadia.
{NICKNAME}前辈，还有不死途大哥，我求求你们，劝劝他们几个……
My senior {NICKNAME}, Mr. Ashveil... I'm begging you, please tell them that it's not too late...
I'm sorry... I'm afraid it is.
大哥，再给我一点时间，你也知道的，他们都是好人……
Please just give me another minute! You know they're good people...
It's best if you just move aside.
真正的英雄，绝不会放弃自己的同伴！
A true hero never abandons his friends!
如果我现在要杀死他们，你会来阻止我吗？还是视而不见？
If I try to kill them now, will you stop me? Or will you turn a blind eye?
我能理解你的好意，但他们有他们的选择，我也有我的。
I get where you're coming from, but they've made their choices, and so have I.
说到底，这样对他们真的好吗？
After all, are they really better off like this?
See it through to the end.
A tribute of life unto death, and a debt paid in blood.
共愿帮…作为盘踞鸽川的帮派曾引发大规模械斗，导致多人重伤，并犯有抢劫、敲诈等多项罪行。

The Synwish Syndicate... A gang that once ruled the streets of Dovebrook, they sparked massive turf wars that left many with grievous injuries, and racked up charges for robbery, extortion, and a whole laundry list of other crimes.
池波与恶水，他们并非什么善类…这辈子干的好事就像污水潭上偶然泛起几个漂亮的肥皂泡。
Polwave and Caustide... They were far from saints. Any good deeds they did in their lifetimes were just like a few pretty soap bubbles floating up from a stagnant pool of filth.
所以他们被英雄讨伐了，他们和这个世界，都变得幸福了！
That's why we brought them down! They, and this whole world, have now become happier!
没错，他们也许有罪要赎，但这不是你们像砸碎玩具般虐杀了他们的理由。
Yes, they may have had sins to atone for, but that doesn't justify your murdering them as if they were just toys.
多谢这位英雄出手相救，我是赤焰战士，是破晓战队的队长。请问——喂，大叔你怎么就走了？
Thank you for your aid. I am the Blazeweaver Warrior, captain of the Daybreak Squadron. May I— Hey, where are you going?
我们没有过家家呀，大家都笑得很高兴嘛，哈哈哈哈。
Play? We're not playing. Everyone's just laughing along happily, hahahaha!
侦探大叔，你知道巡海游侠吗？据说是一群在宇宙里行侠仗义的英雄，照这样说，我们是不是也算城市里的游侠？
Mr. Detective, do you know about the Galaxy Rangers? I heard they are a group of righteous heroes roaming the universe. In that sense... are we the city's Rangers?
啊，不死途先生，我想请你帮我们一个忙——
Ah, Mr. Ashveil! Could you do us a favor...
一股熟悉的味道…呵，原来如此。
This familiar scent... Ah, I see.
记住今天发生的一切，真弘。你随时都可以向我复仇，我绝不阻拦。
Remember what happened today, Magnus. You may seek revenge anytime. I won't stop you.
黑影如退潮般缩回不死途脚下，地面上只留下灰烬一人孤独的身影——他的三位同伴，连同他们被黑影连接过的影子，已在黑影散去时被彻底吞没，再无踪影。

The shadows withdrew beneath Ashveil's feet like a receding tide, leaving Cinderborne standing alone in the wake of the darkness. As the gloom dispersed, it utterly subsumed his three companions, along with the shadows that tethered them to it, vanishing them without a trace.
我、我们都做了些什么啊……
如此一来，「新告死魔」算是结案了。
And so concludes the New Herald of Death case.
没有证据，也没有口供…这份案卷该怎么写结案陈词呢？
But without evidence or testimony... how am I going to write the closing statement for this report?
所以破晓战队真是凶手？
So did the Daybreak Squadron really do it?
关于这点，除了不死途本人外，谁也无法回答你。
No one but Ashveil will ever know.
但我选择相信他。这个男人的「影子」…只对罪孽深重的目标亮出獠牙。
But I choose to believe him. His "shadow"... only bares its fangs at those drenched in sin.
虽然不知他这份力量的来由，但他确实好几次帮「异常防御部」解决了麻烦的案件。
I don't know how he came upon such power, but it did help the Department of Aberration Defense crack several hard cases.
很好，我正发愁没能照顾好几位的人身安全呢，你们命挺硬啊。
Glad to see that you're all made of tough stuff. I was just fretting over failing my chaperone duties.
<color=#dbc291ff>巡海游侠之首，拉曼查</color>。我听过这个名字，但这应该是许久之前的传奇了……
<color=#dbc291ff>La Mancha, leader of the Galaxy Rangers...</color> I've heard about you, but only in legends past.
见多识广啊，无名客。很多年过去了，我还以为这个名字已经被外界忘得差不多了，正打算开始全新的人生呢……
Then you're well-informed, Nameless. I'd expected the name to be long forgotten by now. So much for turning over a new leaf...
你刚刚使用的是什么力量？
What was that power you used just now?
如果不是像我一样被迫，你最好不要问，不要主动探寻，也不要沾上它。
It's best that you don't ask about it, seek it, or get involved with it unless you're forced to, like I was.
你认识波提欧和乱破吗？
Do you know Boothill and Rappa?
你说的难道是…银枪•修罗和缭乱•忍侠殿下？！
You mean... the esteemed Silvergun Shura and Dazzling Ninja Hero!?
当然不认识。我已经隐退很久了。我认得的还活着的游侠，一个把我当叛徒，一个把我当猎物。
Of course not. I retired a long time ago. Out of the Rangers I know who are still alive, one sees me as a traitor, the other as prey.
有言在先，我希望各位忘掉自己刚才听到的名字。此时此刻，在这个名为二相乐园的世界里，我是侦探「不死途」，仅此而已。
Just so we're clear, I want you all to forget the name you just heard. Right here and now, in this world called Planarcadia, I am just Detective "Ashveil."
与其对我的身份究根探底，或者怜悯刚刚死去的那三个罪犯…不如先想想怎么离开这里——早听说乐园的地下深处有不干净的东西，真奇怪，这里的人居然能睡得安稳。

Instead of obsessing over my identity or pitying the three dead criminals, I advise you to work on a way out of this place first. I've long heard rumors about unsavory things hidden deep beneath the arcadia. It's strange how the people here can sleep so soundly.
列车广播把这里唤作「众神嗤笑之地」…我不记得地图上有过这样的站点。
The train broadcast called this place the "Land of Sneering Gods"... I don't think I've ever seen this station on a map.
是不是…咱们有可能被困在这儿一辈子？
Are we... going to be trapped here forever?
不死途先生，你似乎从一开始就胸有成竹，即使置身于如此怪异的场所，也毫不担心自己的安危。
Mr. Ashveil, despite being at such a bizarre location, you've been oddly confident and unconcerned over your safety since the very beginning.
你真的对这个地方一无所知？
Do you truly know nothing about this place?
再者说，我只是贯彻了一位私家侦探的职业素养而已——相信自己的雇主。
Besides, I'm simply doing what any professional private investigator would do: trust my employer.
{NICKNAME}，把真珠送你的东西拿出来吧。
It's time to show us the trinket Pearl gave you, {NICKNAME}.
真珠不是送了你们一枚筹码吗？只要她能靠着那东西定位到你们，我们的安全就有保障。
Come on... Didn't Pearl give you a chip? We're in good hands as long as she can track your location with that thing.
来，看向这边，慢慢地走过来。
是的，就在这道路的尽头，来吧，我呼唤你。
Yes, at the end of this path. Come. I beckon you.
你们有没有听到什么声音啊？
来吧，拥抱这曼妙的世界，来吧，抵达我的身边。
Come. Embrace this wondrous world. Come to my side.
你想要去往更深处，与我融为一体。喜悦，正反馈，大脑皮层闪烁的香甜体验，温柔，曼妙。
You want to go further, deeper. Become one with me. The joy, the positive feedback... Sweet synaptic flickers on your cortex. Gentle. Wonderful.
听，它在呼吸，在沉睡，在呜咽，也在狞笑。
Listen. It's breathing, slumbering, whimpering, and grinning.
温暖，温柔，温暖，温柔，温暖，温柔。
Warm. Gentle. Warm. Gentle. Warm. And gentle.
我就是你，你就是我，来吧，拥抱这原初的喜悦。
I am you, and you are me. Come. Embrace this primordial joy.
用生命换取一张车票，登上前往终点的列车。
Life, in exchange for a boarding pass on the Express toward the end.
与我合为一体，成为我的一部分，成为我的……
Become one with me. Become a part of me. Become mine...
Let's go deeper! I want to go over there!
来吧，来吧，来吧，来吧，就是这样，踏出脚步！
Come. Come. Come. Come! Just like that, STEP FORWARD!
侦探不知何时来到你的身边，他的手杖拦在你的面前，耳畔的低语也就此终止。
The detective appears at your side before you even notice, his cane blocking your path. Just like that, the whispers in your ear fall silent.
在这个世界办案，我的一大原则就是——抑制自己的好奇心，不要涉足与案件无关的事物，尤其是那些看上去就异常凶险的东西。

My golden principle while working on cases in this world is to keep my curiosity in check and not get involved with matters beyond the case itself... especially things that already look considerably dangerous.
不过…沉睡在这深处的东西，却异常眼熟啊。
However, the thing that slumbers in the deep here does look awfully familiar...
更深的地方，有谁在叫我……
There's someone calling for me from some place deeper...
与「火花大会」的闹剧结束后不久……
Shortly after the SparxiCon fiasco came to an end...
…三月小姐，请直视我的双眼。就这样，很好。
...Miss March, please look straight into my eyes. Just like that, perfect.
接下来请模仿我的语气，跟随我念诵下列句子——
Now, I'll need you to repeat these next few lines after me, and do so in the same tone of voice:
「天空是蓝色的，而非火花斑斓的颜色。」
"The sky is blue, not a dazzling display of sparks."
天空是蓝色的，而非火花斑斓的颜色。
The sky is blue, not a dazzling display of sparks.
「喧嚣的火花纵然可以照亮夜幕，但却无法胜过群星长久的沉默。」
"Though dazzling sparks may light up the night sky, they can never outshine the eternal silence of stars."
啊，这算是长难句了吧？喧嚣的火花纵然可以照亮夜幕，呃…却无法胜过群星长久的沉默？
Are you kidding? That's one sentence? Okay, um... "Though dazzling sparks may light up the night sky, um... they can never outshine the eternal silence of stars?"
「网络是心智的脐带也是排泄孔，透过它，人类对欢愉的渴求诞生了扭曲的火花。」
"The internet is both an umbilical cord and a waste duct for the mind, through which humanity's thirst for Elation gave birth to the twisted Sparxie."
欸！？这、这话也太刺激了吧？要不，让{NICKNAME}说吧？
Whoa there! That's a bit much... Maybe {NICKNAME} can be the one to say it?
What are you guys up to?
What kind of crazy talk is that?
这是按《智人及智械基准情感检测》的规则，我临时编撰的几句测试句。
These are test sentences I improvised according to the guidelines from the Human and Intellitron Emotional Baseline Test.
当你念到「火花」时，我会留神那一刻你的微表情和语气变化，来确认你是否存在被模因病毒感染的可能……
I carefully observe the subject's micro-expressions and tone changes at the moment they say the name "Sparxie" to check if they are infected by a memetic virus...
So, I passed the test, right?
你的反应这么有趣，显然用不着我担心了。之后如果发现自己有沉迷网络直播的后遗症，可以联系「异常防御部」的工作人员，我们会为你提供一系列行为矫正治疗。

Given how fascinating your reaction was, I clearly don't need to worry about you. Should you find yourself experiencing any livestream addiction withdrawal symptoms later, feel free to contact the Department of Aberration Defense staff. We'll provide you with a series of corrective behavioral treatments.
朽叶小姐，总感觉你操作起这一切来驾轻就熟的，之前也发生过类似的事情吗？
You're handling this like a real pro, Miss Kuchiba. Has this kinda thing happened before?
「幻月游戏」的过程中会发生什么情况，是完全无法预料的。曾经有一位谒者将真话与谎言的定义颠倒了过来，差一点引发大规模的内乱。
It's impossible to predict what will happen during the Phantasmoon Games. Once, a Supplicant reversed the definitions of truth and lies, which nearly caused massive civil unrest.
打那之后，模因治疗就被纳入了「异常防御部」安全应急对策中。
After that incident, we incorporated memetic treatment into the Department of Aberration Defense's emergency safety protocols.
虽然这次「火花大会」并未造成什么人员伤亡，但如果{NICKNAME}没能阻止火花播撒病毒，她也许会变成「祸」级危害标准的灾异。
"SparxiCon" didn't cause any casualties this time. But if {NICKNAME} hadn't stopped Sparxie from spreading the virus, she might have turned into a Calamity-level Aberration.
Calamity-level... just how dangerous is that?
若没有遏制对策，「祸」级灾异会在扩散过程中摧毁数十座城市…这样的影响范围。
Without proper containment measures, a Calamity-level Aberration can destroy dozens of cities as it spreads... That's the scale we're talking about.
这是「异常防御部」的称呼，通常是指那些受有愿力，且力量失控的幻造种。不过时间一久，但凡是产生危害的存在都被冠以这个名字。

That's the Department of Aberration Defense's term for them. It usually refers to imagenae infused with Wishpower who have lost control and begun to run amok. Over time, though, it's become a label that gets slapped onto any hazardous entity.
So what level of Aberration am I?
…说什么呢，你是「灾异」吗？虽然戴上面具的你，样子确实怪里怪气的。
...You, an Aberration? What're you talking about? Though I gotta say, you do look pretty weird with that mask on.
你不会是《银河战力党》的玩家吧？「异常防御部」的灾害评级可不是什么卡牌游戏的战力等级。
Don't tell me you're a Cosmicon Collective player? The Department of Aberration Defense's hazard ratings are nothing like the power ratings in some card game.
行了，检查程序算是走完了。如果{NICKNAME}对「灾异的危害等级」感兴趣，可以看看这份文件——记住咯，在幻月游戏期间造成上述量级的破坏，可是要被当作灾异讨伐的。

Right then, that's all for the required check-up. If you're interested in "Aberration Calamity Threat Levels" and how they're classified, you might want to take a look at this document. However, do bear in mind that causing damage of the aforementioned scale during the Phantasmoon Games will cause you to be classified as an Aberration... and dealt with accordingly.
在离开前，我还有一件事要知会{NICKNAME}。还记得担任你们导游的林登•斯科特吗？他遇害身亡了。
Before I leave, there's one more thing I need to tell you, {NICKNAME}. Remember Lyndon Skott, the man who served as your tour guide? He was murdered.
斯科特死了？你们搞错了吧？
Skott's dead? No way. You guys sure about that?
是啊，我们认识的这位先生可是…呃，一个很有韧性的对手。
Yeah! The Skott we knew was... uh, a really tenacious opponent!
不，死者的身份证明和遗传信息都与斯科特先生匹配。你说他曾是你们的对手？
We're sure. Both the ID and genetic information of the deceased match that of Mr. Skott's. You said he was once your opponent?
Who'd he tick off this time?
虽然回想斯科特先生过去的做派，他应该得罪过不少人，但总觉得都不至于是要起杀心的深仇大恨吧？
Though, given how he's behaved, he's definitely rubbed a lot of people the wrong way, but I doubt any of it was serious enough to get him killed, right?
看来你们对他的了解不浅啊。
Seems like you are quite familiar with him.
啊，你该不会…怀疑我们吧？斯科特先生在我们心里算不上什么朋友，但我们绝不至于对他动手。
Ah! You don't... suspect us, do you? I wouldn't exactly call Skott a friend, but we'd never do anything like that to him.
小妹妹，别紧张，我可什么都还没问呢。
Easy there, young lady. I haven't even started asking questions yet.
大名鼎鼎的列车英雄，当然不至于对一位和自己有过节的公司小职员动手——最重要的是，你们两位都有不在场证明。
Of course there's no way the renowned heroes of the Express would harm some lowly IPC employee simply because they had a problem with him. More importantly, both of you have solid alibis.
初步推测这起凶案可能和「幻月游戏」有关。我把这件事通报给你们，是想提醒二位务必小心。「幻月游戏」可不是什么打发时间、放松心情的电子游戏。

The initial results of our investigation suggest his murder might be connected to the Phantasmoon Games. I'm informing you both of this to warn you to be extremely careful. The Phantasmoon Games are far from a simple game intended for passing the time or relaxation.
无论如何，{NICKNAME}，我祝你得偿所愿。告辞了。
Anyway, I wish you success, {NICKNAME}. Farewell.
斯科特，居然…我都有点不敢相信。但朽叶小姐通报了，想必这是真的。
Skott? Could he actually... I just can't believe it! But it was Miss Kuchiba who told us, so... it must be true.
幻月游戏，可怕。{NICKNAME}，你怎么看啊？
So, the Phantasmoon Games... pretty frightening, huh? What's your take, {NICKNAME}?
Yeah, I understand what you mean.
斯科特这人时不时会从哪儿冒出来给咱们制造一点麻烦…但，他比起敌人，我觉得更像是我们的朋友，打引号那种。
Skott pops up now and then to give us a bit of trouble... but I'd say he's more of a "friend" than an enemy, if you know what I mean.
I wanna find out the truth.
是啊。虽然斯科特先生总是时不时会从哪儿冒出来给咱们制造一点麻烦…但，他突然不明不白地死在了幻月游戏中，我也会觉得于心不忍。
Yeah! Even though Skott pops up now and then to give us a bit of trouble... I still feel bad about him dying so suddenly during the Phantasmoon Games like this, and without even knowing why...
虽然斯科特先生总是时不时会从哪儿冒出来给咱们制造一点麻烦…但，我觉得他比起敌人，有时候更像是我们的朋友，打引号那种。
Even though Skott pops up now and then to give us a bit of trouble... I'd still say he's usually more of a "friend" than an enemy, if you know what I mean.
如果凶手是冲幻月游戏来的，也许很快就会成为我们的敌人。
If the killer is here for the Phantasmoon Games, they might become our enemy soon.
You're way too young to sigh like that!
唉，得亏姬子姐把这事托付给咱们俩…谁能想到，堂堂小三月，第一回合就止步于这场游戏的大门之外了。
Good thing Himeko entrusted this mission to the two of us... Who would've imagined that the great March herself would be stopped at the doorstep in the very first round?
算了，我不像你，本来就没什么英雄气概，平时打游戏也是手跟不上脑瓜…确实是你比较适合这个幻月游戏。

Forget it, I'm not like you! I was never hero material to begin with... Normally my hands can't even keep up with my brain when I play video games! You're definitely the right person for the Phantasmoon Games.
就是…好可惜呀，难得来姬子姐家乡度个假，想着咱们一起能留下一点愉快的回忆，结果……
It's just... such a shame. We finally get a chance to vacation in Himeko's hometown, and I thought we'd make some happy memories together, but...
我会带着三月的份一起努力！
I'll work hard for the both of us!
我会带着三月的份，赢下幻月游戏的！
I'll triumph in the Phantasmoon Games in your stead!
我希望三月能平平安安的。
I hope you'll be safe and sound.
这场幻月游戏很危险，但我希望三月能平平安安的。
The Phantasmoon Games may be dangerous, but I hope you'll be safe and sound.
小看我了不是？哼，我小三月也是个独当一面的无名客！
Hey, don't look down on me! I, March 7th, am a top-notch Nameless who can hold my own!
不过，真不行的话，{NICKNAME}也别硬撑哦，要记得我们都是你的后援团！
But look, don't push yourself too hard, okay, {NICKNAME}? Remember that we've got your back!
对了，姬子姐和杨叔呢？他们应该也在接受检查和盘问吧？要不你给杨叔发个短信？
Oh right, where are Himeko and Mr. Yang? They must be getting examined and interrogated too, right? Why don't you send Mr. Yang a message?
打从我上车以来，就没听姬子提过自己的父亲。所以，她和她父亲之间是怎么一回事？毕竟当时只有你跟在姬子的身边，我也只能找你来打听了。
Himeko hasn't mentioned her father at all in the time since I've boarded. So, what is going on between them? As you were the only one with her at the time, you're the only one I can ask.
是哦，我乍一听你们说「姬子的父亲」还愣了一下。仔细一想，姬子姐有父亲这不是很合理嘛？也不是谁都像我一样是从冰块里化开的。
Yeah, it really threw me for a sec when you said "Himeko's father." But when you think about it, it's only natural that Himeko has a father, right? Not everyone's like me, thawed out of an ice block.
十五年前的「幻月游戏」，被人们称为「血涂游戏」。许多人失去了自己的孩子，许多人失去了自己的至亲。
Fifteen years ago, the Phantasmoon Games of that year came to be remembered as the "Bloodstained Games"... So many parents lost their children. So many people lost those dearest to them.
其中一名受害者，是我的女儿。我在归来后，亲眼目睹了埋葬她的墓冢。
One of the victims... was my very own daughter. Upon my return, I stood before the grave, where she was laid to rest.
所以，眼前这位顶着她名字的女士……
So, this lady who bears her name...
十五年前，当我决心加入这场幻月游戏时，我的父亲不在我身边。
Fifteen years ago, when I made up my mind to join this Phantasmoon Games, my father wasn't with me.
在我与告死魔对抗，命悬一线的时刻，我的父亲依旧不知道在银河哪儿游荡。
Even as I fought for my life against the Herald of Death, my father was still off somewhere, wandering the cosmos.
严格来说，打从记事起，他在我成长过程中的存在感就像太空里的空气一样稀薄……
Strictly speaking, ever since I can remember, his presence in my life has been as thin as the air in space...
所以，眼前这位顶着他名字的先生，你又是谁？
So, I would ask you who bears his name, who exactly are you?
哎呀，你看看你…怎么就生气了嘛？
Well, well, well, look at you... What are you getting so worked up over?
我不过是开个小玩笑！毕竟十五年过去，你都出落成大姑娘了，我这个做父亲的怎么可能一眼认得出来嘛！
Just a joke, a joke! It's been fifteen years, after all, and you've grown into such a fine young lady! How could you expect your old man to recognize you right off the bat?
所以，我看到的那个刻着你名字的墓碑又是怎么一回事啊？
So, what's with that gravestone I saw with your name on it, then?
对于不知道自己还有没有明天的人来说，尽早料理好自己后事，这有什么可奇怪的，隆介先生？
When you don't know if you'll live to see tomorrow, there's nothing strange about getting your affairs in order in advance, is there, Mr. Ryusuke?
你怎么可以这么生分地喊你的父亲？至少像以前那样喊一声「爸爸」，好吗？
How can you be so formal with your own father? At least call me "dad" like you used to, okay?
难不成，姬子，这是…你的孩子？！
Don't tell me... Himeko, is this... your child!?
Could you please stop making things worse?
Hold up, there's been a misunderstanding...
哈哈，十五年不见，我做外公了？！等等——
Haha, I haven't seen you in fifteen years, and now I'm a grandfather!? Wait—
这孩子的父亲又是谁啊？！
给我适可而止一点！你眼前的这位是我的同事、晚辈、朋友、星穹列车上的伙伴…{NICKNAME}，听明白了吗，父亲？
That's enough! You are looking at my colleague, a new generation of Trailblazer, my friend, and my companion on the Astral Express... {NICKNAME}. Do you understand now, father?
你听到了没，她还是喊我父亲了，哈哈哈！
You hear that? She called me father! Hahaha!
{NICKNAME}，你好啊！不好意思，差点就把你当成姬子的孩子了。
Hello there, {NICKNAME}! Sorry about that, I thought you were Himeko's {M#son}{F#daughter} for a second there.
您老是完全不看新闻吗？
Do you not watch the news at all?
请原谅，毕竟我是个上了年纪，和时代脱节的老人。
You must forgive me, I'm just an old-timer who's lost touch with the times.
We don't even have anything close to the same hair color.
抱歉，我是个上了年纪的人。一看到小孩子，就忍不住会想，自己的{F#外孙女}{M#外孙}也该有这么大了。
Sorry, I'm just getting on in years. Whenever I see a youngster like you, I can't help but think my {M#grandson}{F#granddaughter} would be about your age by now.
我是个画家，工作的大部分时间需要前往不同星域，按照雇主委托完成艺术创作……
I'm a painter. Most of my work involves traveling to different segmenta to complete commissions for my clients...
姬子，我知道，我忽略了许多和你相处的时间。
Himeko, I know I've let too many chances to spend time with you slip away.
只是忽略？我们俩第一次见面是在母亲的葬礼上，那时候我已经六岁了。
Just "slip away"? The first time we met was at mother's funeral. When I was already six years old.
且不谈这个，在我受<color=#dbc291ff>「风化诅咒」</color>折磨的时候，你也在忙于工作？
Let's put that aside for now. Were you also too busy with work when I was suffering from a <color=#dbc291ff>weathering curse</color>?
…也许你不会相信，这段时间里，我一直在为你奔走。这些年，我被困在这间我所幻造的「代表过去的房间」里，从没走出来过。

...You might not believe me, but I've been running around for your sake all this time. All these years, I've been trapped in this "room that represents the past" that I imagenated, and I've never left it.
关于我成为列车领航员的事情，你也一无所知？
You didn't know about me becoming the Express's Navigator either?
十五年过去了，列车一次也没有在这儿停靠，你也没留下自己依然在世的只言片语。而「幻月游戏」中发生的一切，全都被「异常防御部」封锁了消息。

Fifteen years, and the Express never stopped here once. You didn't even leave behind so much as a single word to indicate you were still alive. And the Department of Aberration Defense completely sealed all records of what happened during those Phantasmoon Games.
我确实听到不少关于星穹列车的传闻。我甚至看到了领航员的名字……
I did hear many rumors about the Astral Express, though. I even saw the Navigator's name...
一开始我以为那是另一个重名的人。
At first, I thought it was just someone else with the same name.
就算怀着好奇翻到了你的照片，我还是不敢确信，照片上这个气质出众的女人是我的女儿，她平安无事地长大了，长成了独当一面的传奇。

And even when curiosity drove me to look up your picture, I still didn't dare believe that the woman so full of poise and grace was my daughter. That she'd grown up safe, becoming a living legend in her own right.
我想过联系列车，可万一这位领航员只不过是某个同名人士呢？
I thought about contacting the Express, but what if their Navigator was just someone who happened to share the same name?
我一直抱着一个荒谬的念头：如果不去寻找答案，我的女儿至少还有二分之一的概率活着。可万一我得到了否定的回答…我的女儿就真的死了。

I've been clinging to an absurd notion: that if I never sought the answer, there was still a fifty-fifty chance my daughter was still alive. But if I found the answer, and it was "no"... then she would truly be dead.
所以，姬子，你到底是怎么……
我不想在这里待得太久，我要走了，校长。
I'd rather not tarry here too long. I'll be taking my leave now, Dean.
列车打败了占据这座学校的谒者，避免学校再次陷入十五年前那样的悲剧。你也该好好履行十五年前未尽的义务……
The Express has defeated the Supplicant that occupied this school, and prevented another tragedy like the one fifteen years ago. Now it's time for you to fulfill the duties you failed in back then...
…去安抚一下那些学生，顺便想想如何应付媒体的轰炸吧。
...Go comfort those students, and see if you can't figure out how to deal with the media bombardment while you're at it.
未尽的义务…她还在生我的气啊。
Failed in my duties... So, still mad at me.
在接到翡翠所倡议的「反毁灭同盟」的邀约后，星穹列车驶向了姬子的故乡，列车坠落后再度启航的世界——「二相乐园」。

After receiving an invitation from Jade's Anti-Destruction Alliance, the Astral Express set its course for Himeko's homeland, the world from which the Express set off again after its fall — Planarcadia.
在这座受「欢愉」赐福的世界中，存在一场「幻月游戏」：佩戴古老的欢愉假面，八位参与者要尽情缔造奇迹，震撼二相乐园人类的心灵，以求分享「欢愉」星神的权能。

In this world blessed by the Elation, there exists the Phantasmoon Games. Wearing ancient masks of the Elation, eight chosen participants strive to create miracles that move the hearts and souls of Planarcadia's people, hoping to share in the power of the Aeon.
公司经营这个世界多年，意在操控星神游戏以图获利。星穹列车也决心加入其中。
Having managed this world for many years, the IPC seeks to profit by controlling this Aeonic game. In response, the Astral Express, too, has decided to enter the fray.
与此同时，为「反毁灭同盟」而来的仙舟使节爻光将军则透过占卜，预见了二相乐园所面临的巨大危机——在她的推测中，为幻月游戏而来的星核猎手，刃将是这场灾难的源头。

Meanwhile, General Yao Guang, the Xianzhou envoy to the Anti-Destruction Alliance, foresaw through divination the great crisis looming over Planarcadia. In her reading, the Stellaron Hunter Blade, who had arrived for the Phantasmoon Games, would become the source of this impending catastrophe.
为了勘破末日的局面，爻光劫夺了本应由星核猎手获得的欢愉假面，并将之扣在星期日脸上。阴差阳错间，星期日加入了这场游戏。

To uncover the truth behind the coming apocalypse, Yao Guang seized a Mask of Elation meant for the Stellaron Hunters, and placed it upon Sunday's face. Thus, due to this unexpected turn of events, Sunday was made a participant in the games.
与此同时，我们前往属于姬子家族的学校，寻找曾属于她的欢愉假面…但却受到花火的分身「火花」的袭击，反被她夺走面具。

Meanwhile, we journeyed to the school tied to Himeko's family in search of the Mask of Elation that had once belonged to her. Yet before we could reach it, we were attacked by the streamer Sparxie, a double of Sparkle, who seized the mask for herself.
在识破幻觉后，我在学校档案室遇见了神秘少女绯英。借由她的帮助，我获得了她绘制的另一副面具，成为了幻月游戏的谒者。

After seeing through the illusion, I encountered a mysterious girl named Evanescia in the school's archive room. With her help, I obtained another mask of her own creation, and thus became a Supplicant of the Phantasmoon Games.
为了击败谒者火花，我们深入愚者的根据地「世界尽头」酒馆，并重回学校击败了她。由此，我们达成了幻月游戏的第一场奇迹：「列车英雄击败了散播病毒的反派」。

To defeat Supplicant Sparxie, we ventured deep into the Fool's base of operations, the "World's End" Tavern, and later returned to the school to overcome her. In doing so, we achieved the first miracle of the Phantasmoon Games: "The Express hero defeats the villain spreading the virus."
但在这谒者第一战的尾声，我们却发现了更多谜团。一位陌生的男人出现，宣称他是姬子的父亲，并揭秘往事——十五年前的幻月游戏，名为「告死魔」的存在曾大开杀戒……

Yet at the close of the Supplicant's first battle, greater mysteries emerged. A stranger appeared, claiming himself to be Himeko's father, and revealed a long-buried tale: fifteen years ago, during the Phantasmoon Games, someone known as the Herald of Death went on a murderous rampage...
也许我的问题很唐突：小朋友，姬子从来没在你面前提起过自己的姓氏吗？
Sorry, kid, this might be a bit abrupt, but has Himeko ever mentioned her surname to you?
She has never even mentioned her homeland.
是我这个不称职的父亲伤了她的心。
I'm a failure of a father... I broke her heart.
但…十五年前到底发生了什么？我真不敢相信…她竟然从「风化诅咒」中挺过来了。
But... what exactly happened fifteen years ago? I can't believe it... She actually survived the weathering curse.
你听过传奇画师「绘世」将这颗星球表面的一切藏入「画卷」的传说吗？
Have you heard the tale of the legendary painter Graphia, who hid everything on this planet's surface within a scroll?
有人说，为了达成这样的伟业，她以自己和后人的生命为献祭，进行了一场禁忌交易，其后果就是「风化诅咒」……
It is said that to achieve such a monumental feat, she made a forbidden exchange, sacrificing both her own life and that of her descendants, resulting in the "weathering curse"...
流淌着绘世血脉的后裔极少有能活过三十岁的。她们中大多数人都会在青春少艾的时代结束前，肢体像花一样枯萎凋谢，皮肤像画一般风干绽裂。
Few descendants carrying the Graphia bloodline have lived past thirty. Most of them wither like flowers while they're still young, skin cracking and peeling like dried paint.
姬子也不例外，她被这诅咒折磨了许多年……
Himeko was no exception. She was tormented by the curse for years...
那些年你为她做了什么？
And what did you do for her as she suffered?
What I did... doesn't matter anymore.
求药使的偏方、博识学会的疗法…这些全都试过了，但没什么能逆转风化诅咒。为此花去的那些时间，只是让我没能在她最需要的时候陪在她身边。

The Elixir Seekers' folk remedies, the Intelligentsia Guild treatments... I tried them all, but nothing could reverse the curse. All the time spent searching for cures only resulted in me not being by her side when she needed me the most.
…我，终究只是一个无能的父亲。
...In the end, I am nothing but a useless father.
她现在安然无恙，不好嘛？
She's safe and sound now. Isn't that what matters?
你说的对，是我太迟钝了。
You're right. I just didn't realize it quickly enough.
…她是怎么挺过来的，这些都不重要了。<color=#dbc291ff>重要的是，我的女儿回来了！</color>这就够了。
...How she got through it, how she survived... none of that's important. <color=#dbc291ff>What matters is that my daughter is back!</color> That's all I need.
{NICKNAME}小朋友，我有个冒昧的请求：能否请你带我看看我女儿{RUBY_B#星穹列车}工作的地方{RUBY_E#}？
{NICKNAME}, if I may ask a small favor: Would you mind showing me {RUBY_B#Astral Express}where my daughter works{RUBY_E#}?
我想弥补一直以来对她欠缺的关心…我想更了解我的女儿！
I want to make up for all the care I failed to give her all those years... I want to get to know my daughter better!
But you appear to be very healthy...?
我…只是个无用的入赘女婿，严格来说，我并不算是绘世家族的传人。
I'm... just a useless son-in-law who married into the family. Strictly speaking, I can't really be considered a Graphia descendant.
这确实是个令人印象深刻的「父女重逢」的场面，不禁让我想起了一些故乡的往事。
Truly a memorable father-daughter reunion. Brings up some memories of my own home, as well.
杨叔又是一副过来人的样子，这到底是怎么样的亲子关系啊？
There goes Mr. Yang, with that knowing look again... Just what kind of parent-child relationship are we talking about, anyway?
我小时候，父母也常常忙于工作，没法陪伴我。作为孩子，难免会心生怨言……
When I was a child, my parents were also always busy with work and were unable to spare a moment for me. As a child, I couldn't help but feel resentful...
直到自己成了父亲，才会明白他们不得不割舍陪伴时的心情。
It wasn't until I became a father myself that I understood how they felt when they were forced to sacrifice the time we could have spent together.
所以，{NICKNAME}，你答应要带隆介叔叔参观列车了没啊？
So, {NICKNAME}, did you already promise to give Mr. Ryusuke a tour of the Express?
想想也是，毕竟是姬子姐的爸爸。那，他人呢？
Thought as much. After all, it's Himeko's dad. So, where is he?
啊，几位都在啊。让你们久等了，小女承蒙各位关照，不胜感激。
Ah, everyone's here. Sorry to keep you all waiting. I'm truly grateful to all of you for looking after my daughter.
哪儿的话，是我们一直受姬子的照顾。
Not at all. She's the one who has been taking care of us.
那就劳烦几位为我带路了？
Would you all be so kind as to show me around?
小朋友，方便为我带路了吗？
Hey there, kid, would you mind showing me the way?
这就是星穹列车？果然名不虚传，比想象里更气派。
So, this is the Astral Express? It really lives up to its reputation. It's even more impressive than I imagined.
不愧是我女儿工作的地方啊！说起来，领航员这个职务收入情况如何啊？有没有保险和年终奖金？
As to be expected, of course! It's the place where my daughter works! By the way, what's the pay like for a Navigator? Does the position come with insurance and an annual bonus?
真是可怜天下父母心…怎么一开口就问起了收入是不是体面，这我哪儿回答得了哇。快来个谁，来救救啊！
Talk about parental love... First thing out of his mouth is asking about her salary! Like I'd have a clue... Help! A little backup here?
The Nameless don't have much in the way of income.
也不能这么说吧，平时下车都有零花钱来着。
Hey, that's not totally true! We get some spending money every time we stop somewhere.
什么？零收入？难不成星穹列车的工作其实是义工？
What? No income? Don't tell me that everyone working for the Astral Express is actually doing volunteer work?
要这么说也没错？但实际情况——嗐，都怪我嘴笨…实际情况和您想的可不一样。
I mean, I guess you could say that? But actually, it's more like... Ugh, I'm butchering the explanation... Anyway, it's nothing like what you're thinking!
无名客挣得可不比您少！
We Nameless earn at least as much as you do!
{NICKNAME}答得妙哇！做父母的只要知道孩子挣得不比自己少，应该就放心了吧。
Nice one, {NICKNAME}! Parents can probably relax as long as their kids aren't making less than they are, right?
真的吗？小朋友，可不要小看叔叔我啊。我的主顾有来自银河各处的大人物。我的作品虽然谈不上价值连城，但润笔费可不低唷。
Really? Don't underestimate me, kid. I've got big shots from across the cosmos on my client list. While I wouldn't say my work is worth a king's ransom, my fees are nothing to sneeze at.
隆介先生，请放心，列车乘员的行动资金向来很充足。为我们提供援助的不仅有天才俱乐部的成员，同时还有盛会之星这样繁荣的商业世界。

Mr. Ryusuke, please rest assured, none of the Express crew ever lack for money. We not only receive support from members of the Genius Society, but also from prosperous commercial worlds such as the Planet of Festivities.
好，好。听瓦尔特先生这么说，我就放心了！
Good, good! Hearing you say that is a huge relief, Mr. Yang!
说起来，当领航员的平日里要负责哪些工作呢？
Speaking of which, what kind of work does being a Navigator generally entail?
您可别小看姬子姐。她日常的工作包括划定航路、校准跃迁和技术维护，时不时还要给咱们这些无名客行动指示。

Don't you underestimate Himeko either! Her daily duties include charting navigation routes, calibrating warp jumps, and technical maintenance, not to mention she's always guiding the Nameless on missions.
嚯嚯，我的女儿真的很厉害吧！
Hoho, my daughter is really something else, isn't she!
那当然啦，每次开拓之旅能平安归来，都少不了姬子姐的指挥和看护呢！她就是咱们这架列车的主心骨！
Of course! Every time we return safely from a trailblazing expedition, it's all thanks to Himeko's guidance and protection! She's the backbone of the Astral Express!
Oooh, let me go tell Pom-Pom what you just said~
你把咱们的列车长放哪儿了？
Where's your respect for our conductor?
哎呀，你这个人就知道挑拨离间！
Hey, come on! You're just trying to stir up trouble!
如果说姬子姐是列车主心骨，那咱们的列车长最最可爱、最最勤劳了——对吧，帕姆？
If Himeko's the backbone of the Express, then our conductor is the absolute cutest and hardest working of all! Right, Pom-Pom?
Oh? We got a new passenger?
Hmm, this gentleman does look kind of familiar...
难怪有种亲切感帕！你好啊，隆介先生！
No wonder he felt so familiar! How are you, Mr. Ryusuke?
列车长？您想必就是小女的上级了！多谢您长久以来对她的关照！
Conductor? So you must be my daughter's superior! Thank you for taking such good care of her all this time!
呃啊，上级？太、太正式了帕！是姬子一直在照料列车和我们所有人的帕。
Uh, superior? Th—That's way too formal! It's Himeko who's been taking care of the Express and everyone on it!
你们…怎么把他带到列车上来了？
He's... what is he doing on the Express?
是我不好！爸爸只是很好奇你平日里的工作，没经过你的同意，擅自请求你的同事带我来这里看看。你别生气啊，姬子。
It's all my fault! I was just curious about your daily work, so I asked your colleagues to show me around, and I know I didn't ask your permission first. Please don't be mad, Himeko.
Mad? Why would I be mad?
隆介先生，欢迎登上星穹列车参观。还想看什么？我可以带您到处走走。
Mr. Ryusuke, welcome aboard the Astral Express. Is there anything else you'd like to see? I can show you around.
这个…呃，我知道你内心只想和我这个不称职的父亲保持距离，我也知道贸然闯进你的旅行会很失礼……
Well... uh, I know you'd rather keep your distance from your good-for-nothing father, you're on a journey, and it's rude of me to barge in like this...
但，我们父女俩已有太久没见了。爸爸希望能再多了解你一些，弥补过去蹉跎的时间——
But it's been way too long since we last saw each other. As your father, I want to get to know you better, make up for all the time we've lost...
至少在你停留故乡的时候，允许我这个做父亲的尽一尽过去没能尽到的心。好吗？
At least, while you're staying here... please allow me to show you some of the fatherly care and devotion I owe you. Will you?
两位…不如去派对车厢坐坐？「闭嘴」，准备好饮品帕。
Excuse me, why don't the two of you go to the Party Car? "Shush," get the drinks ready.
闭、闭嘴？…好的，我去沏点茶。
Sh-Shush? ...Alright, I'll go make some tea.
唉，那只是某台家用机器人的名字而已。走吧，父亲，别在这里打扰大家休息。还有{NICKNAME}，你也要来。
That's just our domestic robot's name. Come on, Father, people are resting here. Let's not disturb them. Oh, and {NICKNAME}, come with us.
我？这是你们父女俩的叙旧…
Me? But this is a father-daughter reunion...
Shouldn't I leave you two alone?
我要谈的不止私事，还有幻月游戏。
I want to talk about the Phantasmoon Games, not just personal matters.
干嘛还杵在这儿？姬子姐叫你去派对车厢啦。
What're you still doing here? Himeko asked you to go to the Party Car!
我明白了，你是怕破坏这对父女重逢的气氛是吧？那确实，等等再去也不迟。
I get it, reunions are private, and you don't want to spoil it for them! That's fair, it won't hurt to give them some time.
希望这两位能在喝一杯后冰释前嫌。
I hope a drink will help the two of them set aside their past differences.
{NICKNAME}，要是父女俩拌起嘴来，就拜托你做和事老了。
{NICKNAME}, if they do argue, I'm counting on you to play peacemaker.
姬子的爸爸啊，难怪让人有似曾相识的感觉。
So that's Himeko's father? No wonder he looked so familiar.
要打破一对父女间冰冷的沉默，最理想的饮品莫过于一杯「热水」。
When it comes to breaking the icy silence between a father and daughter, nothing's better than a cup of hot water.
饮下的人只要大呼「好烫」，就能立刻获得另一位「怎么这么不小心」的责备和关切，话题也就能顺利展开了。
The person who drinks it will yelp, "HOT!" and be immediately met with a concerned, "How could you be so careless?" from the other party. And just like that, the conversation starts flowing.
友情提示：这并不是一个笑话，而是一条实用的破冰小技巧。
Friendly reminder: That is not a joke, but a practical ice-breaking tip.
…哈哈哈哈，这机器人可真逗啊！没想到你的工作环境还挺轻松舒适。
...Hahaha, your robot is hilarious! I'm surprised how relaxing and comfy the work environment is here.
无名客的工作并不「轻松舒适」。大部分时候，我们要面对反物质军团的虚卒、蝗灾留下的虫子、步离人、还有一些对列车怀有戒心和不良意图的组织……

Being a Nameless is neither "relaxing" nor "comfy." Most of the time, we are facing down Voidrangers from the Antimatter Legion, bugs left by the Swarm Disaster, Borisin, and various organizations that are suspicious of the Express or have malicious intentions for us...
…这么危险吗？那要不…干脆趁这次回老家的机会，辞掉这份工作？
...That dangerous? Maybe... this trip home is a great chance to quit your job?
巧了，我年纪也大了，绘世学院正需要一位新的校长。
Talk about coincidence! Just so happens I'm getting on in years, and Graphia Academy is in need of a new dean.
你知道我不是这个意思。我认准的事情从来就不会回头。
You know that's not what I meant. Once I've set my mind on something, I never look back.
打从六岁时，你给我讲起在银河里旅行的故事，我就明白自己将来一定会踏进星空。
Ever since I was six, when you told me those stories about traveling through the cosmos, I knew that someday, I would walk among the stars.
其实，爸爸也是说笑呢。对于列车平时是做什么的，我并不是一无所知的。对了，知道列车要来，我特地买了一套以你们的冒险故事为原型的漫画。

Actually, I was just kidding. I'm not completely clueless about what the Express and what you do. Oh, right! Once I knew the Express was coming, I even bought that comic series that's based on your adventures.
…《苍天航路绒绒号》，是吧？真没想到，你也会看漫画。
...Please don't tell me it's Fluffy Across the Blue. I never thought you'd be into comics.
没错，主角是个挥舞球棒的浣熊，是以那个孩子为原型的吧？
That's right, the protagonist is a baseball-bat-wielding raccoon. The character is based on that kid, right?
作为画家，你的眼光还挺准的。{NICKNAME}，来这边。
As an artist, you do have a good eye. Come over here, {NICKNAME}.
谢谢你，给了我们俩一点独处的时间。
Thanks for giving us some time alone.
姬子，刚才是咱们重逢后，你第一次露出笑脸。
Himeko, that's the first time I've seen you smile since I've seen you this time.
所以，能和我聊聊吗，你们这次回到故乡是因为什么机缘巧合？
So, what brought you back home this time? What's the story behind our lucky meeting?
就像我之前说的那样，我们为「幻月游戏」而来。
Like I said before, we're here for the Phantasmoon Games.
…所以，十五年前你能克服风化诅咒，也是因为「幻月游戏」的缘故？
...So, the Phantasmoon Games <unbreak>15</unbreak> years ago were the reason you were able to overcome the Weathering Curse?
原来如此，这就不奇怪了。对没有亲历过这星神游戏的人来说，它只是历史文献里的一段记录，甚至说它是神话也不为过。
I see. That makes sense. For those of us who haven't experienced the Aeonic game firsthand, it's just something from the history books, or even akin to a myth.
但我从来没想到…这场星神的游戏会在一夜间演变成血祭。
But I never imagined... that the Aeonic game would turn into a blood sacrifice overnight.
告死魔…是个毫无人性的疯子。如果当时我没能击败他，也许整个二维市都会成为他的屠场。
The Herald of Death... was a heartless madman. If I hadn't defeated him then, all of Duomension City would have become his slaughterhouse.
踏上旅程的最初几年里，我每夜每夜都会梦回那个黄昏。那个黄昏的颜色，是用血…很多很多的血，还有恐惧和尖叫调出来的。
During the first few years of my journey, I relived that evening every single night in my dreams. The color of that twilight, painted with blood... So much blood, blended with terror and screams.
受害者们像是被拧成各种奇怪形状的粘土，像一支又一支被折断的颜料管。而那个男人享受着遍地喷洒的颜色，他想把这个世界当作画布涂满……

The victims were twisted like clay into grotesque shapes, like paint tubes that had been snapped, one after the other. And that man... he reveled in the colors splattered everywhere, and wanted the whole world to be his canvas...
…就算最后我能为那些受害者们报仇雪恨，他们也没法再活过来了。
...Even if I could avenge his victims, in the end, it won't bring them back to life.
这整件事就像沉重的行李，只有抛下它，我才能在未来的旅途上走得更轻松一些。
The entire thing is like a heavy piece of baggage. Only by letting it go can I travel the road ahead more easily.
你尽力了，很高兴看到你能安然无恙地回到这里。
You did your best, and I'm glad to see you made it back here safe and sound.
我本以为自己不会回来的，但时局有了变化，幻月游戏又一次满足了举行条件——短短十五年间，两次幻月游戏，这本就不寻常。

I thought I'd never come back, but the times have changed. The conditions to hold the Phantasmoon Games have been met again. However, to hold two games in just fifteen years... that in itself is far from normal.
和十五年前一样，公司想要操控这一切。只是，最善变的星神所编织的游戏，注定会脱离所有人的掌控。
Just like fifteen years ago, the IPC wants to control everything. However, a game woven by the most fickle of Aeons is destined to slip through everyone's grasp.
我收到「异常防御部」给的通报——{NICKNAME}想必也知道了，鸽川区发生了一起凶案，有人血洗了共愿帮的总部，并且留下了当年告死魔才会留下的杀人痕迹…「绽放血手」。

I received a report from the Department of Aberration Defense. I'm sure {NICKNAME} must also have heard. There's been a brutal incident in Dovebrook District. Someone massacred everyone at the headquarters of the Synwish Syndicate, leaving a signature that only the Herald of Death would use... the "Bloody Bloom."
What? The Herald of Death is still alive?
The Herald of Death is back at the Games?
这真的是上一次的告死魔？
Is this really the same Herald of Death as before?
「异常防御部」的人告诉我，作为谒者的告死魔在接受审判后早已被处死了。就算复活，受规则的限制，同一人也无法两次成为谒者。

People at the Department of Aberration Defense told me that the Herald of Death was executed after his verdict was passed. Even were he to be resurrected, the rules dictate that the same person cannot become a Supplicant twice.
你是说，有人在模仿他犯罪？
Are you saying we've got a copycat?
没错，告死魔出现了模仿犯。但更让我担心的是，这场幻月游戏被比告死魔更可怕的东西盯上了。
That's right. The Herald of Death has a copycat. But what I find even more worrying is that this Phantasmoon Games has caught the attention of something even more terrifying than the Herald of Death.
我认为，无论这个告死魔二代是否与幻月游戏有关，<color=#dbc291ff>击败他，会是{NICKNAME}向整个二相乐园展现无名客信念的好机会。</color>

I believe that whether or not this Herald of Death copycat has a connection to the Phantasmoon Games, <color=#dbc291ff>defeating him presents an excellent opportunity for {NICKNAME} to demonstrate the resolve of the Nameless to the whole of Planarcadia.</color>
Just as you did all those years ago.
至于爸爸，最近有什么主顾的委托吗？你最好先离开这个世界一阵子。
As for you, Dad, have any clients commissioned you lately? It'd be best if you left this world for a while.
我可以把这句话理解为女儿对爸爸的关心吗？
May I take that as my daughter showing concern for her dad?
你可以把这句话理解为，星穹列车提供的安全建议。
You can take it as a safety advisory from the Astral Express.
还有，由于{NICKNAME}已加入了幻月游戏，成为谒者，我会全力支持{F#她}{M#他}的行动。我们家世代传承的欢愉假面，我想暂时交由{F#她}{M#他}来保管。

Also, as {NICKNAME} has already become a Supplicant and joined the Phantasmoon Games, {M#he}{F#she} will have my full support. I'd like {M#him}{F#her} to temporarily keep the Mask of Elation that has been passed down through our family.
这个时候我也不应该提任何反对意见，对吧？好，面具就留在这个孩子手上吧。
Too late for me to raise any objections at this point, right? Sounds good, the mask stays with the kid.
Thank you. Would you like another drink?
我明白了，接下来该是送客时间了对吧？我在这里确实呆得够久了。
Got it. Next, it's time to show me the way out, isn't it? I've definitely overstayed my welcome.
我一生中大部分时候都没法陪伴在女儿的身旁。眼下有机会了，女儿却希望我离开。
For most of my life, I couldn't be there for my daughter. And now that I finally have the chance, she wants me to leave.
那么，我也该告辞了，两位。
In that case, I ought to be on my way.
姬子，关于「幻月游戏」，绘世家族的先祖曾留下过一些记录。晚些时候来学校图书馆一趟，我把它们交给你。
Himeko, the Graphia family has a number of records about the Phantasmoon Games, passed down through the generations. Come over to the school library later, I'll give them to you.
抱歉，父亲来这儿逛一圈，让整个列车的气氛都尴尬了起来。
I apologize. My father's little tour seems to have made things awkward for everyone on the Express.
走吧，我们去观景车厢慰问一下瓦尔特和小三月。父亲走了，大家也不用这么拘束了。
Let's head to the Parlor Car and check in on Welt and March. Now that my father's gone, we can all relax a bit.
先等一下，我想和你聊聊…
Just a moment, I wanna chat with you...
幻月游戏的目标，我有想法…
I have an idea regarding the goal of the Phantasmoon Games...
嗯，我让他先回家了，毕竟，「幻月游戏」的事情本就和他无关。
Yes, I told him to head home for now. After all, what is going on with the Phantasmoon Games has nothing to do with him.
真抱歉，各位，把家事带到了列车上来。
I'm really sorry, everyone, for bringing my personal family matters onto the Express.
没有的事儿，隆介叔叔是姬子姐的家人，也就是我们的家人了。一家人最重要的就是齐齐整整啦，我们很欢迎他时不时来列车玩玩。
Not at all! Mr. Ryusuke is your family, and that makes him part of our family too. And the most important thing for family is to be together, so he's welcome to drop by any time!
就在刚才，真珠女士发来信息，想邀请星穹列车的谒者见个面。她会派出专车在某个地方等候我们。
Madam Pearl sent a message to the Express just now, inviting our Supplicant to a meeting. She'll have a private car waiting for us.
嗯，会面的地点不是什么气氛严肃的会客室。她希望我们去她名下企业的总部大楼做客参观。
Yes. The meeting won't be held in some stuffy formal reception room. She would like us to visit and tour the headquarters of a company under her name instead.
姬子，你知道「珠星财团」的吧？
Himeko, you know about Pearluxe Corp, right?
嗯，二相乐园最大的综合娱乐公司。
Of course, it's the biggest entertainment conglomerate in Planarcadia.
不错，在动画、漫画、游戏、玩具之类的娱乐消费品领域，珠星财团都能算得上独霸半壁江山的巨头。
That's right, Pearluxe Corp is a titan, dominating the entertainment consumer market, including cartoons, comics, games, toys, and the like. They've cornered half the market.
啊，「珠星」的「珠」，原来是这个意思啊。
Oh! So that's where the "Pearl" in Pearluxe comes from! It's a play on her name!
那么，真珠有没有提起她想聊什么？
Did Pearl mention what she wanted to talk about?
说的不多，但她明确提到想和我们磋商「幻月游戏」的后续进展——还说可以为我们提供一些小小的帮助。
She didn't say much, but she specifically mentioned wanting to discuss the developments regarding the Phantasmoon Games. And that she could provide us with a bit of help.
为星神游戏里的对手提供帮助？看来她确实考虑过我们的「共同进退」。也许她应该意识到了，「幻月游戏」是无法被人为操控的。
Helping her opponents in the Aeonic game? Looks like she realizes we are all in the same boat. Perhaps she has also realized that the Phantasmoon Games cannot be artificially manipulated.
在{NICKNAME}和她碰面之后，也许我们也能更清楚真珠的意图了。
We may be able to get a clearer picture of Pearl's intentions after {NICKNAME} meet with her.
You're really going to have me meet with Pearl?
You know I'm not the best with words, right?
你好好想想，这一路来你和不少派系的重要人物都打过照面，有些甚至谈得上交情了。你可是个能独当一面的无名客了啊。
Think about it. You've already crossed paths with key figures from numerous factions, and even built rapport with some. You're already a capable Nameless who can more than hold your own!
虽然真珠身居这颗星球管理者的高位，但她同时也是石心十人之一，你已经和砂金打过不少交道了，对于如何应对石心十人的成员应该颇有经验了。

Though she holds a high administrative position on this planet, do not forget she is also one of the Ten Stonehearts. You've already dealt with Aventurine on numerous occasions, so you should have ample experience handling members of the Ten Stonehearts.
别担心，真要出了岔子，还有机灵的本姑娘在！
Hey, don't worry! If things do get messy, yours truly is here to save the day!
看来小三月也想一起去参观啊。
Looks like March wants to visit too.
我这不是担心{NICKNAME}嘛，就算局势有变，真珠总不能对{F#咱们两个}{M#一个}可可爱爱的小姑娘发火吧。
I'm just trying to look out for {NICKNAME} here! Even if things do go sideways, Pearl wouldn't dare get mad at {M#an}{F#two} adorable young {M#lady}{F#ladies} like {M#me,}{F#us,} right?
那么，这场会面就拜托你们了。
Well then, I'll leave this meeting to you two.
Aren't you coming with us, Himeko?
我想和父亲谈谈，他不是要把家史里有关幻月游戏的记录交给我么…何况，这也是你们年轻人独当一面的好机会呀？

I'd like to talk with my father. Didn't he say he would hand over the records about the Phantasmoon Games from our family history to me...? And honestly, isn't this a good chance for you youngsters to handle things independently?
我明白了，那么，我和{NICKNAME}，还有小三月这就出发了。
I understand. In that case, {NICKNAME}, March, and I will be heading out now.
专车接送，好耶！那碰头的地方又在哪儿？
Score, a private car! So, where are we getting picked up?
你们应该不陌生，就在@广场的大门下。
You should be familiar with it. It's just under the giant gate next to the @ Plaza.
那不就是我们第一次遇到火花的地方嘛？既然安排了专车接送，怎么不上门啊。
Isn't that where we first met Sparxie? Since we're getting chauffeured there, why not just come straight to us?
这不正好给你机会逛街吗？
Isn't this the perfect chance to do some shopping?
看来专车不止接咱们啊？
Looks like we're not the only ones getting picked up, then.
也好，我一直想顺路去漫画店买上一本《苍天航路绒绒号》呢。
Perfect! I've been wanting to stop by the comic store to grab a copy of Fluffy Across the Blue.
出发，珠星总部！顺路再买上一本绒绒号的漫画，计划完美！
Destination, Pearluxe Headquarters! And let's grab a copy of "The Fluffy" while we're at it. This is just perfect!
{NICKNAME}, we'll head out when you're ready.
也许家史里会有些信息对我们有所帮助…只是一想到要和父亲谈话，难免有些浑身不自在。
There may be some information in the family records that could help us... It's just that whenever I think about talking with my father, I can't help feeling uneasy.
That's not a Himeko we see very often.
哈哈…平日里一直装作气定神闲的我，也会有让大家看笑话的一天。{NICKNAME}，这样一想，是不是去见真珠也没什么可怕的？

Haha... Even someone like me, who is always putting on a composed front, can end up giving everyone a laugh. When you think about it like that, {NICKNAME}, the meeting with Pearl doesn't seem so scary, now does it?
呃，杨叔说，想听听姬子和她老爸之间发生了什么……
Uh, Mr. Yang said he wants to hear what happened between Himeko and her dad...
真别怪杨叔八卦，我也很想听。
Can't blame him for being curious, I really wanna know too!
哇，他们走了…第一次看到姬子姐用这么冷的口气对人说话。
They left... Whoa, that's the first time I've seen Himeko be that cold to anyone.
啊，这儿有家便利店。我想捎带买一本《苍天航路绒绒号》的漫画可以吗？
Ah, look! There's a convenience store. Mind if I grab a copy of Fluffy Across the Blue while we're waiting?
就是那个以列车冒险故事为原型的漫画吗？哈哈，作者倒是挺会捕捉时事热点的。
Is that the comic based on the Express's adventures? Haha, the author sure knows how to tap into what's trending.
最讨巧的是，这位作者把咱们几个都画成了可可爱爱的小动物，很符合咱们的人设嘛！
The best part is that the author drew all of us as adorable little animals! Totally fits our personas, don't you think?
我也是，我也是啦！这是个群像漫画啊！
Hey, so am I! It's an ensemble comic!
The author is totally infringing on our IP!
很遗憾，按泛银河贸易体系遵守的知识产权法规定，取用现实经历进行创作并不侵犯谁的权利。
Unfortunately, according to the intellectual property protection laws governing the Pan-Cosmic Trade System, using real-life experiences as creative material doesn't infringe on anyone's rights.
最近绒绒号还宣布了动画化的消息，动画版权如今就握在珠星手中。
In fact, it was recently announced that The Fluffy is getting an animated adaptation, and the copyright for it is currently held by Pearluxe Corp.
这么值得纪念的漫画，看到了无论如何得捎带一本吧。等我几分钟哦，不会耽误太久的。
It's a super memorable comic! No way can I miss getting a copy while I'm here. I promise I won't be long, a couple of minutes, tops!
看情况，我们似乎也是到的早了些。打从来到这个世界，我还没好好看看这里的街景。不如这样，我们几分钟后在广场大门的@下面会合。

Looks like we got here on the early side. Hmm, since coming to this world, I still haven't had a chance to get a street-level view of the city. How about this: We'll meet up under the @ at the Plaza gate in a few minutes.
我好几次想去店里买一本绒绒号的漫画，但发现都卖空啦。希望在这家店里能买到。
I've tried buying a copy of "The Fluffy" from a couple of stores, but they were always sold out! I really hope this store has it in stock.
《苍天航路绒绒号》最新话出了，你看了吗？
Have you read the new chapter of Fluffy Across the Blue?
不好意思，我不喜欢这么低龄向的作品。
Sorry, I'm not into comics for kids.
漫画里那个帕姆大机器人公开了官方设定图！
They just released the official concept art for that giant Pom-Pom Robot!
这么没有现实感的机设到底有什么好看的？
That mech design is totally unrealistic... What's so great about it?
你会不会和人聊天！你会不会和人聊天！
Do you have the slightest clue how to talk to other people!? DO YOU!?
别生气嘛，要是破晓战队和浣熊合体的话，我就感兴趣了！
Hey, relax! Now, if we were talking about a fusion between Daybreak Squadron and the raccoon, that would totally get my attention!
你听说了吗…绘世学院那边的谒者大战？
Hey, you hear the news? ...There was a Supplicant battle at Graphia Academy.
看到了，网上的帖子早就聊了好几页了。
Yeah, I saw it. The online forums are already blowing up.
那个叫火花的谒者…好可怕，她居然用直播散布模因病毒！哇，太歹毒了吧。这么危险的家伙，「异常防御部」也不管管！

The Supplicant called Sparxie... How terrifying! Actually using livestreams to spread memetic viruses! Aeons, that's just evil. I can't believe the Department of Aberration Defense is letting someone that dangerous run loose!
听说直播间已经被永久封禁了，得亏那个星穹列车的无名客动作迅速。
I heard her livestream got permabanned. Good thing that Nameless from the Astral Express acted so quickly.
下一个出现的谒者又会做些什么啊？
I wonder what the next Supplicant will do?
咱们到广场的大门下了。怎么没瞧见公司打扮的人啊？
Well, we're here. So, where are they? I don't see anyone in IPC uniform.
也许对方路上堵车耽搁了。
Maybe they got stuck in traffic on their way over.
Maybe we got the wrong time?
约定的时间是现在没错…也许是对方路上堵车耽搁了。
This is the time we agreed on, no mistake about that... Maybe they got held up in traffic.
不会吧，都是大公司的专业人士，怎么会招呼都不打就鸽了咱们。
No way! They're professionals, and they work for a huge company! There's no way they'd just bail without saying anything.
星穹列车的诸位，你们好！很荣幸能接待各位前往参观总部大厦！
Greetings, crew of the Astral Express! It is my honor to escort you on your visit to headquarters!
我是珠星造「卫」<unbreak>100086</unbreak>号机，商务科的特别安保专员，我被赋予的人类称呼是费伦，听说来自某个古老语言中的「铁」，很高兴为您效劳。

I am Guard number <unbreak>100086</unbreak>, created by Pearluxe Corp, a security specialist from the Business Division. My designated human name is Feiron, said to derive from an ancient language meaning "iron." It's a pleasure to be of service.
Wow, a mechatron employee, how cool is that!
能听到您这样说，我深感荣幸。
I'm truly honored to hear you say so.
珠星目前在职员工中有<unbreak>16%</unbreak>的比例为机铠职员。在一些商务接待与安保场合，机铠能发挥比人类员工更好的保护作用，且更具惊异感和观赏性。

At present, <unbreak>16%</unbreak> of Pearluxe Corp's active workforce are mechatrons. In specific business and security contexts, they outperform human staff in protective capability and offer a stronger sense of spectacle and visual appeal.
诸位脸上的笑容和惊讶，是对我最佳的褒扬。
The smiles on your faces and looks of surprise are the highest praise I could ask for.
How long have you been waiting here?
各位不必在意，今天我被安排的唯一工作就是确保大家顺利和愉快地到达珠星的本部大楼。
Please, do not concern yourselves with such things. My sole duty today is to ensure everyone reaches Pearluxe headquarters safely and happily.
那咱们还等什么呢，这就走吧？
So, what're we waiting for? Let's go!
按照真珠女士秘书的吩咐，还有一位客人要我顺道迎接。
According to the instructions given to me by Madam Pearl's secretary, there is still one more guest I need to pick up.
我怎么就没想到呢…咱们竟是同路人。
Well, now how did I not see this coming... Looks like we're going the same way after all.
机铠，接下来咱们怎么走，是进到你的座舱里，还是你背着大家飞过去？
Hey, Mechatron, what's the plan? Do we hop into your cockpit, or are you gonna give us all a piggyback while you fly over?
专车已经就位，请各位入座。
Your ride is ready. Please, take your seats, everyone.
Whoa, now that's what I call a custom paint job.
这并非一般商务接待车，而是我们为了迎接贵客而专门定制的车辆。
Your ride isn't your run-of-the-mill business car, but a customized made-to-order vehicle, used especially for receiving guests.
抱歉，虽然有些不合时宜，但我还是想问个问题——这辆车的司机席，真的能坐下费伦先生吗？
Sorry, this might come across as a bit insensitive, but I have to ask: Can Feiron actually fit in the driver's seat?
How are you gonna drive this thing?
当然是不行的。但这辆车将会由我远程驾驶和监护。贵客们，请上座吧。
Of course not. I'll be driving and monitoring this vehicle remotely. Please, take your seats.
Might as well take a look around, then.
模糊二维马老师，永远的神！
What happened in the newest issue?
严禁剧透！看完不要告诉我啊！
No spoilers! If you've already read it, don't tell me a thing!
《苍天航路绒绒号》最新话出了，你看了吗？
Have you read the new chapter of Fluffy Across the Blue?
真是太疯狂了！你有看我发的帖吗？
Absolutely insane! Did you see the post I shared?
您好，想了解一下幸福微笑研究会吗？
Hello there! Would you like to learn more about the Research Society of Happy Smiles?
So, uh... are there any charges or fees?
这不是「路过的名侦探」吗？他在这儿干什么？
Isn't that "Detective Passerby"? What's he doing here?
工作、生活压力沉重到压得人喘不过气来？请您务必了解一下「幸福微笑研究会」。
Is the weight of work and stress in your life crushing you? Check out the Research Society of Happy Smiles!
请放心，加入研究会唯一需要的是您抽出一点宝贵时间就好。
Rest assured, the only thing joining our Research Society will cost you is a bit of your precious time.
我们在鸽川附近设有宣讲会场，在那里我们会向所有来客提供免费的心理疏导和生活帮助——所有的服务全都是免费的。
We've set up a venue near Dovebrook, where we offer free psychological counseling and living assistance to all visitors. All our services are provided free of charge.
我…我有一位过世的朋友提到过你们。他曾跟我说过，要是遇到什么困难，可以求助有研究会的好心人——
I... I had a friend who passed away, and he'd mentioned you before. He told me that if I ever ran into trouble, the kind people at the Research Society would help me...
您的朋友身故了？真令人悲伤啊。但他给您留下的遗言确实为您指明了人生道路。
Your friend passed away? How terribly sad. But the words he left you have illuminated your path in life.
他告诉我，加入幸福微笑研究会，就能永远消除痛苦，得到幸福的笑容。这是真的吗？
He told me that if I joined the Research Society of Happy Smiles, I could get rid of my suffering forever, and be eternally happy. That true?
当然是真的。看看周围这个社会，人人彼此猜忌，相互漠视，为了一点点欢乐和刺激就铤而走险。
Of course it's true. Just look at the society we live in. Everyone's suspicious and dismissive of one another, and willing to take dangerous risks just for a little pleasure, for a thrill.
您听说了吧，有个主播占据了绘世学院，想通过网络撒播模因病毒。而鸽川那边的帮派仇杀火并，死掉了好些人。愿欢愉之主普救众生。

Did you hear about how a streamer took over Graphia Academy and was trying to spread a memetic virus through the internet? And over in Dovebrook, gang violence erupted, and left a pile of corpses in its wake. May the Master of Elation save us all.
研究会的成立初衷，正是为了治疗人类内心无法愈合的伤痛。它奉行阿哈的宗旨，要将笑声遍洒人间，消除一切痛苦。
The Research Society was founded with the sole purpose of healing humanity's incurable inner pain. Following Aha's creed, we aim to spread laughter across the mortal coil and eliminate all suffering.
Eliminate all suffering... what's that mean?
当然就是字面意义上的，就像是用橡皮将铅笔的涂鸦擦掉一样，抹掉痛苦。
Exactly what it says. As an eraser wipes away the doodles of a pencil, so too shall the pain be wiped away.
消除痛苦…怎么可能做到？
Eliminate all suffering... No way is that possible.
当然能做到，这里可是受到欢愉之神赐福的世界，阿哈向我们许诺了幸福的权利。
Of course it's possible! For this is a world blessed by the God of Elation, where Aha has granted us the right to happiness.
两位，你们是否听说过十五年前「血涂游戏」的悲剧呢？
Have either of you heard about the tragedy of the "Bloodstained Games" fifteen years ago?
不愧是星穹列车的大明星啊，连十五年前的旧事都打听得一清二楚。
Why of course you have, you're the Astral Express's superstar! You've even dug up everything there is to know about something that happened over a decade ago!
这可不行啊，星穹列车的大明星，要加入幻月游戏，许多事情可得打听清楚才行。
That won't do at all! You're the Astral Express's superstar, there's a ton of things you need to look into before joining the Phantasmoon Games.
在上一次幻月游戏中，有许多人因为意外，失去了自己的亲人与子女。他们的内心仿佛被痛苦凿开了一个怎么也无法填满的空洞，余生只能和悲伤为伴。

There was an awful accident during the last Phantasmoon Games, and many people lost their loved ones and children. It was as if a hole that could never be filled had been drilled into their hearts, leaving only sorrow to accompany them for the rest of their lives.
为了能摆脱痛苦，这些失去挚爱至亲的人们聚集起来，成立了受害者互助协会。这就是幸福微笑研究会的前身。
To escape their suffering, these people who had lost their loved ones gathered together and established a mutual support association. This was the Research Society of Happy Smiles' predecessor.
十多年过去了，研究会正在帮助越来越多的人走出生命中的黑暗，踏入更幸福光明的未来。
It's now been well over a decade, and the Research Society continues to help more and more people emerge from the darkness in their lives and step into a brighter, happier future.
对了，如果您这样的知名人士也对研究会感兴趣的话，那可就太好了！之后闲暇时间，请务必来我们的互助会看看！

Come to think of it, it would be most wonderful if a distinguished person like yourself were also interested in our Research Society! Should you find yourself with a moment to spare, please come and visit our mutual aid society!
「星穹列车的大明星」…看来咱俩还真是冤家路窄啊。
Well, if it isn't the "Astral Express's superstar"... Of course it's you. Looks like we really were bound to run into each other.
路过的名侦探，你在干嘛？
What, here to catch me again?
怎么会，你可是刚刚拯救了二维市的英雄，对你下手可是会触犯众怒的。
Perish the thought! You're the hero who just saved Duomension City! Laying a hand on you would spark public outrage.
我出现在这里，当然是在干侦探该干的活儿。但是，你搞砸了我的调查！
I'm here to do my job. Problem is, you've gone and messed up my investigation!
当我装作一个经济拮据的路人，想要打入这个可疑研究会的当口，你最好对我视而不见，而不是像个平易近人的大明星走进超市一样，从推销员口中接过我的话头。

Here I was, pretending to be a broke passerby to infiltrate this shady "Research Society." You should've ignored me, but no, you acted like some approachable celebrity waltzing into a supermarket, hijacking my conversation with their recruiter.
你这样的名人一出现，我连探探口风都不成了。
With a star like you here, I can't even test the waters anymore.
You're investigating some roadside charity group?
「幸福微笑研究会」…这算什么路边的慈善团体。
The "Research Society of Happy Smiles"... You think they're just some random charity outfit?
你应该知道鸽川那边共愿帮的血案吧？我在查的事情也许和这个「幸福微笑研究会」有关。但多的我不想说了，横竖你不会掏钱买我的情报，而且这事也和你没什么关系。

You must've heard about the Synwish Syndicate killings in Dovebrook, right? The lead I'm following might be connected to this "Research Society of Happy Smiles." But I'll stop there. Not like you're going to pay for my intel, and none of this is any of your business anyway.
我有认识的人死在那里。
Someone I knew died in that incident.
…啊，从你的社交关系判断，你说的死者该不会是现场唯一的公司倒霉蛋吧？
...Ah. Based on your social circle, you wouldn't be talking about the poor IPC sap who was unlucky enough to be there?
{F#小姑娘}{M#小子}，眼神不错啊。惹到你这样的人，对他们而言算是惹到个大麻烦了。
Sharp eyes, {M#kid.}{F#missy.} Anyone who messes with someone like you is in for a nasty surprise.
我理解。你的眼神里还藏着一点犹豫。
I get it. I can see there's still a bit of doubt in your eyes.
打败告死魔，算替他报仇。
I plan on defeating the Herald of Death. That counts as revenge.
喔，所以你的下一个「奇迹」是…「处决告死魔」？倒也不意外。
Oh, so your next "miracle" will be... executing the Herald of Death? Can't say I'm surprised.
请小心，犯下这个案子的「告死魔」很危险。
Be careful, the murderer is the Herald of Death. He's dangerous.
哈哈哈…谢谢你的关心。「小心」…很久没人对我说这两个字了。
Hahaha... Thanks for your concern. "Be careful"... Been a hot minute since anyone said that to me.
不过，查清这桩案子是我的义务。哪怕没人为此掏钱，我也会查出凶手，将他就地正法。
Even so, it's my duty to solve the case. Doesn't matter if nobody pays me, I'll still find the killer, and exact justice on the spot.
因为受害人中有一个和我私交还算不错的笨蛋。
Because one of the victims happened to be someone I was on fairly good terms with... the fool.
A friend of yours was among the victims?
嗯，一个和我私交还算不错的笨蛋。
Mm. A fool I happened to be on fairly good terms with.
帮派分子死于仇杀、火并…这些都不意外。但死于某个疯子取乐般的虐杀，我不能接受。
Revenge killings or turf wars... wouldn't be unusual for gang members to die like that. But dying at the hands of some psycho who kills for kicks? That, I can't accept.
无论身在银河中的哪个世界，哪个时代，无论文明如何变化，有些规则永远不会被改变……
No matter where you are in the cosmos, which era, regardless of how civilization evolves, some rules will just never change...
比如「以牙还牙，以眼还眼」。
Like "an eye for an eye, a tooth for a tooth."
哎嘿，{NICKNAME}！今天本姑娘真是好运！居然让我买到了便利店里最后一本漫画——啊，这位是？
Hey, {NICKNAME}! Guess which lucky girl just managed to snag the last copy in the whole store— Oh! Uh, who's this?
自我介绍一下，名侦探，不死途。和你的这位朋友可谓是不打不相识的关系。
Allow me to introduce myself. I am Ashveil, the famous detective. You could say your friend and I are acquainted through past clashes.
怎么说我们也是在「酒馆」打过照面的。
We did have a bit of a clash of opinions back at the tavern did we not?
原来是这么一个「打」啊？好吧。
That's what you meant by "clash"? Fair enough.
I—I don't really know this guy.
My, my, celebrities truly are heartless...
还是第一次听人介绍自己是名侦探的……
First time I've ever heard anyone introduce themselves as a "famous" detective...
不死途先生，你总盯着我干嘛？我脸上有什么奇怪的东西嘛？
Mr. Ashveil, why are you staring at me? Is there something weird on my face?
那个…小妹妹，你怀里那本，是《苍天航路绒绒号》对吧？能不能请你把这本漫画让给我？
Um... young lady, you're holding a copy of Fluffy Across the Blue, right? Would you mind giving it to me?
让给你…可这是店里的最后一本漫画？
Give it to you...? This was the last copy in the store, you know!
这样啊，当然，我不是让你白给。我会付钱的！这本漫画的原价是…三百信用点？我可以十倍收购，三千信用点，怎么样？

Ah, I see... Of course, I'm not asking you to give it away for free. I'll pay for it! The retail price is... <unbreak>300</unbreak> credits? I can pay you ten times sticker price... <unbreak>3,000</unbreak> credits, what do you say?
大叔，这根本不是钱的事情！
Hey, mister, this isn't about the money!
喔？是因为这是店里的最后一本漫画？确实。最后一本漫画，就好像盘子里的最后一块蛋糕，原野上的最后一只猎物，总能激起人得之而后快的胜负欲，所以——

Oh? Because it was the last one on the shelves? True, true. The last item in stock is like the final slice of cake on a plate, the last prey animal on the plains. It never fails to stir our urge to seize it before anyone else. So—
三、三万信用点怎么样？不能再多了！我手头也不阔绰啊。
Th-thirty thousand credits, how about that? That's my final offer! I'm not exactly rolling in money here.
...Why are you fighting over a comic book with a kid?
你早过了看漫画的年纪了吧？
Aren't you a bit too old for stuff like this?
其实，我是为那个死去的笨蛋朋友买的。
Truth is, I'm actually buying it for that foolish friend of mine, the one who died.
今天是他的告别仪式，我想着买一本他最喜欢的漫画去祭奠他。
Today is his farewell ceremony. I thought I'd buy him his favorite comic to pay my respects.
这家伙闲聊时总会跟我说什么浣熊和球棒，什么列车的旅程永远不会结束之类的，听得耳朵都起茧子了。

Ha, he'd always be rambling on about some raccoon with a baseball bat, and how the journey of the Express would never end, that kinda stuff. I heard those stories so many times, it felt like my ears were gonna fall off.
但是…刚刚那一番折腾，我居然错过了这附近店里的最后一本漫画！
But... after all that fuss, I completely missed the chance to buy it! Every store around here is sold out!
唉，好了好了！本姑娘最听不得这种让人心碎成八瓣的话。不死途先生，这本漫画你先拿走吧！
Aww, that's enough! My poor little heart can't handle sob stories like that. Here, Mr. Ashveil, take the comic!
谢谢你的漫画，小妹妹。这三万信用点，还请你收好！
Thank you very much for the comic, young lady. Here's the <unbreak>30,000</unbreak> credits, as promised!
对了，听说你们就是这本漫画的角色原型，能请你们顺道帮我签个名吗？
Oh! I heard you're the real-life inspirations for the characters. Since you're here, could I perhaps trouble you to sign it?
谢谢二位。恶水这家伙要是泉下有知，他应该会很开心的。
Thank you both. If Caustide could see this from where he is now, I'm sure he'd be smiling down on us.
作为报答，{NICKNAME}，我想给你一些善意的提醒：我知道你打算将「告死魔」作为展示自己英雄形象的目标。
As a token of my gratitude, I'd like to give you a friendly word of caution, {NICKNAME}: I know you plan to target the Herald of Death and cement your heroic image.
不过，在「幻月游戏」的舞台上，当所有人的目光都注视着你的时候，还是谨慎行事为妙。
However, all eyes will be on you during the Phantasmoon Games. On such a public stage, discretion would be wise.
因为当你向那些普通人展示超然的奇迹和力量时，他们的「愿力」也随时可能会成为恐慌、嫉恨的「怨力」——只是个文字游戏，你懂我意思就好。

Because when the masses see your magnificent miracles and wield your extraordinary power, fear and jealousy could turn their "Wishpower" into "Wish-you-ill-power" at the drop of a hat. Forgive the expression, but you get what I mean.
所以，不管你对这位「告死魔」有什么想法，复仇这样容易脏手的事，还是交给我这样压根不在乎胜负的人，如何？
So, whatever plans you might have for this Herald of Death, why not leave the whole messy affair of revenge to someone who couldn't care less about winning or losing, like me?
和这本漫画一样，对他，我志在必得。
Just like this comic. I'm dead set on getting him.
看来，我们会成为对手啊…
Looks like we're going to be rivals...
Is he an acquaintance of yours?
是个路过的奇怪的侦探大叔。
He's just some weird detective who was passing by.
时候差不多了，该去和珠星的迎接人碰头了。
It's nearly time for Pearluxe Corp to pick us up. We should get going.
一段时间后，你和三月前去拜访绒绒号的作者……
After some time, you and March pay a visit to the author of The Fluffy...
模糊二维马…真是好奇怪一个名字。
《苍天航路绒绒号》的作者为什么要起这样一个笔名？
Why would the author of Fluffy Across the Blue have such a pen name?
画漫画画到视线模糊了。
Maybe the author's eyes went blurry after too much drawing.
你这完全是望文生义吧。但…也很有可能！
You're taking it a bit too literally. But... it's not impossible!
真的假的？唔，通常来说笔名代表作者的个性……
Really? A pen name often says a lot about its creator...
嗨呀，能画出这么可爱的漫画，肯定是位性格温柔的作者。
Someone who can draw something that cute must have a warm, gentle heart.
我听说这位老师在杂志上连载这漫画也有小半年了。一开始，绒绒号在二相乐园算不上什么大热作品。
I heard The Fluffy's been running for half a year in a magazine. At first, it wasn't very popular in Planarcadia.
自从老奥帝先生投拍的忆泡电影《圣杯/今晚留下来》大卖后，星穹列车的冒险故事就越来越广为人知了，绒绒号也突然得到关注，大火了起来。
But after that Memory Bubble movie Holy Grail/stay night Old Oti produced became a massive hit, the Astral Express's adventure stories spread far and wide, and The Fluffy started gaining popularity.
据说最新连载的《圣火归还之章•翁法罗斯创世》都卖到脱销了。
Now the latest chapter, The Sacred Flame's Return: Amphoreus's Creation, is sold out everywhere!
这位马老师，对咱们列车一路的冒险过程了解得还真不少，一定是列车组的超银河级大粉丝。
This Colt sure knows a lot about our journey. Must be a galactic fan of the Express Crew.
Come on, what ever happened to trust?
We just gained another loyal fan!
是是是，从珠星大厦回来后，你已经把那位灰烬小弟的故事给咱们讲了十遍了。
Yes, yes. You've told us the story of Cinderborne ten times since we got back from Pearluxe Tower.
我希望他多少给点赔偿。
I still think we deserve royalties though.
你也太现实了，那可是以咱们为主角的漫画欸，人家平白给咱们宣传，你就不能对人家网开一面吗？
Royalties? You're being way too practical. It's a comic where we're the protagonists, someone's giving us free publicity! Can't you cut them a little slack?
按照珠星工作人员给的地址，咱们似乎来到一个熟悉的地方……
According to the address the Pearluxe employee gave us, it looks like we've arrived at a familiar place...
小小一个鸽川区，真是卧虎藏龙。
For such a small place, Dovebrook District is really full of hidden talents.
在第一个路口左走再右转，再往前直走两百米，这是……
Turn left at the first intersection, then turn right. Go straight for two hundred meters. Wait, this is...
难道，绒绒号的作者本人是只狸猫？难怪他几乎不怎么露面？
Don't tell me the author of The Fluffy is actually a furbo! No wonder he rarely shows his face.
吓？一百万？！虚照社长已经拖欠本狸…不是，拖欠全体兄弟好几个月工资哩！要不是为了钱…谁会铤而走险来干八卦记者，偷拍星穹列车的大人物哩？

What? A million!? President Nihilux has already been behind on my... I mean, behind on everyone's wages for months! If it weren't for the money... who'd risk their neck being a tabloid journalist, sneaking photos of the bigwigs on the Astral Express?
让我猜猜，你们下一句要说的是——
Let me guess... Your next line is—
Mmm, I won't say anything then.
虚照小姐，你为什么在这儿？！
Miss Nihilux, what are you doing here!?
怎么啦？作为这家杂志社的创始人兼社长兼总编，我坐在这里，完全合情合理、合乎逻辑。
What's the problem? I'm the magazine's founder, its president, and its editor-in-chief. It's only logical that I'd be sitting here.
你终于想起，为什么「虚照」这两个字总让你隐隐感到熟悉。《狸狸周刊》的前社长，那个逃债失踪的甩手掌柜，正是这个名字。
It finally occurs to you why the name "Nihilux" always felt vaguely familiar. The former president of Furbobo Weekly, that deadbeat boss who skipped town to dodge her debts, went by that exact name.
不发工资的社长，没资格坐在这里，该下地狱哩！
A boss who doesn't pay wages has no right to sit here, they belong in the underworld!
笨蛋，如果没有我，你们早就不知道被「异常防御部」关到哪个画中监狱去了。居然还敢腆着脸向庇护你们的恩人索要工资这种东西。
Idiots. Without me, you'd all have been locked up in some Department of Aberration Defense painting prison long ago. And you still have the gall to demand wages from your savior?
{NICKNAME}，你听说过轰动一时的社会新闻「怪盗变化狸」连环失窃案吗？话说在乐园历<unbreak>1996</unbreak>年——
{NICKNAME}, have you ever heard of the sensational serial thief case "Phantom Furbomorph"? It happened in the year <unbreak>1996</unbreak> of the Arcadian Calendar—
对不起，我错了，我不该顶撞您，生而为狸猫，我很抱歉！
I'm sorry! I was wrong! I shouldn't have talked back! I'm sorry for being born a furbo!
哔啵，就算我们有把柄捏在你手里，但让我们打白工也太狸了个大谱嘞！
Beep-boop! Even if you've got dirt on us, making us work for free is way too ridiculous!
我们已经成功下克上了！我们有了新社长哩！{NICKNAME}社长，请为我们主持公道哩！
We've had enough! We've overthrown the boss! We've got a new President now! {NICKNAME}, please stand up for us!
你们好啊，无名客！狸肉火锅请提前预约，小道消息一万信用点一条，买凶杀人往里直走右拐，那个杂物间里住的家伙就是干这个的。又或者说——

Welcome, {RUBY_B#Nameless}traveler{RUBY_E#}! Furbo hotpot requires a reservation, rumors are <unbreak>10,000</unbreak> credits a piece, and if you're looking to hire a hitman, just head right down the hall to the storeroom. Oh, or maybe—
你们想见那位聪慧过人、八面玲珑、人见人爱的模糊二维马老师？实不相瞒，其实她就是——
You came to meet the brilliant, charming, and universally adored Blurry_QR_Colt? Well then... truth be told, that person is actually—
We should really be charging royalties.
狸了个大谱，我的爪子连笔都握不住，怎么可能画漫画哩！
Holy furboly! My paws can't even hold a pen. How could I possibly draw comics!?
三月，你背着我做漫画家？
March, are you moonlighting as a comic artist behind my back?
嘶…不存在的记忆又增加了。说什么呢你！
Ugh... Even more nonexistent memories. What are you even talking about!?
排除所有错误选项后，真相只有一个——
Once you rule out all the wrong answers, only one truth remains—
这里唯一会画画的人，虚照，你就是模糊二维马！
The only one here who can actually draw is you, Nihilux. You're Blurry_QR_Colt!
哎呀，被看穿了呢。作为识破我伪装的奖励，想要签名还是合照呢？
Ah, you saw right through me. As a reward for seeing through my disguise, how about an autograph or a photo?
重新自我介绍一下，在下虚照，你们也可以称呼我的笔名，模糊二维马。
Allow me to reintroduce myself. I'm Nihilux, you can also call me by my pen name, Blurry_QR_Colt.
难怪你在珠星大厦的时候老跟着我们，还对我们这么熟悉，这就不奇怪了，等等……
No wonder you were tagging along back at Pearluxe Tower, acting like you knew us so well. Wait...
「模糊二维马」这个身份，不会也是冒名顶替的吧？
This "Blurry_QR_Colt" persona isn't a fake, is it?
所谓身份，不过是一张面具和一副皮囊，是真是假，只取决于看待它的角度。
Identity is just a mask and a body. Real or fake, it's all in how you see it.
至少对现在的你们而言，眼下这个地方也没有第二个模糊二维马能到「星铁FES」做现场签售，为星穹列车造势了吧？
At the very least, for now, there's no other Blurry_QR_Colt around who could show up at Star Rail FEST for a live signing and hype up the Astral Express, right?
我们的来意，你都知道了？
So you already know why we're here?
推理，我只是使用了一点推理罢了。
Just a little deduction, that's all.
关于「星铁FES」铺天盖地的宣传都开始在网络上刷屏了。以那位真珠女士万事都谋求尽善尽美的办事态度，她一定会为你们之间的合作创造更多有利条件。

请我出马当然在她的考虑范围内。

不是我自夸，知道《苍天航路绒绒号》在这个世界的人气有多高吗？如果不限票，现场的人排起来能绕整个星球两圈半。
Not to brag, but Fluffy Across the Blue is ridiculously popular in this world. If tickets weren't limited, the line would wrap around the planet twice and a half.
这哪儿是签售会，这不就是上刑场吗？

Yeah, that does sound pretty horrifying.
可能是明天，可能是下个月，总之不是现在。

这我哪儿能知道啊！不都得看你们又去哪儿捅了哪个马蜂窝…咳咳，我是说，不都得看各位去哪儿行侠仗义击败了哪个反派吗？
How should I know!? It depends on what trouble you get yourselves into... Uh, I mean, on where you go and on which villain you heroically defeat!
你用我们的故事挣了不少吧？

你真的有立场拒绝我们吗？虚照老师，你未经许可使用了列车组的肖像权和冒险经历——不掏点什么慰问咱们，说不过去吧。
So tell me, Miss Nihilux, do you really have the right to refuse us? You've used the Crew's likenesses and adventure experiences without permission... Surely you owe us some form of compensation.
…怎怎怎么突然说起这茬来了？

现在，我代表星穹列车乘员组全体向你索赔肖像授权金、精神损失费、误工费共计…

这个金额到底怎么算出来的？
How did you work that out?
说来各位也许难以置信，但是，呃，眼下我的兜里真的分币没有。

不可能吧！光漫画的版税就该让老师你财富自由了——

因为一些不为人知的原因，我这个人的财运嘛…一直不太行。但是，我看得很明白，你们也不是非要我掏钱不可嘛~
Due to... uh, "unknown circumstances," my luck with money hasn't been great. But I get what this is really about. You're not only after cash, are you~
我会出席「星铁FES」的！这样总行了吧！
I'll show up at "Star Rail FEST." Is that good enough for you?
Then it's settled. Thank you, Colt!
不过，相对的，我也希望作为原型的两位能在出席展会前好好了解《苍天航路绒绒号》，免得遇上漫画粉丝时一问三不知。

That said, I also hope the two of you, as the original inspirations, will take some time to familiarize yourselves with Fluffy Across the Blue before attending the exhibition, so you won't be caught off guard by fans' questions.
接下来，是虚照老师的作者小讲堂。请跟我来。

咳咳，马老师的小课堂开课了，有问题的同学记得随时提问。
Ahem—ahem! Miss Nihilux's mini-class is officially in session. If you have any questions, feel free to ask at any time.

Well, I'm all about realism, but sadly, my previous works like Acheron's Godslay, Galaxy Rangers' Saga, and dozens of others all got canceled.
如果不是你们打败了铁墓，热度飙升，这本也要腰斩。下次不要问这么悲伤的问题。
If you hadn't beaten Irontomb and boosted its popularity, this one would've been canceled too. Let's not ask sad questions, alright?
注意看，画面中间的小动物叫球棒浣熊，是《苍天航路绒绒号》的主角。不久前，三月兔和汪汪丹在一个垃圾桶里找到了{F#她}{M#他}。

此时，一只恐怖的怪兽正在空间站肆虐，它向球棒浣熊喷出火焰，但火焰没能穿透垃圾桶，反而点燃了垃圾，弥漫的臭味熏倒了怪兽。

At that moment, a terrifying monster is causing havoc on the space station. It tries to spit fire at Baseball Raccoon, but the flames don't burn through the trashcan. Instead, it sets the trash on fire, and the stench knocks the monster out.
马老师！为什么{F#她}{M#他}是主角？

我、我也对过去一无所知，怎么不选我？
I don't know anything about my past either, so why didn't you pick me?

Even though {NICKNAME} joined the Express the latest, {M#he's}{F#she's} left behind so many stories across different worlds that there are even rumors in the Luofu's prison about {M#him}{F#her} beating up alien lifeforms.

With material this crazy, not making it the main character? I might disagree, but Aha absolutely wouldn't

March, I'll give you the protagonist role for a day.

哇，这幅得意忘形的嘴脸。

So every time you land somewhere, you just run around to get more screen time, huh!?

March, The Fluffy is just a comic. Outside of this, the author and the readers, every character in this world, aren't we all the protagonists of our own lives?
太热血了，马老师，我完全明白了。

于是，脱线的球棒浣熊，寡言的汪汪丹，以及活泼可爱的三月兔，组成了大家喜闻乐见的三人小队。
And so, the unruly Baseball Raccoon, the quiet Woof Woof Dan, and the lively March Bunny formed a trio everyone loves.
Actually, I have a question, too.

Why are they all small animals?
自从吃了销量的铁拳，我就参透了一个宇宙至理——在现代社会，还得是毛茸茸的萌物最吃香。
Ever since I got punched in the face by sales numbers, I've grasped a universal truth: In today's world, fluffy cute animals are always a crowd pleaser.
的确，帕姆的可爱程度，连我都自愧不如……
Seriously, even I feel like I can't compete with Pom-Pom's cuteness...
为了设计成年组的形象，我花了不少功夫。在打败怪兽后，球棒浣熊接受了其他小动物的邀请，登上了全是毛茸茸的绒绒号。
Designing the adult versions took some work. After defeating the monster, Baseball Raccoon accepted an invitation from the other fluffy animals and boarded The Fluffy.

Here, the protagonist meets three big animals with distinct personalities. First, the adorable and universally loved conductor, Pom-Pom.
在它的身旁，是优雅的领航员，姬奇猫小姐。
Beside them is the elegant Navigator, Miss Himekat.
我知道，这是「姬奇猫」，原型是姬子姐——噗，{NICKNAME}，你可别告诉姬子姐啊。
I know, that's Himekat. Her original inspiration is Himeko. Phew, {NICKNAME}, please don't tell her!
至于另一边这只棕色的大狗，说出他的名字，怕吓你们一跳！没错，他就是——
And the big brown dog on the other side, see? His name will shock you! That's right, he's—
